works.title: Regional variability but global flux balance in the deep sulfur cycle
works.abstract: Sulfur is a key volatile that influences Earth’s redox state, climate, and deep geochemical cycles. Subduction zones are the primary pathways carrying sulfur from the surface into the mantle, yet the global sulfur budget and recycling efficiency remain uncertain. Here, we compile a trench-by-trench inventory of subducting sulfur using sediment compositions from ocean drilling programs collected near major trenches, integrated with spatially resolved estimates of oceanic crustal and serpentinite thicknesses derived from seismic data. Our results reveal pronounced spatial heterogeneity in sulfur fluxes, driven by large variations in sedimentary sulfur contents and fundamental tectonic differences between erosive and accretionary margins. Slab-to-arc sulfur recycling efficiency averages 37% globally but varies markedly among individual subduction systems. Despite this heterogeneity, the global sulfur cycle appears balanced on the modern Earth: Sulfur input into the mantle via slab subduction (57 ± 3 Mt y –1 ) is matched within uncertainty by mantle output (~60 ± 14 Mt y –1 ) through mid-ocean ridges, volcanic arcs, and intraplate magmatism. This balance suggests that Earth’s deep sulfur cycle operates in a steady state today. Sulfur isotopes reveal a systematic decoupling, with subducted sulfur carrying negative δ 34 S values, whereas arc sulfur output is consistently positive. The strong spatial variability in sulfur inputs and recycling efficiency underscores the individuality of Earth’s subduction zones, but the balanced input–output fluxes highlight its capacity for self-regulation. These findings have important implications for atmospheric chemistry, surface environments, and the long-term evolution of the deep Earth’s sulfur cycle.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences

summary_bullets.research_question: 全球俯冲带的硫收支是否处于稳态平衡，再循环效率如何？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合大洋钻探沉积物成分与地震数据，构建海沟尺度的俯冲硫通量清单。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 硫输入具有强烈空间异质性，但全球输入（57±3 Mt/y）与输出（~60±14 Mt/y）相平衡。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示俯冲硫循环的区域变异与全球稳态共存的定量平衡机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为深部硫循环的自调节能力提供了关键证据，影响大气化学和长期地球演化理解。

works.title: Water exchange process and bulk composition regulate slab dynamics and deep earthquakes
works.abstract: Water strongly influences deep mantle processes, including geochemical cycles, slab dynamics, and deep-focus earthquakes. Yet the stability and interactions of hydrous minerals with nominally anhydrous minerals (NAMs) under the water-undersaturated conditions of subducting slabs remain unclear. Here we show, using high-pressure and high-temperature experiments on MgO–SiO_2–H_2O systems (~2 wt% H_2O), that hydrous minerals progressively dehydrate in the mantle transition zone, transferring water to NAMs such as wadsleyite and ringwoodite, while the cold slab core stays nearly dry. Rapid dehydration near the top of the lower mantle may generate fluids linked to the deepest earthquakes. Our results indicate that dry olivine transformations, rather than dehydration embrittlement, likely trigger most deep-focus earthquakes, and that hydration variations in NAMs influence slab deformation and stagnation above 660 km. The bulk Mg/Si ratio controls hydrous mineral stability, suggesting harzburgite transports water more efficiently than peridotite. This study shows that minerals within subducting slabs host water unevenly, generating strong hydration gradients through dehydration–hydration reactions in the transition zone. These gradients promote slab deformation and provide a mechanism for the occurrence of deep earthquakes.

works.title: Stable Mg-Zn isotope compositions in Mangaia HIMU lavas as tracers for ancient recycled carbonate
works.abstract: Intraplate lavas with heavy Zn isotopic compositions commonly exhibit light Mg isotope signatures, a pattern interpreted as evidence for recycling of Mg-rich carbonate. We report high-precision Mg and Zn isotopic data for lavas from Mangaia, an extreme HIMU OIB end-member thought to be derived from a CO2-rich parental melt. The Mangaia samples display whole-rock δ26Mg values ranging from −0.76‰ to −0.17‰, while δ66Zn varies narrowly between +0.19‰ to +0.39‰. After excluding samples affected by post-eruption alteration processes, we constrain the primary δ26Mg of the Mangaia lavas to −0.241 ± 0.018‰ (2SE, N = 15), indistinguishable from composition of depleted upper mantle and mid-ocean ridge basalts (MORB). In contrast, the primary δ66Zn is +0.35 ± 0.01‰ (2SE, N = 15), significantly higher than MORB, indicating a unique Mg and Zn isotope composition for the Mangaia mantle source. The elevated δ66Zn can be explained by a contribution of subducted altered oceanic crust (AOC), but a major AOC component is ruled out by petrological evidence for a peridotite-dominated source beneath Mangaia. Binary mixing and melting models show that the HIMU peridotite source was metasomatized by ≤ 10% melt derived from AOC containing 5–10% magnesite. The light Mg isotope signature of magnesite is diluted during mixing with the slab-derived silicates and ambient peridotite, whereas its heavy Zn isotope composition is preserved due to the high Zn concentration in magnesite. The ‘decoupled’ Mg-Zn isotope systematics of Mangaia thus reflect an ancient, well-homogenized carbonate-recycling event. In contrast, the light δ26Mg and heavy δ66Zn observed in some other intraplate basalts are consistent with melts generated directly from carbonate-rich portions of young subducting slabs, prior to extensive dilution by peridotitic mantle. This distinction makes combined Mg-Zn isotope investigations of intraplate lavas a useful tool to distinguish between contrasting carbonate recycling regimes, such as low-flux versus high-flux carbonate-rich melt metasomatism in ancient, hot subduction zones versus young, cold ones.

works.title: Mercury isotopes as a tracer for material cycling at active continental margins
works.abstract: Active continental margins are key settings for magmatic-hydrothermal ore deposits, yet the mechanisms of subduction-driven deep material mobilization and metal enrichment remain a major research focus. Mercury isotopes, with distinct mass-dependent and mass-independent fractionation signatures, provide a powerful tracer for studying Earth’s material cycles. Here we show that mercury isotope analysis of four porphyry copper systems in active continental margins indicate that deep magmatic fluids exhibit positive Δ^199Hg values. This signature, which is also observed in previously documented epithermal gold deposits, resembles that of oceanic sediments. This implies that oceanic slab-derived volatiles play a key role in activating deep-seated materials. Systems hosted in terrigenous clastic rocks exhibit negative δ^202Hg and Δ^199Hg values, indicating the addition of upper crustal fluids. In contrast, hydrothermal systems without intrusions show positive δ^202Hg and slightly negative Δ^199Hg values, suggesting that long-distance fluid migration and water-rock reactions caused mercury isotopic variations and contributed to ore metal re-enrichment. Oceanic slab-derived volatiles play a key role in activating deep-seated materials and driving metal enrichment, according to measurements of fractionation signatures in mercury isotopes from four porphyry Cu systems in active continental margins.

works.title: Carbonate metasomatism in a cold subduction zone: Evidence from pyroxenite-derived mafic rocks of the Banpo backarc basin, southeastern Tibetan plateau
works.abstract: Identifying magmatic rocks related to carbonate metasomatism in cold subduction zones is critical for deciphering carbon cycling dynamics in these settings. This study presents an integrated geochemical investigation of mafic rocks from the Banpo region along the southern margin of the Changning−Menglian orogenic belt, southeastern Tibetan plateau, which is widely recognized as a classic cold subduction zone. The zircon U-Pb age of the Banpo mafic rocks is 295.6 ± 2.8 Ma, indicating that they formed in the Early Permian. They were not significantly affected by crustal contamination, but they were subjected to variable degrees of fractional crystallization of olivine, pyroxene, plagioclase, and ilmenite. Rare earth element (REE) inversion modeling indicates that most samples exhibit 0.5%−20% partial melting of spinel pyroxenite, while a minority are derived from 10% to 25% melting of garnet pyroxenite. The studied rocks exhibit pervasive carbonate metasomatism, evidenced by specific geochemical markers: clinopyroxene with elevated Mg# (>74), high Ca/Al (>5), enriched (La/Yb)N (3.8−12.4), and low Ti/Eu (850−1850). This interpretation is further supported by whole-rock Zr/Hf ratios (24.3−40.27), zircon and feldspar geochemistry, and integrated isotopic signatures. Monte Carlo simulations reveal a low carbonate-carbon flux of only 0.02 Mt/yr in the study area, significantly below global averages. We suggest that primary carbon originates from the fluid-mediated dissolution of carbonates. This decarbonation mechanism dominates in cold subduction zones, where high fluid fluxes—generated by localized dehydration (e.g., breakdown of chlorite or serpentine) at intermediate depths—combine with low temperatures to enhance carbonate solubility. These findings provide the first evidence for carbonate metasomatism in the Changning−Menglian orogenic belt and support an intra-oceanic arc−backarc basin evolution for the Paleo-Tethys Ocean.

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何在冷俯冲带识别与碳酸盐交代作用相关的岩浆岩以揭示碳循环动态？
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合锆石U-Pb定年、全岩及矿物地球化学、同位素分析和蒙特卡洛模拟计算碳通量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 班坡基性岩记录低温俯冲带碳酸盐交代，源自尖晶石/石榴石辉石岩部分熔融，碳通量极低。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在昌宁-孟连造山带发现冷俯冲碳酸盐交代证据，揭示流体溶解碳酸盐脱碳机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解古特提斯洋俯冲带碳循环及弧后盆地演化提供关键观测与定量约束。

works.title: Origin of Early Cretaceous magmatism and its linkage with Cu–Fe–Au skarn mineralization in the Tonglushan ore field, eastern China: Evidence from whole-rock, zircon, and apatite geochemistry
works.abstract: The Tonglushan ore field in the Edong district of the western Middle–Lower Yangtze River Metallogenic Belt hosts a major Cu–Fe–Au skarn system, yet the emplacement ages, petrogenesis, and metallogenic significance of its spatially distributed intrusions remain poorly constrained. We present integrated whole-rock geochemistry, zircon UPb geochronology, zircon trace-element and Hf isotopic data, and apatite SrNd isotopic compositions for quartz monzodiorite porphyry, quartz monzodiorite, quartz diorite, and associated mafic microgranular enclaves (MMEs) from the Tonglushan ore field, together with supplementary data for the Dajipu quartz diorite from the Yangxin pluton. Zircon UPb ages indicate that the intrusive phases and their MMEs were emplaced synchronously at ca. 142–140 Ma. These rocks display high-K calc-alkaline affinities and weakly adakitic signatures, with elevated Sr/Y and (La/Yb)N ratios, and have isotopic compositions resembling those of coeval K-rich mafic rocks in the MLYRB, suggesting derivation from an enriched lithospheric mantle source followed by extensive fractional crystallization. Petrographic and geochemical evidence indicates that the MMEs formed through injection and incomplete mixing of mafic and felsic magmas, with mafic recharge supplying heat, metals, and volatiles to the evolving system. Zircon oxybarometry and zircon-based water-content estimates further show that the more strongly mineralized intrusions were generated from relatively hydrous, oxidized, and more evolved magmas, whereas the relatively barren Zhengjiawan quartz diorite records lower H2O contents and lower to more variable oxidation states. These results indicate that magma fertility in the Tonglushan ore field was jointly controlled by enriched mantle source characteristics, fractional crystallization, mafic recharge, and the development of hydrous and oxidized magmatic systems. More broadly, our results highlight whole-rock and zircon geochemical parameters as useful indicators of intrusion fertility and magmatic controls on Cu–Fe–Au mineralization in arc-related systems.

summary_bullets.research_question: 铜绿山矿田侵入体的侵位时代、岩石成因及成矿意义尚不清楚。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用全岩地球化学、锆石U-Pb-Hf和磷灰石Sr-Nd同位素等多指标联合分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 侵入体同期侵位于~142-140 Ma，源于富集地幔的分离结晶，矿化受水化和氧化的岩浆系统控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用锆石氧逸度和水含量揭示矿化与富水、氧化岩浆的直接联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为弧系统Cu-Fe-Au成矿提供全岩和锆石成分指标作为侵入体肥力评价工具。

works.title: Presubduction heavy Mg isotope enrichment in the sub-arc mantle
works.abstract: Arc lavas with heavier magnesium (Mg) isotope ratios (denoted as δ26Mg) compared to mid-ocean-ridge basalt (MORB) are commonly attributed to the involvement of subducted serpentinite. However, this hypothesis is challenged by the widespread absence of high-δ26Mg serpentinite in the subducting plates beneath Pacific arcs and fails to consider potential δ26Mg heterogeneity in ambient arc mantle. Here, we show that backarc lavas from the Mariana and Ryukyu subduction zones have MORB-like boron (B) isotope compositions and B/Nb ratios, indicative of little subducted serpentinite in their source. Such lavas have similarly high δ26Mg as their arc counterparts, suggesting the ambient arc mantle in this area is intrinsically rich in isotopically heavy Mg. Further analysis of metaserpentinites demonstrates that deserpentinization residues inherit protolith δ26Mg without significant isotope fractionation during dehydration, highlighting the important contribution of deserpentinized peridotite to the high-δ26Mg mantle. We propose that the high-δ26Mg arc lavas are not necessarily related to ongoing serpentinite subduction, especially in fast-spreading ridge systems. On the other hand, long-term recycling of ancient high-δ26Mg serpentinite provides one plausible mechanism for the heavy Mg mantle domain identified beneath the arc systems. This potentially widespread domain in the mantle greatly affects long-term Mg recycling and crust-mantle evolution.

summary_bullets.research_question: 弧熔岩的镁同位素偏重是否必然源于俯冲蛇纹岩的贡献？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过马里亚纳和琉球弧后熔岩的硼同位素和B/Nb比值排除蛇纹岩贡献，并分析变质蛇纹岩的镁同位素行为。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 弧后熔岩具有类似洋中脊玄武岩的硼特征却呈现重镁同位素，表明弧下地幔固有富重镁域。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示弧岩浆重镁同位素不一定依赖同步蛇纹岩俯冲，而可能与古老高δ26Mg地幔域有关。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带镁循环和地壳-地幔演化提供了非蛇纹岩致重镁的新机制，影响全球镁质量平衡研究。

works.title: Modern arc-like water content in the source of 3.1-billion-year-old volcanic rocks
works.abstract: Abstract Whether Archean arc-like volcanism reflects subduction remains debated. We present high-resolution geochemical data from a well-preserved 3.13-3.10 Ga arc-like volcanic succession in Australia’s Pilbara Craton, a rare Archean analog of modern arc volcanism retaining fluid-mobile element concentrations consistent with primary magmatic values. The sequence records three primitive lava series typical of modern arcs: tholeiitic, calc-alkaline, and the oldest stratigraphically extensive genuine boninites. Geochemical modelling shows this melt diversity requires at least two mantle sources with distinct depletion histories. The mantle H 2 O required for fluid-assisted melting to produce these lavas substantially exceeds primitive mantle, approaching the H 2 O-saturated solidus of modern mantle wedges. We infer hydrous melting was triggered by dripduction, the short-lived inclined foundering of hydrated lithosphere without laterally continuous plate boundaries, in an off-plateau setting. Dripduction locally recycled surface water and generated arc-like magmas without self-sustained plate tectonics, possibly promoting mantle-ocean-atmosphere volatile exchange during the Archean.

works.title: Rubidium isotopes reveal no sub-arc melting of altered oceanic crusts in a cold subduction zone
works.abstract: The extent to which partial melting of subducting slabs contributes to arc magmatism beneath sub-arc regions in cold subduction zones remains highly debated. Traditional models emphasize that altered oceanic crust (AOC) undergoes dehydration, while subducted sediments undergo partial melting. However, an increasing number of studies have argued that partial melting of AOC may also be required to account for the trace-element budgets of arc lavas, particularly their elevated Sr concentrations. To investigate whether AOC undergoes partial melting beneath sub-arc regions, we report Rb isotope (δ87Rb) data for the Cretaceous arc basalts and back-arc basalts associated with the cold subduction zone of the Izanagi plate in Eastern China. The δ87Rb values of the basalts show clear variation across the subduction zone, increasing from −0.31 ± 0.45‰ (2SD, N = 9) for the arc basalts to −0.19 ± 0.07‰ (2SD, N = 22) for the back-arc basalts. This across-arc variation in δ87Rb indicates that while partial melting of subducted sediments occurs across the sub-arc and back-arc regions, partial melting of AOC is only evident in the back-arc region, not beneath the sub-arc region. Moreover, negative correlations between δ87Rb and Sr concentrations strongly suggest that the elevated Sr concentrations (385–913 μg/g) of the arc basalts resulted from the subduction input from sediments, rather than AOC melts as has recently been proposed for global data. Similar compositional relations are observed in arc lavas from other cold subduction zones (Izu-Bonin-Mariana and Tonga-Kermadec), which typically exhibit a negative correlation between Sr/Y and 143Nd/144Nd or Nb/U ratios. Together with recent δ87Rb data from the Mariana arc, our results indicate that in cold subduction zones, AOC may not necessarily undergo partial melting beneath the sub-arc region—even though subducted sediments do. Partial melts of metasomatic pyroxenites formed by interaction between sediment melts and the sub-arc mantle peridotites can carry a significant budget of trace elements, including Sr, contributing to arc magmas. The lack of partial melting in AOC beneath sub-arc regions permits the deep transport of water, carbon, and trace elements, with significant implications for mantle heterogeneity, carbon flux imbalance, and global geochemical cycling.

works.title: An early jurassic gold mineralization event in the Liaodong Peninsula, northeastern margin of the North China Craton: evidence from two types of magmatic and hydrothermal apatite in the Linjia deposit
works.abstract: Apatite is a widespread accessory mineral that occurs frequently in magmatic rocks and diverse hydrothermal ore deposits, and its textural features, geochronology, and geochemical signatures offer critical constraints on magmatic activity and metasomatic events. Here, two types of magmatic and hydrothermal apatite were identified by CL imaging in the hydrothermal altered auriferous granite in the Linjia gold deposit, Liaodong Peninsula, northeastern part of the North China Craton (NCC). The magmatic apatite (Ap1) grains with bright CL imaging formed earlier than the hydrothermal apatite (Ap2) crystals with dark CL imaging. The U-Pb dating results suggest the Ap1 formed contemporaneously with magmatic zircon in the granite at ca. 231 Ma, and these Triassic dates define the emplacement age of the ore-hosting granite. By contrast, the Ap2 and hydrothermal rutiles in the mineralized granite and schist both formed at ca. 186 Ma. The hydrothermal Ap2 grains show much higher S contents than the Ap1, suggesting they may be precipitated contemporaneously with sulfides from the S-bearing hydrothermal fluids. In addition, the calculated δ18Ofluid values, relatively high U as well as Th contents, and REE pattern of Ap2 are clearly distinct from metamorphic fluids, but comparable to magmatic‑hydrothermal fluids derived from granitic magmas. The textural, geochemical, and isotopic evidence indicates that Ap2 and rutiles formed from hydrothermal fluids during gold precipitation, and their Early Jurassic U-Pb ages represent the timing of gold mineralization. Based on the above evidence, we infer that Linjia represents an intrusion-related gold deposit related to a buried Early Jurassic felsic intrusion at depth. Importantly, the newly identified gold mineralization in the Linjia deposit coincides with the onset of paleo-Pacific plate subduction beneath the NCC, suggesting that there was a relatively small-scale Early Jurassic gold mineralization related to subduction prior to the ca. 120 Ma large-scale gold accumulation event in the NCC. This study highlights the importance of combining the microtextures, geochronological data, trace elements, and isotopic compositions of individual apatite grains to unravel the genesis of cryptic magmatic and hydrothermal apatite and reconstruct obscure geological events within magmatic-hydrothermal systems.

summary_bullets.research_question: 辽东半岛林家金矿是否存在早侏罗世金成矿事件及其与古太平洋板块俯冲的关系？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过磷灰石CL成像、U-Pb定年、微量元素和氧同位素分析区分岩浆与热液成因。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出约231 Ma岩浆磷灰石与约186 Ma热液磷灰石，后者年龄代表早侏罗世金成矿。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用单颗粒磷灰石微区结构、年代学、地球化学和同位素联合约束隐蔽热液成矿事件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为华北克拉通早侏罗世与俯冲相关的侵入体有关金成矿提供关键证据，拓展区域成矿规律。

works.title: Paleoproterozoic Dongyaozhuang orogenic gold deposit in the Trans-North China Orogen: Constraints from in-situ U-Th-Pb dating of hydrothermal monazite and trace elements and sulfur isotopes of sulfides
works.abstract: The Wutai Complex in the Trans-North China Orogen hosts several significant Precambrian mesothermal, greenstone-hosted gold deposits. However, as in many Precambrian orogenic belts worldwide, these deposits are associated with complex hydrothermal systems involving multistage fluid activity during successive mineralization stages. As a result, their age, origin, evolutionary history, and genetic mechanisms remain poorly constrained. Here, we present in-situ hydrothermal monazite U-Th-Pb geochronological data, together with trace-element and S isotope analyses of multiple generations of pyrite and arsenopyrite, from the representative greenstone-hosted Dongyaozhuang gold deposit in the Wutai Complex. These integrated datasets provide new constraints on the hydrothermal evolution and genesis of the deposit. Gold mineralization occurred in three distinct stages and is represented by veinlet-hosted and disseminated ores: Stage I disseminated pyrite-arsenopyrite assemblages, Stage II quartz-carbonate-pyrite veinlets, and Stage III quartz-chalcopyrite-pyrite veinlets. Six generations of pyrite were identified, including Py1 from Stage I, Py2a, Py2b, and Py2c from Stage II, and Py3a and Py3b from Stage III. Hydrothermal monazite from Stage II gold-mineralized veinlets yielded a mean 232Th/208Pb age of 1846.7 ± 4.7 Ma, which is interpreted as the timing of gold mineralization. This age is inconsistent with regional granitic magmatism at 2560–2515 Ma, 2180–2120 Ma, and ∼1800 Ma, but overlaps with metamorphic and deformational processes related to the Paleoproterozoic orogeny. Most of the gold was precipitated during Stage II, when pyrite commonly developed a complex core-mantle-rim texture. Most sulfide generations show a narrow range of δ34SV-CDT values from −3.7 ‰ to 2.6 ‰, consistent with sulfur mobilization from greenstone wall rocks and its subsequent reprecipitation at the site of ore formation. In contrast, the negative δ34SV-CDT values of Py2a (−6.7 to −2.3 ‰) suggest isotopic fractionation induced by an increase in the pH of the metamorphic ore-forming fluid. These results, together with the geological evidence, indicate that the Dongyaozhuang deposit is an orogenic gold deposit genetically related to regional metamorphism and orogenic deformation associated with the Paleoproterozoic continent-arc-continent collision between the Western and Eastern Blocks.

summary_bullets.research_question: 东腰庄绿岩型金矿的成矿时代、成因及与区域构造演化的关系是什么？

summary_bullets.key_findings: 金矿化发生在约1846 Ma的造山事件中，硫主要来自绿岩围岩，第二阶段为主成矿期。
summary_bullets.innovation: 通过独居石定年精确约束古元古代造山型金矿的成矿时代，并建立多阶段成矿模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为华北克拉通及全球前寒武纪绿岩带造山型金矿的成因与勘探提供关键年代学和地球化学依据。

works.title: Evolution of Sulfur Concentration in the Deep Earth During the Proto‐Earth Growth: First‐Principles Study on the Sulfur Partitioning Between Metal and Silicate at High Pressure and Temperature
works.abstract: Abstract Sulfur (S) is one of the promising light elements that can explain the density deficit of the core. The degree of siderophile nature of S under high pressure and temperature ( P , T ) is the key to estimating the S content in the core. However, a significant discrepancy between the metal‐silicate partition coefficient of S extrapolated from relatively low‐ P and that measured at deep mantle P , T is identified. In this study, we calculate the partition behavior of S between liquid iron and molten silicate in a wide range of P , T conditions using the ab initio thermodynamic integration molecular dynamics approach. The results indicate that S is strongly siderophile at 0–135 GPa and 3,000–5,000K, but the partition coefficient of S () markedly decreases with increasing the oxygen content in liquid iron. The pressure dependence of is also found to change around 20 GPa. These properties might reconcile the experimental conflicts and can be interpreted based on the atomic structures of the liquids. Using the derived , we model the evolution of the S concentrations in the core and mantle during the growth of the proto‐Earth. According to this model, the S concentration retained in the mantle increases as the size of the accreting planetesimals decreases and as the core becomes more oxidized. Our results further indicate that S could be a major light element in the core when the S concentration in the accreting planetesimals is larger than ∼3 mol%.
works.label: consider

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何解释低压与高压实验中硫的金属-硅酸盐分配系数存在的显著差异，并约束地核的硫含量。
summary_bullets.methodology: 使用第一性原理热力学积分分子动力学模拟计算宽广温压条件下的硫分配行为。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 硫在0–135 GPa和3000–5000K下具强亲铁性，但分配系数随液态铁含氧量增加而显著降低，且压力依赖性在约20 GPa发生变化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用从头算方法统一了宽广温压范围内硫分配系数的矛盾实验数据，并揭示了氧含量与压力效应的耦合机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为类地行星增生过程中核幔硫演化建模提供了关键分配系数，可更准确地约束地核轻元素组成。

works.title: Metamorphic sulfur release as a driver of sustained cooling and mass extinction
works.abstract: The emplacement of large igneous provinces may drive catastrophic volatile release, both directly through volcanic degassing and indirectly through heating of carbon- and sulfur-bearing host sediments. It is broadly assumed that sulfur injection must reach the stratosphere to drive long-term cooling; thus, these indirect metamorphic sulfur emissions have been almost entirely ignored. Here, we demonstrate that plausible carbon and sulfur emissions from contact metamorphism may be sustained long enough to cause centennial-scale sulfate aerosol–driven cooling spikes of several kelvins superimposed on millennial-scale warming from the carbon dioxide greenhouse effect. We use modeling of sediment metamorphism along with simple carbon cycle and planetary energy balance models of the climate response to explore this relationship. Our results suggest that a metamorphic sulfur source should be considered as a driver of sustained global cooling during large igneous province emplacement, with potential implications for Phanerozoic biotic crises such as the End-Triassic Mass Extinction.
works.label: flagship

summary_bullets.research_question: 大型火成岩省侵位期间接触变质作用释放的硫能否驱动持续全球冷却并导致生物大灭绝？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用沉积变质作用建模，结合简化的碳循环和行星能量平衡模型模拟气候响应。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 变质硫排放可引发持续百年的硫酸盐气溶胶冷却尖峰，叠加在千年尺度CO₂温室变暖上，导致持续冷却。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示长期被忽略的间接变质硫排放可作为持续全球冷却和灭绝事件的驱动因素。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解读显生宙生物危机（如三叠纪末大灭绝）的触发机制提供了新的气候致冷途径。

works.title: Multiple Au enrichment processes in the Early Cretaceous Heilongtan–Xiejiagou deposit, Tongbai Orogen, Central China
works.abstract: The Tongbai Orogen is an important Au province in central China, but the processes responsible for localized high-grade Au enrichment in its southern segment remain poorly constrained. Here, we investigate the Heilongtan–Xiejiagou Au deposit using ore geology, hand-specimen-scale element mapping, ore-stage geochronology, and in-situ trace-element and S–Pb isotope analyses of sulfides. The deposit records three stages of mineralization: Stage I quartz–sericite–pyrite alteration, Stage II quartz–pyrite vein, and Stage III quartz–polymetallic sulfide vein. Ore-stage geochronology based on Rb-Sr and U-Pb isotopic systems of Stage I sericite and monazite, and Stage III muscovite constrains the main Au–Ag mineralization to ca. 140–134 Ma. The S–Pb isotope data, together with the Early Cretaceous ages and spatial association with granitoid magmatism, indicate a major magmatic–hydrothermal contribution, with variable input from Neoproterozoic host rocks. Pyrite records a systematic evolution from As-rich invisible-Au-bearing Py-I, through porous and inclusion-rich Py-II associated with Au redistribution and polymetallic enrichment, to trace-element-poor Py-III associated with late polymetallic sulfides. These features indicate that Stage II was the main stage of Au remobilization and local reconcentration. During this stage, coupled dissolution–reprecipitation of earlier auriferous pyrite, together with additional Au input from the infiltrating fluid, generated porous reaction domains that promoted Au release, redistribution, and electrum precipitation. These results link the deposit to Early Cretaceous magmatic–hydrothermal activity and suggest that exploration in the southern Tongbai Orogen should focus on reactivated vein systems capable of localized high-grade upgrading. Overall, this study provides new insight into fluid-mediated remobilization and local reconcentration of pyrite-hosted Au in high-grade lode gold systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国中部桐柏造山带早白垩世黑龙潭–谢家沟矿床的多期金富集过程

summary_bullets.research_question: 解析桐柏造山带南段局部高品位金富集的关键过程与成因机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合矿床地质、手标本元素填图、成矿阶段年代学及硫化物原位微量元素和S–Pb同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 主成矿期约140–134 Ma，第二阶段流体导致含砷黄铁矿溶解‑再沉淀，驱动金再活化与高品位局部富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了流体介导黄铁矿中金再活化和局部再富集的微观机制，为高品位脉金系统提供新认识。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为桐柏造山带将勘探目标指向再活化脉系统提供依据，并深化对金再富集过程的理解。

works.title: Gold mineralisation characteristics of the typical ore body and the potential for exploration in the Qiucun Au deposit, Dehua county, Fujian province, China
works.abstract: The Qiucun Au deposit is located in Dehua County, Fujian Province, within the Wuyi Mountain metallogenic belt. Gold mineralisation of the typical ore body exhibits distinct zoning characteristics between 940 m and 647 m, is structurally controlled by a volcanic conduit and its associated fracture zones, and is closely associated with quartz (chalcedony)-sericite-pyrite-calcite assemblages. To decipher the ore-forming processes of the Qiucun deposit, detailed geological investigations were carried out, along with sulfur isotope analysis of syn-ore pyrite, microthermometric analysis (homogenization temperature and salinity) of fluid inclusions in syn-ore quartz, and U-Pb dating of syn-ore calcite. The results show that in typical orebodies, gold grade increases and then decreases from shallow to deeper sections. Gold occurs mainly as fracture-fillings within pyrite, displaying diverse morphologies and colours that correlate with grade. Significant gold mineralisation is hosted within sericite alteration zones, whereas the presence of calcite is generally associated with lower gold grades. The δ 34 S values of gold-related pyrite range from –6.8‰ to + 1.6‰, suggesting a deep magmatic source for the ore-forming materials. Fluid inclusions in quartz are dominated by two-phase (liquid-rich) types with minor evidence of boiling assemblages, obtaining low-temperature (180–260 °C) and low-salinity (0.35–5.56 wt% NaCl equiv.). U-Pb dating of calcite yields an age of 152.0 ± 17 Ma. Integrated evidence indicates that the Qiucun low-sulfidation epithermal Au deposit is related to the subduction of the paleo-Pacific Plate. Fractured volcanic breccia zones served as the main pathways for hydrothermal fluid migration and ore precipitation. Pyrite, sericite, calcite, and other minerals at different elevations are the main indicators for further gold exploration in the Qiucun gold deposit and its adjacent areas.
works.label: consider

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示福建邱村金矿典型矿体的矿化特征、成矿过程与控矿因素。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用地质调查、硫同位素分析、流体包裹体显微测温及方解石U-Pb定年。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 金品位随深度先升后降，金以裂隙充填形式赋存于黄铁矿中，成矿流体为低温低盐度，成矿年龄约152 Ma，属低硫化浅成低温热液矿床。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过方解石U-Pb定年与硫同位素综合约束邱村金矿的成矿时代与物质来源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为区域火山岩型金矿的深部及外围找矿提供了矿物组合标志和成矿模型指导。

works.title: Ancient plume-reinforced lithosphere modulates present-day crustal fluid migration and deformation
works.abstract: Using geophysical imaging and numerical modelling, the authors suggest that remnants of the 260- million-year-old Emeishan mantle plume may still influence how crustal fluids move and where deformation and earthquakes occur in southwest China. Understanding how ancient mantle plume residues modify lithospheric structure and influence tectonic deformation remains challenging, especially in plume-peripheral regions where basalts are not exposed at the surface. Here, we present magnetotelluric imaging across the Huayingshan Fault in the outer zone of the Permian Emeishan large igneous province, China. The resistivity model reveals a vertically extensive high-resistivity structure beneath the fault that coincides with high seismic velocities and high density, and is most consistently interpreted as the crystallized product of mantle-derived basaltic melts from the Emeishan plume. We use upper-mantle-scale geodynamic simulations to examine how plume-driven melting and plume-derived material interact with lithospheric heterogeneity. While these models do not explicitly simulate small-scale melt extraction or crustal emplacement, they suggest that pre-existing lithospheric heterogeneity can shape the lateral redistribution of plume-derived material. We infer that residual plume material crystallized in situ within the fault zone formed a low-permeability, mechanically strong lithospheric barrier that may impede or redirect crustal-fluid migration. This plume-reinforced lithosphere may promote stress localization on its northwestern side, where present-day earthquakes are preferentially clustered. Together, these results suggest that plume-modified lithosphere can preserve a long-lived structural imprint that modulates crustal-fluid migration and continental deformation.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 古地幔柱强化岩石圈调控现今地壳流体运移与变形

summary_bullets.research_question: 古老地幔柱残留物如何影响现今岩石圈结构、流体运移与地震活动？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用大地电磁成像与上地幔尺度地球动力学数值模拟相结合的方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 华蓥山断裂带下方的高阻结构是峨眉山地幔柱熔体结晶产物，形成低渗强化的岩石圈屏障。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示古地幔柱物质可原位结晶强化岩石圈并持续控制现今流体和变形。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解古老地幔柱对大陆构造的长效影响与地震危险性评估提供新视角。

works.title: The Preservation of Intragranular and Intergranular Coesite in Metasedimentary Rocks: Insights From a TEM‐Based Structure Analysis
works.abstract: ABSTRACT Coesite is a key indicator mineral of ultrahigh‐pressure (UHP) metamorphism. A “dry” environment is widely recognized as a prerequisite for coesite preservation during exhumation. However, the deformation behaviour of coesite, its retrograde replacement by quartz and their host and surrounding minerals remain poorly constrained at the micro‐ to nanoscale, especially for coesite included in or surrounded by nonrigid minerals. Here, we employed electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD), focused ion beam (FIB) and transmission electron microscopy (TEM) to characterize the micro‐nanostructure of intragranular coesite (within dolomite) and intergranular coesite (surrounded by dolomite and apatite) in a UHP metasedimentary rock from the Ganjialing area, Dabie Shan region in east‐central China. Our observations reveal that both intragranular and intergranular coesite grains are essentially undeformed and dislocation‐free, whereas the palisade quartz rim enveloping coesite exhibits abundant dislocations and tangles. Based on the dislocation densities within these quartz rims, the differential stress is estimated at 347–663 MPa for intragranular coesite and 320–741 MPa for intergranular coesite grains, respectively. Combining this differential stress estimate with the regional P–T–t path constrains the corresponding metamorphic conditions to 715°C–720°C and 1.7–2.0 GPa. Furthermore, dolomite and apatite domains adjacent to coesite show higher dislocation densities than those distal to coesite. Collectively, the palisade quartz rim, dolomite and apatite form a composite buffer zone that not only maintains a closed, dry system but also accommodates the high differential stress generated by phase transformation. This buffer system effectively suppresses the replacement of coesite by quartz during decompression. Our findings demonstrate that transformation‐induced differential stress plays a pivotal role in the preservation of coesite within the mechanically weak, nonrigid matrix of UHP metasedimentary rocks during exhumation.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 变沉积岩中粒内与粒间柯石英的保存：基于TEM结构分析的见解

summary_bullets.research_question: 在非刚性基质中，柯石英的变形行为及其退变质保存机制是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用EBSD、FIB和TEM技术分析粒内与粒间柯石英的微纳米结构。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 柯石英颗粒无变形位错，而栅栏状石英边含高位错密度，构成缓冲带维持干燥封闭体系，抑制退变质。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示相变诱导差应力在非刚性矿物基质中保存柯石英的关键作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解超高压变质岩折返过程中柯石英保存的微观机制提供新见解和约束。

works.title: Sulfur and lead isotope geochemistry of sulfide minerals from the Yushui copper deposit, eastern Guangdong, South China
works.abstract: The Yushui volcanogenic massive sulfide (VMS) copper deposit in eastern Guangdong, South China, is distinguished by two discrete mineralization events: a Carboniferous stratiform ore system (ca. 308 Ma) and a Jurassic vein-type overprint (ca. 163 Ma). In situ sulfur and lead isotope analyses (LA‑MC‑ICP‑MS) were conducted on sulfides from both ore types to constrain sulfur and metal sources and hydrothermal system evolution. Sulfur isotopes (δ34S = − 23.88‰ to + 4.01‰) show systematic variations: early exhalative and stockwork ores record significant bacterial and thermochemical reduction of seawater sulfate, whereas main‑stage massive and banded ores approach magmatic sulfur values (0‰ to + 3‰). Vein‑type ores yield δ34S indicative of a dominant magmatic source linked to Jurassic igneous activity. Lead isotopes form three linear groups corresponding to Carboniferous VMS mineralization, Jurassic vein‑type overprint, and host volcanic rocks. Lead in stratiform ores was largely leached from basement crust with minor magmatic input, while vein‑type ores predominantly inherited lead from pre‑existing stratiform ores in a closed system. These results confirm a two‑stage genesis: (1) shallow‑marine seafloor hydrothermal sedimentation forming primary VMS ore bodies at ∼ 308 Ma; (2) Jurassic magmatic‑hydrothermal reworking and superimposition generating vein‑type ore bodies at ∼ 163 Ma. This study highlights the utility of in situ S–Pb isotopes in unravelling polyphase ore‑forming processes in VMS deposits modified by later tectono‑magmatic events.
works.label: consider

summary_bullets.research_question: 华南玉水铜矿如何在不同时代矿化事件中演化和获取硫、金属来源？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用LA‑MC‑ICP‑MS对两种矿石硫化物进行原位硫铅同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 层状矿体硫来自海水硫酸盐还原，铅源于基底淋滤；脉状矿体硫铅均为岩浆继承。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用原位S–Pb同位素揭示VMS矿床多期叠加成矿过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为后期构造岩浆事件改造的VMS矿床成因解析提供了有效示踪方法。

works.title: Niobium and heavy rare earth element mineralization in the Bayan Obo deposit, China: insights from aeschynite mineralogy, geochemistry, and geochronology
works.abstract: The Bayan Obo deposit in China is the largest light rare earth element (LREE) deposit worldwide, and also hosts substantial Nb and heavy REE (HREE) resources. However, the timing and enrichment mechanisms of the Nb and HREE mineralization are poorly constrained. Aeschynite is the most important Nb- and HREE-bearing mineral at Bayan Obo and was investigated in this study to reconstruct the history of Nb and HREE mineralization. In situ Lu–Hf isochron dating of two types of aeschynite yielded consistent ages of 435–420 Ma, which overlap with the Th–Pb isotopic ages of intergrown monazite (438–392 Ma). These results demonstrate that early Paleozoic is a significant episode for Nb and HREE mineralization. The aeschynite has a close spatiotemporal relationship with alkali silicates, suggesting that hydrothermal fluids were naturally rich in alkalis and dominantly exsolved from coeval carbonatitic magmas. Strontium isotopic compositions of aeschynite are relatively enriched and exhibit an increased trend from the type-1 (87Sr/86Sr = 0.7037–0.7064) to type-2 (87Sr/86Sr = 0.7072–0.7128), which was likely caused by heterogeneous crustal contamination during the evolution of hydrothermal fluids. Paragenetic aeschynite, calcite, fluorite and bastnäsite reflect that carbonate (CO3 2–) and fluoride (F-) anions played a key role for Nb mobilization. The unloading of Nb in aeschynite was usually related to the variation of Ti content in hydrothermal fluids. According to apparent correlation of REE, Th and Ca in aeschynite and developed ilmenite, Nb unloading was influenced by the processes of coupled substitution or ilmenite crystallization. The enrichment of HREE was ascribed to preferential LREE fractionation following gradual temperature decrease of CO3 2–-bearing alkaline hydrothermal fluids. Moreover, earlier crystallized LREE minerals is potential trigger for local elevation of HREE content.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国白云鄂博矿床铌与重稀土元素成矿作用：来自易解石矿物学、地球化学和年代学的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 白云鄂博矿床中铌和重稀土成矿的时间和富集机制尚不清楚，本文旨在揭示其成矿历史。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对易解石进行原位Lu-Hf等时线定年及独居石Th-Pb定年，结合矿物地球化学和锶同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铌和重稀土成矿发生在早古生代（435-420 Ma），与碳酸岩岩浆热液演化及地壳混染有关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过易解石原位Lu-Hf定年精确限定铌和重稀土成矿时代，并阐明其热液富集过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碳酸岩型铌和重稀土矿床的成矿时代与热液迁移机制提供了关键约束，指导找矿勘探。

works.title: Formation of iron oxide-apatite deposits triggered by magmatic assimilation of evaporitic sulfate
works.abstract: Abstract The geological origins of iron oxide-apatite (IOA) rocks, important resources for iron and rare-earth elements, are intensely debated. Using triple oxygen isotope data, we here show that magnetite from IOA deposits near Kiruna, northern Sweden, and related igneous rocks contain high concentrations of oxygen derived from evaporitic sulfate. To explain these observations, we propose that the Kiruna IOA assemblage formed in response to massive assimilation of evaporites by silicate magmas. sulfate from the evaporites would have oxidised ferrous iron in these magmas, facilitating the formation of immiscible ferric iron-rich melts and/or magnetite, which then separated from the magmas to form ore deposits. Ferric iron-bearing fluids with low Δ′ 17 O values, exsolved from the silicate magmas or the ore-forming melts, would have crystallised additional magnetite. An inventory study reveals that Proterozoic and Cambrian IOA deposits have lower Δ′ 17 O values than post-Cambrian IOA deposits. This shows that the Δ′ 17 O values of global IOA deposits reflect the changing isotope composition of atmospheric O 2 incorporated by evaporitic sulfate over time, and demonstrates that oxygen released from evaporitic sulfate is a common component in IOA deposits.

works.title: Tracing the Origin and Hydrothermal Overprint of Magnetite-Apatite Mineralization in the New Afton Cu-Au ± PGE Alkalic Porphyry Deposit: Insights from Magnetite Textures and Chemistry
works.abstract: Abstract Alkalic porphyry deposits are significant sources of Cu-Au ± platinum group elements (PGE), with magnetite being particularly abundant in the Triassic alkalic systems of British Columbia, Canada. The New Afton area hosts both Cu-Au ± PGE mineralization and several massive magnetite lodes, which were historically mined for iron. The origin of these magnetite orebodies and their relationship to alkalic porphyry mineralization remains unclear. This study integrates field observations and magnetite chemistry and textures to elucidate their formation. We identify two stages of magnetite mineralization: an early high-temperature (>500°C) magmatic-hydrothermal stage, characterized by ilmenite exsolution lamellae, high-Ti magnetite, and symplectitic intergrowths with ilmenite, followed by a later stage of hydrothermal reequilibration that precipitated ilmenite-free Ti-depleted magnetite. Rather than preserving its original crystallization signature, magnetite records a complex history of hydrothermal activity, including Cu-Au-PGE-bearing magmatic-hydrothermal fluid circulation and repeated, superimposed coupled dissolution-reprecipitation events. These findings align with those from other magmatic-hydrothermal ore systems such as iron oxide copper-gold and Kiruna-type iron oxide-apatite deposits, emphasizing the widespread nature of magnetite reequilibration and the need for caution when using magnetite as a petrogenetic indicator.

works.title: Devonian Jinshuikou pegmatites at the northern margin of the Tibetan Plateau: UPb and SmNd constraints on their genetic relationship with regional granitoids
works.abstract: Granitic pegmatites represent critical repositories of strategic rare metals (e.g., Li, Be, Nb, Ta) and are conventionally interpreted as terminal products of highly evolved granitic magmas. However, this classic genetic model was frequently challenged where pronounced age gaps exist between pegmatites and their putative host granitoids. Along the northern margin of the Tibetan Plateau lies a world-class lithium metallogenic belt hosting approximately 14.8 million tons of Li2O resources. As a key segment of this belt, the East Kunlun Orogen contains widespread granitoids and newly recognized pegmatite dikes in the Jinshuikou area, yet their emplacement ages and genetic linkage between each other remain poorly constrained. Here we present integrated in situ UPb geochronology, mineral chemistry, and SmNd isotope data for monazite, garnet, and columbite group minerals (CGMs) from the pegmatites to resolve these issues. UPb dating of monazite and CGMs yields consistent ages of 372–375 Ma, firmly establishing a Devonian crystallization age for the pegmatites. Despite a ~ 15 Myr age difference relative to the youngest coeval Devonian granitoids (ca. 389 Ma), SmNd isotopic systematics strongly support a genetic connection between them. Monazite from pegmatites yields a SmNd isochron age of 390.2 ± 6.0 Ma and εNd(t) values (−6.01 to −5.39) identical to those of coeval I-type granitoids in the region. These data indicate that the pegmatites and associated granitoids originated from a common deep crustal magma reservoir generated by partial melting of ancient continental crust with limited input from juvenile mantle materials. The pegmatites represent the final products of protracted magmatic evolution within a long-lived crustal magma chamber. This study not only documents a previously overlooked Paleozoic rare-metal pegmatite system in the East Kunlun Orogen but also demonstrates that age gaps alone do not negate a cogenetic relationship between pegmatites and regional granitoids, with important implications for rare-metal exploration models in orogenic belts.
works.label: consider

summary_bullets.research_question: 青藏高原北缘金水口泥盆纪伟晶岩与区域花岗岩是否存在成因联系及年龄差距是否排除同源性。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用独居石和铌钽铁矿原位U-Pb定年、矿物化学及Sm-Nd同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 伟晶岩结晶于372–375 Ma，与约389 Ma花岗岩相差~15 Myr，但Sm-Nd同位素证实共同源自古老地壳的部分熔融。
summary_bullets.innovation: 论证了年龄差距不能否定伟晶岩与花岗岩的同源关系，揭示东昆仑早古生代稀有金属成矿系统。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为造山带稀有金属勘探模型提供成因约束，挑战了传统伟晶岩必须与寄主花岗岩近同时形成的认识。

works.title: Linking Himalayan uplift to crustal deformation: Structural and multi-chronometer constraints from the Kangmar dome
works.abstract: The highest topography on Earth occurs in the Himalayan orogen, which is the quintessential example of continental collision. To elucidate the crustal processes that accompanied the rise of the Himalayas, we investigated the deformational history of the Kangmar dome in the eastern Himalayas. By integrating field mapping with monazite U-Th-Pb, mica 40Ar/39Ar, and zircon and apatite (UTh)/He geochronology, we identified three distinct phases of deformation. The first phase involved north-south contractional deformation at ca. 51–44 Ma. This was followed by pervasive top-to-north ductile shearing at ca. 26–17 Ma, which exhumed deep-crustal rocks. North-south shortening was responsible for the final doming, at ca. 15–8 Ma, which involved two distinct cooling and exhumation stages: an earlier bottom-up cooling event that was driven by underthrusting of the Tethyan Himalayan Sequence below the Kangmar dome, and a later pop-up exhumation of the dome core. These deformation phases, which were driven by India-Asia convergence, are correlated with structural patterns across the Himalayan orogen. The deformation record is temporally linked to the episodic uplift history of the Himalayas, thus elucidating potential driving mechanisms. Early Eocene contraction was likely responsible for elevating the Himalayas above sea level. The main rise of the Himalayas, which occurred during the Early Miocene, was possibly triggered by the southward migration of deep-crustal rocks toward the southern Himalayan front. Collectively, the deformation history of the Kangmar dome provides critical insights into the tectonic evolution of this collisional orogen, including its uplift history.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 喜马拉雅隆升与地壳变形的联系：来自康马穹隆的构造与多重年代计的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 喜马拉雅造山带隆升过程中地壳变形过程与机制是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合野外填图与独居石U-Th-Pb、云母40Ar/39Ar、锆石和磷灰石(U-Th)/He多年代学方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出51–44 Ma南北收缩、26–17 Ma向北韧性剪切及15–8 Ma两阶段穹隆抬升三期变形。
summary_bullets.innovation: 通过多年代学方法精确约束康马穹隆变形时序，揭示其与喜马拉雅阶段性隆升的成因联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碰撞造山带地壳变形与隆升历史提供关键构造演化约束和驱动机制见解。

works.title: Structurally Controlled Deposition of Gold During Inversion of Sedimentary Basin: A Case Study of Sediment-Hosted Orogenic Gold in the Gaolong Deposit, Youjiang Basin, South China Block
works.abstract: Abstract The Youjiang basin underwent late Paleozoic expansion and Triassic inversion, resulting in scattered Paleozoic isolated carbonate platforms surrounded by Triassic turbidites. The Gaolong gold deposit is representative of sediment-hosted orogenic gold deposits formed along isolated platforms in the central-southern basin, where three stages of deformation were identified. The pre-ore D1 deformation in Gaolong features a WNW-trending brachy-anticline and NNE-trending dextral strike-slip shearing within the competent carbonate platform, overthrust of the turbidites onto the carbonate platform along the lithological contacts, and WNW-trending thrusts and related asymmetric tight folds in incompetent turbidites. Kinematic analyses revealed that northeast-southwest to north northeast–south southwest regional shortening occurred. The U-Pb dating of the synkinematic calcite constrains the D1 deformation age of 240.5 ± 5.2 Ma. Syn-ore D2 deformation is associated with north-south shortening and features NE-striking sinistral and NW-striking dextral strike-slip mineralized faults that cut through the D1 structures. Gold orebodies formed in the stratigraphic-structural traps, like tight folds, thrusts, and strike-slip faults in turbidites at the less compressed and permeable eastern and western edges of the platform. Gold mineralization in those edges is mainly invisible gold in the rims of zoned pyrite and arsenopyrite in quartz veins, hydraulic breccia, and altered turbidites with ore-related silicification, sulfidation, sericitization, and minor carbonatization. The inferred stress field and published bitumen Re-Os age suggest that the D1 and D2 deformations were formed during Triassic inversion and record a change in direction of the propagation process of basin inversion. The post-ore D3-1 deformation is characterized by west-northwest–east-southeast shortening, whereas the latest post-ore D3-2 deformation represents extension. The north-northeastward basin inversion progressively propagated from the southernmost toward the northernmost of the Youjiang basin during the Middle to Late Triassic. This inversion involved horizontal crustal shortening and vertical thickening, leading to overpressure of deep fluids and triggering large-scale vertical fluid migration via regional inverted preexisting faults. These faults served as conduits, linking the deep source with shallower traps in the fold-and-thrust belt. At shallow depths, gold deposition during compression is controlled by lithological and rheological contacts along competent isolated platforms, which provide better permeability and Fe-bearing reactants that facilitate the precipitation of gold-bearing sulfide. The geochronology of progressive basin evolution and regional sediment-hosted gold mineralization reveals a coupled spatiotemporal relationship between them. Both the sedimentary facies and structural architecture preparation during basin formation and the following structural inversion and lithological-rheological conditions during basin inversion jointly controlled gold deposition. The identified processes for the formation of sediment-hosted orogenic gold deposits can be used to guide mineral exploration in inverted sedimentary basins worldwide.

summary_bullets.research_question: 高龙金矿在盆地反转过程中金沉淀的结构控制因素与时空关系是什么？

summary_bullets.key_findings: 金沉淀受先存台地边缘的褶皱、逆冲和走滑断裂控制，盆地反转驱动的深部流体沿先存断裂上涌并在浅部含铁围岩中富集。

summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为全球反转沉积盆地中同类矿床的勘查提供了可直接应用的构造-岩性控矿标志与预测准则。

works.title: Interface Deformation, Exhumation, and Underplating: The Role of Plate Velocity Changes Throughout the Evolution of a Subduction Zone
works.abstract: Abstract Exhumed metamorphic rocks yield critical insights into the mechanical, chemical, and thermal structure of the plate interface that can be used to infer exhumation pathways and their evolution throughout a subduction zone's lifetime. Metamorphosed oceanic rocks often record exhumation and underplating over relatively punctuated time periods, which appear to be linked to specific stages of subduction. Although plate velocities also vary from one stage of subduction to the next, the influence of this time dependence on exhumation and underplating remains unclear. We therefore use 2‐D time‐dependent subduction models to investigate how evolving plate velocities affect the timing and distribution of exhumation and underplating. By extracting plate velocities from a freely evolving subduction model and imposing them on kinematically driven models, we isolate the effects of realistic velocity variations on interface processes without the complexity of a dynamically evolving slab. We also explore the role of interface strength by varying its rheology and composition. In our models, exhumation consistently initiates during a punctuated detachment event following decreases in subduction velocity. Shallow exhumation (

summary_bullets.research_question: 板块速度随时间的变化如何影响俯冲带中岩石的折返与底侵过程？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过二维时变俯冲模型，从自由演化模型中提取板块速度并施加于运动学驱动模型以隔离速度变化效应。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 折返总是起始于俯冲速度降低后的快速拆离事件，浅部折返主要受速度变化控制。

works.title: Tracing hydrothermal fluid evolution of the Tongshankou skarn–porphyry Cu–Mo–W deposit (Eastern China) using integrated infrared spectroscopic characteristics and magnetic susceptibility
works.abstract: The Middle–Lower Yangtze River Metallogenic Belt (MLYRB) is one of the dominant skarn–porphyry Cu–Au metallogenic belts in Eastern China. Within this belt, skarn–porphyry Cu–Au deposits show a close genetic linkage to Late Mesozoic high‑K calc‑alkaline granitoids, and are associated with variable degrees of critical metals mineralization (i.e., Co, Te, Se and Re). Previous studies have generally suggested that these granitoids possess limited W metallogenic potential; nevertheless, several concealed medium‑to‑large W–Cu–Mo deposits have been discovered in their peripheral areas in recent years. At present, the hydrothermal fluid evolution of these W‑rich skarn–porphyry Cu polymetallic deposits remains poorly constrained, and their deep exploration indicators still need further optimization. This study focuses on the Tongshankou skarn–porphyry Cu–Mo–W deposit in the westernmost segment of the MLYRB. The deposit hosts contained metal resources of 0.55 Mt Cu, 0.01 Mt Mo, and 0.012 Mt WO3, with ore grades of 0.86 wt%, 0.10 wt%, and 0.19 wt%, respectively. By combining detailed petrographic observations with short-wave infrared (SWIR) and thermal infrared (TIR) spectral alteration mapping, this study pinpoints the precise ore-forming stages and delineates detailed alteration zoning features in the Tongshankou Cu–Mo–W deposit. Building on SWIR and TIR spectral parameters, alongside volumetric bulk magnetic susceptibility (Kbulk ) measurements, we propose four mineral exploration indicators for this deposit: (i) the widespread development of kaolinite, dickite, skarn, and retrograde alteration mineral assemblages; (ii) Fe-rich chlorite, identifiable by its characteristic absorption wavelength with Pos2250 > 2250 nm; (iii) white mica–montmorillonite, distinguished by a diagnostic absorption wavelength with Pos2200 1.0 × 10-3SI). Notably, the presence of kaolinite and dickite along the intrusive contact zones between ore-forming porphyries and carbonate wall rocks provides direct evidence for acidic fluid activity during the Cu–Mo–W mineralization process. The development of acid fluid conditions in the system is tightly linked to hydrogen ion release during the precipitation of iron oxides and sulfide minerals. Collectively, these results reveal that hydrothermal fluids associated with Cu–Mo–W mineralization in the Tongshankou deposit evolved from alkaline to acidic throughout the mineralization process. Combined with previous research advances, the present findings further suggest that acidic hydrothermal fluids likely represent a ubiquitous component of skarn-hosted Cu–Mo–W mineralization systems. Clay indicator minerals, including kaolinite and dickite, provide robust constraints on the hydrothermal fluid evolution of Tongshankou deposit and serve as newly recognized, effective exploration proxies for analogous skarn–porphyry Cu–Mo–W deposits worldwide. Significantly, this study demonstrates that the integrated application of SWIR and TIR spectroscopic analyses combined with magnetic susceptibility measurements provides a rigorous and reliable approach for identifying concealed skarn–porphyry ore bodies across the MLYRB, Eastern China.

works.translated_title: 利用综合红外光谱特征和磁化率追踪铜山口矽卡岩-斑岩型铜钼钨矿床（中国东部）的热液流体演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 约束铜山口矽卡岩-斑岩型铜钼钨矿床的热液流体演化，并优化其深部勘探指标。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学、短波红外与热红外光谱蚀变填图及体积磁化率测量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 热液从碱性演化为酸性，高岭石与地开石指示酸性流体，提出四项矿物勘探指标。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次综合红外光谱与磁化率揭示酸性流体在矽卡岩型铜钼钨系统中的普遍性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为全球类似矿床提供了基于粘土矿物和磁性的有效勘探新标志与方法。

works.title: Reassessing long-term exhumation rates in magmatic terranes
works.abstract: Crustal exhumation is central to mountain building, weathering, and sediment production processes, which significantly influence the composition and behavior of Earth’s oceans and atmosphere. It also controls the formation, enrichment, and preservation of porphyry copper deposits, which are a vital source of metals for the clean energy technologies underpinning the global green energy transition. Exhumation rates are typically determined from rock cooling histories combined with a geothermal model. However, in magmatically active regions, models can overpredict exhumation rates because the elevated heat signature is mistakenly attributed to advection driven by rapid exhumation. We present a method to accurately constrain exhumation histories in magmatic terranes that combines thermokinematic modeling of thermochronometric cooling histories with independent geobarometric constraints on the total exhumed crustal thickness. Focusing on the Central Andes, which has a prolonged history of magmatic and magmatic-hydrothermal activity, we find that accounting for this additional source of heat results in exhumed crustal thicknesses within error of the independent constraints, whereas ignoring it results in exhumed thicknesses up to four times greater than geologically plausible.

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何准确约束岩浆活动区的地壳剥露速率，避免高估？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合热运动学模型与独立地质压力计约束的总剥露厚度。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 考虑岩浆热源后剥露厚度与独立约束一致，忽略则高估达四倍。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出热年代学冷却历史与地质压力计结合的联合约束方法。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为岩浆区的剥露历史和斑岩铜矿保存研究提供了更可靠的工具。

works.title: Anatomy of a seafloor spreading event captured by in situ seismogeodesy
works.abstract: Abstract Over geological time, the growth of the ocean floor involves magmatic and tectonic extension 1 at mid-ocean ridges (MORs). Because seismogeodetic monitoring of these submarine plate boundaries remains challenging 2–7 , little is known about how these systems operate on yearly timescales. Here we report the first, to our knowledge, in situ observation of a rifting event at a MOR segment that combines hydroacoustic, direct-path ranging and bottom-pressure measurements, with repeated seafloor mapping. This event started on 26 April 2024 at the axis of the Southeast Indian Ridge (SEIR) near 37° S, two months after instruments had been deployed across the ridge axis and nearby Amsterdam transform fault (TF). The event began as a rapidly migrating swarm of extensional seismicity along the axial valley. It caused 4 m of subsidence of the valley floor and more than a metre of horizontal extension across the valley. We interpret this as the deflation of a sill-like reservoir feeding propagating dykes along the ridge axis. The dykes eventually led to the outpouring of about 160 million m 3 of lava at the seafloor in about 16 days, while inducing both seismic and aseismic slip on valley-bounding normal faults and finally triggering seismic activity on the abutting TFs. Large-scale aseismic slip induced by magmatic processes could therefore be the primary mechanism by which MOR normal faults accrue their displacement, which would account for their well-documented seismic deficit 8,9 .

works.translated_title: 原位地震大地测量学捕捉到的海底扩张事件解析

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何表征洋中脊在年度尺度上的岩浆-构造伸展过程？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合水声、直接路径测距和海底压力计的现场地震大地测量与重复海底测绘。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 观测到轴向裂谷快速迁移地震群、4米沉陷和逾米级伸展，最终约1.6亿立方米熔岩在16天内喷出。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在原位捕获到洋中脊裂谷事件全过程，揭示岩浆驱动的无震滑移机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证明岩浆过程触发的无震滑移是正断层累积位移的主要方式，解释了长期地震缺失。

works.title: Geochronology and genesis of rare-metal mineralization in the Himalayan leucogranite-pegmatite system
works.abstract: Himalayan leucogranites are a key target for rare-metal exploration, yet the sources and petrogenetic evolution of their parental magmas remain debated. This study investigates three representative deposits hosted by leucogranite-pegmatite systems in distinct tectonic units of the Himalayan orogen, integrating apatite and cassiterite U-Pb geochronology, whole-rock and apatite geochemistry, and apatite oxygen isotopes. Combined cassiterite and apatite dating reveals that rare-metal mineralization developed through multiple discrete magmatic-hydrothermal pulses rather than a single event, defining a prolonged, multi-stage metallogenic framework. Whole-rock and apatite trace-element signatures indicate highly fractionated, relatively oxidized melts that experienced extensive fluid exsolution, consistent with derivation from ancient metasedimentary sources within the Higher Himalayan Crystalline Sequence. These pegmatites likely evolved from parental leucogranitic magmas through extreme fractional crystallization and fluid exsolution. Apatite oxygen isotopes further resolve three contrasting fluid-evolution paths among the deposits. These range from open-system overprinting by external fluids, through continuous internal magmatic-to-hydrothermal evolution, to a largely closed system dominated by extreme fractionation, with each path corresponding to a distinct mineralization style. Collectively, these data suggest that post-collisional crustal decompression promoted partial melting of metasedimentary rocks, and the resultant leucogranitic magmas underwent high-degree fractionation and fluid exsolution to form rare-metal-bearing pegmatites. These findings constrain crustal melting, magmatic differentiation, and rare-metal enrichment in the Himalayan collisional orogen and highlight apatite as a sensitive tracer of pegmatite-forming processes.

summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碰撞造山带地壳熔融、分异与稀有金属富集机制提供关键约束，凸显磷灰石示踪潜力。

works.title: Fingerprints of s-cl-bearing fluids deduced from metal and mineral microinclusions in Quaternary Kamchatka lavas
works.abstract: Quaternary ankaramite, basalt, andesite and dacite from the Avacha, Bakening, Mutnovsky and Gorely volcanoes in Kamchatka contain numerous mineral microinclusions in rock-forming silicate and accessory oxide minerals as well as in groundmass volcanic glass. We have studied the composition and textural setting of these microinclusions along with the petrology and geochemictsry of their host lavas using optical petrography, major and trace element geochemistry and scanning electron microscopy with energy dispersive spectroscopy (SEM-EDS). The microinclusions are represented by Au and Au-bearing alloys, Ag and Ag-bearing alloys, partially oxidized siderophile (W) and chalcophile (Pb, Zn, Cu, Bi, Sb, Pb) metals. S-Cl-bearing microinclusions as Ag (± Cu) chlorides, composite S-O-C-bearing metal chlorides, Ag (±Cu) sulfides, sulfides of Fe, Ni, Cu, Pb, Zn and Sb as well as barite, cassiterite and apatite are very characteristic for these rocks. Primary-textured, magmatic microinclusions in olivine, pyroxenes, amphibole, plagioclase and fresh volcanic glass show no evidence for the later-stage transformations. Secondary-textured, post-magmatic microinclusions are localized in pores, voids and fractures or along the boundaries of silicate minerals and in association with secondary minerals. Magmatic and post-magmatic S-Cl-bearing microinclusion assemblages almost completely overlap compositionally suggesting that S-Cl-bearing fluids accompanied formation of Kamchatka lavas from magmatic differentiation in sub-volcanic conduits to their emplacement, cooling and degassing above the surface as well as possible post-eruptive transformations near active fumarolic fields. Lavas from the Avacha, Bakening, Mutnovsky and Gorely volcanoes display elevated Pb, Zn, Sb, Cu and Ag concentrations in comparison with the average MORB and upper continental crust. Some volcanic samples with both magmatic and post-magmatic S-Cl-bearing mineral microinclusions have higher Mo, Sn, Sb and Ag contents than previously reported for Kamchatka volcanoes suggesting that sulfur and chlorine potentially contribute to metal enrichment in magmas and associated fluids and facilitate transport of certain ore metals in the Kamchatka subduction zone.

summary_bullets.research_question: 堪察加第四纪熔岩中S-Cl含矿物微包裹体如何记录流体活动并影响金属富集？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用光学岩相学、主微量元素地球化学及SEM-EDS分析硅酸盐矿物与火山玻璃中的微包裹体。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆与岩浆后S-Cl含包裹体组合在成分上几乎完全重叠，反映流体从岩浆分异到喷气阶段的持续作用。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用原生和次生微包裹体揭示S-Cl流体在全过程促进俯冲带金属运移与富集。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带成矿系统中硫和氯在金属迁移中的角色提供了直接的岩相学与地球化学证据。

works.title: Geochemical, mineralogical, and geochronological constraints on the Wugongshan granite-aplite complex: Implications for regional Li-Nb-Ta mineralization in South China
works.abstract: A key obstacle to understanding rare-metal mineralization in highly evolved granitic systems is the uncertain petrogenetic relationship between granites and their felsic derivatives. This study presents an integrated investigation of Mesozoic granites and aplite dikes from the Wugongshan complex in South China, which incorporates whole-rock geochemistry, mineral composition, U-Pb dating of apatite and cassiterite, and apatite Sr isotope. Both rock types crystallized at ∼ 151–150 Ma. Relative to barren granites, the Li-Nb-Ta mineralized aplite are characterized by the crystallization of lepidolite, columbite-(Mn), tantalite-(Mn), and microlite. Geochemical and mineralogical evidence indicates that the aplite crystallized from a more evolved, fluid-rich melts during the magmatic-hydrothermal transition stage. However, mineralogical and Sr isotopic discrepancies between the granites (whole-rock initial 87Sr/86Sr = 0.7143–0.7208, from literature) and the aplite (apatite initial 87Sr/86Sr = 0.7512–0.7648) preclude a simple in situ differentiation origin for the aplite from the exposed granites. Instead, it probably originated from a more reduced, isotopically and compositionally heterogeneous underlying batch, either derived from a different deep-seated magma chamber or from the same chamber that sourced the exposed granites but subsequently underwent crustal assimilation at depth. Both alternative models are characterized by high initial 87Sr/86Sr ratios. Regional comparisons with Yichun and Yifeng deposits imply that rare-metal granite-aplite systems in western Jiangxi may result from multiple episodes of granitic magmatism, reflecting heterogeneous source melting and multistage magma recharge on a regional scale, rather than being sole products of continuous fractional crystallization and fluid exsolution.

works.title: Subsolidus fluid generation via coupled muscovite dehydroxylation and biotite dehydration: Experimental constraints for metasomatism in granites
works.abstract: Subsolidus muscovite dehydroxylation represents a significant internal fluid source in felsic rocks. To investigate its effects, non-equilibrium differential-heating experiments were conducted at 1 bar and 750–1000 °C, together with piston–cylinder experiments at 800 °C and 500 MPa, using a two-mica orthogneiss and a biotite orthogneiss. The two lithologies show markedly different behaviour. In the biotite orthogneiss, only limited transformations occur. In contrast, muscovite dehydroxylation in the two-mica orthogneiss generates internally derived H2O fluids capable of reactivating mineral-replacement reactions without external fluid addition. Structurally bound OH released during dehydroxylation destabilises adjacent biotite, producing fine-grained orthopyroxene + spinel aggregates accompanied by the loss of H2O, K, Ti and F. The generated fluids also promote titanite growth and pervasive alkali metasomatism. Plagioclase is replaced by transitional Or–Ab feldspar, porous albite, and newly formed K-feldspar, producing textures comparable to those in natural hydrothermal and lower-crustal metasomatic systems. These microstructures indicate efficient fluid-mediated mass transfer even at extremely low fluid abundances (<1 wt%). The contrasting responses of the two orthogneisses highlight the role of muscovite in controlling fluid availability, alkali mobility, and subsolidus reaction pathways. A major consequence is the transfer of the K-feldspar component hosted in biotite into newly formed K-feldspar, shifting the bulk composition towards granite and potentially enhancing fertility during subsequent water-fluxed melting. These experiments demonstrate that mica-derived fluids can act as effective metasomatic agents during thermal shock events, linking dehydration reactions, feldspar re-equilibration, and the preconditioning of felsic rocks for anatexis.

works.translated_title: 通过白云母脱羟基和黑云母脱水耦合作用产生亚固相流体：对花岗岩中交代作用的实验约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 白云母脱水如何引发花岗质岩石的亚固相流体生成及交代作用？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过二云母和黑云母正片麻岩的非平衡差热实验及活塞-圆筒实验对比反应。

summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示云母源极低量流体即可驱动亚固相矿物反应与花岗岩化交代过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解中下地壳流体活动、交代作用及深熔前的成分富集机制提供实验约束。

works.title: Regional-scale integrated 3D modeling of the northern Norrbotten ore province (Sweden): Implications on the iron oxide-apatite mineral system
works.abstract: The northern Norrbotten ore province, situated within the Fennoscandian Shield, constitutes a major metallogenic domain in Europe and hosts more than 40 iron oxide-apatite (IOA) deposits, including the Kiirunavaara deposit, the type locality for this deposit type. Although extensive mapping, geochemical, geochronological, and structural studies have refined the conceptual understanding of IOA systems at deposit and district scales, a fully integrated three-dimensional framework that synthesizes this knowledge with regional geological and geophysical datasets has not yet been developed. This study presents an integrated 3D model of the northern Norrbotten ore province that incorporates lithological, structural, and petrophysical constraints with inversions of magnetic and gravity data, as well as available magnetotelluric conductivity models. The geological models delineate the architecture of intrusive suites, supracrustal belts, crustal-scale shear zones, and subordinate brittle–ductile second-order structures, implemented in a voxel-based domain for quantitative spatial integration. Mafic to ultramafic intrusions previously linked locally to IOA genesis are consistently coincident with high-density, magnetically anomalous domains and spatially associated with vertically extensive electrical conductors. These features are interpreted as the upper-crustal expression of a deeper transcrustal conduit system that facilitated magma ascent, fluid migration, and heat transfer. IOA deposits are located within second-order oblique structures intersecting or splaying from first-order structures, and their geometry and extent correlate with diagnostic magnetic signatures characterized by steep gradients, localized highs, and adjacent negative side lobes. These findings refine the metallogenic framework for IOA mineralization in the northern Norrbotten ore province and provide a robust 3D geoscientific basis for testing mineral system hypotheses.

works.translated_title: 瑞典北部Norrbotten成矿省的区域尺度综合三维建模：对铁氧化物-磷灰石矿物系统的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何构建整合地质与地球物理数据的区域三维模型以理解铁矿氧化物磷灰石成矿系统？
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合岩性、构造、岩石物理约束与磁法、重力反演及大地电磁模型，建立体素化三维地质模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: IOA矿床位于与一级构造斜交的二级构造中，与陡梯度磁异常相关；基性-超基性侵入体指示深部通道系统。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次为北诺尔博顿矿区建立区域尺度多源数据整合的三维模型，揭示控矿构造与物性标志。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为IOA矿床成矿假说验证提供了坚实的三维地质科学基础，指导区域勘探与成矿系统研究。

works.title: Vanadium isotopes demonstrate depth-dependent magma differentiation in Rindjani Volcano, Sunda arc
works.abstract: The andesitic composition of the continental crust—characterized by high SiO2 and low FeOT contents—has been attributed to differentiation processes operating in arc settings. One contributing mechanism could be amphibole-forming peritectic reaction at the crust–mantle boundary; however, its role in arc magma differentiation remains poorly constrained. Here we present high-precision δ 51/50V data (hereafter δ51V) for volcanic rocks from the Rindjani suite in the Sunda arc that span compositions from high-Al basalts to trachydacites, investigating how V isotopes respond to amphibole-controlled magma differentiation. At the crust–mantle boundary, amphibole-forming peritectic reactions transform H2O-rich magma into Si-rich melt and induce minor δ51V variation of approximately 0.08‰. H2O-rich magmas that bypass the peritectic reaction ascend to the shallow crust and differentiate from high-Al basalts to high-K andesites, showing limited δ51V variation from −0.76‰ to −0.66‰. Shallow-level differentiation of the Si-rich melt from andesites to trachydacites produces a sharp increase in δ51V from −0.62‰ to −0.04‰, consistent with an average mineral-melt fractionation factor Δ51Vmineral–melt ≈ −0.30‰. Published Fe−Ti isotope data show that δ56Fe remained constant, whereas δ49Ti responded to differentiation throughout the compositional range of the Rindjani suite. The decoupled Fe–Ti–V isotope systematics reveal differences in elemental mass balance and mineral–melt isotope fractionation during magma differentiation. These results show that amphibole-forming peritectic reactions fundamentally modify melt chemistry, thereby enabling significant V isotope fractionation associated with magnetite crystallization at shallow levels. Our findings highlight the depth–dependent differentiation framework of arc magmas and advance understanding of the V isotopic pathways involved in continental crust formation.

works.translated_title: 钒同位素揭示巽他弧Rindjani火山中与深度相关的岩浆分异作用

summary_bullets.key_findings: 壳幔边界的角闪石反应改变熔体化学并驱动浅部磁铁矿结晶时钒同位素显著分馏，铁同位素无变化而钛响应分异。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出深度依赖的岩浆分异框架，揭示钒同位素分馏路径及其对大陆壳成分的指示意义。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为弧岩浆分异机制和大陆壳形成的同位素示踪提供关键约束，推进钒同位素在地球化学中的应用。

works.title: Limits of Water Storage in Stishovite at Deep Mantle Conditions
works.abstract: Abstract The deep Earth water cycle is a key process in Earth's evolution. Stishovite has been proposed as a major carrier of water from the surface into the lower mantle. However, its role remains unclear because its water solubility is controversial. We investigated the water solubility of Al‐free stishovite at pressures of 33–38 GPa and temperatures of 700–1200 K using in situ X‐ray diffraction in an advanced multianvil apparatus. Water solubility is high, around 3 wt%, at 700 K but decreases rapidly with increasing temperature and becomes negligible (
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 深部地幔条件下斯石英储水能力的极限

summary_bullets.research_question: 无铝斯石英在深部地幔温压条件下的水溶解度及其温度依赖性存在争议。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用先进多砧装置结合原位X射线衍射，在33–38 GPa和700–1200 K下测量。

works.title: Garnet amphibolite as relics of TTG magma: Evidence from the Wuhe complex in the eastern North China Craton
works.abstract: Tonalite–trondhjemite–granodiorite (TTG) gneisses constitute the dominant component of cratons. Their parental rocks are thought to be continental mafic rocks; however, direct field evidence remains scarce. A suite of garnet amphibolite from the Wuhe Complex in the North China Craton provides direct evidence of in situ melting based on integrated field observation, whole-rock geochemistry, zircon UPb geochronology and phase equilibrium and trace-element modelling. Zircon UPb data indicate that the amphibolites underwent anatexis at 1.95–2.1 Ga, followed by a retrograde overprint at ca. 1.8 Ga. Bulk compositions of the leucosome are similar to those typical TTGs in the adjacent region; while those of the amphibolite fit a relic composition after the derivation of the leucosome. Phase equilibrium modelling constrains the peak melting to produce TTG-like melt such as the leucosome in the amphibolite to medium-pressure conditions (~9 kbar and ~ 840 °C). Trace-element modelling shows that the compositions of parental rocks and the residual mineral phases (garnet, plagioclase, amphibole, and rutile) in them controlled the elemental patterns in the melt. This study confirms that the TTGs can be produced from mafic crust at relatively low pressure conditions inside the continental crust.
