works.translated_title: 石榴角闪岩作为TTG岩浆的残留物：来自华北克拉通东部五河杂岩的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: TTG岩浆是否源于大陆镁铁质地壳的直接部分熔融？
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合野外观察、全岩地球化学、锆石U-Pb年代学、相平衡及微量元素模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 石榴石角闪岩记录了1.95–2.1 Ga深熔事件，产生的浅色体成分与相邻TTG一致。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提供角闪岩原位熔融形成TTG熔体的直接野外证据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 确证TTG可在中压下由镁铁质地壳熔融产生，约束早期地壳分异过程。

works.title: Slab geometry controls Paleo-Tethyan post-collisional tectonomagmatism: Insights from Late Triassic ultrapotassic rocks in Peninsular Malaysia
works.abstract: Post-collisional ultrapotassic magmas are generally formed by partial melting of a subduction-metasomatized mantle source in response to continental collision and subduction. This paper presents new geochronological, geochemical, and Sr−Nd−Hf−Pb isotopic data for a suite of potassic and ultrapotassic rocks from the Raub Complex in Peninsular Malaysia. Zircon U−Pb dating shows the ultrapotassic rocks were emplaced at 225−222 Ma and the potassic rocks at 216 Ma. The elemental and isotopic data suggest the ultrapotassic rocks were derived from melt-metasomatized, subcontinental lithospheric mantle, and the potassic rocks were derived from subducted continental sediments. The occurrence of the ultrapotassic rocks, along with spatiotemporal variations in the geochemistry of igneous rocks in Peninsular Malaysia, indicate that continental collision began at ca. 235 Ma, followed by progressive shallow continental subduction and slab breakoff at ca. 225 Ma. Two distinct post-collisional tectonomagmatic events occurred along the eastern Paleo-Tethyan suture, characterized by rapid exhumation associated with the formation of low-K mafic rocks and limited exhumation associated with ultrapotassic rocks. We propose that high- and low-angle continental subduction can account for these different post-collisional events. The results provide insights into the Late Triassic geological evolution of the eastern Paleo-Tethyan suture and enhance our understanding of the effect of slab geometry on post-collisional tectonomagmatism.

works.title: Subduction Initiation and Early Subduction Zone Development: Insights From the P–T–t Path of the Bay of Islands Metamorphic Sole
works.abstract: ABSTRACT The processes involved during subduction initiation (SI) remain poorly constrained, in part due to the rarity of geological archives. Ophiolites and their underlying metamorphic soles are thought to form during subduction zone infancy and may thus provide critical constraints. Metamorphic soles are derived from oceanic crust of the lower plate accreted to the base of the upper plate following SI and are exhumed during upper plate extension and ophiolitic crust generation. Their metamorphic evolution therefore provides insights into the thermal conditions at the nascent subduction plate interface and the trajectory of the lower plate during subduction infancy. In this study, we revisit the Bay of Islands complex (BOIC) metamorphic sole in the Newfoundland Appalachian Orogen and constrain P–T–t paths using phase equilibria modelling, melt reintegration and in situ U–Pb titanite geochronology. Our findings reveal generic SI and early subduction processes that align with geochronologic and metamorphic constraints reported for other soles as well as with the proposed early development of some modern subduction zones. The BOIC sole exhibits an inverted metamorphic gradient, with granulite and amphibolite facies metabasites at upper and middle structural levels, and greenschist facies metasedimentary and meta‐igneous rocks in the lowest level. Our results are consistent with burial of garnet–clinopyroxene–amphibolite sole rocks to peak pressure conditions of ~14 kbar and 750°C–850°C, followed by decompression to peak temperature conditions of 880°C–940°C and 10.5–12 kbar. The immediately underlying plagioclase–hornblende amphibolites equilibrated at ~740°C and ~8.5 kbar. Sole metamorphism produced melts and fluids that may have contributed to arc magmatism during early subduction. Titanite geochronology of granulite facies samples yields dates of 512 ± 11 Ma and 501 ± 11 Ma, interpreted to constrain prograde metamorphism. Our results indicate that the sole formed along a clockwise P–T–t path, with initial burial occurring along a relatively cold 18°C/km metamorphic gradient, followed by heating of the subduction interface during decompression and eventually exhumation to a 26°C–27°C/km gradient. Peak temperature conditions in the sole were coeval with c . 484–488 Ma ophiolitic crust formation. We propose that subduction initiated from far‐field forces and evolved to a self‐sustained state as the slab pull force increased. Upwelling of hot asthenospheric mantle during rollback can explain decompressional heating and ensuing exhumation along an increasing thermal gradient, coeval with upper plate extension.

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文利用岛湾变质基底岩的 P–T–t 轨迹约束俯冲起始及早期俯冲带的热与构造演化过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用相平衡模拟、熔体重整及原位榍石 U–Pb 年代学重建 P–T–t 轨迹。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 基底记录顺时针 P–T–t 轨迹，先沿冷梯度（18°C/km）埋藏至 ~14 kbar、750–850°C，减压加热至 880–940°C，最后沿热梯度（26–27°C/km）折返。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过熔体重整和原位定年精确厘定岛湾变质基底的时序，揭示减压加热与伸展同时发生。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲起始的热力学过程提供罕见的关键地质约束，并与现代俯冲带早期演化类比，对理解板块构造启动有意义。

works.title: Propagation of fluid-driven aseismic slip fronts under upper crustal conditions
works.abstract: Fracture mechanics models suggest that aseismic slip may either lag behind or outpace the fluid pressure front, depending on injection conditions and the fault’s initial stress state. However, direct experimental validation of these predictions has been lacking. Here, we report laboratory experiments on granite samples under upper crustal stress conditions, where we simultaneously tracked the propagation of fluid pressure and aseismic slip during fluid injection. We show that aseismic slip lags the pressure front at low injection rates and low initial stress but rapidly outpaces it under high-rate injection or near-failure initial stress conditions. The transition is governed by a dimensionless loading parameter that integrates injection rate, fault strength, and initial shear stress. Our results provide direct support for fracture mechanics models of fluid-induced aseismic slip and suggest that in critically stressed crustal faults, rupture propagation may commonly outpace fluid diffusion.
works.label: flagship

summary_bullets.research_question: 流体注入条件下，无震滑移与流体压力前缘的传播关系如何受注入速率和初始应力状态控制？
summary_bullets.methodology: 在上地壳应力条件下对花岗岩样品进行流体注入实验，同步追踪流体压力和滑动前缘的传播。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 低速率、低应力时滑移滞后于压力前缘，高速率或近临界应力时滑移迅速超越压力扩散前缘。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过实验直接验证了断裂力学模型关于无震滑移传播的预测，并定义无量纲参数控制过渡。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示临界应力断层上破裂传播常快于流体扩散，对诱发地震活动评估有重要启示。

works.title: Seismological evidence for fluid accumulation beneath the dormant East Eifel volcanic region, Germany
works.abstract: Abstract The East Eifel region is a Cenozoic-Quaternary intraplate volcanic field, well known as the type locality for maar volcanism. Its most recent major eruption occurred at the Laacher See volcano about 13,000 years ago and is regarded as the largest late Quaternary volcanic eruption in central Europe. Despite its dormant state, ongoing regional mantle-derived CO 2 degassing and persistent microseismicity, particularly within the Ochtendung Seismic Zone, indicate active subsurface processes, likely related to fluid migration. Using the Eifel large-N seismic network, we recorded over 500 local microearthquakes from September 2022 to August 2023. Earthquakes within the Ochtendung Seismic Zone exhibit distinct secondary S-wave phases, indicating strong impedance contrasts associated with fluid accumulations within the crust. By extracting travel-time differences between direct and reflected S waves and applying an eikonal-based reverse-time-migration-like approach, we image localized fluid-rich zones at depths of 12–14 km beneath the microearthquakes, suggesting the accumulation of magmatic fluids aligned near the seismic zone. Microearthquakes within the Ochtendung Seismic Zone occur as burst-like sequences reflecting successive ruptures. We propose that the sustained microseismicity results from slip reactivation induced by transient fluid flux, representing an example of natural hydraulic fracturing.

works.title: Deep magma underpressure and connectivity drive large dike intrusions
works.abstract: Large dikes are the main mechanism of crustal extension in volcanic areas, but the processes in the underlying magma system that supply the required volumes remain unclear. We show that 1.4 cubic kilometers of magma propagated under the Ethiopian rift in December 2024 and continued for ~3 months. Geodesy and seismicity reveal that the dike was fed from a network of magma reservoirs between 6 to 12 kilometers in depth with pathways rapidly forming between them. We calculate pressure changes in the reservoirs and show that underpressure developed in the deeper portion, creating the conditions to drain large magma volumes. We find that tectonic stress and availability of magma alone are not enough to drive intrusion of massive dikes. These events will start only after magma connectivity and deep underpressure develop. Similar conditions may be important for the transfer of large magma volumes from the mantle and the formation of large igneous provinces.
works.label: flagship

summary_bullets.research_question: 大规模岩脉侵入所需的大量岩浆供应机制是什么？

summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示仅有构造应力和岩浆供给不足，深层负压与连通性才是大规模侵入的必要条件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解地幔岩浆转移和大火成岩省形成提供了新的关键机制。

works.abstract: A sea-floor monitoring experiment observed oceanic crust being created between two tectonic plates — the first in situ measurement of this phenomenon. A sea-floor monitoring experiment observed oceanic crust being created between two tectonic plates — the first in situ measurement of this phenomenon.

works.title: Declines in organic matter persistence with increased soil carbon
works.abstract: Abstract The persistence of soil organic matter (SOM) is critical for predicting carbon-climate feedbacks, yet how increasing soil organic carbon (SOC) relates to long-term SOM persistence across environmental gradients remains unclear. Soil radiocarbon, SOM physicochemical composition, and microbial carbon use efficiency (CUE) are analyzed along a precipitation-driven gradient integrated with global datasets. Here we show, as SOC content increases, its persistence as reflected by radiocarbon signatures declines at both the transect and global scales. This pattern indicates that higher SOC soils are increasingly dominated by younger, faster-cycling carbon rather than older, stabilized pools. Plant carbon inputs strongly predict SOM persistence and are associated with younger, less persistent SOC. While microbial CUE increases with SOC, higher CUE does not necessarily enhance long-term stabilization. Our findings suggest that SOC content alone provides limited insight into long-term soil carbon persistence and highlight the importance of explicitly representing plant carbon inputs and microbially mediated persistence in Earth system models.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 土壤碳增加导致有机质持久性下降

summary_bullets.research_question: 土壤有机碳含量增加如何影响其长期持久性，该关系在环境梯度上如何变化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合降水梯度样带实测与全球数据，分析放射性碳、有机质组成和微生物碳利用效率。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高有机碳土壤中碳更年轻、更新更快，持久性下降，植物碳输入是主要预测因子。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示土壤碳储量与持久性反相关，并强调植物输入和微生物过程的机制作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 挑战以碳含量评估稳定性的传统认知，为地球系统模型改进提供关键依据。

works.title: Iron as a driver of organic carbon fate in permafrost regions
works.abstract: This Perspective explores how changes in microbial and hydrological processes, in response to permafrost thaw across Arctic landscapes, alter iron–organic carbon interactions and therefore carbon cycling and greenhouse gas emissions. Iron (Fe) and its biogeochemical interactions with organic carbon (OC) exert critical controls over carbon storage and water quality across Arctic and sub-Arctic landscapes. Permafrost thaw affects Fe–organic carbon interactions by exposing thawed material and driving shifts in hydrologic regimes. Here we propose a conceptual framework describing how Fe–OC interactions respond to permafrost thaw and the implications for global carbon cycling. The framework builds on current understanding of hydrologically driven processes that are altered by permafrost thaw, including microbial Fe reduction that influences OC decomposition and carbon emissions; Fe cycling through redox transformations and sulfide oxidation; dissolution and reprecipitation of Fe–OC assemblages; and Fe export to river networks. We put forward four testable hypotheses—on topics from Fe supply to its role in soil OC storage and transfer to rivers—to advance understanding of the coupled environmental controls on pore-scale reactions (that is, microscale reactions at mineral–water–microorganism interfaces) that are central to global Fe–OC cycling. Our framework highlights how soil-profile- and landscape-scale processes, such as hydrologic connectivity and redox dynamics, regulate pore-scale Fe–OC reactions.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 铁作为多年冻土区有机碳命运的驱动因素

summary_bullets.research_question: 冻土融化如何通过微生物和水文过程改变铁-有机碳相互作用，从而影响碳循环和温室气体排放？
summary_bullets.methodology: 构建概念框架，整合微生物铁还原、氧化还原循环、溶解-再沉淀及铁输出等水文驱动过程。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 冻土融化促使铁还原影响有机碳分解，铁硫氧化耦合及铁-有机碳复合物变化调控碳储存与释放。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出四个可检验假设，将孔隙尺度反应与土壤剖面及景观尺度的水文和氧化还原动态连接。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解冻土区碳命运和温室气体排放提供了铁-碳耦合机制性框架，指导未来研究方向。

works.title: How an ancient continental breakup ultimately helped spawn the vast Antarctic Ice Sheet
works.abstract: Mantle waves and tectonic stretching lofted polar mountains into a deep freeze
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 古老的大陆裂解如何最终促使广阔的南极冰盖形成

summary_bullets.research_question: 古代大陆裂解如何最终促成南极冰盖的形成？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过地质与地球物理分析揭示地幔波与构造拉伸的作用。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地幔波和构造拉伸抬升极地山脉，引发深层冻结形成冰盖。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将大陆裂解、地幔动力学与冰川启动直接关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为冰盖形成机制提供构造新解释，对气候与地质交叉研究有启示。

works.title: Dual clumped isotopes in foraminiferal calcite reveal kinetic bias in some species
works.abstract: Abstract Clumped isotope (∆ 47 ) analyses of foraminifera provide a powerful means to reconstruct upper and bottom water temperatures, independent of seawater δ 18 O and elemental composition. We show statistically significant disequilibrium in the dual (∆ 47 -∆ 48 ) clumped isotope composition of some large benthic foraminifera, while other large benthic foraminifera plot within analytical uncertainty of ∆ 47 –∆ 48 equilibrium. This deviation suggests the influence of reaction kinetics, such as kinetic effects during CO 2 absorption or a combination of ion attachment/detachment effects at the solution-crystal interface and slight DIC disequilibrium. Measured core-top, planktic and deep-sea benthic foraminifera plot within the 95% confidence level of empirical ∆ 47 -∆ 48 equilibrium, although additional measurements are required to confidently exclude kinetic ∆ 47 -∆ 48 bias. Dual clumped isotope measurements of large benthic foraminifera from the Eocene of the Paris and Hampshire basins that conform with ∆ 47 -∆ 48 equilibrium (95% confidence level) further support existing evidence for surface ocean temperatures ~12–17 °C warmer than today.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 有孔虫方解石双团簇同位素揭示部分物种的动力学偏差

summary_bullets.research_question: 某些有孔虫的团簇同位素组成是否偏离热力学平衡，受动力学效应影响？
summary_bullets.methodology: 同时分析有孔虫方解石的 Δ47 和 Δ48 双团簇同位素组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 部分大型底栖有孔虫显示显著的动力学非平衡偏差，而浮游和深海底栖种基本处于平衡。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用双团簇同位素联合判别有孔虫中动力学偏差与非平衡信号。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为古温度重建中识别可靠载体和避免动力学偏差提供了新指标和约束。

works.title: Mineralized carbonates contribute to the millennial durability of Roman concrete
works.abstract: Roman concrete structures have remained serviceable for nearly two millennia and are widely regarded as outstanding examples of durable ancient engineering. Existing literature attributes Roman concrete longevity to the pozzolanic reaction that occurs between reactive volcanic ashes and lime. While the pozzolanic reaction is of fundamental importance, we argue that carbonation over a long period of time also substantially enhances the durability and potential self-healing properties of concrete. To validate this claim, a comprehensive analysis of the concrete used in a latrine included in the Canopus western substructures, in Hadrian’s Villa (Roman imperial residence, Tivoli, Italy, 2nd century AD), is performed using multiscale spectroscopic and tomographic approaches to uncover the mechanisms behind the resilience of these enduring structures. Microstructural evidence reveals that volcanic lava composed of leucite, analcime, and ferrian diopside was combined by the Romans with lime at a water-to-binder ratio of ~0.4 to 0.45 to mix the concrete. Calcite cementation in pore spaces and fractures served as the primary binding mineral phase, while the formation of a relatively minor amount of calcium-aluminum-silicate-hydrate precipitated around and between lava fragments to further enhance the integrity of concrete. Conversely, unhydrated calcium oxide reacted with atmospheric carbon dioxide and moisture to form volumetrically dominant calcite cements, creating the primary driver to reinforce structural strength and occlude porosity. This radiaxial fibrous calcite has the potential to mitigate environmental and mechanical stresses in modern concrete infrastructure and advance the development of sustainable and resilient construction materials in the future.
works.label: flagship

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究罗马混凝土千年耐久性是否源于长期碳化作用及其微观机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用多尺度光谱与断层扫描技术分析哈德良别墅厕所混凝土样本。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 放射纤维状方解石胶结物通过充填空隙和裂缝显著增强强度与自修复能力。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示碳化形成的方解石是主导耐久性关键因素，超越传统火山灰反应解释。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为开发可持续、自修复现代混凝土材料提供仿生学与工艺原理借鉴。

works.title: Microseismic monitoring with the quake neural operator
works.abstract: Abstract Accurate monitoring of small-scale seismic events is essential for seismological studies. Traditional techniques rely on manual or automated seismic phase picking, which often leads to inaccuracies in microseismic monitoring due to unclear phase onsets. Here we introduce the Quake Neural Operator (QNO), a deep learning algorithm that builds earthquake catalogs directly from continuous data without explicit phase picking. As a multi-task operator, QNO utilizes classification and regression to detect and locate events across arbitrary seismic network geometries. We show that QNO successfully characterizes events where state-of-the-art phase picking fails. Applying QNO to the Geysers geothermal field, we identify nearly an order of magnitude more seismic detections than reported in routine catalogs. These results are validated through comparison with the Phase Neural Operator and visual inspection. QNO holds the potential to reveal undetected seismic activity, enhancing our understanding of subsurface processes critical to both natural phenomena and industry applications.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 利用quake neural operator进行微震监测

works.title: Counterfactual modeling isolates sand mining impacts, revealing it as a key driver of Mekong Delta destabilization
works.abstract: Sand mining is a poorly quantified threat to river deltas because its impacts are often confounded with those of dams and climate change. Here, we isolate its effects in the Vietnamese Mekong Delta, a global sand mining hot spot, using a long-term numerical model and observed mining data. Results show that mining exceeds natural sediment supply by 6 to 15 times, causing riverbed erosion across ~65% of channels, with mean incision rates of ~0.10 meters per year (~25 to 30% of total incision driven by all drivers). This channel deepening alters flow, reduces sediment transport, and enhances saltwater intrusion. Sand mining alone contributes ~16 to 30% of the annual salinity increase, extending intrusion up to ~1.5 kilometers further inland during the dry season. These changes demonstrate that sand mining is a major, previously underquantified driver of delta instability, affecting river morphology, flow, sediment, and salinity. This study provides a framework to quantify these impacts and support better management of sand extraction in vulnerable deltas worldwide.
works.label: flagship

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何分离并量化采砂对湄公河三角洲稳定性的独立影响？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用长期数值模型和观测采砂数据进行反事实模拟，分离采砂与其他驱动因素的效应。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 采砂超过自然供沙6-15倍，导致约65%河道侵蚀，并贡献16-30%的盐度增加。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过反事实建模将采砂影响从大坝和气候变化效应中分离并量化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为全球脆弱三角洲的采砂管理提供可推广的定量评估框架。

works.title: Hadean bridgmanite in the source of a present-day ocean island
works.abstract: Abstract Constraining the complex dynamics of the inner Earth unites research efforts across several scientific disciplines, including geochemistry, geophysics and geodynamics. Seismological and geodynamic studies offer insights into the present state of the mantle structure, whereas geochemical approaches characterize its chemical and isotopic heterogeneities 1 , shedding light on the complexity of its evolution. One key challenge is determining the age and origin of its chemical heterogeneities. Here we present new high-precision Nd isotopic measurements in present-day volcanism that identify heterogeneities dating back to the Earth’s earliest history. We report significantly positive 142 Nd anomalies in lavas from the submarine Fani Maoré volcano in the Comoros archipelago. These anomalies require the preservation, in the mantle, of material depleted in light rare-earth elements (REE) and formed within the first 100 million years (Myr) of Earth’s history. We suggest that this material is mainly composed of bridgmanite that crystallized from an early Earth magma ocean. This Hadean bridgmanite may be more widespread in the present-day mantle than previously expected, raising new questions about its survival over billions of years of plate tectonics and vigorous mantle convection.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 现今海洋岛屿源区中的冥古宙 bridgmanite

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何确定现今地幔化学不均一性的年龄和起源，追溯至地球最早期的演化历史？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对科摩罗群岛海底火山熔岩进行高精度钕同位素（142Nd）测量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现显著正的142Nd异常，表明地幔中保存了地球形成首一亿年内形成的轻稀土亏损物质。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出该异常物质主要由冥古宙岩浆洋结晶的布里奇曼石构成，且其分布可能比预期更广。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地幔长期保存极古老物质提供新证据，挑战了对板块构造和地幔对流混合效率的传统认知。

works.title: Mélange melting generates metasomatic precursors for post-collisional potassic magmas
works.abstract: The significant role of mélanges in the sources of various mantle-derived magmas, particularly those recording crust-mantle interactions, has been increasingly debated. However, previous experimental studies have predominantly focused on their contribution to arc magmatism, leaving the links between mélange melting and postcollisional orogenic potassic magmatism poorly constrained. Here, we conducted high-temperature and high-pressure experiments simulating the partial melting of mélange rocks—consisting of continental crustal sediment, terrigenous blueschist, and depleted peridotite—at relatively shallow mantle conditions (e.g., at 1.5–2.0 GPa and 750–1150 °C). Our results demonstrate that the mass ratios of different lithologies within the mélange critically govern the major element compositions of the resulting melts, effectively distinguishing the petrogenetic pathways of postcollisional K-rich magmas from typical primitive arc magmas. Furthermore, rather than directly representing the final erupted magmas, our experimental melts act as pristine metasomatic agents. They represent the primary stage of crust-mantle interaction during shallow imbrication, where they ascend to refertilize the overlying lithospheric mantle. The subsequent partial melting of this newly enriched mantle—driven by postcollisional lithospheric dynamics—ultimately generates the final erupted K-rich magmas with their distinct geochemical signatures.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 混杂岩熔融产生后碰撞钾质岩浆的交代前体

summary_bullets.research_question: 混杂岩熔融与后碰撞造山钾质岩浆作用之间的成因联系尚不清楚。
summary_bullets.methodology: 在浅部地幔条件下（1.5–2.0 GPa, 750–1150°C）对混杂岩进行高温高压部分熔融实验。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 混杂岩的岩性比例控制熔体主量元素，实验熔体作为展交代介质富集地幔，其再熔融形成钾质岩浆。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了混杂岩熔融产生交代前体而非直接岩浆，为后碰撞钾质岩浆提供新的源区富集路径。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解后碰撞构造背景下的壳幔相互作用与钾质岩浆成因提供了关键实验依据和模型。

works.title: Comment on “Super-reduced and ultra-high pressure minerals in ophiolites: A critical review and the case for meteorite impact” by
works.abstract: Su and Jing (2025) hypothesized that meteorite impacts could have formed ultra-reduced and ultra-high-pressure minerals (especially microdiamonds) within ophiolites. Although competing genetic models enrich academic debate, systematic comparison between impact diamonds (from Popigai, Kara, Ukrainian craters and ureilite meteorites) and ophiolite-hosted diamonds reveals fundamental discrepancies across five key indices: crystal morphology, internal microstructures, nitrogen impurity characteristics, carbon isotope signatures and tectonic settings. Comprehensive mineralogical, geochemical and geological observations collectively rule out an impact origin for ophiolite-hosted diamonds.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 对“蛇绿岩中极度还原与超高压矿物：批判性评述与陨石撞击成因论证”一文的评论

summary_bullets.research_question: 评判蛇绿岩中极端还原矿物（尤其是微金刚石）是否由陨石撞击形成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 系统对比撞击金刚石与蛇绿岩金刚石在晶体形态、内部结构、氮杂质、碳同位素和构造环境五方面差异。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 矿物学、地球化学和地质学观察全面排除了蛇绿岩金刚石的撞击成因。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过五大指标综合对比，系统驳斥蛇绿岩金刚石的撞击假说。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为蛇绿岩金刚石成因提供关键约束，深化对深部碳循环和极端条件地质过程的理解。

works.title: Formation of Cu‐Bearing and Mo‐Bearing Miarolitic Cavities During the Magmatic–Hydrothermal Transition in Porphyry Metallogenic Systems
works.abstract: ABSTRACT Miarolitic cavities (MCs) serve as key indicators of volatile phase exsolution during magmatic differentiation, providing critical insights into the transition between igneous and hydrothermal regimes. Despite their metallogenic significance, the mechanisms controlling the selective extraction of metal‐bearing fluids remain poorly understood. This study investigates the microstructural and geochemical characteristics of chalcopyrite‐ and molybdenite‐dominated MCs in the Hongyuan porphyry Mo–Cu deposit (NW China). The cavities exhibit sulfide cores surrounded by graphic quartz‐feldspar, aplitic, and K‐alteration halos. Mass balance calculations reveal enrichments in Cu, Fe, Na, and Si during the magmatic–hydrothermal transition. The term “sulfide‐silicate bulb” refers to silica‐saturated fluid pockets or bubbles that develop during hypogene copper mineralization in porphyry deposits. The central sulfide‐silicate bulbs represent hypersolidus mineral assemblages, with differential Cu–Mo precipitation linked to quartz growth rates. Late‐stage meteoric water alteration further influences metal precipitation. We propose a genetic model wherein sulfide‐silicate bulbs act as the primary vehicles for the extraction, transport, and focused precipitation of Cu‐ and Mo‐rich fluids. Our results highlight the critical role of quartz growth rates and meteoric fluid influx in controlling metal segregation, providing a new framework for understanding the spatial zonation in porphyry Cu–Mo systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 斑岩成矿系统岩浆-热液过渡阶段中富铜与富钼晶洞的形成

summary_bullets.research_question: 斑岩成矿系统中岩浆-热液过渡阶段如何选择性萃取铜钼金属流体？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对红源斑岩钼铜矿床的显微结构和地球化学特征进行质量平衡计算分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 硫化物-硅酸盐泡是萃取、运输和沉淀富铜钼流体的主要载体，石英生长速率控制钼铜差异沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出硫化物-硅酸盐泡作为金属萃取运移的载体，并揭示石英生长速率与大气水流入的控制作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解斑岩铜钼系统的空间分带和金属选择性沉淀提供了新的成因框架。

works.title: Late Eocene to Oligocene intracontinental deformation and growth of the northwestern Tibetan Plateau
works.abstract: Abstract The timing and mechanisms of deformation along the northwestern Tibetan Plateau remain poorly constrained. Here we present new low-temperature thermochronological data from the western Songpan-Ganzi terrane, a key yet understudied region of the plateau interior. Apatite fission track and zircon and apatite (U-Th)/He ages cluster in the late Eocene-Oligocene, and thermal history modeling indicates moderate to rapid cooling and exhumation during this interval, followed by limited post-Oligocene cooling. These results suggest that deformation and exhumation were primarily concentrated in the late Eocene-Oligocene, with subsequent limited cooling and exhumation across the high-elevation, low-relief plateau interior. In contrast, younger cooling ages from the West Kunlun Mountains indicate that Neogene deformation and exhumation were localized along the plateau margin. Together, these observations highlight strongly diachronous deformation histories across northern Tibetan Plateau and provide new constraints on the spatiotemporal evolution of plateau development.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 晚始新世至渐新世青藏高原西北部的陆内变形与生长

works.title: Enrichment of germanium in sphalerite from the Nanmushu Pb-Zn deposit in SW China: Constraints from physical and chemical properties of ore-forming fluids
works.abstract: The Nanmushu Pb-Zn deposit in the Mayuan district of Shaanxi Province, located on the northern margin of the Yangtze Block, is a representative Ge-rich deposit in the Mayuan ore concentration area and is therefore of significant scientific importance. Currently, the influence of physical and chemical parameters such as temperature, fO2, fS2 and pH of ore-forming fluids on Ge precipitation and mineralization efficiency in Ge-rich Pb-Zn deposits is not yet clear. Accordingly, in this research, (LA)-(MC)-ICP-MS combined with thermodynamic phase diagram analysis was employed to investigate the key factors controlling Ge enrichment in sphalerite and the modes of Ge substitution into sphalerite. These results suggest that sphalerite in the Nanmushu deposit commonly exhibits zoned texture, with high enrichment of Ge observed in the second and fourth zones, with average contents of 612 ppm and 545 ppm, respectively. Ge substitutes for Zn via coupled substitution with monovalent cations, expressed as: 2(Ag+ + Cu+) + Ge4+ ↔ 3 Zn2+. Sulfur and carbon isotope composition and thermodynamic phase diagram analysis reveal that pH and fO2 exerts only a minor influence on Ge enrichment in sphalerite, whereas temperature and fS2 jointly control the enrichment process. The minimum fS2 value required for Ge enrichment systematically increases with rising temperature, while relatively high fS2 conditions are conducive to Ge enrichment.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西南楠木树铅锌矿床闪锌矿中锗的富集：来自成矿流体物理和化学性质的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 成矿流体的温度、fO2、fS2和pH如何影响富锗铅锌矿床中锗的沉淀与富集？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用(LA)-(MC)-ICP-MS微量元素分析结合热力学相图模拟进行研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 闪锌矿分带明显，锗在第二、四带高度富集，温度和fS2共同控制锗富集过程。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了锗以2(Ag⁺+Cu⁺)+Ge⁴⁺↔3Zn²⁺方式替代锌，并量化了温硫耦合控矿机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解锗成矿机理和指导同类矿床勘探提供了重要的物理化学约束。

works.title: Linking plates to plumes in the Cretaceous Pacific
works.abstract: Two independent studies imply that a remarkable burst of voluminous volcanism on the Pacific plate during the Cretaceous is attributable to coupled plate–mantle dynamics. Together, their findings show how enhanced subduction, mantle heterogeneity, and plate tectonic boundaries collectively controlled the timing and expression of these oceanic large igneous provinces.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 白垩纪太平洋板块与地幔柱的联系

summary_bullets.research_question: 白垩纪太平洋板块上大规模火山爆发的成因机制是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合两项独立研究，分析俯冲作用、地幔不均一性和板块边界演化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 增强的俯冲、地幔不均一性与板块构造边界共同控制了海盆大火成岩省的产生时间和表现。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将板块与地幔柱动力学明确耦合，揭示板缘过程对海盆内部岩浆活动的控制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为大火成岩省形成机制提供新框架，促进深地幔与板块构造关联研究。

works.title: Mixed paragenesis diamond inclusions form during metasomatic fluid evolution
works.abstract: Mineral inclusions in diamond provide the context for diamond formation, yet some diamonds contain disequilibrium ‘mixed paragenesis’ mineral inclusions. Mixed paragenesis diamonds are inferred to somehow record growth of a single diamond in both mafic eclogitic and peridotitic substrates. Here we use thermodynamic modelling with the Extended Deep Earth Water (DEW) model to show that mixed paragenesis mineral inclusions can form during a single episode of diamond growth via fluid-rock metasomatism in the lithospheric mantle. Simulations of fluid infiltration and reactions predict sequential mineral precipitation, with early eclogitic minerals (omphacite and garnet) followed by more peridotitic minerals (e.g., olivine and Mg-rich garnet) during continued diamond growth. Concurrently, modelled fluids evolve from silicic toward carbonatitic compositions and reproduce the compositional range of high density fluids observed in fibrous diamonds. These results demonstrate that mixed paragenesis inclusions and the diversity of diamond-forming fluids can arise from progressive metasomatic reactions during a single diamond-forming event, rather than requiring a diamond to grow first in eclogite and then in peridotite.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 混合共生金刚石包裹体形成于交代流体演化过程中

summary_bullets.research_question: 金刚石中混合共生矿物包裹体的形成是否需多次生长于不同基岩，还是可由单一交代事件解释？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用扩展深部地球水模型进行热力学模拟，计算流体-岩石交代反应中的矿物沉淀序列和流体成分演化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 混合共生包裹体可在单次金刚石生长中通过流体-岩石交代作用依次沉淀榴辉岩型与橄榄岩型矿物。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用热力学模拟证明混合共生金刚石成因为渐进交代反应，而非金刚石先后生长于两种不同基岩。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为金刚石中矿物包裹体多样性及成矿流体演化提供统一机制，对地幔交代与深部碳循环研究有重要启示。

works.title: Measurement of isotope fractionation associated with crystal nucleation: Implications for biocrystallization studies
works.abstract: Isotopic fractionation is a unique indicator of the mechanisms of mineral precipitation from aqueous solutions, but existing theory does not account for nucleation effects or nonclassical growth mechanisms. Here, using barite (BaSO 4 ) as a model crystal, we provide an experimental measurement of isotope fractionation associated with nucleation. We isolated nucleation effects by precipitating crystals on an organic film, where cation enrichment creates a highly supersaturated microenvironment so nucleation dominates over crystal growth. In a single batch experiment, we retrieved nanocrystals (~1.5 nm) from the organic substrate and large microcrystals in bulk solution where growth dominates. The 138 Ba/ 134 Ba isotopic fractionation of −0.6 to −0.8‰ for the microcrystals match those expected for classical ion-by-ion growth from a moderately supersaturated solution, whereas the fractionation for the nucleation-dominated nanocrystals is about −0.1‰, falling within the reported equilibrium fractionation range between barite and aqueous Ba 2+ . These results demonstrate that cation isotopic fractionation in sparingly soluble salts like barite and calcite is not a single-valued function of saturation indices (SI) and precipitation rate as predicted with current theory, with the fractionation factor (∆ 138/134 Ba barite-soln = δ 138/134 Ba barite − δ 138/134 Ba solution ) increasing in magnitude with increasing SI. Instead, the shifting precipitation mechanism(s) at high SI cause the fractionation factor to return to near-equilibrium values. This finding may be critical for understanding isotopic fractionation in localized extreme environments in nature, including for Ba isotopes during biomineralization.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 晶体成核相关的同位素分馏测量：对生物结晶研究的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 现有理论未考虑成核对同位素分馏的影响，本文探究晶体成核过程的钡同位素分馏效应。
summary_bullets.methodology: 在有机膜上沉淀重晶石分离成核与生长，对比纳米晶和微晶的¹³⁸Ba/¹³⁴Ba同位素比值。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成核主导的纳米晶分馏接近平衡值（约-0.1‰），而生长主导的微晶分馏更负，高过饱和度下分馏因子返回近平衡。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次实验量化了晶体成核的同位素分馏，证明沉淀机制转变可反转分馏趋势。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 挑战了同位素分馏仅与饱和度相关的单值函数模型，对生物矿化和极端环境同位素示踪具有重要价值。

works.title: Ultralow-angle faults produce giant earthquakes
works.abstract: What controls the occurrence of giant earthquakes remains a central question in seismology. We reveal a notably simple—but previously overlooked—relationship between earthquake size and fault dip in subduction zones. Global earthquake statistics show a robust dependence of earthquake size on fault dip, with the probability of extreme events peaking on ultralow-angle faults. Through three case studies, we demonstrate that earthquakes tend to grow larger when the fault geometry is aligned with the regional stress field. We further discuss how such favorable stress configurations are generated along subduction interfaces and emphasize the critical importance of monitoring the temporal evolution of stress in subduction zones to better forecast future megaearthquakes.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 超低角度断层引发巨型地震

summary_bullets.research_question: 什么因素控制巨大地震的发生，特别是断层倾角如何影响地震规模。
summary_bullets.methodology: 全球地震统计分析与三个案例研究，结合区域应力场与断层几何关系探讨。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地震规模与断层倾角显著相关，巨大地震概率在超低角度断层上达到峰值。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了地震规模与断层倾角之间此前被忽视的简单而稳健的关系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 强调监测俯冲带应力演化的重要性，为改进特大地震预测提供新方向。

works.title: Absolute chronology of the Early Palaeolithic Karatau Culture in Central Asia
works.abstract: Abstract Central Asia represents a key region for our understanding of early human dispersal patterns, because it served as a migration corridor that linked the Levant and southern Caucasus with Northeast Asia. However, no Early Palaeolithic sites in Central Asia are anchored with reliable age constraints, including the thick loess-palaeosol sections in Tajikistan that recorded early human activities and environmental changes over multiple glacial-interglacial cycles. This lack of absolute age constraints is presently a key factor limiting our understanding of the early human occupation history of this region. Here, we provide a comprehensive description and an absolute chronological framework for the Early Palaeolithic Karatau Culture; defined by the rich lithic assemblages found in palaeosols in the Khovaling Loess Plateau, Tajikistan. Age constraints are provided through multi-method analysis of three loess-palaeosol sections in the Khovaling Loess Plateau, combining luminescence ages, cosmogenic 26 Al- 10 Be concentrations, and magnetostratigraphic boundaries into a probabilistic inverse age-depth model. This model shows that the Karatau Culture flourished with the onset of Marine Isotope Stage 15, thrived during Marine Isotope Stage 13 and 11, but disappeared around onset of Marine Isotope Stage 10. We frame the archaeological occupations within local and regional ecological settings to better understand the drivers of Pleistocene human migrations in Central Asia.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 中亚旧石器时代早期卡拉套文化的绝对年代学

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何确定中亚早期旧石器时代卡拉套文化的绝对年代及其在人类扩散中的作用？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过光释光测年、宇宙成因核素26Al-10Be和磁性地层学构建概率逆年龄深度模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 卡拉套文化始于MIS 15，繁盛于MIS 13和11，消失于MIS 10初期。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次为中亚早期旧石器遗址提供多方法绝对年代框架，填补关键时间空白。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解更新世人类沿中亚走廊的迁徙和生态适应提供可靠年代标尺。

works.title: Earth is mostly diffusive: A global analysis of landscape evolution
works.abstract: Earth’s landscapes—from mountains to river deltas—are shaped by sediment erosion, transport, and deposition. However, most landscape evolution models represent only two processes: diffusive soil creep and bedrock river incision. How much of Earth’s surface can be represented by these two processes alone? To address this question, we mapped the global abundance and distribution of eight major geomorphic process domains, finding that ~75% of Earth’s land area consists of soil-mantled hillslopes and flatlands dominated by diffusive soil creep, while 0.5% is a bedrock river corridor. While other process domains (glaciers, lakes, alluvial river corridors, aeolian deserts, and bedrock hillslopes) make up only ~24% of Earth’s land area, they transport most of the sediment from continents to oceans. Process domains align with different topographic, climatic, and tectonic conditions, indicating a pathway to improve coupled global landscape, climate, and tectonic evolution models. Overall, our results reveal the distribution of the eight major geomorphic process domains globally and highlight the spatial dominance of diffusive topography.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 地球以扩散作用为主：全球景观演化分析

summary_bullets.research_question: 地表多大比例可由扩散性土壤蠕动和基岩河流侵蚀这两种过程代表？
summary_bullets.methodology: 绘制全球八大地貌过程域的丰度与分布图。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 约75%陆地由扩散主导的土壤覆盖坡地和平原组成，仅0.5%为基岩河道。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次量化全球八大地貌过程域的空间分布与物质传输贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为结合气候与构造模型改进全球景观演化预测提供了空间明确的过程域框架。

works.title: Svalbard-barents ice sheet instability enhanced delivery of reactive iron to the ocean
works.abstract: Abstract Iron (Fe) plays a key role in marine environments as a bio-limiting nutrient and a control on sedimentary burial of carbon and other nutrients. Sensitive glacial systems provide an important delivery mechanism for Fe to the ocean, but it is unknown how these glacial sources will change as ice retreats. Sedimentary records from the Yermak Plateau, proximal to the Svalbard-Barents Ice Sheet provide an opportunity to investigate how past glacial instability may have affected bioavailable iron delivery. Here we find that over the past 135 ka, pulsed reactive Fe export to the Yermak Plateau occurred at least 5 times, during intervals of ice sheet retreat or advance. Fe-rich layers preserve high contents of reactive Fe phases, some of which were likely bioavailable at the time of deposition. Glacial Fe from Svalbard may have been delivered either directly by meltwater plumes or through remobilization of Fe deposited in fjord and shelf sediments. The delivery of reactive Fe hundreds of kilometers offshore during these events indicates that ice sheet instability in modern settings could perturb high latitude nutrient cycles.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 斯瓦尔巴-巴伦支冰盖的不稳定性增强了活性铁向海洋的输送

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示斯瓦尔巴-巴伦支冰盖在过去13.5万年间的不稳定如何影响活性铁向海洋的输送。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用耶马克高原的沉积记录分析过去13.5万年的反应性铁相态及其沉积环境。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 冰盖进退期间至少发生5次脉冲式活性铁输出，部分铁相可能在当时具有生物可利用性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将冰盖不稳定性与远洋活性铁脉冲输运联系起来，拓展冰山融水驱动的营养盐机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为预测现代极地冰盖退缩对高纬度海洋营养循环的扰动提供古气候类比依据。

works.title: Urokodia sheds light on the origin of chelicerae and book gills of Chelicerata
works.abstract: Chelicerates are a diverse group of terrestrial and aquatic arthropods, yet their origin and early evolution remain debated1–6. Among different hypotheses7–11, one proposes that the front appendages, known as chelicerae, of chelicerates evolved from the short great appendages (SGAs) of Cambrian megacheirans12–16 and that book gills originated from their trunk limbs7. Although taxa such as Mollisonia plenovenatrix7 and Megachelicerax cousteaui16 provide important clues to the early evolution of chelicerates, the morphological transition from megacheiran-like appendages to true chelicerae and book gills remains unresolved. Here we use X-ray microtomography to reveal the three-dimensional anatomy of Urokodia aequalis, an early Cambrian euarthropod from the Chengjiang biota of China. Urokodia has a seven-segmented head with a sclerotized hypostome, pincer-like SGAs and biramous trunk appendages with overlapping exite flaps. Its pincer-like SGAs represent a bridge structure between the appearance of multisegmented SGAs and true chelicerae, and its trunk appendages support a megacheiran origin of book gills. Phylogenetic analyses consistently confirm the monophyly of Cheliceromorpha17, with Urokodia being the earliest-branching upper stem-group chelicerate that links lower stem-group megacheirans to crownward forms such as Mollisonia and Megachelicerax. Microtomography reconstructions and phylogenetic analyses of Urokodia aequalis from the Chengjiang biota of China provide an updated interpretation of the evolution of anatomical structures in chelicerates.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: Urokodia 揭示了螯肢亚门螯肢和书鳃的起源

summary_bullets.research_question: 螯肢动物的螯肢和书鳃的起源与早期演化过程尚不明确。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用X射线显微断层成像技术重建澄江生物群中Urokodia aequalis的三维解剖结构。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Urokodia的钳状短大附肢是螯肢的过渡形态，双肢型躯干附肢支持书鳃源自大附肢类。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过三维证据揭示连接大附肢类与真螯肢类的桥梁结构，并整合系统发育分析。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为螯肢动物关键创新特征的演化序列提供了直接的化石形态学链条，完善了节肢动物早期演化框架。

works.title: Accelerating glacier recession contrasts rock glacier stability in a temperate mountain range
works.abstract: Cryospheric landforms play a critical role in alpine hydrology and ecosystems. Using historical and contemporary data spanning nearly six decades (1967–2024), we assessed elevation change for glaciers, rock glaciers, and perennial snowfields and the thermal response of streams in the Teton Range, Wyoming, United States. Glaciers and snowfields thinned at −0.84 ± 0.07 meters per year (m year −1 ) and −0.59 ± 0.04 m year −1 between 2014 and 2022, a ~7-fold increase relative to 1967–2014, driven by warming summer temperatures. In contrast, rock glaciers are near equilibrium (−0.05 ± 0.05 m year −1 ) and saw no change in rate. Since 2015, snowfield-fed streams have warmed rapidly (+3.4°C), whereas glacier- and rock glacier–fed streams have warmed at lower magnitudes (+0.9° and +0.6°C, respectively). Our results demonstrate the greater resilience of rock glaciers to atmospheric warming, highlighting the critical role that these features will play as glaciers and perennial snowfields are lost.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 温带山脉冰川加速退缩与石冰川稳定性形成对比

summary_bullets.research_question: 评估冰川、岩石冰川和积雪场的高程变化及补给溪流的热响应差异。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用近六十年历史和当代数据，分析高程变化速率与溪流温度变化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 冰川和积雪场近期减薄速率猛增，而岩石冰川保持稳定，积雪补给溪流升温最剧烈。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次对比揭示岩石冰川对气候变暖的高度稳定性及其未来水文主导作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 指明当冰川消退后，岩石冰川将成为高山水文与生态的关键稳定水源。

works.title: Primary controls on mineralization scale in the Zhunuo-Beimulang porphyry copper ore cluster, Gangdese Arc, Tibet: Input of juvenile lower-crust melt and fluid exsolution
works.abstract: The Gangdese porphyry copper belt (GPCB) hosts Miocene porphyry Cu deposits within broadly similar intrusive rocks but showing pronounced variations in mineralization scale. The Zhunuo-Beimulang ore cluster, at the westernmost part of the GPCB, records two mineralization stages: a ∼ 16 Ma stage forming small deposits and prospects (e.g., Wubaduolai and Cimabanshuo), and a ∼ 14 Ma stage producing the Zhunuo and Beimulang deposits. Both stages show adakite-like affinities and evolved under similarly oxidized and hydrous conditions, providing a basis for evaluating porphyry Cu endowment in the district and GPCB. In this study, whole-rock and in situ geochemical and isotopic analyses were conducted on ore-forming porphyries from both stages. Early-stage porphyries show Sr/Y of 35–77, εHf(t) of −6.9 to −2.1, δ18O of 7.1–8.2 ‰, and ΔFMQ of 4.13–5.82, whereas late-stage porphyries show higher Sr/Y of 51–139, εHf(t) of −3.2 to 0.03, δ18O of 5.5–8.4 ‰, and ΔFMQ of 4.32–6.01. Sm-Nd and Hf isotopes indicate derivation mainly from partial melting of Tibetan juvenile lower crust with minor metasomatized mantle input. A source-constrained magma mixing model indicates increasing juvenile lower-crust contributions from 33 to 50 % in the ∼ 16 Ma magmas to 48–70 % in the ∼ 14 Ma magmas. Apatite volatile data further indicate more extensive fluid exsolution in the ∼ 14 Ma systems. Collectively, although adakitic affinity, high oxygen fugacity, and high water content establish a favorable magmatic background, variations in juvenile lower-crust input and fluid exsolution efficiency may control Cu endowment in Miocene porphyry systems in the GPCB.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 西藏冈底斯弧朱诺-北姆朗斑岩铜矿集群矿化规模的主要控制因素：新生下地壳熔体的注入与流体出溶

summary_bullets.research_question: 为什么冈底斯斑岩铜矿带中侵位时间相近的岩体却形成了矿化规模差异显著的矿床？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对早、晚两期含矿斑岩进行全岩和原位地球化学及同位素分析，结合磷灰石挥发分数据和岩浆混合模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 晚期成矿岩浆具有更高比例的新生下地壳熔体贡献和更充分的流体出溶，控制了大矿形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了源区新生下地壳输入与流体出溶效率是控制斑岩铜矿规模的关键因素。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为斑岩铜矿带的成矿潜力评价提供了新的岩浆成因指标和找矿方向。

works.title: Ore-forming volatiles linked to mafic magma recharge in the Xiongcun porphyry Cu-Au system, southern Tibet: Evidence from zircon petrochronology and apatite inclusions
works.abstract: The formation of porphyry Cu deposits (PCD) is related to deep magmatic systems, which serve as sources for porphyry magmas and metal- and sulfur-bearing mineralizing fluids. However, the interactions among deep magmas, mid- to upper-crustal magma chambers, and shallow porphyritic intrusions that trigger PCD formation remain poorly understood. This study focuses on the Xiongcun porphyry Cu-Au district in the Gangdese belt of the southern Tibetan Plateau, which experienced two distinct mineralization events: an earlier event related to a hornblende quartz diorite porphyry (HQDP), followed by a later event with a quartz diorite porphyry (QDP). The magmatic and volatile evolution linked to the Xiongcun PCD formation is investigated based on zircon textures, in situ zircon trace element and U-Pb isotope data, and the geochemical compositions of zircon-hosted apatite inclusions. Zircon U-Pb geochronology and trace element compositions indicate that the mid- to upper-crustal magma chamber linked to the Xiongcun porphyry system experienced mafic magma recharge at ca. 174.9 ± 0.4 Ma, followed by the emplacement of the HQDP (173.2 ± 0.4 Ma) and the QDP (170.6 ± 0.5 Ma). Variations in zircon trace element concentrations from both porphyries indicate that magmatic evolution was primarily driven by amphibole-dominated fractional crystallization, reflecting a hydrous magmatic system. Zircon-hosted apatite inclusions reveal a pronounced increase in volatile concentrations, particularly sulfur, likely provided by mafic magma recharge rejuvenating the mid- to upper-crustal magma chamber. Compared with the earlier and low-grade HQDP, the younger and more fertile QDP has lower zircon Gd/Yb ratios, and higher Eu/Eu*, (Ce/Nd)/Yb ratios, sulfur concentrations, and apatite XF/XCl ratios. Therefore, the formation of the high-grade Au-rich PCD centered on QDP is attributed to a protracted magmatic evolution in the mid- to upper-crustal magma chamber. During this prolonged period, the QDP likely underwent multiple mafic magma recharges and extensive fractional crystallization, leading to increasing volatile concentration, particularly sulfur, ultimately reaching volatile saturation. This study highlights the critical role of mafic magma recharge in the formation of the Xiongcun PCD, as it supplied essential ore-forming volatiles, especially sulfur, to the mid- to upper-crustal magmatic system.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 藏南雄村斑岩铜金系统中与基性岩浆补给相关的成矿挥发分：来自锆石岩石年代学和磷灰石包裹体的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 深部岩浆、中上地壳岩浆房与浅部斑岩体如何相互作用触发斑岩铜矿床形成？
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于锆石结构、原位微量元素、U-Pb定年及锆石中磷灰石包裹体地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 基性岩浆补给提供了硫等挥发分，经历角闪石分离结晶后促成QDP高品位铜金矿化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示基性岩浆补给直接供给斑岩系统成矿所需的关键挥发分（尤其硫）。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为斑岩铜金矿床深部岩浆过程与挥发分富集机制提供了新的成因解释和勘查标志。

works.title: Metallogenic potential of komatiites from the Shankaraghatta Complex, Western Dharwar Craton (Southern India)
works.abstract: The Shankaraghatta Complex in the Dharwar Craton (Southern India) hosts highly serpentinized komatiites containing minor disseminated nickel-sulfides as blebs of millerite–pyrite–violarite ± chalcopyrite, locally enriched in a range of semi and precious metals. This study shows that these rocks, yielding a Sm-Nd age of 2718 ± 107 Ma, are broadly coeval with the highly nickel-sulfide mineralized komatiites of the Yilgarn Craton (Western Australia), but significant mineralization is absent in the Shankaraghatta Complex and across the Dharwar Craton. This discrepancy is addressed through systematic multiple sulfur isotope characterization of the sulfides, which reveals a predominant mantle-like signature that rule out significant crustal assimilation during komatiite emplacement in the complex. It is proposed that sulfide saturation was unlikely achieved through dynamic processes typical of economically mineralized komatiite systems, such as, turbulent magma flow and interaction with sulfur-rich crustal reservoirs. Instead, sulfide formation is attributed to fractionation within a cooling magmatic system, with subsequent serpentinization-driven remobilization locally enhancing semi and precious metal concentrations, as supported by detailed sulfide trace-element geochemistry, and study of platinum-group minerals and their textures. In addition, review of regional radiogenic isotope data suggests the absence of significant lithospheric structures capable of channelizing and focussing magma flow during emplacement, indicating a stable, partially cratonized crust that hindered widespread komatiite emplacement in the Dharwar Craton. This study therefore suggests that although Dharwar komatiites may be unfavourable for nickel-sulfide mineralization, widespread serpentinization may have remobilized and locally concentrated a range of metals, leading to previously unknown styles of non-conventional mineralization.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 印度南部西达瓦尔克拉通Shankaraghatta杂岩科马提岩的成矿潜力

summary_bullets.research_question: 为何Dharwar克拉通科马提岩与Yilgarn同期却未形成经济型镍硫化物矿化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用多硫同位素分析、硫化物微量元素地球化学、铂族矿物研究及区域放射性同位素数据综述。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 硫同位素显示地幔特征，排除地壳混染；硫饱和由岩浆分异和蛇纹石化再富集导致，区域构造稳定不利成矿。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出蛇纹石化驱动金属再活动可形成非常规富集类型，而非传统镍硫化物成矿机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估科马提岩成矿潜力提供新框架，指出蛇纹石化相关非常规矿化的勘探价值。

works.title: Decoupling of surface and lithospheric sutures, a review of Early Mesozoic Sulu UHP orogenic belt, eastern China
works.abstract: Suture zones are fundamental markers of ancient plate boundaries, essential for reconstructing paleogeography, plate kinematics, and the geodynamic evolution of orogenic systems. However, in many collisional belts, their identification remains challenging due to the absence of diagnostic elements such as ophiolitic mélanges and arc-related magmatism. Growing geophysical and geological evidence suggests that lithospheric sutures are commonly decoupled from surface sutures, further complicating their recognition. The Sulu orogenic belt, formed by the Early Mesozoic northward deep subduction of the South China block (SCB) beneath the North China block (NCB), provides a natural laboratory to address these issues. Despite extensive studies over the past three decades, the location of the suture zone remains highly debated, largely due to the Late Triassic post-orogenic to Late Mesozoic intracontinental reworking. Here, we adopt an alternative approach by focusing on the tectonic response of the overriding plate and its coupling with the behavior of the subducted plate to constrain the locations of surface and lithospheric sutures. We synthesized our new structural analysis, anisotropy of magnetic susceptibility, and geochronological data with previous study to reveal the deformation history of the overriding NCB and the multiphase exhumation of SCB. The NCB records NE–SW-trending contraction, manifested by Early–Middle Triassic (250–230 Ma) top-to-the-NE thrusting and Late Triassic (230–220 Ma) top-to-the-SW back-thrusting. Multiphase exhumation is attributed to Early–Middle Triassic syn-convergence southwestward extrusion, Latest Triassic post-orogenic extension, and Early Cretaceous rolling-hinge type detachments. By reviewing previous models, we argue that the boundary between the NCB and the Sulu orogenic belt corresponds to extensional detachment systems, whereas the surface suture is located north of the South Sulu massif and likely extends to the north of the Beihuaiyang belt in the Dabie orogen. The identification of SCB-sourced material exhumed within the overriding NCB reveals a two-layer crustal architecture of the southeastern NCB, indicating that a 200-km-long tract of the NCB's lithosphere was bulldozed and replaced by the flat-slab subduction of the SCB. This process drove overriding-plate contraction and decoupled the surface from the lithospheric suture. We thus locate the lithospheric suture beneath Bohai Bay, ~200 km north of the surface suture. Finally, we propose a comprehensive tectonic model involving Late Permian–Early Triassic oceanic subduction, slab break-off, followed by continental deep subduction of the SCB, Early–Middle Triassic syn-convergence exhumation accompanied with overriding-plate contraction driven by flat-slab subduction, Latest Triassic post-orogenic extension, and Early Cretaceous reworking. This study highlights the importance of linking overriding-plate deformation with subduction process to trace lithospheric and surface sutures and explain their decoupling in complex orogens.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地表与岩石圈缝合线的解耦：中国东部早中生代苏鲁超高压造山带研究综述

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何厘定苏鲁造山带中地表缝合带与岩石圈缝合带的位置及其解耦关系？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过综合构造解析、磁组构与年代学，分析仰冲板块变形响应与俯冲板片折返过程。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地表缝合带位于南苏鲁杂岩以北；岩石圈缝合带北移至渤海湾下，二者解耦约200公里。
summary_bullets.innovation: 从仰冲盘变形与板片行为耦合视角，揭示平板俯冲驱动解耦并定位双缝合带。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为复杂碰撞造山带识别隐蔽缝合带及重建板块运动学提供了新思路与方法范例。

works.title: Podiform chromitites as multi-stage mantle archives: Integrating deep-mantle inheritance with shallow mantle processes
works.abstract: Podiform chromitites hosted in ophiolitic mantle peridotites preserve mineralogical and geochemical signatures formed under contrasting pressure–temperature–redox conditions, making them among the most debated lithologies in Mantle Geology. Field relationships, internal structures, and chromite compositions consistently indicate formation during melt–rock interaction and focused melt transport in the shallow upper mantle. However, these rocks also contain diverse mineral inclusions, including platinum-group minerals (PGMs), ultrahigh-pressure (UHP) phases, ultra-reduced minerals, crust-derived components, hydrous silicates, and amorphous materials that are difficult to reconcile within the single-stage genetic models. This review integrates global mineralogical, petrographic, geochemical, isotopic (ReOs, SrNd), and nanoscale observations to reassess the origin and significance of podiform chromitites in the context of mantle evolution and crust–mantle recycling. To distinguish observational constraints from interpretation, the evidence is evaluated using a hierarchical confidence framework based on petrographic context, analytical verification, and reproducibility. High-confidence observations include in situ inclusions, confirmed by multiple analytical techniques, whereas ultra-reduced phases and amorphous materials are treated more cautiously because shallow or secondary origins cannot constantly be excluded. The compiled evidence indicates that podiform chromitites are evolving mineralogical systems capable of trapping and preserving materials formed under variable mantle conditions. We propose a four-stage evolutionary framework involving: (1) deep-mantle preconditioning and material recycling, (2) chromitite segregation during melt extraction in the shallow upper mantle, (3) modification by supra-subduction zone and plume-related melts and fluids, and (4) late-stage metasomatism and hydrothermal overprinting. Within this framework, structural relationships constrain chromitite formation to shallow upper-mantle melt–rock interaction systems, whereas some inclusions and microstructures are consistent with inheritance of recycled high-pressure components transported from deeper mantle domains. Podiform chromitites are therefore interpreted as time-integrated archives of mantle processes recording melt transport, redox heterogeneity, fluid–rock interaction, and long-term crust–mantle recycling without requiring chromite crystallization at mantle transition zone depths.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 豆荚状铬铁矿作为多阶段地幔档案：深部地幔继承与浅部地幔过程的整合

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何调和豆荚状铬铁矿中浅部形成证据与超高压、超还原等深部地幔包裹体的矛盾？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过整合全球矿物学、地球化学、同位素及纳米尺度观察，采用分层置信度框架评估证据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 豆荚状铬铁矿形成于浅部熔-岩反应，但捕获了深部地幔循环成分，是跨尺度地幔过程档案。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出四阶段演化框架，解释铬铁矿浅部结晶与深部继承性包裹体的共存。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解地幔演化与地壳-地幔物质循环提供了统一模型，影响铬铁矿成因与深部勘探研究。

works.title: Hydrogen and mantle plumes
works.abstract: This paper analyzes geological, geophysical, and geochemical data, along with behavior of minerals under high temperatures and pressures, to assess a possible role of hydrogen and its compounds in formation and ascent of mantle plumes. Positive correlation between hydrogen and helium concentrations in the mantle enables the use of helium data to estimate hydrogen content in plumes. Three categories of plumes are examined: the African and Pacific superplumes, which represent ascending branches of whole-mantle convection; intra-mantle plumes, which rise from the upper part of the lower mantle; and upper mantle plumes, which are confined to the upper mantle and transition zone. The analysis reveals diversity of redox conditions across different mantle regions. In the lower mantle of superplumes, increased temperatures and, possibly, reducing conditions prevail. Hydrogen can exist there as hydrides and H2 molecules, partly dissolved in silicates. In descending branches of whole-mantle convection, the environment can become more oxidizing, and the hydrogen content decreases. In the transition zone, ringwoodite and wadsleyite can incorporate hydroxyl groups that form aqueous fluids that promote development of upper mantle plumes. In the upper crust, redox reactions generate additional hydrogen sources, associated, in particular, with the oxidation of divalent iron to trivalent. The presumed presence of hydrogen and/or water in mantle plumes reduces elastic properties of rocks and finally can increase their fluidity by weakening interatomic bonds and activating dislocation creep. This can facilitate faster plume ascent. Hydrogen emissions associated with plumes and rift zones may provide a promising energy source for industrial hydrogen production.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 氢与地幔柱

summary_bullets.research_question: 评估氢及其化合物在地幔柱形成与上升过程中的作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合地质、地球物理、地球化学数据及矿物高温高压行为分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 不同地幔区域氧化还原条件迥异，氢以氢化物、分子氢或羟基等形式存在，可降低岩石弹性并加速地幔柱上升。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用氦与氢的正相关性估算地幔柱氢含量，揭示氢对地幔柱流变性的促进作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解地幔动力学与深部挥发分循环提供新视角，并指出地幔柱氢排放可作为工业氢源的潜力。

works.title: A native sulfur deposit in Gale crater, Mars
works.abstract: Martian rocks are known to contain sulfur-bearing species, including sulfates and sulfides. These compounds record a sulfur cycle that operated over Mars’ geological evolution. We used the Curiosity rover to investigate a deposit of light-toned stones in Gediz Vallis, within Gale crater on Mars. We find that the stones are composed of native sulfur. The sulfur deposit appears to have formed in place, within a sinuous entrenched canyon cut into the floor of Gediz Vallis. The presence of native sulfur implies that a sulfur enrichment pathway involving buoyant subsurface fluids operated on ancient Mars. We propose that the primary source of this sulfur was magmatic vapor, which cooled in the near subsurface cryosphere and was released by decompression during the erosion of Gediz Vallis.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 火星盖尔陨石坑中的天然硫矿床

summary_bullets.research_question: 火星盖尔陨石坑盖迪兹谷中浅色石块的成分与形成机制是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用好奇号火星车对盖迪兹谷的浅色石块进行原位成分分析与地质背景探测。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 石块系自然硫原地沉积，由岩浆蒸汽在近地表冰圈冷却后，经侵蚀减压释放形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在火星发现自然硫沉积，并揭示岩浆挥发分与冰圈相互作用的新成矿路径。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为重建火星硫循环、挥发分演化及古气候提供了关键性的地质证据与约束。

works.title: Occurrence and petrogenesis of diamondiferous lamprophyres: Insights into mantle metasomatism and diamond formation
works.abstract: Lamprophyres are a rare rock-type that include different lithologies, classified mineralogically (abundance of mica, amphibole, feldspathoids) rather than geochemically (enrichment in alkalis and volatiles). Despite the attention that these rocks have attracted, due to their possible economic interest, their sources, petrogenesis and classification remain a matter of debate. One of the most intriguing aspects is the relationship of some lamprophyre sub-types with diamonds, especially because diamondiferous lamprophyres are the rarest diamond-bearing rock-types. The reason for this association and their potential genetic relationship remain poorly understood. Previous studies on lamprophyres (diamond-bearing and barren) are reviewed to improve our knowledge of peculiar mantle paragenesis, fertilization events, metasomatic agents and the relationship between lamprophyres and diamonds. Calc-alkaline lamprophyres (CALs) are often emplaced in subduction-related settings, where slab dehydration and crustal recycling can stabilize hydrous phases (amphibole/phlogopite). Low degree partial melting of shallow metasomatized sources may explain CALs petrogenesis. To reconcile this shallow formation depth with the presence of diamonds, we propose a lithospheric stacking model, that results in a highly transient geotherm during the initial phases of craton formation. Ultramatic lamprophyres (UMLs) mostly crop out along rifts and are related to a veined lithospheric and/or asthenospheric source. A direct genetic link between diamonds and UMLs can be excluded. Instead, the presence of diamondiferous UMLs relies on spatial and temporal connections (e.g., mantle domains enriched in C-H-phases). Lamprophyres are hostile magma for diamonds, due to their high fO2, H2O and CO2, along with a longer lag time and a lower volume of emplaced magma.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 含金刚石煌斑岩的产状与岩石成因：对地幔交代作用和金刚石形成的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究含钻石煌斑岩的成因及其与钻石的成因关联。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过系统综述前人关于含钻石与不含钻石煌斑岩的研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 钙碱性煌斑岩需用岩石圈堆叠模型解释浅源与钻石共存，煌斑岩岩浆不利于钻石保存。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出岩石圈堆叠模型协调浅部熔融与钻石稳定条件的矛盾。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解地幔交代、钻石形成及勘探靶区提供新见解。

works.title: Birth, evolution, and consumption of the Neoproterozoic Adamastor Ocean: New data from the Ribeirão da Folha Ophiolite, Araçuaí Orogen
works.abstract: The geological history and role of the Ribeirão da Folha Ophiolite in the construction of the Araçuaí Orogen were investigated to establish temporal and geochemical constraints for the evolution of the Adamastor Ocean. Through petrological, geochemical, and isotopic (U–Pb, Lu–Hf, and Sm–Nd) analyses, this study presents the newly discovered Granjas do Norte meta-ultramafic body, which serves as a fundamental record of the oceanic lithosphere history of the Macaúbas Basin. New U–Pb zircon ages obtained from a chloritite sample reveal a complete ca. 140 Myr metasomatic and metamorphic chronology for the northern Adamastor Ocean: from the metasomatic record of its opening at 745 ± 11 Ma to the fluid-mediated onset of subduction at 661 ± 3 Ma, culminating in regional metamorphism at 606 ± 3 Ma during advanced subduction-accretion. The juxtaposition of rocks with magmatism from intraplate (OIB) and supra-subduction zone (SSZ) settings in a tectonic mélange with a pervasively deformed mylonitic matrix, combined with the polyphasic evolution of fluids from the subducted plate and the crust, provides robust evidence that subduction was the dominant mechanism for the closure of the Adamastor Ocean. These results provide direct evidence that challenges intracontinental models and contributes to understanding the complete life history of the Adamastor Ocean.

works.translated_title: 新元古代阿达马斯托尔洋的诞生、演化和消亡：来自阿拉苏阿伊造山带Ribeirão da Folha蛇绿岩的新数据
