works.title: The deep link between intraplate volcanism and plate tectonics
works.abstract: Two independent studies suggest that thousands of submarine volcanoes in the Pacific Ocean and offshore Africa are likely to have resulted from two high-temperature structures in the lower mantle, whose location and morphology are influenced by plate subduction. Together, their findings imply many forms of intraplate volcanism are tied to plate tectonics through the deep mantle.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 板内火山活动与板块构造之间的深层联系

summary_bullets.research_question: 板块内部火山活动与深部地幔结构和板块构造之间存在怎样的联系？
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合分析两项独立的地球物理与地质观测研究，探讨地幔深部结构与板内火山分布的关系。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 太平洋和非洲近海的数千座海底火山源自下地幔两个高温结构，其位置和形态受板块俯冲控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将板内火山活动与板块俯冲及深部地幔结构直接关联，揭示统一成因框架。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解板内火山的深部动力来源和全球地幔对流与板块构造的耦合提供关键证据。

works.title: Precise age constraints for the Huangjindong gold deposit, South China
works.abstract: The large Huangjindong gold deposit, which was positioned in the Jiangnan Orogen, has developed through an early scheelite-gold mineralization epoch and a later wolframite mineralization epoch. The ore-forming age remains poorly constrained, ranging from 462 Ma to 129.7 Ma, mainly due to a lack of appropriate dating minerals and uncertainties in mineral paragenesis. The current work identified hydrothermal rutile paragenetic with gold-bearing arsenopyrite as well as post-mineralization wolframite. These rutile and wolframite grains were subjected to in-situ LA-ICP-MS U–Pb dating, resulting in an age of 380.6 ± 6.6 Ma for the principal ore-forming stage during the scheelite-gold epoch and 158.8 ± 6.6 Ma for the wolframite mineralization epoch. The obtained ages conform to the observed ore-forming processes, implying that the primary gold mineralization of this deposit happened in the Devonian period. Combined with recently obtained precise ages for gold deposits in South China, this work emphasizes that the Silurian–Devonian was an important period for gold mineralization. The gold mineralization event at Huangjindong is indicative of Silurian–Devonian tectono-magmatic-hydrothermal activity in South China, formed within an extensional tectonic framework associated with intracontinental orogenic evolution. This paper also highlights that in-situ dating of U-bearing accessory minerals is an effective method for precisely constraining mineralization timing in deposits characterized by multi-pulse hydrothermal activity.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华南黄金洞金矿床的精确年龄约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 厘清黄金洞金矿多期矿化的精确年龄，解决成矿时代争议。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对与金矿共生的热液金红石和后期黑钨矿进行原位LA-ICP-MS U–Pb定年。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 主成矿阶段为380.6±6.6 Ma（泥盆纪），黑钨矿化阶段为158.8±6.6 Ma。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用含铀副矿物原位定年精确约束多期热液矿床的成矿时间序列。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证实志留纪-泥盆纪是华南重要金矿期，为陆内造山伸展环境成矿提供新证据。

works.title: Subseafloor processes in ultramafic-influenced volcanic-hosted hydrothermal systems: An insight from the Gnitahei massive sulfide mineralization, Arctic Mid-Ocean Ridges
works.abstract: The extinct Gnitahei seafloor massive sulfide (SMS) deposit was discovered in 2019 on the ultraslow spreading Mohns Ridge (Arctic Mid-Ocean Ridge System, 72.8°N, 3.81°E, 3022–2760 mbsl). It provides a unique opportunity to study subseafloor hydrothermal processes without drilling, as tectonic uplift and ongoing mass wasting expose the deeper parts of the hydrothermal system. The deposit is hosted by hydrothermally altered basalts within the footwall of a NE–SW striking normal fault, in proximity to the active Fåvne Vent Field. Driven by extensional tectonics and facilitated by the thin oceanic crust along the ultraslow-spreading Mohns Ridge, hydrothermal circulation likely extends deep into the serpentinized upper mantle. Hydrothermal alteration exhibits vertical zonation. Chloritization accompanied by remobilization of silica, LILEs, and REEs dominate the deeper parts of the system. In contrast, silicification associated with an enrichment in LILEs and REEs characterizes the upper part of the Gnitahei SMS deposit. The paleosurface is clearly marked by a layer of red jasper. The sulfide mineralization is dominated by pyrite and marcasite, with euhedral pyrite prevailing in deeper zones and colloform pyrite being more abundant near the paleosurface. Native gold occurs mostly as inclusions in pyrite. Trace-element data obtained from pyrite, including elevated Ni and Co concentrations and a high Au/Ag ratios, are consistent with fluid interaction with underlying ultramafic rocks. Sulfur isotope composition of pyrite reveals a strong 34S enrichment (bulk δ34SVCDT = 11.1–15.9‰; in-situ δ34SVCDT = 10.8–17.3‰), indicating a significant contribution of reduced seawater sulfate, which constitutes ~50% of the total sulfur according to a two-component mixing model. The high influx of reduced sulfate is attributed to reducing conditions driven by serpentinization of ultramafic lithologies. Under these conditions, seawater sulfate can be reduced prior to anhydrite deposition, allowing isotopically heavy sulfur to infiltrate the hydrothermal system. Depth-dependent decreases in δ34S values likely reflect greater contributions of reduced seawater sulfate in shallower zones and/or enhanced fractionation at lower temperatures.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 超镁铁质影响下的火山容矿热液系统中的海底深部过程：来自北极洋中脊Gnitahei块状硫化物成矿作用的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究超慢速扩张脊中超镁铁质影响下火山岩赋矿热液系统的海底以下成矿过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用构造暴露的硫化物矿床开展矿物学、微量元素和硫同位素地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 揭示垂向蚀变分带，蛇纹石化驱动海水硫酸盐还原提供约50%硫源，金赋存在黄铁矿中。
summary_bullets.innovation: 无需钻探即揭示深部热液过程，并提出蛇纹石化促成还原环境导致硫酸盐早期还原机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解超慢速扩张脊环境下的海底硫化物成矿机制与超基性岩作用提供新见解。

works.title: Mineralogical and geochemical insights into the Duxiushan granite-pegmatite system in Anqing area, Middle-Lower Yangtze River Metallogenic belt, eastern China: Implications for critical metal mineralization
works.abstract: The concealed Duxiushan intrusion, located in the Anqing district of the Middle-Lower Yangtze River Metallogenic Belt in eastern China, is a newly recognized granite–pegmatite complex that offers critical insights into the late-stage evolution of highly fractionated granitic magmatism in this region. To investigate its petrogenesis and potential for critical metal enrichment, we employed a combination of monazite and apatite U–Pb dating (which circumvents the common problem of zircon metamictization in highly evolved systems), whole-rock geochemistry, Sr–Nd isotopes, and mineral chemistry. The obtained ages, ranging from approximately 130 to 124 Ma, indicate emplacement during Early Cretaceous lithospheric extension, linked to the rollback of the Paleo-Pacific Plate. The two-mica granite, muscovite granite, and pegmatite exhibit consistent mineralogical and geochemical trends, suggesting that they originated from a common crustal melt primarily derived from the partial melting of ancient metasedimentary rocks, as indicated by their enriched Sr-Nd isotopic compositions, with minimal mantle-derived contributions. Systematic enrichment in SiO2, Rb, and F, alongside depletion in Ba, Sr, and Eu, reflects significant fractional crystallization. Compositional analysis of mica and apatite reveals a decrease in oxygen fugacity and the evolution of F-dominated magmatic fluids under reduced conditions, creating favorable conditions for the retention of incompatible elements during magma evolution. LA–ICP–MS mapping identifies Rb concentrations exceeding 1500 ppm in pegmatitic muscovite, confirming significant mineral-scale Rb enrichment. These findings demonstrate that the concealed Duxiushan granite–pegmatite system represents a late-stage product of crustal anatexis during Early Cretaceous extension in the Middle-Lower Yangtze River metallogenic belt.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国东部长江中下游成矿带安庆地区独秀山花岗岩-伟晶岩系统的矿物学和地球化学特征：对关键金属成矿的指示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究杜秀山隐伏花岗岩-伟晶岩系统的成因及其关键金属成矿潜力。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用独居石和磷灰石U-Pb定年、全岩地球化学、Sr-Nd同位素和矿物化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 侵入体形成于130-124 Ma早白垩世伸展背景，源于变沉积岩部分熔融，经历强烈分离结晶，有利于不相容元素富集，伟晶岩白云母Rb>1500 ppm。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用独居石和磷灰石定年规避高分异系统锆石蜕晶化问题，揭示矿物尺度Rb富集。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证明该区早白垩世伸展期地壳深熔晚期产物对关键金属勘查具有指示意义。

works.title: Plate tectonic history and ocean oxygenation shaping biogeography of hydrothermal bacterial community
works.abstract: The influence of plate tectonics on microbial distributions remains poorly understood. Here, we demonstrate that the global biogeography of hydrothermal vent-endemic chemoautotrophic microbiota is structured by the tectonic history of the global major oceans. These microbiota, particularly anaerobic ones, are significantly more abundant in early-origin Pacific, Arctic, and Mediterranean oceans, whereas they are notably scarce in late-formed Atlantic and Indian Oceans. This pattern was attributed to the timing of ocean formation and its interplay with global redox evolution. Fully oxygenated conditions in the Phanerozoic during the formation of the latter two oceans imposed a dual-dispersal barrier among oceans: toxicity of molecular oxygen to anaerobes and depletion of energy sources (especially reduced chemicals) for aerobes, but such a barrier didn’t exist before the Phanerozoic, when the former three oceans started. These results integrate microbial biogeography into a geodynamic framework, revealing that even microbial life is subject to planetary-scale geological constraints. The links between deep-time geologic processes and microbial distribution remain poorly understood. This paper reveals that tectonic and geochemical evolution shapes the global biogeography of hydrothermal bacteria by limiting their dispersal to the oceans formed after oxygenation.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 板块构造历史与海洋氧化作用塑造热液细菌群落的生物地理学

summary_bullets.research_question: 板块构造历史与海洋氧化如何塑造热液细菌的生物地理分布？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过比较不同大洋热液喷口微生物群落组成，结合海洋形成年代与氧化还原演化分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 早期形成的太平洋等海洋富集厌氧菌，后期形成的缺氧大西洋和印度洋则显著稀少。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将微生物生物地理学纳入地球动力学框架，揭示深时地质过程控制微生物扩散。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解地质历史如何驱动微生物分布提供新视角，连接深时演化与现生生态格局。

works.title: Oceanic subduction zones: Factory of abiogenic hydrogen and methane
works.abstract: Molecular hydrogen (H_2) and methane (CH_4) are among the most crucial volatiles in the Earth system, serving as key energy carriers for both geological and biological processes. Extensive studies have constrained the formation mechanisms, redox conditions, and global fluxes of abiotic H_2 and CH_4 at divergent plate boundaries, particularly at mid-ocean ridges where fluid-rock reactions such as serpentinization are well characterized. In contrast, subduction zones, the representative convergent boundaries, act as efficient “factories” for the abiotic formation of H_2 and CH_4, yet the underlying processes and fluxes remain far less constrained. Within the subducting slab, the decomposition of organic matter and a series of high-pressure water-rock interactions can produce both biogenic and abiogenic H_2 and CH_4 under varying redox conditions. This review integrates recent advances and highlights four depth-dependent mechanisms that govern the formation of abiotic H_2 and CH_4 in subduction settings: shallow, low-pressure serpentinization during slab initiation, intermediate forearc serpentinization at elevated pressures, deep metamorphic fluid re-equilibration, and ultra-deep mantle metasomatism under ultra-high-pressure conditions. A comparison of potential gas fluxes between divergent and convergent boundaries suggests that subduction zones may represent a previously underestimated source of abiotic H_2 and CH_4. The upward migration and release of these gases could significantly influence hydrocarbon seepage, deep biosphere activity, and the redox evolution of Earth’s volatile cycles, underscoring the need for integrated experimental, thermodynamic, and isotopic investigations to quantify these processes better.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 海洋俯冲带：非生物成因氢和甲烷的工厂

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨俯冲带中非生物成因氢气和甲烷的形成机制、控制因素及全球通量。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过系统综述近期的实验、热力学和同位素研究成果来整合俯冲带非生物气体形成过程。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 俯冲带非生物H₂和CH₄的形成受四种深度依赖的机制控制，并可能是一个被低估的重要气体来源。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统划分俯冲带非生物气体形成的四个深度相关机制，并提出其通量可能超过离散板块边界。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为烃类渗漏、深部生物圈和地球氧化还原演化提供了新的气体来源约束，促进多学科交叉研究。

works.title: Seamount subduction drives cyclicity in continental arc magmatism: A record from southeastern Lhasa terrane
works.abstract: Continental arc magmatism is characterized by episodic flare-ups and lulls, a rhythmicity that profoundly influences crustal recycling, yet the driving mechanisms remain unresolved. Here, through an integrated study of the Xionglai high-Mg andesites in southern Tibet, we propose that seamount subduction played a key role in regulating this process. Petrological, geochemical, and Sr-Nd-Hf isotopic data show the Xionglai HMA (199–196 Ma) has enriched isotopic signatures and abundant inherited zircons with forearc-derived age spectra. Critically, these inherited zircons share comparable Raman spectral characteristics and radiation damage levels with syn-magmatic zircons, indicating a shared thermal history that precludes shallow crustal assimilation. These features are consistent with melting of mélange diapirs formed from subducted sediments and mantle wedge. We temporally correlate two distinct magmatic flare-ups (ca. 280–260 Ma and ca. 210–185 Ma) with two seamount subduction events, as recorded by seamount fragments and eclogite-facies metamorphism. This correlation supports a model in which buoyant seamount subduction enhances erosion, delivering sediments to form mélange diapirs whose melting triggers flare-ups. Our findings highlight seamount subduction as a plausible mechanism generating cyclic continental arc magmatism by modulating sediment input and slab dynamics, thereby contributing to the cyclicity of continental arc magmatism.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 海山俯冲驱动大陆弧岩浆作用的周期性：来自拉萨地体东南部的记录

summary_bullets.research_question: 陆弧岩浆作用周期性爆发的驱动机制是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对藏南雄来高镁安山岩开展岩石学、地球化学、Sr-Nd-Hf同位素及锆石拉曼光谱分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 海山俯冲增强侵蚀并输送沉积物形成混杂岩底辟，其熔融触发岩浆爆发。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出海山俯冲通过调节沉积物输入和板片动力学控制陆弧岩浆周期性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示海山俯冲驱动地壳物质循环和岩浆节律，为造山带演化研究提供新机制。

works.title: Genetic linkage between porphyry and structure-controlled gold mineralization: evidence from hydrothermal zircon and S isotopes at the Bada Deposit, Eastern Tibet
works.abstract: Porphyry and related hydrothermal gold deposits constitute a major portion of global gold resources. However, the genetic relationship between porphyry systems and spatially associated structure-controlled gold mineralization remains contentious, particularly when cross-cutting relationships obscure temporal links. This study investigates the Bada Cu–Au deposit in the eastern Tethyan belt, western China, where late-stage, structure-controlled gold veins overprint porphyry intrusions. NW- and NE-trending faults, together with associated joints and fractures, control quartz-sulfide-sericite-argillic alteration and Au mineralization. U–Pb dating of hydrothermal zircon grains separated from mineralized fault gouge yields a Concordia age of 34.6 ± 0.5 Ma (n = 30), indistinguishable from the emplacement age of the Bada porphyry (∼35.0 Ma). These hydrothermal zircons exhibit higher Th/U ratios and Y content than magmatic zircons but display comparable rare earth element patterns and oxygen fugacity estimates (ΔFMQ = +0.5 to + 2.5). In situ LA-MC-ICP-MS sulfur isotope analyses reveal a systematic shift from magmatic sulfides in barren porphyry (δ34S ≈ 1.2‰) to hydrothermal sulfides in fault gouge (δ34S = 4.3–7.7‰), indicating sulfur isotope fractionation during fluid exsolution. These results demonstrate that structure-controlled gold mineralization at Bada represents a late-stage expression of the same porphyry system, driven by magmatic–hydrothermal fluids derived from a shared deep-seated magma source. Porphyry emplacement, structural reactivation, and subsequent Au mineralization occurred within a narrow temporal window (<1 Myr). The mineralized structures and associated Au mineralization are spatially fractal, secondary products of the regional Yulong metallogenic event driven by pull-apart basin tectonics. This model provides a viable framework for deciphering genetic relationships in other metallogenic belts exhibiting similar cross-cutting relationships.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 斑岩型与构造控制型金矿化的成因联系：来自藏东八达矿床热液锆石和硫同位素的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 构造控制金矿化与斑岩系统之间的遗传关系，尤其在交切关系掩盖时间联系时难以确定。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用热液锆石U–Pb定年和硫化物原位LA-MC-ICP-MS硫同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 构造控制金矿化为斑岩系统晚期产物，两者时间窗口小于1百万年，硫同位素显示岩浆热液分馏。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用热液锆石定年与硫同位素联合约束，揭示交切矿脉与斑岩的准同时成因。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 提出适用于其他成矿带中交切关系的判别框架，可为类似矿床勘查提供理论依据。

works.title: Inclusion evidence for melt-fluid evolution and rare earth element mineralization in deep intrusive carbonatites
works.abstract: Carbonatite-associated Rare Earth Element (REE) deposits have been the primary source of REEs for decades, yet the melt-fluid evolution and REE mineralization processes in these systems remain enigmatic. In this study, we successfully characterize the REE mineralizing liquids from two large carbonatite REE deposits, based on microscopic analyses of primary REE-rich multi-phase inclusions in fluorite from pegmatitic ore dykes, and acquisition of their homogenization pressure–temperature (P-T) conditions by using a Raman spectrometer and a hydrothermal diamond anvil cell. The inclusions studied here consist mainly of sulfate, carbonate and REE daughter minerals (65 – 75 vol%), along with subordinate aqueous liquid (20 – 30 vol%) and vapor (<5 vol%). Their homogenization P-T conditions reach 470 – 600 °C and 5.0 – 7.0 kbar, with sulfate and carbonate concentrations being estimated to exceed 50 wt% and 20 wt%, respectively. By referring to the thermodynamic properties of aqueous-salt systems involving carbonates and sulfates, we conclude that such liquids are neither magmatic nor hydrothermal in the conventional sense, but rather transitional brine-melts, or supercritical fluids formed by complete miscibility between aqueous fluids and salt melts under high P-T conditions. More importantly, the identification of REE daughter minerals (burbankite) in these inclusions, along with their dissolution at 450 – 520 °C during heating, provides direct evidence that such brine-melts have a remarkable capacity in transporting and concentrating REEs, hence shall be responsible for the primary mineralization of REEs in carbonatite systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 深成侵入碳酸岩中熔-流体演化与稀土元素成矿的包裹体证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 碳酸岩型稀土矿床的熔体-流体演化和稀土成矿机制尚不明确。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过显微分析和热液金刚石压腔结合拉曼光谱，研究萤石中原生多相包裹体的均一化温压条件。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 包裹体揭示存在过渡性卤水熔体，具极强的稀土运移和富集能力。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次直接证实碳酸岩中高浓度卤水熔体对稀土元素的主要成矿作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为深部碳酸岩中稀土矿化的流体性质和成矿过程研究提供了关键实验证据。

works.title: The role of plate tectonic-like behaviour in the long-term climate evolution of Earth
works.abstract: This study investigates the long-term evolution of Earth’s climate by coupling a simplified atmosphere–ocean model with a carbon cycle that includes the deep interior (deep carbon cycle). Unlike previous studies that relied on parameterised thermal histories, carbon release fluxes here are computed using fully dynamic mantle convection simulations, encompassing mid-ocean ridges, hotspots and subduction-related arc volcanism. Two tectonic regimes are examined: a mobile-lid mode representing plate tectonics and a stagnant-lid mode lacking plate motion. Results indicate that the mobile-lid regime sustains a stable, temperate climate over billions of years by maintaining continuous CO₂ outgassing from the deep mantle. In contrast, the stagnant-lid regime fails to offset the faint young Sun, leaving the planet in a globally frozen state despite increasing insolation. Continental silicate weathering emerges as the dominant carbon sink. These findings highlight the critical role of plate tectonic-like processes in sustaining Earth’s long-term climate stability and habitability and underscore the need for better constraints on deep carbon cycling and its coupling with atmosphere–ocean evolution, given the simplifications and limitations of current models.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 类板块构造行为在地球长期气候演变中的作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 探索类板块构造活动与停滞盖模式对地球长期气候演化及宜居性的不同影响。
summary_bullets.methodology: 耦合简化大气-海洋模型与全动态地幔对流模拟，计算深部碳循环的排气通量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 活动盖模式通过持续CO₂排气维持温和气候；停滞盖模式则导致全球永久冰冻。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以全动态地幔对流替代参数化热历史，直接计算板块与深部碳释放通量。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示了深部碳循环对气候稳定的关键作用，为评估类地行星宜居性提供重要约束。

works.title: Rediscovery of the high-grade Viana orebody: a missing link in the Archean Cuiabá microbasin framework and the timing of a world-class BIF-hosted gold system
works.abstract: The Cuiabá world-class gold deposit, hosted by the Archean Rio das Velhas green-stone belt (Minas Gerais, Brazil), is a major gold system with >7 Moz produced. Re-cent resource delineation drilling at Levels L19 and L20 intercepted a 30-m-thick mineralized zone (Viana) at the hangingwall of the Fonte Grande Sul and Serrotinho orebodies. The Viana orebody, represents a significant (re)discovery (>15 t Au) of a historically neglected shallow target. The Viana orebody is subdivided into two domains. Domain 1 features a 15-m-thick replacement-style ore zone (15–30 g/t Au) consisting of massive sulfide at the base and a gold-bearing metachert at the top, separated from barren metachert by a mylonitic sericite-chlorite schist. Domain 2 comprises a 2-m-thick zone of carbonate-sericite-quartz schists and laminated/smoky-quartz veins (2–10 g/t Au). Multi-element geochemistry and REE + Y systematics demonstrate that the carbon-rich Viana Metachert is geochemically distinct from the main Cuiabá BIF horizon, reflecting a stronger high-temperature hydrothermal input and organic matter presence during deposition. Structurally, the Viana orebody is interpreted as the result of flexural-slip folding along its stratigraphic level during the formation of the Cuiabá F1 upright fold (D1). Domain 2 laminated veins developed along refracted cleavages, channelizing fluids into Domain 1. A duplex system formed within Domain 1 due to flexural-slip, trapping syn-deformational fluids below the thrust plane. The current cigar-shaped oreshoot geometry results from refolding during the D2 penetrative event. Geochronological data expand the temporal window of gold mineralization in the Rio das Velhas belt. Hydrothermal monazite U-Pb dating from massive sulfides (51.7 g/t Au) yielded an age of 2775 ± 23 Ma, while Re-Os ages from arsenopyrites yielded 2723 ± 25 Ma. These results identify a previously unrecognized chemical sedimentary horizon and indicate that gold mineralization occurred through multiple pulses associated with the Rio das Velhas II and Mamona tectono-magmatic events. This study requires a reinterpretation of the local lithostratigraphic column and highlights significant new exploration opportunities within the Cuiabá system.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 高品位Viana矿体的重新发现：太古代Cuiabá微盆地格架中缺失的一环及世界级BIF容矿金矿系统的成矿时代

summary_bullets.research_question: 该研究旨在厘清Viana矿体的发现意义及其在Cuiabá金成矿系统的时间和结构框架中的位置。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用岩相构造分析、多元素地球化学、稀土元素及钇系统学、独居石U-Pb和毒砂Re-Os定年。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Viana矿体是受剪切控制的化学沉积层位，金矿化经历了2775 Ma和2723 Ma两期岩浆构造事件。
summary_bullets.innovation: 识别出被忽视的高品位化学沉积层位，并通过双定年揭示了多脉冲成矿的新时序。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为世界级BIF型金矿系统提供了新的勘探方向和地层柱重新解释的地质依据。

works.title: Enhanced crystal-melt segregation within dynamic mush systems links silicic cumulates with caldera-forming eruptions
works.abstract: Abstract Supported by the mush model, the origin of crystal-poor, high-silica rhyolitic magmas (≥ 75 SiO₂ wt.%) is commonly linked to melt extraction in shallow, crystalline mushes, yet their complementary cumulates remain elusive in the upper crust. Here we present the “dynamic mush model” for the Campo Alegre-Corupá system (Brazil), combining textural analysis and thermodynamic modeling to show that high-silica melts formed through upper-crustal fractionation, leaving a granitic residue and feeding a caldera-forming eruption. Syenites and melasyenites represent their silicic-mafic cumulates, the syenites being formed at relatively low crystallinities (~16-33 of bulk vol.%) after extraction of large amounts of interstitial melts (~47-80 of liquid vol.%). In contrast to static models (extraction window ~50-70 vol.%), our results indicate early melt segregation in a dynamic reservoir. Alkali-feldspar crystals were size-selectively and hydraulically sorted by upward melt flow; aggregates were then formed at low crystallinities, supposedly via synneusis, enabling rapid sinking, and were repacked by recharge. This process, enhanced by relatively high magma fluxes, efficiently separated crystals from melt, explaining the origin of large-volume eruptible magmas in the upper crust. Our findings redefine mush evolution while underscoring the role of flow-driven crystal sorting (elutriation) in caldera-forming systems.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 动态晶粥系统中增强的晶体-熔体分离将硅质堆晶岩与形成破火山口的喷发联系起来

summary_bullets.research_question: 高硅流纹岩浆的互补性堆晶岩为何在上地壳缺失？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合结构分析与热力学模拟，研究Campo Alegre-Corupá系统。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 低结晶度下通过流动分选和聚集沉降，早期熔体分离形成高硅熔体与堆晶岩。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出动态岩浆粥状模型，揭示流动驱动晶体分选促成火山口喷发。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 阐明上地壳大型可喷发岩浆的成因机制，修正静态岩浆房演化概念。

works.title: Detrital zircon reveals secular evolution of granite petrogenesis from early Earth geodynamics to supercontinent cycles
works.abstract: The secular evolution of granitoid magmatism provides a key to understanding the transition from early Earth’s geodynamic regimes to modern plate tectonics and the co-evolution of continental crust with supercontinent cycles. Detrital zircons preserve a continuous record of this evolution, but previous provenance classifications have been limited to a binary I-S-type scheme, overlooking A-type, M−type, and non-granitic sources. Here we present a two-step machine-learning classifier (Random Forest, 93.2 % overall accuracy), trained on 8,101 magmatic zircons with known host-rock context, that discriminates among I-, S-, A-, M−type granitoid and non-granitic sources based on 18 trace-element features. Applied to 11,591 detrital zircons older than 500 Ma, the classifier reveals first-order Precambrian trends in granite petrogenesis and their links to supercontinent evolution. S-type zircons appear as early as ∼ 4.3 Ga, supporting Hadean liquid water and supracrustal recycling. M−type zircons are first recognized after ∼ 3.5 Ga and increase markedly beginning just before ∼ 2.0 Ga, suggesting a progressive involvement of mantle-derived magmas consistent with a transition to more widespread horizontal tectonics. I-type zircon abundances display declines coincident with the Great Oxidation Event and Neoproterozoic Oxidation Event, motivating a testable hypothesis that links deep reducing-gas fluxes, atmospheric O2 sinks, and redox conditions unfavorable for typical oxidized I-type granitoid magmatism. A-type zircon enrichment intervals, especially around ∼ 2.7–2.5 Ga, ∼1.85–1.75 Ga, and ∼ 1.25–1.10 Ga, broadly correspond to lithospheric thinning and post-orogenic to intraplate extension, suggesting that A-type zircon abundance records lithospheric thermal reorganization, pointing to gravitational delamination as a dominant control. By explicitly including all granitoid types and non-granitic sources and framing the results within the context of supercontinent cycles, our approach provides a more complete and quantitative framework for reading Earth’s deep-time history from detrital zircon archives, offering new insights into the coupled evolution of the continental lithosphere, surface environments, and global geodynamics.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 碎屑锆石揭示从早期地球动力学到超大陆旋回的花岗岩成因长期演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 碎屑锆石如何完整记录早期地球到现代板块构造的花岗岩成因演变及超大陆旋回？
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于8101个岩浆锆石和18种微量元素，构建两步随机森林分类器区分I-S-A-M型与非花岗岩源区。
summary_bullets.key_findings: S型锆石最早约4.3Ga出现，M型约3.5Ga增多，I型丰度下降与氧化事件相关，A型富集指示岩石圈减薄事件。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次纳入全部花岗岩类型及非花岗岩源区，突破传统二元分类，建立多类碎屑锆石物源判别框架。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为深时地质演化提供高精度量化工具，将锆石记录与超大陆动力学、古气候氧化事件直接关联。

works.title: Genesis of late mesozoic porphyry Cu (Mo, Au) deposits in NE China: insights from biotite geochemistry
works.abstract: The discovery of Late Mesozoic large- to medium-sized porphyry Cu (Mo, Au) deposits in Northeast (NE) China highlights the region’s significant potential for mineral exploration. These deposits exhibit a clear spatial metallogenic zonation. Late Jurassic porphyry deposits in the north are dominated by Cu-Mo assemblages, whereas Early Cretaceous porphyry deposits in the east are characterized by Cu-Au mineralization. However, the genesis of these deposits and the key factors controlling their distinct metal assemblages remain poorly constrained, limiting a systematic understanding of regional metallogeny and the associated ore-forming processes. This study analyzes major-element compositions of magmatic biotites collected from ore-forming rocks of two porphyry episodes to characterize differences between the two magmatic systems and elucidate controls on their metal specialization (Cu–Mo vs. Cu–Au). Our results indicate that the two porphyry episodes formed from magmas with relatively high oxygen fugacity, comparable temperatures, and shallow emplacement depths. Integrated with regional tectonic evolution, the results suggest that the ore-forming magmas of Late Jurassic Cu–Mo systems were derived mainly from partial melting of thickened continental crust in a post-collisional setting following the Mongolia-Okhotsk Ocean closure. Their biotites are characterized by high Si and Mg, low Fe and Mn, coupled with F enrichment, which favored Mo enrichment and transport, leading to significant Mo accumulation in porphyry Cu deposits. In contrast, the ore-forming magmas of Early Cretaceous Cu–Au systems formed in a setting dominated by Paleo-Pacific plate subduction and rollback, coupled with crust-mantle interaction and mantle-derived contributions. Their biotites exhibit low Si and Mg, high Fe and Mn, coupled with Cl enrichment. This study demonstrates that biotite geochemistry provides key constraints for deciphering the formation mechanisms and metallogenic diversity of porphyry systems in NE China.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 中国东北晚中生代斑岩型铜（钼、金）矿床的成因：来自黑云母地球化学的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示东北地区晚中生代斑岩铜（钼、金）矿床的成因及控制其不同金属组合（铜-钼 vs. 铜-金）的关键因素。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过对比两期成矿斑岩中岩浆黑云母的主量元素地球化学特征，分析岩浆系统的差异与金属专属性。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 两期岩浆均高氧逸度、浅成就位；晚侏罗世富F黑云母高Si、Mg利于钼富集，早白垩世富Cl黑云母高Fe、Mn指示壳幔混合与金矿化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用黑云母地球化学标型特征有效示踪东北斑岩成矿系统的金属分带与构造背景差异。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为区域斑岩矿床勘查提供了黑云母成分判别指标，深化了不同构造体制下斑岩成矿多样性的理解。

works.title: Fe-Zn-Cu isotopes reveal spatially variable dual metasomatism in the eastern Neo-Tethyan subduction system
works.abstract: The Yarlung Zangbo ophiolites (YZO), exposed along the southern Tibetan Plateau, represent remnants of the Neo-Tethyan oceanic lithospheric mantle, variably serpentinized during subduction and continental collision. These forearc-type peridotites provide a valuable archive of fluid−rock interactions along the subduction interface during the initiation and evolution of the India−Eurasia convergence. Moreover, such fluid−rock interaction processes may have contributed to the formation of potential natural hydrogen resources. We present an integrated geochemical dataset—including major and trace elements and Fe, Zn, and Cu stable isotopes—for 34 serpentinites and peridotites sampled across the YZO to characterize melt- and fluid-mediated modification processes in mantle rocks. The serpentinites display spoon-shaped rare earth element (REE) patterns, with flat heavy REE, depleted middle REE, and enriched light REE, along with fluid-mobile element (FME) ratios (e.g., low U/Cs, Li/Cs, Rb/Cs and high Li/U, Cs/Th, Rb/U) characteristic of subduction forearc environments. Zn and Cu isotope compositions (δ66Zn = +0.11‰ to +0.39‰; δ65Cu = −0.24‰ to +0.26‰) correlate with Zn depletion, consistent with the loss of isotopically light Zn and heavy Cu via oxidizing slab-derived fluids during serpentinization. In contrast, Fe isotopes (δ56Fe = −0.05‰ to +0.35‰) show systematically heavy values, decoupled from FME proxies. These signatures are inconsistent with metasomatism by fluids alone and instead point to an earlier refertilization stage by sediment-derived melts from the subducting Neo-Tethyan slab, imparting an isotopically heavy signature before serpentinization. Critically, the geochemical and isotopic compositions evolve along-strike: Western and central YZO samples show more mantle-like signatures, whereas eastern segments exhibit stronger metasomatic overprints and more fractionated isotopic values. This east−west gradient likely reflects changes in fluid sources, mantle protoliths, and redox conditions, linked to spatial and temporal variations in subduction zone dynamics. These findings underscore the potential of forearc serpentinites to record complex metasomatic histories and along-strike heterogeneities in subduction-related geochemical cycling.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: Fe-Zn-Cu同位素揭示新特提斯洋东部俯冲系统中空间差异的双重交代作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 新特提斯洋俯冲带东段蛇绿岩地幔岩记录了怎样的流体/熔体交代过程及其空间变化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对雅鲁藏布江蛇绿岩的34个蛇纹岩和橄榄岩进行主微量元素及Fe-Zn-Cu同位素地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 西部样品具类地幔特征，东部样品显示更强熔体交代与同位素分馏，揭示俯冲带东段存在早期沉积物熔体再富集与后期流体蛇纹岩化的双重交代。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次联合Fe-Zn-Cu同位素约束蛇绿岩地幔岩的多阶段交代历史及沿走向的不均一性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证明前弧蛇纹岩可记录复杂交代过程与空间非均质性，对理解俯冲带物质循环和自然资源形成有重要意义。

works.title: Lower crustal modification at the margin of the North China Craton: Multi-proxy geochemical and isotopic imaging constraints from the Late Mesozoic granitoids in Jiaodong Peninsula
works.abstract: The evolution of continental crust is a fundamental issue in solid Earth science. Granitoids, as key products of the lower crust, record these processes. The Jiaodong Peninsula hosts three stages of Late Mesozoic granitoids and provides insights into cratonic lower crustal modification. This study integrates geochronology, whole-rock geochemistry, and zircon Hf-O isotopes to constrain these processes. Nb-Ta-Zr-Hf elemental and Hf-O isotopic compositions define a NW-SE trending geochemical boundary (∼121°E). This boundary separates the strongly modified Jiaobei Terrane from the weakly modified Sulu Terrane and aligns with tectonic subdivisions along the Wulian-Yantai fault zone. Three stages of lower crustal modification are identified. Stage I granitoids (166–141 Ma) show variable εHf(t) values (−26.5 to −13.1), δ18O values (4.58–8.93‰), and low Mg# (16–34). These features indicate partial melting of a thickened ancient lower crust during subduction of the Paleo-Pacific Plate. Stage II granitoids (133–121 Ma) display higher εHf(t) values (–23.0 to −11.2), elevated δ18O values (8.09–9.03‰), and Mg# of 26–58. These characteristics indicate melting of a weakly modified lower crust triggered by underplating of enriched mantle materials metasomatized by high-δ18O fluids during slab rollback. Stage III granitoids (120–107 Ma) exhibit high εHf(t) values (–22.3 to −13.9), lower δ18O values (5.34–8.09‰), and higher Mg# (17–64). These data indicate melting of a strongly modified lower crust influenced by enriched mantle materials metasomatized by low-δ18O melts and sediments during continued slab rollback. Integrated petrogenetic, spatiotemporal, and geophysical evidence supports a progressive lower crustal modification model controlled by subduction and slab rollback processes.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华北克拉通边缘下地壳改造：来自胶东半岛晚中生代花岗岩类的多指标地球化学与同位素成像约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 华北克拉通边缘下地壳如何经历多阶段改造？
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合地质年代学、全岩地球化学和锆石Hf-O同位素多指标联合约束。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 在121°E附近识别出NW-SE向地球化学界限，揭示三期下地壳改造，与古太平洋板块俯冲和后撤相关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 通过Nb-Ta-Zr-Hf元素和Hf-O同位素厘定地球化学边界，构建渐进式下地壳改造模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为克拉通边缘深部地壳演化和俯冲-后撤动力学提供多指标实例，对理解陆壳分异具有参考价值。

works.title: Mid-Miocene high-temperature magmatism, a case study of the Sakya dome: Implications for the removal of the Himalayan orogenic root
works.abstract: Intense crustal anatexis, metamorphism, and structural deformation occurred throughout the collisional orogeny, preserving crucial records and constraints on the thermal and tectonic evolution. During the mid-Miocene, the Himalayan magmatism, including the leucogranites, adakite-like, and ultrapotassic rocks, culminated, coeval with (ultra)high-temperature metamorphism. However, the heat source and the deep process in the mid-Miocene Himalaya remain debated. This study presents results of U-(Th)-Pb dating of monazite and zircon, whole-rock geochemical and isotopic analyses, and three independent thermometric estimates for porphyritic granites and granite porphyries from the Sakya dome, northern Himalaya. The porphyritic granites and granite porphyries yield ages of 13.9−13.0 Ma and 12.6−11.6 Ma, respectively. Geochemical and isotopic analyses indicate the former were derived from the Greater Himalayan Crystalline (GHC), while the latter likely originated from a mixed source comprising ∼80% GHC and ∼20% Indian thickened lower crust materials. Estimated results from three thermometers consistently indicate elevated temperatures during both anatexis and subsequent magma evolution, implying an abnormally high-temperature background. Integrating evidence from the mid-Miocene Himalayan magmatism, (ultra)high-temperature metamorphism and regional tectonics, this paper adopts a model of the delamination of the Indian lithospheric mantle, which triggered the asthenospheric upwelling and additional heat input, thereby driving the (ultra)high-temperature magmatism and metamorphism, extensive anatexis at multiple depths, and diverse magmatism involving contributions from the GHC, Lesser Himalayan Sequence, Indian thickened lower crust, and the mantle in the mid-Miocene Himalaya. This delamination may signify the removal of the Himalayan orogenic root in the mid-Miocene, after which orogenesis persisted under continued convergence between the Indian and Asian plates.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中新世中期高温岩浆作用：以萨迦穹隆为例——对喜马拉雅造山带根部移除的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探索中中新世喜马拉雅高温岩浆活动的热源和深部驱动机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过独居石和锆石定年、全岩地球化学、同位素分析及三种独立温度计进行评估。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 斑状花岗岩与花岗斑岩分别形成于13.9–13.0 Ma和12.6–11.6 Ma，源区及高温背景指示岩石圈地幔拆沉所致。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出印度岩石圈地幔拆沉导致软流圈上涌，为中中新世高温岩浆和变质作用提供统一解释。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示了喜马拉雅造山根移除的关键时限与机制，深化对碰撞造山带热演化与地壳深熔的理解。

works.title: The redox state of the martian interior: insights from experimentally calibrated V/Sc oxybarometry
works.abstract: Constraining the oxygen fugacity (fO2) of the mantle of Mars is critical for understanding planetary differentiation processes and magmatic evolution. The degree to which the shergottite martian meteorites faithfully record the redox states of their mantle sources remains obscured by several factors. One of these factors is the various methods used to estimate fO2: Fe-based oxybarometers require multiple minerals to be found in chemical equilibrium, which can be challenging to obtain, while previous V-based values rely on estimated parental melt compositions. Here, we present new, mineral-specific V/Sc oxybarometers calibrated for olivine and pyroxene in shergottites using experimentally determined partition coefficients. This method obviates the need for parental melt V concentrations and allows for fO2 determination from single mineral phases, bypassing the equilibrium constraints that limit Fe-oxybarometry. We applied these calibrations to a petrologically diverse suite of geochemically depleted, intermediate, and enriched shergottites. Our results reveal that: (1) basaltic shergottites, previously estimated at fO2 ∼FMQ-1, record a significantly lower initial/magmatic fO2 of ∼FMQ-1.7; (2) the magmatic fO2 of shergottites is correlated with their geochemical enrichment; and (3) all shergottites show oxidation of a magnitude of >0.5 log units with progressive crystallization. The V/Sc oxybarometers provide a robust tool for estimating the magmatic fO2 of shergottites and tracking their redox changes throughout their petrogenetic histories.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 火星内部的氧化还原状态：来自实验校准V/Sc氧逸度计的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何更准确测定火星陨石的岩浆氧逸度并揭示地幔源区氧化还原状态？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用实验校准的橄榄石和辉石V/Sc氧压力计，从单矿物直接确定氧逸度。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 玄武质火星陨石初始氧逸度为FMQ-1.7，与地球化学富集程度相关，结晶过程中普遍氧化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 开发矿物特定V/Sc氧压力计，首次实现单矿物直接测氧逸度，无需母岩浆或多相平衡。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为研究火星陨石岩石成因及内部氧化还原演化提供精确可靠的新工具。

works.title: Magma degassing assisting hybridization and crystal alteration: evidence from plutonic rocks
works.abstract: Abstract Magma hybridization, the mixing and mingling of compositionally distinct magmas, is commonly interpreted as involving only silicate melts and crystals. Yet magmas are multiphase systems comprising silicate melts, crystals, and exsolved fluid phases, suggesting that fluids may also play a role in hybridization. Through an integrated study of field relationships, microstructures, and the chemistry of major and accessory phases in hybrid rocks from the early Palaeozoic Archibarca pluton (Puna Plateau, NW Argentina), we identify microstructural and geochemical evidence for the presence and involvement of an exsolved fluid phase during magma mingling. We find that these diorites record a transition from magmatic to hydrothermal conditions (~800 to 500°C), driven by F-CO32−-SO42− aqueous fluids exsolved from granitic magma, that trigger an autometasomatic hornblendization reaction in which biotite is replaced by hornblende and titanite, plus other phases such as quartz, zircon and apatite, and minerals typical of hydrothermal alteration such as calcite, baryte and rutile, in response to increasing fO2 and aSiO2. This process promotes mobility of medium- to heavy-REE and HFSE, producing spoon-shaped REE patterns in hornblende and titanite, REE-poor fluorapatite, and light-REE-enriched altered zircon. Due to this alteration, commonly used thermobarometers and chemometers yield conditions outside the true magmatic conditions, reflecting disturbed rather than pristine conditions, hampering the use of petrochronologic tools as reliable indicators of magmatic crystallization timing and conditions. Simultaneously, these fluids enrich surrounding rocks in incompatible elements, fostering local geochemical hybridization. At the meso- and microscales, the hornblende-titanite-rich structures provide direct evidence of fluid migration through crystal mushes, recording both chemical and mechanical signatures of reactive transport. Features such as hornblende-titanite selvedges, patchy replacement textures, quartz ocelli, and hornblendite dykes serve as diagnostic markers of fluid-crystal-melt interaction. These structures could serve as key indicators of fluid transfer and autometasomatism in other calc-alkaline magmatic mingled systems and for reconstructing volatile evolution and element redistribution during pluton assembly.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 岩浆脱气促进混合作用与晶体蚀变：来自深成岩的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 岩浆混合作用是否仅有硅酸盐熔体和晶体参与，还是也有出溶流体的贡献？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过野外关系、微观结构及主量、副矿物化学综合分析混合岩中的流体印记。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 流体驱动的自交代角闪石化反应改造矿物化学，干扰温压计，促进元素迁移和局部地球化学混合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提供岩浆混合中出溶流体参与的直接微观结构和地球化学证据，并识别出诊断标志。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为重建岩浆挥发分演化与元素再分配提供新视角，警示岩石年代学工具需审慎使用。

works.title: Thermal Elasticity of δ‐AlOOH and Its Implications for the Velocity Structure of Deep Mantle
works.abstract: Abstract δ‐AlOOH can remain stable down to lower mantle depth, making it a potential carrier for water transport into the deep mantle and a plausible candidate for influencing deep‐seated velocity structures. To elucidate its impacts on the velocity structure of the deep Earth and the global water cycle, we conducted synchrotron radiation ultrasonic experiments to measure the sound velocities of δ‐AlOOH under conditions up to 18.5 GPa and 873 K, and derived its elastic parameters, yielding: K S 0 = 231.6 (2) GPa , K S ' = 4.1 (1) , ∂K S /∂T = −0.025 (1) GPa/K , G 0 = 159.2 (3) GPa , G' = 1.7 (1) , ∂G/∂T = −0.031 (1) GPa/K. By integrating the elastic parameters of major minerals within the stability field of subducting sediments, we modeled the velocity structure of δ‐AlOOH‐bearing sedimentary layers. Combined with the thermal stability of δ‐AlOOH and coexisting minerals, we propose that δ‐AlOOH may contribute to elevated velocity gradients of subducting sediments in the transition zone. Furthermore, using first‐principles calculations, we have determined the seismic velocities of δ‐AlOOH up to 130 GPa. This helps to evaluate its contribution to the seismic properties of localized, slab‐derived hydrous lithologies. Meanwhile, this phase plays a significant role in shaping the heterogeneity along the periphery of Large Low‐Shear‐Velocity provinces and in the generation of Ultra‐Low‐Velocity zones.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: δ‐AlOOH的热弹性及其对深部地幔速度结构的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: δ-AlOOH如何影响深部地幔速度结构及水循环？
summary_bullets.methodology: 使用同步辐射超声实验测量声速，并结合第一性原理计算。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 获得了δ-AlOOH的高温高压弹性参数，揭示其可提升过渡带沉积层速度梯度。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将实验速度与高温弹性参数结合，模拟含水沉积层速度结构。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别深部地幔水传输载体和解释局部速度异常提供了关键数据。

works.title:
<sup>16</sup>
                    O poor cosmic spherules from near-Earth CY chondrite asteroids
works.abstract: Approximately 10% of cosmic spherules—microscopic extraterrestrial particles that melt upon atmospheric entry and dominate the influx of astromaterials to Earth—exhibit anomalous oxygen isotopic compositions, suggesting an asteroidal source not represented in current meteorite collections. We introduce a a previously unidentified subset of micrometeorites, the sulfur-rich cumulate olivine (SCumPo) cosmic spherules, characterized by cumulate textures evidencing the settling of olivine crystals, and oxygen-16 ( 16 O)–poor bulk signatures. The systematically nickel-poor olivine phenocrysts, frequent iron-nickel-sulfur droplets, unusually sulfur-rich mesostasis, and a virtual absence of magnetite all point to unusually highly reducing conditions during atmospheric entry, which may reflect unusual precursor mineralogy. Numerical modeling of olivine settling under deceleration speeds of ~14 to 17 kilometers per second suggests high-eccentricity precursor orbits ( e > 0.2), incompatible with typical main-belt asteroid sources. These findings point to a previously unsampled, primitive, sulfide-rich CY-like near-Earth asteroid, which represents a “missing” meteorite parent body that contributes distinctive 16 O-poor cosmic dust to Earth.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 来自近地CY球粒陨石小行星的贫¹⁶O宇宙球粒

summary_bullets.research_question: 约10%的宇宙球粒具有异常氧同位素组成，其来源天体未知，本文旨在确定其母体类型。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学、氧同位素分析和数值模拟，研究富硫堆积橄榄石宇宙球粒的特征与轨道来源。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现一类贫¹⁶O的SCumPo宇宙球粒，其高度还原特征和高偏心率轨道指向CY-like近地小行星母体。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次识别出代表“缺失”陨石母体的新型微陨石，将贫¹⁶O宇宙尘埃与特定小行星类型关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为太阳系物质输运和未采样小行星类型提供了直接样品，有助于完善行星物质演化模型。

works.title: Rheologic controls on the depth dependence of megathrust earthquakes
works.abstract: The various slip behaviors of the subduction megathrust fault, including deadly megathrust earthquakes, are depth-dependent. Yet, we do not know what causes this depth dependence, in part due to variability between subduction zone thermal structures and lithological inputs. Here, we investigate controls on the nucleation depths of great earthquakes (Mw ≳ 8) and the deeper extent of seismogenesis. To do so, we create rheologic strength envelopes for six subduction zones using published constitutive relations for subducting lithologies and regional thermal models. We then compare the strength envelopes to local plate interface earthquake depths. Our synthesis shows that subducted sediments undergo a transition from frictional to predominantly viscous deformation near 300 ± 60 ° C a transition that correlates with the maximum nucleation depths of great earthquakes at 20 to 30 km. However, smaller plate interface earthquakes ( 5 ≤ Mw 8) continue to nucleate below this depth, and the maximum earthquake size decreases until the base of the seismogenic zone at 40 to 60 km depth and ∼ 500 °C. We evaluate potential causes of seismicity below the onset of viscous deformation in these now metasediments, and conclude that the presence of lithologic heterogeneities that are loaded to frictional failure by viscously deforming metasediments is most plausible. Thus, we propose that great earthquakes can nucleate and grow into large events where all lithologies are frictional. However, the base of the seismogenic zone is deeper than the onset of viscous deformation in metasediments, which limits the growth of earthquakes into large events, and here seismicity reflects the existence and size of heterogeneity along the plate interface.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 流变学对巨型逆冲地震深度依赖性的控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 控制大型逆冲地震成核深度及深部地震活动性终止的流变学因素是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过构建六个俯冲带的流变强度剖面并与当地板片界面地震深度进行对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 俯冲沉积物在约300°C从摩擦转变为粘性变形，对应大地震最大成核深度；其下小型地震仍存在，可能由粘性变形中不均匀摩擦破坏引起。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出大地震成核限于完全摩擦域，而更深地震活动性受岩性非均质性控制的统一流变学解释。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲带地震深度分层提供机理解释，有助于改进地震灾害评估和孕震带模型。

works.title: A Cambrian normal MORB tholeiite to boninite succession caused by ridge subduction in the Western Kunlun Orogen, Northwest China
works.abstract: The magmatic chemostratigraphic progression in Izu−Bonin−Mariana (IBM) forearc and supra-subduction zone ophiolites display magmatic conversions from mid-ocean-ridge basalt (MORB)-like/forearc basalt (FAB) tholeiites to boninites, which are always interpreted as rules for the evolving chemical geodynamics of subduction initiation magmatism. Here, we present new zircon U-Pb ages, major and trace elemental, and isotopic data of MORB-like tholeiites and boninitic rocks in Western Kunlun, Northwest China. The Early−Middle Cambrian (517−500 Ma) tholeiites exhibit compositions similar to those of the most depleted MORBs, but with lower Ti/V ratios (20−26 versus ∼33), suggesting slightly higher concentrations of fluid-soluble elements than normal MORBs. They have high εNd(t) values (6.1−7.4), low (87Sr/86Sr)i ratios (0.7044−0.7049), low zircon δ18O (4.50‰−5.69‰) values, and low initial Pb isotope ratios [(206Pb/204Pb)t: 17.174−17.842; (207Pb/204Pb)t: 15.437−15.553; (208Pb/204Pb)t: 37.052−37.815]. The Middle Cambrian (509−506 Ma) boninitic dikes are characterized by depletions in Ti, heavy rare earth elements (HREEs), and high field strength elements (HFSEs), with enrichment in large ion lithophile elements (LILEs). They have low εNd(t) values (0.6−4.9), low (87Sr/86Sr)i ratios (0.7035−0.7038), and high initial Pb isotope ratios [(206Pb/204Pb)t: 17.849−18.179; (207Pb/204Pb)t: 15.554−15.625; (208Pb/204Pb)t: 37.735−38.058]. Our results show that the tholeiites were generated from decompression-dominated melting of sub-slab asthenosphere mantle, and later the boninitic dikes were derived by high-temperature melting of refractory peridotitic mantle re-fertilized by minor hydrous melt from subducted oceanic lithosphere. Taking into account geological evidence and the occurrence of contemporaneous ophiolites and volcanic lavas in Western Kunlun, we propose that the tholeiites and boninitic rocks were formed above a subducted ridge-related slab window, distinct from strictly subduction initiation magmatism. Consequently, we suggest that caution is required before assuming such a normal MORB tholeiite to boninite succession was strictly indicative of subduction initiation without considering alternative tectonic settings.
