works.title: Impact heating and the hidden Hadean
works.abstract: The nature of Earth’s crust during the Hadean eon [≥4.03 billion years ago (Ga)] is uncertain. Numerical models of early Earth geodynamics emphasize the control of mantle temperature but generally consider only internally derived heat, despite empirical evidence for an intense Hadean impact flux. Using a stochastic model of that flux, we show that the time-integrated heat due to impacts would have dwarfed that produced internally throughout the Hadean. Earth’s Hadean crust would have been extensively molten at depths below a few kilometers, causing gravitational segregation of dense, iron- and magnesium-rich material and driving average crustal compositions to become increasingly silica rich. Globally, impact heating would have become much less important after 3.9 Ga, allowing the crust to thicken. That enduring continental crust appeared around this time is likely not a coincidence.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 撞击加热与隐伏的冥古宙

summary_bullets.research_question: 冥古宙地壳性质为何不确定，撞击加热是否对其形成有决定性影响？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用随机模型模拟冥古宙撞击通量，量化撞击对地球的加热量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 撞击热远超内部热，使地壳深部广泛熔化，成分向富硅演化，3.9Ga后撞击减弱，地壳增厚。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在早期地球动力学模型中整合撞击加热，揭示其对地壳成分和厚度的控制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 将大陆地壳出现时间与撞击通量下降关联，为冥古宙地壳演化提供新约束。

works.title: Correlations between multi-stage tectonic evolution and metallogenic processes in the proto- and paleo-tethyan domains in the sanjiang composite orogenic system, SW China
works.abstract: The Sanjiang Tethyan orogenic belt, a globally representative composite multi-island arc-basin system, has been a focus of ongoing debate regarding the coupling relationship between the Proto- and Paleo-Tethyan tectonic evolution and metallogenic processes. This study systematically synthesizes regional geological, geochronological, and metallogenic data to characterize the distinct tectonic units within the Sanjiang Composite Orogenic System. A tectono-metallogenic coupling model is established by integrating the spatiotemporal distribution of ophiolites, high-pressure metamorphic rocks, and representative ore deposits. The Changning-Menglian suture zone preserves a complete record of the oceanic-basin evolution from subduction to final closure, including Early Paleozoic Lancang Group accretionary complexes, Ordovician-Silurian ophiolites, Early Paleozoic high-Mg adakites, Devonian-Carboniferous oceanic island basalts, and Middle-Late Triassic eclogites. Our results demonstrate a strong genetic correlation between regional metallogenesis and tectonic settings: extensional settings control Sedex-type Pb-Zn deposits, subduction systems dominate VMS-type Cu-Pb-Zn mineralization, collisional stages develop porphyry-skarn Cu-Mo deposits, while post-collisional extension triggers Sn-W and epithermal Pb-Zn mineralization. Innovatively, this study proposes a four-stage tectonic-metallogenic evolution model for the Proto- and Paleo-Tethyan Ocean: (1) Early Paleozoic passive margin extension (Sedex-type Pb-Zn mineralization); (2) Middle Ordovician to Silurian subduction (VMS/BIF-type mineralization); (3) Late Paleozoic development of a multi-island arc-basin system (large-scale VMS-type mineralization); and (4) Middle-Late Triassic collisional orogeny (eclogite deep subduction, porphyry-skarn Cu-Mo, and Sn-W mineralization). These findings provide new insights into the multi-stage dynamic processes of Proto- and Paleo-Tethyan evolution and clarify the controlling mechanisms of diverse tectonic settings (rift → subduction → collision → intracontinental extension) on metallogenic systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 三江复合造山系原-古特提斯构造域多阶段构造演化与成矿过程的关联

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示三江原-古特提斯构造演化与成矿过程的时空耦合关系及动力学机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 系统整合区域地质、年代学与成矿数据，分析蛇绿岩、高压变质岩和矿床分布。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 不同构造背景控制特定矿床类型，建立了四阶段构造-成矿演化模型。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新提出原-古特提斯洋四阶段演化模型，阐明构造对成矿系统的控制机理。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为多岛弧盆系统构造-成矿耦合研究提供新见解，指导特提斯域找矿勘探。

works.title: Ion microprobe analysis of fluorine, water, and oxygen isotopes in garnet from skarn deposits in the Tongling ore district, eastern China: Implications for coupled F-OH substitution mechanism and polymetallic mineralization
works.abstract: Skarn deposits, as integral components of magmatic-hydrothermal systems, represent major global resources of economically critical metals. Volatile constituents such as fluorine (F), chlorine (Cl), and sulfur (S) play fundamental roles in regulating metal complexation, transport efficiency, and precipitation within hydrothermal fluids. Despite this recognized importance, the partitioning behavior of F among melt, minerals, and fluid phases and its influence on metal selectivity across different skarn deposits remain insufficiently constrained. This study investigates representative skarn deposits from the world-class Tongling ore district in eastern China to evaluate the substitution mechanisms and partitioning behavior of F and hydroxyl (OH) in garnet, together with oxygen isotope systematics, using high-precision ion microprobe analysis. The objective is to clarify the metallogenic role of the volatiles in polymetallic skarn mineralization. The principal findings are as follows: (1) F and hydroxyl incorporation in garnet are dominantly coupled, reflecting defect-related substitution mechanisms; (2) a first-order quantitative estimate of the garnet-fluid F partition coefficient (DFGrt−Fluid = ∼0.074) indicates that F is highly mobile in hydrothermal fluids but exhibits limited structural incorporation in garnet; (3) elevated F contents in garnet from skarn Cu-Mo deposits imply the development of hydroxyl-fluoride complexes in ore-forming fluids, potentially enhancing Mo transport and precipitation; and (4) calculated δ18Ofluid values decrease from early skarn stages (6.3‰−11.2‰, Vienna standard mean ocean water) to late quartz-sulfide stages (3.1‰−7.6‰), indicating dominantly magmatic fluid sources with minor input of ancient meteoric water during the later stages of mineralization. Collectively, integrated secondary ion mass spectrometry determinations of F and H2O contents, combined with garnet oxygen isotopes, provide quantitative constraints on F partitioning behavior in skarn systems and elucidate the fundamental role of volatiles in controlling metal transport and enrichment during polymetallic mineralization.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国东部铜陵矿集区矽卡岩矿床石榴石中氟、水和氧同位素的离子探针分析：对F-OH耦合替代机制及多金属成矿作用的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究F和OH在石榴石中的取代机制及分配行为，及其对多金属矽卡岩成矿的控制作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用高精度离子探针分析石榴石中的F、H₂O含量和氧同位素组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: F与OH耦合替代；石榴石-流体F分配系数约0.074；F含量高指示羟基氟化物络合物促进Mo运移；成矿流体以岩浆水为主，晚期混入少量大气水。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次定量估算石榴石-流体F分配系数，并集成SIMS表征挥发分与氧同位素。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为矽卡岩系统中挥发分分配行为及金属运移富集过程提供关键定量约束。

works.title: Cyclic sealing and drainage on an oceanic transform fault
works.abstract: Oceanic transform faults have been considered conservative, shear-dominated boundaries, yet their proximity to magmatic systems implies fluid involvement. Here, we discovered tidally modulated tremor at the Gofar transform fault along the East Pacific Rise. Tremor amplitude correlates with semidiurnal tides during periods of sparse seismicity and low in-situ compressional to shear wave velocity ratio (Vp/Vs), but this correlation weakens following earthquake swarms accompanied by high Vp/Vs. We propose a valve-like sealing‒drainage dynamic process where sealing traps volatiles and boosts tidal sensitivity, sustaining tremor activity until rupture opens high porosity and permeability pathways, which silences tremors, triggers microseismicity, and resets the system via hydrothermal resealing. Thus, transform faults are likely permeable and tide-critical, with energy release oscillating between tremors and rupture, paced by magmatic volatile supply and healing.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 大洋转换断层上的周期性封闭与泄水

summary_bullets.research_question: 大洋转换断层是否为纯剪切边界，流体在其中扮演何种角色？
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析Gofar断层地震数据，研究震颤与潮汐及Vp/Vs波速比的相关性。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 潮汐调制震颤与低波速比相关，地震群后减弱，揭示阀式封闭-排水动态过程。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出阀式密封-排水模型，解释流体驱动的震颤与破裂交替机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证明转换断层具渗透性和潮汐敏感性，改变对断层滑动行为和地震危险性的认知。

works.title: Progressive mantle melting and crust–mantle–fluid hybridization in fluorite-bearing Sn–Nb ± Mo-rich alkaline granites of the Jos Plateau, central Nigeria
works.abstract: Alkaline granites of the Jos Plateau Tin Belt (central Nigeria) host Sn-Nb-Mo mineralization. However, their petrogenesis, metal enrichment, and tectono-geodynamic evolution remain poorly constrained. This study integrates whole-rock geochemistry and Sr-Nd isotopes, amphibole-fluorite chemistry, and zircon U-Pb geochronology from the Buji, Jos-Bukuru (JBK), and Kigom (KGM) complexes. Zircon U-Pb ages reveal a north-to-south younging trend from Buji (∼179 Ma) through JBK (∼168 Ma) to KGM (∼166 Ma). Buji barren granites exhibit the most negative εNd(t) (–4.4 to –4.2), least radiogenic 87Sr/86Sr(i) (0.7065–0.7066), and highest Neodymium Crustal Index (NCI = 0.31), indicating an enriched mantle source with strong crustal input. JBK Sn–Nb biotite-amphibole granites show intermediate εNd(t) (–3.3 to –3.0), NCI (0.25), and moderately radiogenic 87Sr/86Sr(i) (0.7066–0.7173), suggesting an enriched mantle source with moderate crustal input and selective hydrothermal overprint. KGM Mo–Nb arfvedsonite–riebeckite granites exhibit near-chondritic εNd(t) (–1.1 to –0.4), lowest NCI (0.25), and most radiogenic 87Sr/86Sr(i)r (0.7139–0.7206), reflecting extreme fluid-mediated metasomatism on a mantle-dominated magma. Decoupled fO2 distinguishes oxidized JBK Ca-amphiboles from reduced KGM Na-amphiboles hosting oxidized zircons. Mass balance modeling indicates ∼40–50 vol% feldspar-dominated fractional crystallization coupled with ∼30–40 vol% upper crustal assimilation. JBK granites show Sn-Nb enrichment (4–126 ppm; 37–910 ppm), while KGM granites exhibit high Nb with extreme Zn-Pb-Cu (≤1326, 1054, 845 ppm), consistent with Mo-enriched systems. Fluorite compositions (F = 52–56 wt%) record F-rich reducing fluids that promoted HFSE-REE-Sn-Nb-Mo mobility. A four-stage model explains Sn-Nb-Mo enrichment in JBK and KGM: (I) magmatic enrichment; (II) magmatic-hydrothermal transition; (III) hydrothermal veining and stockworks formation; (IV) supergene placer formation. Transtension triggered adiabatic melting of metasomatized mantle, generating alkaline magmas that ascended along shear zones to form shallowly emplaced (2.6–8.7 km) anorogenic alkaline complexes. Fertile global analogues share this convergence of transtensional shearing, crustal assimilation, and F-rich fluid flux.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 尼日利亚中部乔斯高原含萤石富Sn–Nb±Mo碱性花岗岩的渐进式地幔熔融与壳–幔–流体混合作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 尼日利亚乔斯高原含萤石富Sn-Nb碱性花岗岩的岩石成因、金属富集及构造动力学演化不清。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合全岩地球化学、Sr-Nd同位素、角闪石-萤石化学与锆石U-Pb年代学进行分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 年龄北老南新；源区为受地壳混染的富集地幔；氧化还原解耦；四阶段模型阐明Sn-Nb-Mo富集机制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出张扭剪切、地壳同化与富氟流体协同作用的四阶段稀有金属成矿新模式。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为全球类似张扭构造背景下碱性花岗岩稀有金属成矿预测提供关键类比依据。

works.title: Impacts shaped Earth’s first continents
works.abstract: Heat from large impacts may have melted most of Earth’s earliest crust
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 撞击作用塑造了地球最初的陆地

summary_bullets.research_question: 大型撞击事件如何影响地球最初大陆的形成？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用热力学模拟分析大撞击对早期地壳的熔融效应。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 大撞击产生的热量可能熔融了大部分早期地壳，从而塑造了最初的大陆。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提出大撞击而非板块构造是地球最早大陆形成的主导机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地球早期演化及大陆起源研究提供了新的动力机制与视角。

works.title: Magma convection favors ephemeral melt-rich bodies within mushy reservoirs
works.abstract: Abstract Magma convection is a mechanism that greatly enhances heat transfer from mobilizable, crystal-poor magma bodies to the surrounding immobile, crystal-rich mush reservoir of Earth’s igneous systems. As most of these systems are geophysically shown to be mush-dominated, magma convection is often omitted from thermo-kinetic models, and its role in magma evolution and eruptibility remains underexplored. Here we present 2-D numerical thermal modelling that parameterizes magma convection through a Nusselt-number approach that describes the local enhancement of heat transfers, and examine its effects in the axial mush zone of fast-spreading mid-ocean ridges. We demonstrate that magma convection, while not affecting the overall thermal regime of the mushy reservoir, significantly reduces the lifespan of individual pockets of eruptible melt to
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 岩浆对流有利于糊状储库内短暂的富熔体透镜体

summary_bullets.research_question: 岩浆对流如何影响糊状储层中岩浆的演化和可喷发性？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用二维数值热模拟，通过努塞尔数参数化岩浆对流的局部热传输增强效应。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆对流显著缩短可喷发熔体团的寿命，但不改变储层整体热状态。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将岩浆对流的热效应纳入糊状储层的热动力学模拟中。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示了对流在控制喷发窗口和地壳增生过程中的关键作用，为火山监测提供约束。

works.title: Geometric phase sensing using seismic waves for comprehensive volcano monitoring at Kı̄lauea Hawaii
works.abstract: Abstract Monitoring volcanic activity requires sensitive tools capable of detecting subtle subsurface changes across eruptive cycles. While seismic methods are widely used to study volcanic unrest, few provide continuous tracking throughout eruptive stages with clearly interpretable signals. We present a geometric phase sensing approach, rooted in topological acoustics, that encodes the intrinsic geometry of the seismic wavefield. By integrating signals across a station array, the geometric phase change (Δ η ) captures wavepath-integrated medium perturbations, providing a stable measure of evolving subsurface conditions distinct from conventional waveform coherence metrics. Applied to Kı̄lauea volcano, Δ η closely tracks precursory magmatic pressurization and co-eruptive caldera collapse during the 2018 eruption, identifies two major intrusion events and post-eruptive recovery spanning five eruptions from 2020 to 2024. Δ η exhibits systematic and interpretable signatures of eruptive transitions, even under strongly perturbed ambient noise conditions. Numerical simulations corroborate these observations, indicating a sensitivity of ~15.0% per MPa to subsurface pressure changes. By leveraging geometric phase approach, we establish a monitoring framework applicable to volcanic and other dynamic Earth systems.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 利用地震波进行几何相位传感以实现夏威夷基拉韦厄火山的综合监测

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何用地震波连续追踪火山活动各阶段的微小地下变化并给出清晰解释信号？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用基于拓扑声学的几何相位传感，通过台阵波形合成几何相位变化Δη来编码波场本征几何。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Δη精确跟踪2018年喷发的加压与崩塌，识别2020–2024年两次侵入事件及喷发后恢复，模拟灵敏度约15.0%/MPa。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将拓扑声学几何相位引入火山监测，提供不依赖传统相干度的稳定路径积分介质扰动测量。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 建立了适用于火山及其他动态地球系统的几何相位监测框架，可在强噪声下提取可解释信号。

works.title: Derivation of coeval potassic mafic magmas and orogenic gold fluids from heterogeneously metasomatized mantle lithosphere
works.abstract: The sources and processes linking metasomatized mantle lithosphere to potassic magmatism and spatio-temporally associated K-rich orogenic gold deposits remain unclear. This issue is addressed through study of the Badi potassic complex and the adjacent Danba gold deposit in the post‑collisional Tethyan belt, SW China, which share similar phlogopite-biotite-sulfide assemblages. Potassic rocks from the complex exhibit high CaO and MgO contents, arc‑like trace element patterns, and mildly enriched Sr–Nd–Hf isotopes, pointing to a metasomatized mantle source rather than crustal contamination during magma ascent. Zircon U‑Pb dating reveals two magmatic episodes. The second episode (190–186 Ma), slightly postdating early gold ores but coeval with late ores, comprises high-fO2, volatile-rich potassic mafic magmas. Phlogopite, olivine, and clinopyroxene from these rocks exhibit δ41K = –0.57‰ to +0.03‰ and δ26Mg = –0.38‰ to +0.07‰. Rayleigh modeling demonstrates minimal K isotope fractionation (<0.2‰) via fractional crystallization. These data indicate a mantle source metasomatized by altered oceanic crust (AOC)‑dominated slab fluids with relatively minor carbonate‑rich sediment input. After excluding wall‑rock contamination, hydrothermal biotite in early gold ores yields δ41K = –0.50‰ to + 0.07‰ and δ26Mg = –0.51‰ to + 0.04‰, consistent with derivation from the AOC‑metasomatized mantle lithosphere. In contrast, biotite in late gold ores exhibits lower values (δ41K = –0.77‰ to –0.25‰; δ26Mg = –1.21‰ to –0.39‰), indicative of a mantle source metasomatized by carbonate‑rich sediment‑derived fluids. Therefore, the two gold mineralization periods share a common, albeit heterogeneous, mantle lithosphere source with the second‑episode potassic mafic magmas. However, temporal, spatial, and K–Mg isotope contrasts indicate that the gold ores and potassic rocks represent independent products of mantle devolatilization and melting, respectively, suggesting they are coeval companions rather than causally linked. A higher sediment proportion in the metasomatized mantle source appears to favor generating auriferous fluids for orogenic gold mineralization, as supported by modeling of Au content in high‑temperature fluids from mantle devolatilization
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 来自非均匀交代地幔岩石圈的同时代富钾镁铁质岩浆与造山型金矿流体的成因

summary_bullets.research_question: 交代地幔岩石圈如何产生钾质岩浆和时空共生的富钾造山型金矿流体？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锆石U-Pb定年、全岩地球化学和金云母-黑云母-硫化物组合的K-Mg同位素分析及瑞利模型模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 两期金矿化与第二期钾质基性岩浆同源但独立，早期流体源区以蚀变洋壳交代为主，晚期以碳酸盐沉积物流体交代为主。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次联合K-Mg同位素揭示地幔交代不均一性，并区分地幔脱挥发分成矿与部分熔融成岩的平行过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解造山型金矿与钾质岩浆的时空相伴提供了新的成因判别标志，并指示富碳酸盐沉积物交代源区对金成矿更有利。

works.title: The origin of the post-Marinoan 17O-depleted barite
works.abstract: Determining the origin of 17O-depleted barite in post-Marinoan cap dolostones is crucial for reconstructing ocean-atmosphere dynamics immediately following Marinoan deglaciation. We investigated coupled δ138Ba, Δ17O, and δ34S in barites from inner-shelf to shelf-lagoon settings in South China to identify barium sources and discriminate between two competing sulfate sources: riverine delivery via continental sulfide oxidation versus local H2S oxidation at a dynamic shelf redoxcline. Results reveal positive covariations among the three isotopes (δ138Ba: −0.08‰ to 0.17‰; Δ17O: −0.83‰ to −0.14‰; δ34S: 22.6‰ to 43.9‰) and systematic spatial gradients. These patterns support barite formation at an oxic-sulfidic redoxcline, where upwelling Ba2+- and H2S-rich deep waters encountered dissolved O2, generating sulfate that inherited the pronounced atmospheric 17O-depletion. Minor nearshore isotopic deviations suggest a subsidiary riverine contribution. This δ138Ba-Δ17O-δ34S isotope system effectively traces sulfate provenance and short-lived redox fluctuations on post-Marinoan shelves, thereby confirming widespread sulfate-depleted, Ba2+- and H2S-rich waters in early Ediacaran oceans.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 后Marinoan时期17O亏损重晶石的成因

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究后Marinoan期亏损17O重晶石的起源以重建冰期后海洋-大气动态。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用δ138Ba、Δ17O和δ34S三同位素耦合分析华南内陆架至泻湖环境的重晶石。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 三同位素正协变与空间梯度表明重晶石形成于氧化-硫化跃层，继承了大气17O亏损。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次联合Ba-O-S三同位素有效示踪后冰期陆架硫酸盐来源与瞬时氧化还原波动。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证实早期埃迪卡拉纪海洋广泛存在贫硫酸盐、富Ba2+和H2S的深海水体，约束古海洋演化。

works.title: Mid-Cretaceous porphyritic magmatism in the Beartooth Mountains of the northern Laramide foreland and its connection to Frontier Formation sediment dispersal in Bighorn basin, Montana-Wyoming (USA), and Cordilleran tectonism
works.abstract: Porphyritic intrusions in the southeast Beartooth Mountains and porphyritic cobbles from the Torchlight conglomerate of the Cenomanian Frontier Formation in Bighorn basin (Montana-Wyoming, USA) bear striking resemblance. We utilize geologic mapping, petrography, geochemistry, and geochronology to characterize rocks from both locations and test whether the Beartooth Mountains area was the provenance for Bighorn basin cobbles. Mapping on Line Creek Plateau in the Beartooth Mountains shows three units with porphyritic phenocrysts consisting dominantly of plagioclase, plagioclase + potassium feldspar, and plagioclase + quartz. Petrography shows embayed quartz, opacitic rims, and zoned plagioclase. Geochemistry characterizes the intrusions as trachydacite to trachyte and trace elements exhibit enrichment in light rare earth elements and slight depletion in heavy rare earth elements relative to primitive mantle. Zircon U-Pb dating shows substantial Archean inheritance and ca. 104−92 Ma dates; some samples display multiple mid-Cretaceous date populations. Bighorn basin porphyritic cobbles exhibit similar modal mineralogy, near-identical geochemistry, and Archean inheritance and mid-Cretaceous geochronology. We suggest the porphyritic cobbles were sourced from basement-hosted porphyritic intrusions now exposed in the Beartooth Mountains, given that geochemistry does not agree with coeval volcanic sources along the Frontier Formation depositional fairway (Idaho batholith) or sedimentary-hosted Beartooth Mountains porphyritic sills intruded into Cambrian shale. Stratigraphic evidence does not support kilometer-scale mid-Cretaceous Beartooth Mountains exhumation to expose basement-hosted porphyritic intrusions, and we therefore present a volcanic hypothesis to bring rocks to the surface. This mid-Cretaceous multimillion-year magmatism is unexplained by tectonic models for the north-central Laramide foreland, and thus we further explore the emplacement processes, spatiotemporal significance, and tectonic implications of these rocks.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 拉勒米前陆北部比尔图斯山中白垩世斑状岩浆作用及其与蒙大拿-怀俄明州（美国）比格霍恩盆地弗龙蒂尔组沉积物扩散及科迪勒拉造山运动的联系

summary_bullets.research_question: 验证Bearooth山脉是否为Bighorn盆地Frontier组斑状卵石的物源区。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用地质填图、岩相学、地球化学和锆石U-Pb年代学对比两地岩石。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 两地斑状岩石高度相似，卵石源自Bearooth基底侵入体，需火山机制而非剥蚀暴露。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出火山假说解释侵入岩地表暴露，重建前陆沉积物扩散路径。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为Laramide前陆未解的中白垩世岩浆活动与构造-沉积耦合提供新约束。

works.title: Genetic types, mineralization patterns and exploration implications of ore-hosting fractures in porphyry-type deposits
works.abstract: Fractures concentrating around shallow granitic plutons are the key deposition site for porphyry-type ores. Early studies have proposed various formation mechanisms for different types of fractures, but these mechanisms are yet to be well integrated with the porphyry ore-forming processes. Here, we present a synthetic study on the formation mechanism and influence factors of fracture network development in/around the ore-causative porphyries during their emplacement, cooling/solidification, and alteration. According to their order of appearance, the fractures in porphyry systems can be divided into three types: (1) intrusion-induced type, (2) magma cooling-related type (i.e., cooling fractures), and (3) magmatic fluid-related hydraulic type (i.e., hydraulic fractures). Intrusion-induced fractures are formed by the compression on wallrocks exerted by magma emplacement, and are mostly distributed in the wallrocks around the pluton apex. Cooling fractures are only developed within the porphyries during magma cooling and solidification. Hydraulic fractures are largely formed by magmatic-hydrothermal pressure-driven cracking. The occurrence, geometry, orientation, and ore grade of the porphyry-type orebodies are all controlled by these three fracture systems, which offers insights for ore prospecting: (1) Intrusion-induced fracture-controlled orebodies are bell-shaped overlying the porphyry bodies, with ore grade gradually dropping away from the porphyries. The veins are relatively straight, and generally comprise a steep- (major) and a shallow- (minor) dipping group. They are few-mm to few-cm wide, and several meters long; (2) Cooling fracture-controlled orebodies are also bell-shaped and commonly developed in the densely-fractured porphyry apex, with the ore grade decreasing away from the porphyry margin toward depth. The veins are generally few-tens of cm long and within a few-mm wide, and are homogeneously distributed with no preferred orientation; (3) Hydraulic fracture-controlled orebodies are generally developed as pipes in the axial part of the porphyries, and can vertically extend over 1000 m. The veins are mostly steep and few-mm to few-cm wide, and several to tens of meters long.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 斑岩型矿床中容矿断裂的成因类型、矿化样式及找矿启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何将斑岩型矿床中不同期次控矿裂隙的形成机制与斑岩成矿过程进行系统整合？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过综合分析斑岩侵入、冷却固结及蚀变过程中裂隙网络的形成机制和影响因素。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出侵入诱导型、冷却型和热液水力型三类裂隙，分别控制钟状矿体、钟状密集裂隙矿体和筒状矿体的产状与品位。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将斑岩矿床三类裂隙的成因机制、空间分布和成矿模式统一归纳并与找矿勘查直接关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为斑岩型矿床的矿体形态预测和找矿方向提供了基于裂隙类型的系统勘查标志。

works.title: Radiogenic heat production in granite and its role in geothermal resource distribution and targeting
works.abstract: Heat sources are fundamental to comprehending the origin of geothermal resources and are vital for the effective exploration and usage of these resources. Granitic heat production is a principal source of heat. However, its influence on the distribution of high-temperature geothermal systems and on target area selection is not fully understood. This study investigates the characteristics of granitic heat production and its influence on geothermal systems by utilizing rock data from the Global Whole-Rock Geochemical Database, integrating geothermal-geological analyses of the Western United States, Cathaysia Block, and Gangdise Belt regions, and incorporating assessments of typical geothermal wells globally. The subsequent findings are derived: (1) Intrusive rocks with higher acidity typically demonstrate increased heat production, while an excessively elevated SiO₂ content may diminish the concentration of radioactive elements. The global average heat generation of granite is estimated at roughly 3.177 ± 0.96 μW/m3, with thorium as the primary contributor, uranium as a moderate contributor, and potassium as the least contributor. (2) The global allocation of geothermal resources appropriate for power generation is strongly influenced by the presence of granite within Mesozoic–Cenozoic orogenic belts. Current geothermal power facilities are primarily situated near granitic formations with elevated heat generation. (3) Granites developed during stages of crustal thinning are more prone to demonstrate elevated heat generation. Anomalously elevated granitic heat production values are globally linked to supercontinent development and collision events. (4) Post-Mesozoic granites with an average radiogenic heat production exceeding the contemporary global granite average can function as efficient heat source rocks for geothermal systems. (5) Combinations of granite with various geological formations yield unique geothermal gradient curves. Reservoirs situated over hidden granite formations frequently constitute the most economically advantageous drilling targets. (6) Mantle heat movement influences the potential of high-temperature geothermal resources, whereas the distribution of high-heat-production granites directs the identification of advantageous geothermal zones and specific drilling targets. The synergistic integration of water supplies, heat sources, and fracture systems underpins the establishment of high-temperature hydrothermal geothermal systems. These discoveries offer significant references for international geothermal exploration and the identification of drilling prospects.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 花岗岩中的放射性生热及其在地热资源分布与靶区圈定中的作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 放射性产热如何影响高温地热系统分布与靶区选择？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用全球全岩地球化学数据库，结合区域地热地质分析与典型地热井评估。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高酸度侵入岩产热更高，钍是主要贡献者，后中生代高产热花岗岩是有效热源。
summary_bullets.innovation: 系统量化全球花岗岩产热背景值，揭示超级大陆碰撞与地壳减薄阶段产热异常。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地热勘探靶区优选提供热源岩识别标志与不同地质组合的梯度曲线参照。

works.title: Migmatised amphibolites of the Nellore Schist Belt, southeastern India: Deformation-driven melt segregation and implications for Proterozoic granitoid crust formation
works.abstract: Crustal melting is a fundamental process governing the long-term evolution of continental crust and the formation oftonalite-trondhjemite-granodiorite (TTG) suites and granitic rocks. In the eastern Vinjamuru Domain of the Nellore Schist Belt (SE India), centimetre-scale, garnet-bearing tonalite leucosomes occur within amphibolite (matrix: amphibole + plagioclase + biotite, rare ilmenite; garnet absent) that possesses a steeply-dipping (N-striking) tectonic foliation. These foliation-parallel, podiform leucosomes (<5 vol% of rock) contain garnet porphyroblasts with chemically homogeneous cores with inclusion trails oblique to the foliation, overgrown by chemically-zoned and inclusion-poor rims. Mineral textures indicate low-degree, incongruent hydrous melting of amphibole + biotite + plagioclase + quartz + fluid, producing garnet (Grt-Icore) and melt represented by plagioclase + quartz. Melt-reintegrated phase equilibria modelling reveals that partial melting began at ∼8.2 kbar and ∼675 °C, with peak metamorphic conditions of ∼8–9 kbar and ∼780–810 °C. Later inclusion-poor garnets (Grt-Irim and Grt-II) record late-stage growth during cooling (∼9.5–10.2 kbar and ∼670–680 °C) from residual melts, followed by subsolidus re-equilibration. The melts escaped from the system in two stages, evolving from early hydrous tonalitic–granodioritic (∼65 wt% SiO2, ∼11 wt% H2O) to more differentiated granitic (∼67 wt% SiO2, ∼7.5 wt% H2O) compositions, consistent with TTG-like compositions. Electron Backscatter Diffraction (EBSD) data reveal a strong crystallographic preferred orientation (CPO) in amphibole but weak CPOs in plagioclase and quartz, indicating strain partitioning and the fabric development under melt-present conditions rather than by solid-state dislocation creep. U-Pb zircon geochronology constrains an earlier pre-migmatisation tectonothermal event at ∼1673 ± 10 Ma. In contrast, titanite grains hosted within leucosomes determine the timing of partial melting and peak metamorphism at ∼1448 ± 31 Ma. These results highlight the role of amphibolite-facies partial melting and deformation in the generation of TTG-like melts and reworking of Paleoproterozoic continental crust.
works.label: ignore

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究变形如何驱动角闪岩中低度部分熔融及TTG质熔体的分凝与地壳再造。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学、矿物化学、相平衡模拟、EBSD组构分析和U-Pb锆石/榍石年代学。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现峰期约8–9 kbar、780–810 °C的含水部分熔融产生TTG质淡色体，并经历两阶段熔体逃逸。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过EBSD揭示熔体存在下的应变分配，并约束Nellore带混合岩化年龄约1.45 Ga。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解元古宙TTG熔体生成和角闪岩相变形-熔融耦合改造地壳提供关键实例。

works.title: What triggers seismicity thousands of kilometers away from a mainshock?
works.abstract: Remotely triggered earthquakes have emerged as a compelling yet puzzling phenomenon for advancing seismic-hazard forecasting. Here, we propose a unifying mechanism to explain their enigmatic behaviors, that is, the pore-pressure dynamics in fault gouge. Using a bounding surface model rooted in critical-state soil mechanics, we embed gouge deformation into a computational framework that tracks stress evolution under the perturbation of teleseismic waves. Our simulations reveal that dynamic loading drives pore-pressure increases several times larger than the applied stress amplitude, thus markedly weakening the fault and enabling failure under minimal perturbations. Also, we show that compressional components of the waves amplify pore pressure far more than shear components, explaining the superior triggering capacity of Rayleigh waves over Love waves. Given that pore pressure dissipates slowly in low-permeability gouge, weakening persists well beyond the transient forcing, promoting elevated seismicity after wave passage. Together, these results establish fault-gouge pore-pressure dynamics as a fundamental mechanism for remote earthquake triggering.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 是什么触发了距主震数千公里外的地震活动？

summary_bullets.research_question: 是什么机制触发了距主震数千公里外的远程地震？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用基于临界状态土力学的边界面模型，嵌入断层泥变形计算，追踪远震波扰动下的应力演化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 动态加载使断层泥孔隙压力增幅远超施加应力幅度，显著弱化断层，且压缩波分量比剪切波分量更有效触发地震。
summary_bullets.innovation: 统一用断层泥孔隙压力动态解释远程触发，揭示了波分量差异及震后持续弱化机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地震危险性预测提供新物理基础，阐明远程触发机理对评估区域地震风险具有关键价值。

works.title: Divergent responses of soil organic and inorganic carbon driven by land use during coastal reclamation
works.abstract: Coastal reclamation fundamentally transforms natural tidal flat ecosystems into managed terrestrial landscapes, initiating profound shifts in soil physicochemical properties and carbon dynamics; understanding how reclamation history and land use jointly regulate soil carbon fraction dynamics is essential for evaluating carbon sequestration potential in rapidly expanding reclaimed coastlines. Here, we show that reclamation induces progressive desalination, surface dealkalization, nutrient enrichment, and texture refinement; soil organic carbon increases markedly across reclamation stages, exhibiting strong surface accumulation under woodland and cropland, with mineral-associated organic carbon as the dominant fraction and organic carbon increasingly stable; soil inorganic carbon remains stable during early reclamation but declines markedly in surface layers of long-term reclaimed terrestrial soils while remaining high in aquaculture systems; and organic carbon fractions are primarily associated with nutrient availability and clay content whereas inorganic carbon dynamics are closely linked to soil pH and salinity. Coastal reclamation drives divergent soil organic and inorganic carbon dynamics, with organic carbon becoming increasingly stable while inorganic carbon depletes under long-term terrestrial land use.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 沿海围垦过程中土地利用驱动下土壤有机碳与无机碳的差异化响应

summary_bullets.research_question: 围垦历史和土地利用如何共同调控土壤有机碳与无机碳组分的动态变化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过分析不同围垦阶段和土地利用类型下的土壤理化性质与碳组分变化规律。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 长期围垦使有机碳增加且趋于稳定，无机碳在表层显著衰减，水产养殖系统无机碳保持较高。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示围垦驱动下有机碳和无机碳呈现截然相反的演变路径及主导因子。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估快速扩张的围垦海岸带碳固存潜力提供科学依据和管理启示。

works.title: Spatially distributed complex organic matter detected in an ancient river valley in Jezero crater, Mars
works.abstract: Using a Raman spectrometer onboard the Perseverance rover, we report the heterogeneous distribution of organic carbon within mudstones located in an ancient river valley on Mars. Measurements of two mudstones show hundreds of organic detections, making this the most robust organic detection in Jezero crater thus far, and, to our knowledge, the only detection of macromolecular carbon on a natural rock surface on Mars. Spectra of the interior of one rock reveal an association of organics with secondary carbonate and sulfate minerals, whereas another rock exhibits an association of organics with primary silicate-dominated matrix. Although in situ Raman analyses cannot determine whether these organics denote abiotic or biotic sources, the organic association with both depositional and diagenetic minerals and the detection of organics on the martian surface suggests that the organics observed ubiquitously at the Bright Angel outcrop may be resistant to radiation and oxidation or have been relatively recently exposed.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 火星耶泽罗陨石坑内古老河谷中探测到的空间分布复杂有机质

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究火星杰泽罗陨石坑古河谷泥岩中有机碳的分布和赋存形式。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用毅力号火星车的拉曼光谱仪对两处泥岩进行原位扫描分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现数百处有机碳信号，首次在自然岩石表面检出大分子碳，且有机质与原生或次生矿物共生。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在火星天然岩石表面探测到大分子有机碳，并揭示其与多种矿物的空间关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解火星有机物抗辐射机制、保存潜力及潜在生物标志物探测提供关键新证据。

works.title: Profile of John P. Smol
works.abstract: John P. Smol has spent more than four decades demonstrating how lake sediment cores can reveal environmental changes spanning decades to centuries. His pioneering work established paleolimnology as a credible scientific discipline, first, by documenting the impact of acid rain on North American lakes in the 1980s and, later, by tracking Arctic climate warming. Through continuous monitoring of High Arctic ponds and lakes, Smol has shown how ice cover duration influences aquatic ecosystems. His recent research reveals that even the deepest Arctic lakes are now crossing ecological thresholds due to accelerated warming, with implications for Indigenous fisheries and northern communities.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: John P. Smol 简介

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何利用湖泊沉积物岩芯重建酸雨和气候变暖等长期环境变化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过对高北极湖泊和池塘的持续监测及沉积物岩芯分析进行古湖沼学研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 北极最深湖泊正因加速变暖跨越生态阈值，威胁土著渔业和北方社区。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将古湖沼学确立为可信科学学科，率先用沉积物证据追踪酸雨与北极变暖。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解长期生态变化提供关键方法，对北极保护与社区适应决策有价值。

works.title: Nanometric mineral inclusions from a fluid-rich diamond: identification, structure, and implications for deep Earth
works.abstract: Abstract Fluid-rich (cloudy/fibrous) diamonds host millions of micrometric fluid inclusions that can reveal the nature of diamond-forming media. Mineral inclusions in fluid-rich diamonds are nano to micrometric making structural and chemical characterization of the different phases difficult. Consequently, limited work has been done determining the pressures, temperatures and depths at which such inclusions form. The relationship between such conditions and those of fluid-rich diamond formation remains unclear. We report the use of micro-electron diffractometry to identify and anisotropically refine the structure of a nanometric åkermanite inclusion in a fluid-rich diamond from South Africa. Additional nanometric Ba/Sr-carbonate inclusions were detected. FTIR analyses revealed a highly aggregated, gem-quality core surrounded by a rim rich in high-density fluid (HDF) inclusions from which åkermanite crystallized. Åkermanite formed during HDF depressurization due to kimberlite eruption or exhumation. In the latter scenario, åkermanite constrained diamond formation to a minimum temperature of 1000 °C at ∼140 km depth (~4.6 GPa). Analysis of the HDFs reveal low-Mg carbonatitic to silicic compositions. The high BaO and Cl and the δ 13 C values of the diamond (−5.72 to −7.84 ‰) are attributed to formation via penetration of saline fluid into an eclogite, related to subduction of carbonated altered oceanic crust.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 来自富流体钻石的纳米级矿物包裹体：鉴定、结构及其对深部地球的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 流体富集钻石中纳米矿物包裹体如何鉴定及其形成条件与钻石成因关系如何？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用微电子衍射术鉴定纳米包裹体结构，结合FTIR、化学分析和同位素测定。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现纳米钙硅镁石和钡/锶碳酸盐包裹体，核心高聚合度、边缘富流体，指示形成于～4.6 GPa、≥1000°C与俯冲相关流体。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用微电子衍射各向异性精修出流体富集钻石中纳米级包裹体的晶体结构。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为深部碳循环、俯冲洋壳物质参与钻石形成及高温高压条件提供了直接证据和约束。

works.title: Petrogenesis and tectonomagmatic evolution of diabase dikes in a Tethyan SSZ setting: constraints from U-Pb geochronology, geochemistry and Sr-Nd-Pb isotopes
works.abstract: Mafic dikes within ophiolitic complexes provide critical constraints on the magmatic and tectonic evolution of supra-subduction zone (SSZ) environments. This study investigates the petrological, geochronological (titanite UPb), mineral-geochemical, and isotopic (Sr-Nd-Pb) characteristics of isolated diabase dikes intruding ultramafic-mafic units in the Tekirova and Gödene Zones of the Tauride Ophiolite within the Eastern Mediterranean Ophiolite Belt. The dikes are dominated by primary plagioclase (labradorite) and clinopyroxene (diopside), with opaque minerals as accessory phases. Amphibole (magnesio-hornblende) and titanite occur both as primary magmatic and secondary phases. Titanite UPb ages from the Tekirova dikes (89.40 ± 13.40 and 80.47 ± 4.77 Ma) constrain Late Cretaceous magmatism. Geochemically, the dikes are enriched in large-ion lithophile elements (LILE) and depleted in high field strength elements (HFSE), displaying pronounced NbTa anomalies consistent with an SSZ arc affinity. Chondrite-normalized rare earth element (REE) patterns show light REE depletion, relatively flat heavy REE distributions, and variable Eu anomalies ((Eu/Eu*) N = 0.21–2.62). Sr-Nd-Pb isotopic compositions (87Sr/86Sr(i) = 0.705455–0.707456; εNd(t) = +4.5 to +8.3; 206Pb/204Pb = 17.89–18.91; 207Pb/204Pb = 15.63–16.31; 208Pb/204Pb = 37.96–39.88) indicate derivation from a depleted N-MORB-like mantle source variably metasomatized by subduction-derived fluids and sediments, with limited crustal contamination. There are compositional differences between the isolated dikes from the Tekirova and Gödene Zones. The Tekirova dikes exhibit closer affinities to a depleted mantle source with limited slab input, whereas the Gödene dikes record stronger metasomatic signatures, including LILE enrichment, pronounced NbTa depletion, and deviation from the mantle array, indicating enhanced involvement of slab-derived components and a more evolved mélange-related setting. Partial melting modeling indicates that the Tekirova dikes derived from a depleted spinel lherzolite source through approximately 1–10% partial melting under shallow upper mantle conditions, whereas the Gödene dikes reflect higher melting degrees (~20%) from the same source, as indicated by >20 LREE systematics. These differences are attributed to mantle source heterogeneity and variable subduction-related contributions. Geothermobarometric estimates suggest shallow crustal crystallization conditions, with Tekirova samples recording slightly higher temperatures and pressures than those from Gödene. In conclusion, the systematic increase in crystallization ages from west to east along the Tauride Ophiolite Belt indicates westward younging of SSZ magmatism. This pattern is interpreted to reflect trench retreat driven by slab roll-back during Neotethys subduction, whereby progressive slab retreat and segmentation of the subduction system induced along-strike (east-west) migration of arc magmatism, resulting in the observed westward shift of magmatic activity.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 特提斯SSZ背景下辉绿岩脉的岩石成因与构造岩浆演化：来自U-Pb年代学、地球化学和Sr-Nd-Pb同位素的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示特提斯SSZ环境中辉绿岩脉的成因及构造岩浆演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用U-Pb年代学、全岩地球化学及Sr-Nd-Pb同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩脉形成于亏损地幔源区受俯冲交代，年龄自西向东变新。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用榍石U-Pb定年约束该带岩脉时代并揭示弧岩浆向西迁移。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲带后撤导致岩浆活动沿走向迁移的模型提供了关键实证。

works.title: 40Ar/39Ar geochronology, SrNd isotopes and melting conditions of the Dahongshan alkaline basalts: Constraints on mantle modification beneath the northern Yangtze Craton
works.abstract: We present new groundmass 40Ar/39Ar ages, whole-rock major and trace element data, SrNd isotopic compositions, and P–T estimates for the Dahongshan alkaline basalts in the northern Yangtze Craton, China. Integrating these data with regional records demonstrates that Late Cretaceous mafic magmatism in the northern Yangtze Craton records a transition from subduction-modified lithospheric mantle to increasingly asthenosphere-influenced melting. Four representative samples yield concordant plateau-like weighted mean 40Ar/39Ar ages of 83.4–84.1 Ma (2σ), constraining the eruption of Dahongshan magmas to ca. 84 Ma. The basalts have intraplate, OIB-like trace element patterns, elevated LREE/HREE ratios, and a narrow range of SrNd isotopic compositions ((87Sr/86Sr)ᵢ = 0.704358–0.704800; εNd(t) = −0.80 to +1.35), indicating derivation from a moderately enriched, pyroxenite-influenced mantle source with a mafic component and only limited syn-ascent crustal assimilation. Low Ce/Pb and Nb/U ratios, together with pronounced positive Pb anomalies, are interpreted as source-inherited features rather than evidence for significant crustal assimilation. Primary melt reconstruction and complementary whole-rock major element modelling yield low- to moderate-pressure P–T estimates of 1.4–2.1 GPa and 1252–1356 °C, interpreted to record final melt–mantle equilibration or segregation during ascent rather than the depth of melt initiation. In contrast, REE systematics indicate a garnet-influenced melting signal, suggesting that melt generation was initiated deeper, probably near the garnet–spinel transition, before undergoing re-equilibration at shallower lithospheric levels. Regional comparisons support a temporal shift from Early Cretaceous lithosphere-derived arc-like magmatism to Late Cretaceous increasingly asthenosphere-influenced volcanism, followed by Cenozoic deeper-sourced alkaline basalts consistent with garnet-facies melting during post-extension thermal adjustment.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 大红山碱性玄武岩的40Ar/39Ar年代学、Sr-Nd同位素及熔融条件：对扬子克拉通北部地幔改造的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 长江克拉通北部晚白垩世碱性玄武岩如何记录地幔源区从俯冲改造的岩石圈地幔向软流圈影响熔融的转变？
summary_bullets.methodology: 基质的40Ar/39Ar定年、全岩主微量元素和Sr-Nd同位素分析，结合原生岩浆重建与P–T估算。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 大洪山玄武岩喷发于约84 Ma，源自含辉石岩的适度富集地幔，熔融始于石榴石-尖晶石过渡带但最终在较浅岩石圈深度平衡。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次综合40Ar/39Ar年龄、同位素与压力-温度计算，揭示扬子北缘白垩纪至新生代地幔熔融机制转变的时空轨迹。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解克拉通破坏过程中岩石圈地幔到软流圈熔融的演化提供了关键年代学与地球化学约束。

works.title: Si–O isotopes and trace elements of detrital zircons record magmatic sources and environments of the early continental crust
works.abstract: The formation and evolution of the Archaean continental crust record the history of the early Earth, although its magmatic sources and magmatic environments remain controversial. Detrital zircons may preserve geochemical signatures of both extinct and surviving crustal rocks, providing insights into crustal formation. We present in situ Si–O isotope and trace element data for detrital zircons from Caozhuang (3.84–3.53 Ga) and Kaapvaal (3.55–3.45 Ga and 3.28–3.11 Ga). The zircons have δ30Si values of −0.50‰ to −0.12‰, corresponding to modeled melt δ30Si values that are higher than those of the Igneous Array. The 3.84–3.53 Ga Caozhuang and 3.26–3.11 Ga Kaapvaal zircons display elevated δ18O values (6.03–7.25‰) compared to mantle zircons, whereas those from 3.55 to 3.45 Ga and one 3.28 Ga Kaapvaal zircons display “mantle-like” δ18O signatures (5.49–6.05‰). Consistently high δ30Si values in the zircons indicate a contribution from supracrustal silicified materials. This suggests that the “mantle-like” δ18O values may not necessarily reflect a mantle source. Instead, these δ18O signatures may result from metasomatism of the source by low-δ18O fluids derived from komatiites, or may reflect the limited sensitivity of O isotopes to trace supracrustal materials in ancient zircons. By combing the Si–O isotopes of zircons with their Tht/Nb (16–157) and Ut/Nb (50–417) ratios, Dy/Yb ratios (0.2–0.4), we suggest that the parent melt of zircons have geochemical affinities to arc magmas. Compared to Jack Hills zircons, the absence of pelitic material and meteoric water signatures suggests that these zircons were formed far from subaerial continents.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 碎屑锆石的Si-O同位素及微量元素记录早期陆壳的岩浆源区与环境

summary_bullets.research_question: 太古宙早期大陆地壳的岩浆源区和构造环境尚存争议，碎屑锆石能否揭示其成因？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对曹庄和卡普瓦尔克拉通的碎屑锆石进行原位Si–O同位素及微量元素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高δ30Si指示壳源硅化物质贡献；部分地幔δ18O值可能源于低δ18O流体交代或氧同位素不敏感；微量元素显示弧岩浆亲和性，且缺少陆源风化特征。
summary_bullets.innovation: 联合Si–O同位素与微量元素，揭示太古宙碎屑锆石“地幔δ18O”信号的多解性和隐性的壳源贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别早期地壳的再循环物质和岩浆环境提供了新的地球化学判别依据。

works.title: What drove hinterland uplift and exhumation in the southern central Andes (29−34°S)?
works.abstract: The elevated Andean hinterland at 29−34°S overlies a modern spatial transition from normal to flat-slab subduction. Development of this zone of high topography has been attributed to crustal thickening driven by internal (hinterland) shortening, underthrusting during shortening in external fold-thrust belts, or deeper processes associated with increased buoyancy forces and/or plate coupling above the flat slab. We integrate geologic and geo/thermochronological data to resolve the timing and magnitude of rock uplift, exhumation, and cooling necessary to evaluate possible mechanisms of hinterland construction. New and published apatite (U-Th)/He, apatite fission track, and zircon (U-Th)/He data and allied thermal history models from hinterland samples spanning >400 km along strike define protracted low-temperature residence of most samples since the late Mesozoic, followed by rapid Neogene cooling after ca. 20−15 Ma. Multi-sample models and other datasets demonstrate the influence of shortening-induced exhumation, with considerable spatial variations identified for different orogen-perpendicular (E-W) transects. At 29−31°S, ∼10° east-down tilting recorded hinterland development via continental underthrusting linked to external (eastern) fold-thrust belt shortening. In contrast, at 31−33°S, underthrusting was overprinted by internal (hinterland) shortening. At 33−34°S, reverse faults within the hinterland principally drove rock uplift and exhumation. These latitudinal variations in the kinematics and style of hinterland deformation coincide with along-strike changes in structural/stratigraphic inheritance, arc magmatism, and subduction geometry. Our findings underscore the range of processes governing orogenic construction above a modern type-example of flat-slab subduction, while demonstrating the enhanced capabilities of multi-sample thermal history modeling to test structural and geodynamic hypotheses.

works.title: Magnesium isotopes constrain connectivity and environmental resilience among ocean basins during the Early Triassic
works.abstract: The pronounced spatial heterogeneity in the severity of the end-Permian mass extinction is suggested as the result of changes in oceanic connectivity, which regulate the buffering capacity of marine environments against global perturbations. However, direct geochemical constraints remain limited. Magnesium isotopes (δ26Mg) of seawater serve as a sensitive tracer for oceanic restriction. Here, we present reconstructed seawater δ26Mg records from the Neo-Tethys and Panthalassa oceans and compare them with existing data from the Paleo-Tethys. Our results reveal a fundamental divergence: seawater δ26Mg remained stable (−0.4‰ to −0.3‰) in the Neo-Tethys and Panthalassa across the Permian–Triassic transition, whereas it increased by more than 0.5‰ in the Paleo-Tethys. This contrast suggests that the Neo-Tethys was effectively connected to the vast, well-buffered Panthalassa Ocean, while the Paleo-Tethys was a more restricted basin. Mass balance modeling suggests that the open Panthalassa/Neo-Tethys system maintained a significantly larger Mg reservoir and greater capacity to buffer external changes, thereby supporting relatively stable environmental conditions. However, the restricted Paleo-Tethys is more sensitive to chemical disturbances, potentially leading to more pronounced environmental stress. Our Mg isotope data provide geochemical constraints on ocean connectivity and suggest that differences in buffering capacity may have played an important role in shaping the spatial heterogeneity of biotic catastrophe during the end-Permian mass extinction. The degree of restriction and inter-basin exchange in deep-water areas warrant further investigation.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 镁同位素制约早三叠世海盆之间的连通性与环境韧性

summary_bullets.research_question: 早期三叠纪海洋连通性如何影响环境缓冲能力，导致二叠纪末大灭绝的空间异质性？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用海水镁同位素（δ26Mg）示踪，重建新特提斯洋与泛大洋记录并与古特提斯洋对比。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 新特提斯洋和泛大洋δ26Mg稳定，古特提斯洋显著升高，揭示前两者连通开放，后者受限。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以镁同位素直接约束早三叠世洋盆连通性与缓冲能力的差异。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为生物灭绝空间格局差异提供地球化学机制证据，强调海洋环流对生态危机的缓冲作用。

works.title: Links between the Archean hydrosphere and Earth’s interior
works.abstract: Earth’s long-term habitability depends on cycling of surface volatiles into and out of the mantle, yet when this cycling began and how the early hydrosphere became connected to Earth’s interior remain debated. Komatiites are ultramafic magmas produced mostly during the Archean by deep, high-degree mantle melting, providing a sensitive archive of early mantle composition. Here we present high-precision K isotope data for komatiites from ten localities. Our data show that Archean komatiites from three localities record heavy potassium isotope compositions, well above values typical of the mantle and most surface reservoirs. This signal is best explained by metasomatism of mantle domains by potassium-rich fluids released from subducted, water-altered oceanic lithosphere, later sampled by komatiite magmas. The data indicate that surface-derived water was transferred into mantle reservoirs by at least 3.6 billion years ago. Komatiites thus link the Archean hydrosphere to Earth’s interior and record early operation of subduction-style volatile recycling. Surface volatiles, including water, entered Earth’s mantle via subduction-style recycling at least 3.6 billion years ago, linking the early hydrosphere to the planet’s interior, according to potassium isotopes from ancient volcanic rocks called komatiites.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 太古宙水圈与地球内部之间的联系

summary_bullets.research_question: 地表挥发物（尤其是水）循环进入地幔的启动时间及早期水圈如何与地球内部建立联系？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对来自十个地区的科马提岩进行高精度钾同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 至少在36亿年前，俯冲带已循环地表水到地幔深处，形成交代地幔域。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首用科马提岩高精度钾同位素揭示太古宙俯冲式挥发分再循环。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为早期板块构造启动与地球长期宜居性演化提供关键同位素约束。

works.title: Origin of the Early Cretaceous Yongxin breccia-hosted gold deposit in Northeast China
works.abstract: Accurately constraining metal sources in hydrothermal breccia-hosted gold (Au) deposits that occur within pre-mineralization bodies is challenging yet essential for deciphering regional Au mineralization. This study uses geochemical and isotopic (S, Hg) analyses to constrain the genesis of the Yongxin Au deposit in Northeast (NE) China, which is hosted between Early Carboniferous syenogranite (hanging wall) and mylonitized granite (footwall). Geochemical data show that PyI in mylonitized granite is relatively As-rich, while PyII–IV in hydrothermal breccias are enriched in Ag, Te, and Bi, which points to a deep-sourced magmatic fluid. The δ34S values of pyrite from the Yongxin deposit range from 2.26 to 6.41 ‰, with most samples (79 %) falling within the magmatic S range. Some samples show positive deviations, indicating a mixed sulfur source dominated by deep magmatic input with contributions from the upper continental crust. Furthermore, the ores and pyrites from the Yongxin Au deposit exhibit δ202Hg values (–0.40 ± 0.31 ‰, 1SD, n = 10) higher than those of the mantle, and Δ199Hg values (0.00 ± 0.05 ‰, 1SD, n = 10) lower than those of contemporaneous epithermal deposits linked to metasomatized deep-sourced melts, indicating minor incorporation of continental upper crustal material into the ore-forming system. Integrating regional tectonic constraints, we propose that during the Early Cretaceous extension driven by Paleo-Pacific plate rollback, deep-soured Au-Ag-Te-Bi-rich melts ascended with some crustal assimilation. Exsolved fluids migrated along granite contacts, and metal precipitated during explosive decompression, forming the Yongxin breccia-hosted Au deposit.

works.translated_title: 中国东北早白垩世永新角砾岩型金矿床的成因

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何约束热液角砾岩型金矿中成矿物质来源及其对区域金成矿的启示？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用地球化学及硫、汞同位素分析方法制约成矿流体与物质来源。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成矿流体来自深部岩浆，伴有上地壳物质混染，金属在爆发减压过程中沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次联合S-Hg同位素揭示永新金矿深源岩浆与壳源混杂的双重贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解区域伸展背景下壳幔相互作用与角砾岩型金成矿机制提供新范例。

works.title:
Early Cretaceous Magmatism in the Great Xing'an Range,
                    <scp>NE</scp>
                    China: Constraints on the Subduction and Rollback of the Paleo‐Pacific Plate
works.abstract: ABSTRACT This study presents new zircon U–Pb–Hf isotopic and whole‐rock geochemical data for Early Cretaceous igneous rocks in the Great Xing'an Range, NE China, with the aim of constraining the subduction and rollback history of the Paleo‐Pacific Plate. The results indicate that late Early Cretaceous magmatism (ca. 130–112 Ma) involved both intermediate and felsic magmas. Trachyandesite was derived from a depleted mantle wedge metasomatized by subduction‐related fluids, whereas trachydacite, dacite and granite porphyries were generated mainly by melting of newly accreted lower crust. Combined with the final emplacement of the Raohe Accretionary Complex and coeval calc‐alkaline magmatism in eastern NE China, these data indicate that the late Early Cretaceous magmatism formed in a back‐arc extensional setting related to westward subduction of the Paleo‐Pacific Plate. From ca. 112 Ma to the Late Cretaceous, the eastward narrowing of magmatism records rollback of the Paleo‐Pacific Plate.

works.translated_title: 大兴安岭早白垩世岩浆作用，中国东北：对古太平洋板块俯冲与回撤的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 大兴安岭早白垩世岩浆活动如何制约古太平洋板块的俯冲与后撤历史？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锆石U–Pb–Hf同位素和全岩地球化学分析早白垩世火成岩。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 晚早白垩世岩浆作用源自地幔楔熔融和新生下地壳重熔，形成于弧后伸展背景。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示岩浆活动东向收窄记录了古太平洋板块约112 Ma后的后撤过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为东亚中生代俯冲-后撤动力学及地壳增生机制提供关键岩石学约束。

works.title: Algal δ13C reveals climate changes during the Cambrian Explosion
works.abstract: This study reconstructs atmospheric CO2 variations during the Cambrian Explosion using algal carbon isotope signatures. It reveals a tectonically driven three-stage greenhouse-hypergreenhouse-greenhouse climate that impacted early animal evolution. Carbon dioxide is a fundamental atmospheric component that regulates Earth’s climate. However, atmospheric CO_2 levels ( p CO_2) during the Cambrian Explosion remain poorly constrained. Here we report p CO_2 variations reconstructed via carbon isotope signatures of algal fossils from eight fossil deposits across the Ediacaran–Cambrian transition (~553 to ~508 Ma). Results reveal an increase in p CO_2 (±1 σ ) from ~3–9 to ~9–21 PAL during ~553–529 Ma, followed by a progressive decline to ~5–17 PAL and ~3–8 PAL at ~517 Ma and ~508 Ma, respectively. These temporal p CO_2 changes coincide with shifts in marine strontium isotope values, which, together, are most consistent with tectonically driven changes in the carbon and strontium cycles, as supported by the results of Earth system biogeochemical box modelling. Tectonic modulation over a three-stage greenhouse–hypergreenhouse–greenhouse climate could have profoundly influenced marine environments in ways that impacted the early diversification of animals.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 藻类δ13C揭示寒武纪大爆发期间的气候变化

summary_bullets.research_question: 寒武纪大爆发期间大气CO₂浓度如何变化及其与气候和早期动物演化的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用藻类化石碳同位素特征重建大气pCO₂，结合锶同位素和地球系统生物地球化学箱式模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 揭示构造驱动的三阶段温室-超温室-温室气候，pCO₂先升后降，影响早期动物多样化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过藻类δ¹³C高分辨率定量重建寒武纪大爆发期大气CO₂波动。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解碳循环、气候变迁与早期生命演化耦合机制提供关键定量约束。

works.title: Paleozoic magmatic rocks and metamorphism in the Dabie orogen, central China
works.abstract: The Qinling-Tongbai-Hong’an-Dabie orogenic belt records complex tectonic evolution history from the Paleozoic to the Mesozoic. However, the Paleozoic magmatism and metamorphism of the Dabie orogen remain poorly constrained. This study presents an integrated geochemical, geochronological, and isotopic investigation of mylonitized monzonite and granite in the Beihuaiyang zone. Zircon U-Pb dating and Hf isotopic analysis reveal that the granite from the Tiechong pluton formed at ca. 451 Ma with positive εHf(t) values (10.3−14.4), whereas the monzonite from the Gongdian outcrop crystallized at 481 ± 4 Ma with negative εHf(t) values (−7.2 to −0.7). Geochemical signature and zircon Hf isotopic composition of monzonite provided clear evidence for its genesis in a continental arc setting with significant crustal materials. Metamorphic zircon and titanite U-Pb ages documented multiple Carboniferous−Permian tectonic-thermal metamorphism at ca. 340 Ma, 313 Ma, and 283 Ma. The high-temperature metamorphism in the eastern Dabie orogen shows a clear contrast to the high-pressure/low-temperature metamorphism in the Hong’an orogen, indicating tectonic variations within the oceanic subduction system. These new data provide critical petrological and geochemical evidence for the eastward extension of the Paleozoic Qinling orogen and the Shangdan Ocean into the Dabie orogen, offering new constraints on the lateral tectonic correlation and evolution history of the Qinling−Tongbai-Hong’an-Dabie orogenic belt.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华中大别造山带古生代岩浆岩与变质作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 大别造山带古生代岩浆作用与变质作用缺乏约束，本文探究其成因及时空演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锆石U-Pb定年、Hf同位素分析及地球化学方法研究糜棱岩化二长岩和花岗岩。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铁冲岩体形成于451 Ma具亏损Hf同位素，公甸二长岩481 Ma富集特征，记录三期石炭-二叠纪变质。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提供古生代商丹洋向东延伸至大别造山带的直接岩石学证据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为秦岭-桐柏-红安-大别造山带横向对比和古生代演化提供关键约束。

works.title: Petrogenetic link between Sevattur carbonatites and associated silicate rocks: Single magma or many?
works.abstract: The Neoproterozoic Sevattur alkaline complex (Southern Granulite Terrain, India) comprises calcite- and dolomite‑carbonatites spatially associated with an alkaline silicate suite including monzodiorite, monzonite, syenite, granite, albitite, and pyroxene hornblendite enclaves, exclusively hosted within monzonite and monzodiorite. The carbonatites are characterized by enrichment in high field strength elements (HFSE), Ba, Sr, and rare earth elements (REE)-bearing phases. Their radiogenic isotopic signatures (εSr(i) = +21.2 to +26.4; εNd(i) = −8.0 to −5.2) are consistent with derivation from an enriched, metasomatized peridotite mantle source. Their mineralogical, geochemical, and isotopic signatures lack evidence of crustal contamination or any genetic link to the associated silicate suite. In contrast, the unaltered silicate rocks display relatively less radiogenic Sr (εSr(i) = +4.6 to +11.6) and Nd (εNd(i) = −9.7 to −6.8) isotopic signatures. Combined with their whole-rock geochemical characteristics and coherent mineral evolutionary trends, these features indicate derivation from an alkali-rich basaltic parent magma that evolved by fractional crystallization. The cumulate texture, similar pyroxene and amphibole compositions, and coherent geochemical and isotopic trends indicate that the pyroxene hornblendite represents cognate cumulates derived from the silicate magma. Evidence of limited crustal assimilation is confined to the most evolved members of the suite, namely the granite and the albitite. The silicate suite records a transition from magmatic to hydrothermal stages: (i) amphiboles crystallized at magmatic conditions (2–6 kbar; 839–986 °C), whereas mica, feldspar, and actinolite formed at shallower levels under hydrothermal conditions (1–2 kbar; 400–715 °C) and (ii) later low-temperature overprint (~188 °C) in granite, marked by chlorite and clinozoisite which also has resulted in extremely low calculated εSr(i) values (−37.7 to −7.7) in some silicate rocks. Fenitization is largely absent in the silicate suite and is restricted to the localized phlogopite-rich clinopyroxenite, formed through interaction with carbonatite-derived fluids. Comparative mineral chemistry reveals systematic differences between carbonatites and silicate rocks: diopside–hedenbergite, phlogopite–annite, and Ca-rich amphiboles predominate in the silicate suite, whereas carbonatites host aegirine, phlogopite, and alkali-rich amphiboles. These contrasting mineralogical trends, combined with trace-element systematics (Ba/Mn, Nb/Th, Ba/Y) and isotopic signatures, exclude both silicate–carbonate liquid immiscibility and involvement of a common parental magma, and instead indicate derivation from independent magma sources.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: Sevattur碳酸岩与伴生硅酸岩的岩石成因关联：单一岩浆还是多源岩浆？

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究印度Sevattur碳酸岩与伴生硅酸岩是否同源（单一岩浆）还是来自独立岩浆源区。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合矿物化学、全岩地球化学、Sr-Nd同位素及热力学温压计算进行综合对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 碳酸岩与硅酸岩在矿物组合、微量元素体系及同位素特征上存在系统差异，排除不混溶或共母岩浆，指示独立源区。
summary_bullets.innovation: 通过多重化学示踪体系与热力学约束，首次厘清该杂岩体中碳酸岩与硅酸岩的岩石成因非直接关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为古老碱性杂岩体中碳酸岩-硅酸岩共生组合的成因机制提供了关键判别依据，对幔源岩浆演化研究具有参考价值。

works.title: Lithologic controls on silicate weathering in a tropical arc-continent collision zone: multi-isotopic evidence
works.abstract: Arc-continent collisions at low latitudes have been proposed to drive late Cenozoic cooling. These collisions built high-relief Southeast Asian Islands (SEAIs), enhancing erosion and weathering of mafic/ultramafic rocks. This hypothesis is challenged by the contrast between the rising seawater strontium (Sr) isotope ratio (87Sr/86Sr) and the low 87Sr/86Sr from mafic/ultramafic weathering. However, arc-continent collisions can also exhume lithologies from evolved continental crust that introduce radiogenic 87Sr/86Sr signals, but the effects of such variable lithologies on regional weathering signals and global seawater 87Sr/86Sr remain untested. Here we characterize geochemical signals of silicate weathering in New Guinea (NG), the largest SEAI, by analyzing Sr, neodymium (Nd), and uranium (U) isotopes in core sediments from the International Ocean Discovery Program (IODP) site U1485 that span the last 550 kyr. The measured Sr-Nd isotopes indicate that U1485 sediments are sourced from both juvenile mafic/ultramafic lithologies and metasedimentary rocks derived from older continental crust. Before the emergence of the Coastal Range at ∼ 350 ka, NG weathering mostly occurred in the Central Range and released radiogenic Sr (87Sr/86Sr > 0.7090) to the oceans. Since then, 87Sr/86Sr ratios shifted from radiogenic to unradiogenic (<0.7050) values, reflecting lithologic controls on weathering signals. Sedimentary residence times derived from (234U/238U) comminution ages reveal long durations and deep weathering zones in the Central Range and vice versa in the Coastal Range, suggesting that less-reactive metasedimentary rocks can still produce high weathering fluxes sustained by prolonged tropical weathering. Element-based proxies, including a modified chemical index of alteration and a Na-enrichment factor, showed marked shifts following the uplift of the Coastal Range and enhanced mafic/ultramafic weathering. Glacial–interglacial cycles introduced additional variations on Sr-Nd-U isotopes, reflecting greater contributions from the Central and Coastal Ranges to weathering fluxes during interglacial and glacial periods, respectively, likely caused by precipitation pattern changes. To test global influences, we constructed a geochemical box model and show that a radiogenic Sr flux from SEAI weathering can persistently explain rising seawater 87Sr/86Sr over the late Cenozoic across various scenarios where different Sr fluxes and isotopic signals change concurrently. Model results also show that the seawater Sr isotopic curve can be explained by either an increase or a decrease in the global weathering flux since 15 Ma, but a decreased flux is favored across a broader parameter space. Overall, our work demonstrates that lithologies, in tandem with tectonic uplift and climatic variations, exert primary controls on tropical weathering signals, highlighting SEAIs as a key player in Earth’s climate and global geochemical cycles
works.label: consider

summary_bullets.research_question: 热带弧陆碰撞带不同岩性如何调控硅酸盐风化信号，并影响全球海水Sr同位素演化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过分析IODP U1485站位过去55万年沉积物的Sr-Nd-U多同位素及元素地球化学，结合箱式模型模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 风化信号主要由岩性控制，海岸山脉隆升后基性/超基性岩风化使87Sr/86Sr急剧下降，中央山脉变质沉积岩提供放射成因Sr。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用Sr-Nd-U多同位素和U系碎屑年龄约束热带弧陆碰撞带风化通量与岩性耦合机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示了东南亚岛弧风化对晚新生代海水Sr同位素上升和全球变冷的关键作用，为构造-风化-气候联系提供新证据。

works.title: Shelf-invading low-oxygen waters control Cenozoic organic carbon burial rates
works.abstract: The thermostatic mechanisms of Earth’s persistent habitability remain unresolved. High-resolution Cenozoic C isotope records, P accumulation, and coarse-fraction I/Ca allow recalculation and assessment of controls on the global proportion of total carbon buried as organic carbon ( f org ), a regulator of atmospheric CO 2 and O 2 . f org was suppressed during the Eocene hothouse, coincident with an oxygenated water column and low water-column phosphate. With decreased sea level, the area for efficient organic carbon and phosphate sedimentary burial diminished, leading increasingly to greater water-column phosphate, higher primary productivity, and emergent water column deoxygenation. The sea-level influence on the areal extent of high sedimentation in shelf regions acts as a control on phosphate availability for new production, respiratory demand, and ocean oxygenation, as proposed by hypsographic models [C. J. Bjerrum, J. Bendtsen, J. J. F. Legarth, Geochem. Geophys. Geosys. 7 , 1–24 (2006)]. During intermediate sea-level highs of the Neogene, pulses of enhanced organic carbon burial prevailed for multimillion years, in response to the redox recycling of phosphate when oxygen minimum zones with O 2 org burial due to redox recycling of phosphate, whereby oxygen minimum zones (OMZ) with O 2 org rich continental shelf sediments. Such a sweet spot has narrowed over Earth history due to deepening OMZs, stabilizing both atmospheric O 2 and CO 2 . Continental marine inundation controls on phosphate availability, and the sedimentary carbon flux, provide a positive-feedback and rectifier to perturbations during inception of the icehouse world.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 侵入陆架的低氧水体控制新生代有机碳埋藏速率

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究新生代有机碳埋藏比例（f_org）的调控机制及其对大气CO2和O2的影响。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用高分辨率碳同位素记录、磷积累及粗组分I/Ca重建古海洋氧化还原条件与碳埋藏。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 海平面控制的陆架淹没面积通过调节磷可利用性，决定海洋缺氧程度和有机碳埋藏效率。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了海平面、磷循环与最小含氧带之间的正反馈机制，解释冰室期碳埋藏稳定。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解地球长期宜居性中海洋缺氧与碳循环的耦合提供了关键机制和量化证据。

works.title: Metallogenic types, genesis, and distribution of endogenetic rare-metal deposits in China: A perspective of continental tectonic evolution
works.abstract: Li, Be, Nb, and Ta represent important strategic rare metal resources, which primarily consist of the LCT (Li-Cs-Ta) and NYF (Nb-Y-F) pegmatite-type deposits, granite-type deposits, volcanic-type deposits, and carbonatite and alkaline rock-type deposits. These deposits are categorized into three metallogenic systems, including the strongly peraluminous, weakly peraluminous to metaluminous, and peralkaline metallogenic systems that are distributed across 14 rare-metal metallogenic belts in China. Spatially, the metallogenic belts or segments hosting these metallogenic systems are characterized by well-developed thick flysch sedimentary or metasedimentary sequences, widespread volcanic or metavolcanic-sedimentary rocks, and numerous alkaline rocks ± carbonatite intrusive complexes, respectively. The strongly peraluminous system and the weakly peraluminous to metaluminous system (mainly granite- and pegmatite-type deposits) primarily formed during the Late Caledonian to Early Hercynian, Indosinian, and Yanshanian periods, and are genetically associated with convergent orogeny. In contrast, the peralkaline system and the peraluminous to metaluminous system (mainly volcanic-type deposits) formed primarily during the Late Caledonian to Hercynian periods in continental margin or intracontinental extensional settings. From the strongly peraluminous system through the weakly peraluminous to metaluminous system to the peralkaline metallogenic system, the source regions tend to have less mature crustal components but more juvenile crustal and mantle-derived components. In this study, rare-metal deposits that occur within the same metallogenic belts and have similar ore-forming time and tectonic settings are considered a metallogenic series. Accordingly, a total of 22 metallogenic series have been identified across the 14 rare metal metallogenic belts in China. From the perspective of tectonic evolution of China, a metallogenic lineage of these series is constructed. Using the principle of “metallogeny occurring in all favorable spatio-temporal sites, where deposits are absent for prospecting” for the metallogenic series theory, we predict that Northeast China and the Bangong Co-Nujiang tectonic belts have great potential for rare-metal exploration, in addition to the 14 rare-metal metallogenic belts delineated in the study. Furthermore, future exploration for Nb, Be, and rare earth elements should be strengthened in the Northern Margin of the Tarim-North China Block.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国内生稀有金属矿床的成矿类型、成因与分布：大陆构造演化视角

summary_bullets.research_question: 中国内生稀有金属矿床的成因类型、成矿系统与构造演化关系是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用矿床类型划分、成矿系统归类、时空分布分析和成矿系列构建方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出三大过铝质-过碱性成矿系统、14条成矿带和22个成矿系列，受汇聚造山或伸展背景控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 从中国大陆构造演化视角构建了稀有金属成矿谱系，并提出成矿系列缺位预测新靶区。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为稀有金属勘查提供成矿理论框架，指明东北、班公湖-怒江带等新区找矿潜力。

works.title: Multistage pyrites and association with uranium mineralization in the Yingqian granite-related uranium deposit, South China
works.abstract: Multi-stage pyrites commonly occur in hydrothermal uranium deposits, yet the genesis and association with uranium mineralization remain unclear. This study addresses these issues through integrated petrographic and geochemical analyses, combined with geochemical modeling, on the Yingqian granite-related uranium deposit in South China. Petrographic investigations reveal three major stages of pyrites in the Yingqian deposit, i.e., the pre-ore massive Py1 and syn-ore veinlet Py2 and Py3. All three generations of pyrites exhibit similar and narrow ranges of δ34S (−8.63 to − 11.71‰), δ56Fe (−1.37 to 0.84‰) and δ57Fe (−1.97 to 1.27‰) values, indicating a common source for sulfur and iron. Rayleigh fractionation modeling suggests that the limited sulfur isotopic variation in pyrites from the Yingqian deposit, as well as other hydrothermal uranium deposit worldwide, is attributed to the precipitation from H2S-bearing fluids, rather than via reduction of sulfate derived from oxidized U-bearing fluids. Based on petrographic characteristics, isotopic compositions and geochemical modeling, the pre-ore massive Py1 is interpreted to be formed by the flocculation of colloidal iron sulfides or the mixing of H2S-bearing fluids and iron-bearing fluids. In contrast, the deposition of Py2, Py3 and uraninite are produced by the interactions involving uranium-bearing fluids, H2S-bearing fluids and hosting granites. Some Py1 grains are extensively metasomatized by ore fluids with the enrichment of U, Co, As, Se, and Cu, similar to those enriched in the syn-ore Py2 and Py3, indicating the high concentration of these metals in the ore-forming fluids. The precipitation of Py1 immobilized the flowing reducing H2S and therefor enhance the reducing capacity for the ore-forming environment. In addition, pyrite is kinetically more efficient than the Fe-bearing silicates in the magmatic rocks. Consequently, the pre-ore massive Py1 constitutes ideal chemical traps, facilitating multiple episodes of metasomatism and superimposed mineralization by subsequent uranium-bearing fluids. Our findings highlight the critical role of H2S-bearing fluids in the formation of multistage pyrites and associated uranium enrichment, a process that may have broad application to other sulfide-bearing uranium polymetallic deposits worldwide.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华南鹰钱花岗岩型铀矿床中多期黄铁矿及其与铀成矿的关系

summary_bullets.research_question: 热液铀矿床中多期黄铁矿的成因及其与铀成矿的关联尚不明确。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过岩相学、地球化学分析和瑞利分馏模拟进行综合研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成矿前黄铁矿由含H₂S流体沉淀，构成化学陷阱，促进后期铀叠加富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了含H₂S流体而非硫酸盐还原在黄铁矿及铀成矿中的关键作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为全球含硫化物铀多金属矿床中多期黄铁矿与铀富集机制提供新模型。

works.title: Author Correction: Pentavalent and tetravalent uranium formation via glycerol-stimulated bacteria in mine water

summary_bullets.methodology: 无新方法，仅修正原文错误。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 更正原论文中的数据或描述错误，未报告新发现。
