works.title: The contingent advantage of photosymbiosis in coral evolution
works.abstract: The ecological success of modern reef-building corals is rooted in photosymbiosis, yet its macroevolutionary benefit remains unclear. Analyzing the Phanerozoic record of inferred zooxanthellate (Z) and azooxanthellate (AZ) corals over geologic time scales using Bayesian methods, we identify a fundamental shift in diversification dynamics and their drivers across the Paleozoic–Mesozoic transition. Although Z corals dominate modern tropical reef ecosystems, their Paleozoic counterparts were outpaced by AZ forms and showed failed recoveries after the Late Devonian mass extinction. We found Z coral diversification was primarily driven by origination, whereas AZ diversification was controlled by extinction. Multivariate birth–death models reveal that Paleozoic coral diversification was governed by abiotic stressors like warming and anoxia, to which Z and AZ corals showed similar vulnerability. The rise of scleractinian corals in the Triassic marked a distinct macroevolutionary regime shift after which photosymbiosis spurred coral diversification. Positive correlations between temperature and Z coral extinction dominated the Paleozoic, while negative correlations prevailed in the Meso-Cenozoic. The long-term reversal of this relationship could be the reduced supersaturation of the oceans with respect to CaCO 3 due to the emergence of calcareous plankton in the Triassic. Our deep-time perspective demonstrates that the advantage of photosymbiosis is not intrinsic but contingent on the broader ecological and environmental context.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 珊瑚演化中光合共生的偶然优势

summary_bullets.research_question: 珊瑚虫与光合共生藻的共生关系在地质时间尺度上是否始终具有宏观演化优势？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用贝叶斯方法分析显生宙推测虫黄藻共生与非共生珊瑚化石记录的多变量生灭模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 光合共生的演化优势并非固有，在古生代由非共生珊瑚主导，中生代后才转为促进多样化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示珊瑚光合共生优势的宏观演化依赖于环境背景，并在古生代-中生代之交发生体制转变。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解共生关系在气候变化下对造礁生物未来命运的影响提供了深时演化依据。

works.title: Genesis of the Lizi gold deposit in the western Qinling Orogen, China: Insights from in situ U-Pb dating of rutile, trace elements of pyrite, and S-Pb isotopes
works.abstract: The Lizi gold deposit, a representative gold deposit in the West Qinling Orogen of China, has ongoing debates regarding its ore-forming material sources, enrichment and precipitation mechanisms, and metallogenic age. This study combines geological characteristics with in situ U-Pb rutile dating, trace-element of pyrite, and S-Pb isotope analyses to determine the metallogenic age and constrain the sources and processes of ore formation. Based on crosscutting relationships and mineral paragenesis, the mineralization process of the Lizi gold deposit can be divided into four stages: (1) quartz-sericite-pyrite (Stage I), (2) pyrite-gold (Stage Ⅱ), (3) chalcopyrite-gold (Stage Ⅲ), and (4) quartz-calcite (Stage IV). Gold primarily occurs in Stage Ⅱ and Ⅲ coexisting with pyrite and chalcopyrite, respectively. Rutile from Stage Ⅱ yielded a metallogenic age of 211.1 ± 6.3 Ma, indicating gold mineralization is associated to the Late Triassic hydrothermal activity. Three generations of pyrite were identified from Au-bearing quartz-sulfide veins, i.e., Py1 from Stage I, Py2 from Stage Ⅱ, and Py3 from Stage Ⅲ. Py2 is further divided into Py2a and Py2b according to growth zoning. From Py1 to Py3, the contents of elements such as Au, Ag, Cu, Pb, and Bi increase, and Au concentrations in pyrite remain below 10 ppm, indicating gold predominantly precipitated as visible gold (e.g., native gold, electrum, sylvanite), with only minor solid-solution incorporation in pyrite. The strong positive correlations between Au and Cu, Pb, Te, and Bi in pyrite, coupled with native gold coexisting with minerals containing these elements, collectively suggest a magmatic contribution to gold mineralization. The δ34S values of Py1 (1.78–2.57 ‰) reveal mixing sulfur characteristics of the Liziyuan Group strata (–10.47 to 1.80 ‰) and syenitic rocks (2.90–9.09 ‰), whereas the δ34S values of mineralization-related Py2 and Py3 (5.59–12.18 ‰) indicate a dominant syenitic magmatic source. In situ Pb isotopic compositions of galena intergrowing with gold (206Pb/204Pb = 17.971–18.312, 207Pb/204Pb = 15.553–15.654, and 208Pb/204Pb = 38.01–38.42) further support a mixed source involving Liziyuan Group strata and syenitic magmatic rocks for metallogenic materials. Collectively, this study provides compelling evidence that the formation of the Lizi gold deposit was primarily associated with late Triassic magmatic-hydrothermal activity.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西秦岭造山带李子金矿床的成因：来自金红石原位U-Pb定年、黄铁矿微量元素及S-Pb同位素的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 厘清李梓金矿的成矿物质来源、富集沉淀机制及成矿时代。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合地质特征，采用金红石原位U-Pb定年、黄铁矿微量元素及S-Pb同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成矿年龄为211.1±6.3 Ma，金以可见金为主，成矿物质主要来自正长质岩浆与李子园群地层混合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过金红石U-Pb定年确定李梓金矿的晚三叠世岩浆热液成矿年龄。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为西秦岭造山带金矿成矿时代与物源提供关键约束，指导区域找矿勘探。

works.title: Interplay between supercontinents and accretionary orogens recorded in 200 million years of metallogeny
works.abstract: The assembly of supercontinents and the evolution of accretionary orogens are one of the most fundamental drivers of Earth's lithospheric architecture and mineral endowment. Here we reconstruct the 200 million years metallogenic history of the mainland Australian part of the Delamerian convergent margin, a pivotal segment of the East Gondwana paleo-Pacific margin that archives the transition from Rodinian fragmentation to terminal Gondwana assembly. Our analysis reveals that the region's mineral potential is a non-random result of sequential tectonic switching and specific magmatic priming. Magmatic fertility was governed by a narrow window of high hydration, deep-seated fractionation, and elevated oxidation states driven by the recycling of continental and oceanic sediments during multiple tectonic switching events. Integrated geological, geochemical, geochronological, and sulphur isotope evidence identifies four temporally distinct mineralisation events – from Neoproterozoic orthomagmatic Ni-Cu to Siluro-Devonian intrusion-related Au formations. Unlike the specialised “copper factories” of the Andes or the reduced magmatic systems of Japan, the Delamerian convergent margin functions as a diverse “general store” of strategic resources and critical minerals preserved beneath widespread post-mineralisation sedimentary cover. This 200 million years record demonstrates how the interactions between supercontinent and accretionary orogens are translated into four distinctive metallogenic belts within one coherent mineral province.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 超大陆与增生造山带的相互作用：2亿年成矿作用的记录

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示超大陆聚合与增生造山带相互作用如何记录在2亿年成矿历史中。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合地质、地球化学、地质年代学和硫同位素证据进行时空分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出四次成矿事件，该边缘作为多样战略资源“杂货店”而非单一类型矿床。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出构造开关与岩浆引发控制窄窗口高水化、深分异、氧化态成矿机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为超大陆-增生造山带耦合控矿提供新模型，指导覆盖区关键矿产勘探。

works.title: The Lar alkaline igneous complex: Age, mineralogy, chemistry, and isotopes of a potassic post-collisional event in the Eastern Iran Magmatic Belt (Sistan Suture Zone, East Iran)
works.abstract: This study investigates the Cenozoic magma genesis in the East Iran Magmatic Belt through a detailed petrographic, geochemical, and radiometric analysis of igneous rocks from the Lar alkaline complex in the Sistan Suture Zone (East Iran). The Lar complex consists of intrusive and hypabyssal rocks showing shoshonitic to ultrapotassic affinities with variable degrees of silica saturation. The most alkaline silica-undersaturated lithotypes include lamprophyres, nepheline-syenites, and felsic dykes of phonolitic composition, whereas silica-saturated and over-saturated rocks are represented by syenites, trachytic dykes and monzonites. U-Pb and K-Ar geochronological constraints indicate that intrusive and hypabyssal igneous rocks of the Lar complex were generated in a time span of ca. 3 Ma in the Early Oligocene (from 32.5 ± 0.4 to 29.3 ± 0.6 Ma). Lamprophyres and nepheline-syenites show pseudoleucite textures due to subsolidus unmixing forming nepheline and K-feldspar intergrowths. Incompatible trace element patterns show geochemical features compatible with a subduction-related setting (i.e., large ion lithophile elements -LILE- enrichments and high field strength elements -HFSE- depletions), with the alkaline potassic and silica-undersaturated rocks characterized by higher light/heavy rare earth elements (LREE/HREE) fractionation (LaN/YbN from 12 to 22) with respect to the silica-saturated and -oversaturated rocks (LaN/YbN from 10 to 12). The initial Sr-Nd-Pb isotopic composition of the Lar igneous rocks is rather homogeneous (87Sr/86Sri = 0.704295–0.706222, 143Nd/144Ndi = 0.512627–0.512748, 206Pb/204Pbi = 18.82–18.90, 207Pb/204 Pbi = 15.62–15.65, 208Pb/204Pbi = 39.00–39.16) suggesting a common mantle source and limited crustal contamination/assimilation, which only affects the most differentiated products. The geochemical and isotopic features of the Lar magmas suggest that mantle metasomatism occurred as partial melts derived mainly from carbonate-rich sediments. The formation of the Lar igneous complex is attributed to post-collisional magmatism. This magmatism was triggered by asthenospheric upwelling that caused melting within the overlying mantle. Crucially, the mantle composition had been modified (metasomatized) by materials derived from the subducted Sistan Neo-Tethyan oceanic slab.

works.translated_title: Lar碱性火成杂岩体：伊朗东部岩浆带（锡斯坦缝合带，东伊朗）钾质碰撞后事件的年代、矿物学、化学和同位素特征

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究东伊朗岩浆带Lar碱性杂岩体的成因、地幔源区及后碰撞岩浆作用机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用岩相学、全岩地球化学、U-Pb和K-Ar年代学及Sr-Nd-Pb同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆活动发生于早渐新世约32.5–29.3 Ma，源区为受碳酸盐沉积物熔体交代的俯冲改造地幔。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示锡斯坦缝合带后碰撞超钾质岩浆作用与俯冲洋壳碳酸盐沉积物交代地幔的联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解大陆碰撞带后碰撞阶段钾质-超钾质岩浆成因及地幔交代过程提供了新案例。

works.title: Characterization of the Shiretokoiozan volcano hydrothermal system in Hokkaido, North Japan: Possible source and mechanism of molten sulfur eruptions
works.abstract: Shiretokoiozan volcano in North Japan is known for repeated molten sulfur eruptions. Although the generation of sulfur in the aquifer has been interpreted as the most plausible source of the molten sulfur, the detailed mechanism of its generation is unclear. This study examines the sulfur generation mechanism by estimating the aquifer structure, mixture of groundwater with magmatic water, and water flow system via geochemical water and gas sample analyses for isotope, water, and gas compositions and the reservoir temperature. A mixture of meteoric water with andesitic water and gas in the aquifer in a high self-potential zone is indicated by the water isotope analysis. The average recharge elevation of the hot spring water is 860 m above sea level (masl) according to altitude effects. A schematic flow model indicates that the recharged water flows through the mixing zone at 700 masl and the eruption point at 600 masl and then discharges near the Kamuiwakka hot spring at 330–500 masl. H2S and SO2 were confirmed in the fumarole gas in the high self-potential zone, and a high SO4 2− concentration was measured in the hot spring water. Consequently, the gases and the andesitic water are interpreted as being the main source of sulfur; their mixing with meteoric-sourced water in the aquifer generated sulfur that then erupted downstream through an open fracture from the aquifer at Crater I owing to gravity and the inner pressure.
works.venue: Journal of Volcanology and Geothermal Research
works.label: consider

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示Shiretokoiozan火山频繁喷发熔融硫的生成机制和硫来源。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用水、气样品的地球化学分析（同位素、化学组成、储层温度）及自电位测量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 硫主要源自岩浆气体(H₂S,SO₂)和安山岩水，与大气降水的含水层混合生成后沿裂隙喷发。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首度整合水同位素、气体化学与自电位数据，建立熔融硫生成-运移的详细水文模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为熔融硫喷发灾害评估和火山热液系统硫循环研究提供关键依据。

works.title: Magmatic controls on variable Cu mineralization at the cluster scale: Wubaduolai and Zhunuo porphyry Cu deposits, southern Tibet
works.abstract: The Gangdese metallogenic belt in southern Tibet hosts multiple Miocene porphyry Cu deposits formed in a post-collisional setting, yet their mineralization scales vary significantly despite similar ages and magma sources. This study focuses on the newly discovered Wubaduolai deposit and the adjacent, well-mineralized Zhunuo deposit within the same ore-concentration area to investigate the key factors controlling such variability. Zircon U-Pb dating, whole-rock geochemistry and Sr-Nd-Hf isotopes indicates that both deposits formed contemporaneously at ∼16–15 Ma and exhibit adakitic geochemical affinities, deriving from hybrid magmas involving juvenile lower crust and lithospheric mantle-derived melts. Amphibole thermobarometry and zircon-based oxybarometry reveal that the Wubaduolai magmas crystallized at higher pressures (∼136 MPa; ∼5.0 km), lower oxygen fugacity (ΔFMQ = 1.60 ± 0.24), and lower water contents (4.7 ± 0.8 wt%), whereas the Zhunuo magmas were emplaced at shallower levels (∼113 MPa; ∼4.2 km) with higher oxygen fugacity (ΔFMQ = 1.88 ± 0.29) and higher water contents (5.6 ± 1.0 wt%). Apatite compositions further show that the Wubaduolai is characterized by higher Cl contents (0.24–0.95 wt%) and higher XCl values compared to Zhunuo, indicating less efficient Cl extraction during fluid exsolution and thus reduced volatile release. These differences indicate that the contrasting mineralization scales are closely related to variations in magmatic physicochemical conditions, particularly oxygen fugacity, volatile content, and emplacement depth, which together control the efficiency of fluid exsolution and metal transport. In addition, Sr–Nd isotope modeling suggests that ultrapotassic melt contributions are higher at Zhunuo (∼20%) than at Wubaduolai (∼5–10%), which may have influenced magma evolution and volatile characteristics. Overall, these results indicate that porphyry Cu mineralization at the cluster scale was governed by the combined effects of multiple magmatic factors, particularly oxygen fugacity, volatile content, and emplacement conditions, whereas differences in ultrapotassic melt involvement may also have contributed to variations in magma evolution between the two systems.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 集群尺度上岩浆对铜成矿不均一性的控制：藏南乌巴多莱与朱诺斑岩铜矿床

summary_bullets.research_question: 为何同矿集区内同龄同源的斑岩铜矿床矿化规模存在显著差异？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锆石U-Pb定年、全岩地球化学、Sr-Nd-Hf同位素、角闪石温压计、锆石氧逸度计和磷灰石成分分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 乌巴多来岩浆更深侵位、更低氧逸度、水含量和Cl萃取，朱诺相反；超钾质熔体贡献不同。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示岩浆氧逸度、挥发分和侵位深度协同控制簇尺度斑岩铜矿矿化差异。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碰撞后环境中斑岩铜矿成矿差异性提供新成因机制，对区域找矿有指示意义。

works.title: Linking zircon (re-)crystallization to partial melting in migmatitic orthogneiss: Constraints on the tectonometamorphic evolution of the Upper Greater Himalayan Sequence, Western Arunachal Himalaya, NE India
works.abstract: Migmatitic orthogneisses provide significant insights into the relationships between partial melting, and zircon (re-)crystallization, and are the key to understanding crustal anatexis. This study focuses on migmatitic orthogneisses from the middle and upper Greater Himalayan Sequence (GHSM; GHSU) across the Zimithang Thrust (ZT) in the western Arunachal Himalaya (WAH), NE India, employing field observations, microtextures, mineral chemistry, phase equilibria modeling, and zircon petrochronology to understand partial melting processes in the Arunachal Himalaya and their broader tectonic implications. The ZT delineates a metamorphic break, separating an aluminosilicate-absent orthogneiss with incipient partial melting in the footwall from a kyanite-sillimanite-bearing migmatitic orthogneiss with metatexite textures in the hanging wall. The immediate footwall rocks reached peak P-T conditions of 1.05–1.00 GPa and 700–680 °C, generating ~6 vol% melt, before decompressing to 0.93–0.88 GPa and 650–640 °C, where melt is believed to crystallize completely. No prograde metamorphic history is preserved, and muscovite remained stable, consistent with limited melt production (~6 vol%) and closed-system behavior. In contrast, hanging-wall rocks record a clockwise P–T trajectory, from prograde burial at 0.72–0.60 GPa and 655–645 °C to peak suprasolidus conditions of 1.25–0.88 GPa and 820–780 °C. Muscovite dehydration melting produced ~22 vol% and ~ 29 vol% melt at high-P and high-T peak metamorphic conditions, respectively. Peak metamorphism was followed by decompression to 0.72–0.6 GPa and 700–640 °C. Zircon records three distinct age clusters in the hanging wall: 30–26, ~24, and ~ 18 Ma, signifying prograde heating, peak melting, and decompression associated with garnet resorption, respectively. Zircon in the footwall orthogneiss yield ~20 Ma rims, enriched in HREE with negative Eu anomalies, consistent with garnet re-equilibration and plagioclase growth. The findings indicate that muscovite dehydration melting started by ~30 Ma, reached peak metamorphism at 24–20 Ma, followed by the decompression at <20 Ma, which marked the initiation of the ZT. Our results reveal an early Miocene exhumation phase of the GHSU along the ZT, from 36 to 41 km to 20–24 km depth over 3–4 Myr (19–16 Ma) at rates of ~5 mm/yr, representing an out-of-sequence exhumation pulse that was followed by late Miocene movement along the ZT. This study suggests that melt-enhanced weakening, coupled with thrust activity, facilitated the extrusion of the hanging wall, providing new insights into partial melting and tectonometamorphic evolution of the GHSU in the WAH.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 混合岩化正片麻岩中锆石（重）结晶与部分熔融的联系：对印度东北部阿鲁纳恰尔喜马拉雅西段上大喜马拉雅岩系构造变质演化的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 混合岩化正片麻岩中的部分熔融与锆石（再）结晶如何联系，以及其揭示的喜马拉雅东部构造变质演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合野外观察、显微构造、矿物化学、相平衡模拟和锆石岩石年代学进行综合研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 上盘记录顺时针P-T轨迹，锆石年龄分30-26 Ma、~24 Ma和~18 Ma三期，分别对应进变质、峰期熔融和减压退变质。
summary_bullets.innovation: 限定早期中新世（19-16 Ma）上喜马拉雅序列沿Zimithang逆冲断层以~5 mm/yr速率发生无序折返。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示熔体弱化与逆冲活动共同促进挤出，为地壳深熔与造山带折返机制提供关键约束。

works.title: Ore-forming fluid evolution linked to polymetallic mineralization within basement granitoids of the Eastern Dharwar Craton, India
works.abstract: Uranium–sulfide co-mineralization represents a significant process in the evolution of hydrothermal systems, often marking redox-controlled precipitation mechanisms during post-magmatic fluid activity. The present study is carried out in the Chitrial area of the Eastern Dharwar Craton (EDC), India, where uranium mineralization occurs within the ~2.51–2.52 Ga granitoids unconformably overlain by the Paleoproterozoic (~1.7–1.8 Ga) Srisailam Formation of the Cuddapah Basin. The mineralization is fracture-controlled and largely confined to the granitoid basement, where uranium occurs as uraninite and coffinite associated with pyrite, chalcopyrite, and galena within hydrothermally altered zones. Petrographic and EPMA analyses reveal multiple generations of pyrite (Py1–Py3) and distinct paragenetic stages, reflecting evolving redox and physico-chemical conditions during mineralization. Early disseminated pyrite (Py1) formed under reducing conditions, while subsequent oxidative–reductive fluctuations facilitated successive sulfide, uraninite, and coffinite precipitation. Uraninite–pyrite intergrowths and coffinite overprints suggest reduction of U6+ to U4+ mediated by pyrite and its derivatives. Phase chemistry of pyrite indicates Co variations (11–900 ppm) and sulfur-deficient compositions (Fe/S = 0.83–1.09), consistent with a hydrothermal origin under epithermal conditions. Uraninite compositions (UO2 = 86–89 wt%, PbO = 1–4 wt%) and low Th and Y contents further confirm their hydrothermal derivation and later remobilization. The paragenetic sequence from pyrite to uraninite–coffinite–autunite reflects progressive fluid evolution from reducing to oxidizing regimes. Collectively, our results indicate that post-magmatic, structurally controlled hydrothermal alteration of fertile granitoids facilitated uranium mobilization and reprecipitation, providing insights into the physico-chemical evolution of ore-forming fluids within the Chitrial granitoids of the EDC.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 印度东德瓦尔克拉通基底花岗岩体内与多金属成矿相关的成矿流体演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示印度东部达尔瓦尔克拉通基底花岗岩中铀-多金属矿化的成矿流体演化与沉淀机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过岩相学观察和电子探针（EPMA）分析矿物结构、共生序列及相化学组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 多世代黄铁矿和铀矿物记录从还原到氧化的流体波动，黄铁矿介导铀还原沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在该区建立氧化还原波动控制铀-硫化物共沉淀的详细共生序列和矿物化学证据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为热液铀矿床的成矿流体演化和勘查提供了关键物理化学约束及成因模型。

works.title: Neoarchean crustal accretion mechanism in the western North China Craton: Geochemical and geochronological evidence from metavolcanic rocks in the Yinshan Block
works.abstract: The mechanism of Neoarchean crustal growth in the Yinshan Block of the western North China Craton remains controversial. Previous studies have primarily focused on Neoarchean granitic rocks, with limited investigation of metavolcanic rocks, constraining our understanding of regional magmatism. In this study, we present systematic zircon UPb geochronology, whole-rock geochemistry, and LuHf isotope analyses of the Neoarchean metavolcanic rocks exposed in the Xiwulanbulang area of the Yinshan Block, aiming to constrain their formation ages, petrogenesis, and tectonic setting. Zircon UPb dating indicates that these metavolcanic rocks were emplaced at 2.58–2.55 Ga. Geochemically, these metavolcanic rocks exhibit affinities to mid-ocean ridge basalts (MORB), characterized by depleted mantle signatures with magma sources derived from spinel-garnet lherzolite (approximately 10–70% partial melting). Although such MORB-like geochemical features are typically associated with divergent plate boundaries, in the Archean context they do not necessarily imply the existence of modern-style mid-ocean ridges. Instead, these features can be reconciled with a mantle plume regime, in which large-scale decompression melting beneath a mantle plume head produces basaltic magmas that share similar depleted mantle geochemical fingerprints. Whole-rock geochemical data and zircon ε Hf(t) values (ranging from +1.6 to +8.0) further indicate derivation from partial melting of a depleted mantle source without significant crustal contamination. Thus, the MORB-like compositions of these rocks are best interpreted as the product of a mantle plume–related melting event, rather than evidence for plate divergence or ridge subduction. Additionally, these metavolcanic rocks were likely formed in a tectonic setting involving mantle plume-ridge interaction. Therefore, we propose that the Yinshan Block experienced a crustal accretion event dominated by mantle plume activity during the Neoarchean. This understanding provides new insights into the early crustal formation mechanisms of the North China Craton.

works.title: Revisiting the formation and differentiation of Neoproterozoic continental arc crust in the western Yangtze Block, South China
works.abstract: Neoproterozoic continental arc magmatism in the western Yangtze Block (South China) provides critical insights into early crust-mantle evolution during circum-Rodinia subduction-accretionary orogenesis. However, the specific processes of Neoproterozoic continental crustal growth and stratification remain unclear. Herein, we present a comprehensive synthesis of mineral chemistry, zircon U–Pb–Hf isotopes, whole-rock major and trace elements as well as SrNd isotopes from representative Neoproterozoic Igneous Intrusive Complexes (NIICs) in the western Yangtze Block, including the Tianquan (TIC; ca. 833–825 Ma) and Shimian complexes (SIC; ca. 781–779 Ma) in this study, alongside the previously reported Nanba (NIC; ca. 796–790 Ma) and Luding complexes (LIC; ca. 783–779 Ma). The NIICs comprise mafic gabbros through intermediate diorites to highly fractionated silica-rich granitoids, suggesting a coherent calc-alkaline differentiation trend. They exhibit variable but predominantly depleted whole-rock SrNd (e.g., TIC: εNd(t) = −0.08 ~ +4.55; NIC: εNd(t) = −0.60 ~ +1.91; LIC: εNd(t) = +2.35 ~ +5.10; SIC: εNd(t) = +0.50 ~ +6.07) and zircon Hf isotopes (TIC: mean εHf(t) = +7.75 ~ +11.89; NIC: mean εHf(t) = +4.33 ~ +5.66; LIC: εHf(t) = +4.03 ~ +7.69; SIC: εHf(t) = +5.69 ~ +9.81), indicating a heterogeneous mantle source metasomatized by subducted components. Combined with “crust-like” trace element signatures, systematic whole-rock compositional variations, and hornblende P-T estimates, the NIICs represent middle–upper crustal sections, which underscore a three-stage evolution for Neoproterozoic continental arc crustal growth and fractionation: (1) the generation of primary basaltic melts from heterogeneous metasomatized mantle source infiltrated by subducted components; (2) the long-lived supply of metasomatized mantle-derived melts, magma mixing, and polybaric crystallization-driven differentiation within a trans-crustal magmatic system; and (3) extraction of high-silica melts in a shallow mush reservoir. Integrated with previous studies, our findings demonstrate that this complex array of petrogenetic processes—alongside the partial melting of diverse crustal sources—ultimately governed the maturation and vertical stratification of the Neoproterozoic continental arc crust in the western Yangtze Block.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 重新审视华南扬子地块西部新元古代大陆弧地壳的形成与分异

summary_bullets.research_question: 新元古代扬子西缘大陆弧地壳的生长和垂向分层过程尚未明确。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合矿物化学、锆石U–Pb–Hf同位素、全岩主微量元素及Sr–Nd同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现不均一地幔源区经俯冲交代，通过穿地壳岩浆系统驱动多阶段结晶分异形成中上地壳分层。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出从交代地幔熔融、穿地壳岩浆演化到浅部高硅熔体抽提的三阶段地壳生长模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为罗迪尼亚超大陆周缘俯冲增生过程中早期壳幔演化提供了关键岩石成因约束。

works.title: Early Holocene vigorous Black Sea outflow and the onset of sluggish Aegean deep-water convection
works.abstract: The Eastern Mediterranean Sea underwent profound hydrographic changes from the late glacial to the Early Holocene, culminating in deep-water stagnation and the deposition of the most recent organic-rich sediment layer (sapropel S1). While this event has traditionally been attributed to riverine discharge from North Africa and enhanced precipitation over the northern Mediterranean borderlands, the role of Black Sea outflow remains overlooked. Here, we present high-resolution multi-proxy records from a central Aegean sediment core spanning the past 42,500 years. Combining grain size, X-ray fluorescence, radiogenic and stable isotope records, we show that a shift in sedimentation ~ 11,000 years ago marked the onset of silt-rich detrital input predominantly sourced from the Dardanelles-Marmara region, accompanied by surface freshening and an enhanced influx of isotopically light dissolved inorganic carbon. We propose that vigorous Black Sea outflow enhanced stratification and suppressed Aegean deep-water convection, playing a more critical role than previously recognised in sapropel S1 formation. Black Sea outflow played a role in the collapse of deep-water convection in the Aegean Sea, according to analysis of a central Aegean sediment core.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 全新世早期黑海强劲外流与爱琴海深水迟缓对流的开始

summary_bullets.research_question: 早期全新世黑海强烈外流是否对爱琴海深水对流减弱和腐殖泥S1形成起关键作用？
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于爱琴海中部沉积岩芯的高分辨率多指标分析，涵盖粒度、XRF、放射性及稳定同位素数据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 约1.1万年前黑海强外流带来粉砂、淡化表层水和轻碳同位素，增强分层并抑制深水对流。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示黑海外流是爱琴海深水对流崩溃和腐殖泥形成的主要驱动因素，挑战传统河流输入假说。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为东地中海古海洋变化提供新机制，凸显黑海-爱琴海水文连通对区域气候与环流研究的价值。

works.title: Flood-related surface collapse at Osuga Valles, Mars
works.abstract: Constraining the formation mechanism of geologic depressions on the surface of Mars can shed light on the planet’s climatic, hydrological, and geochemical evolution. At Osuga Valles, surface morphologies indicative of catastrophic flood events can be tracked from their chaotic origins down to their sink at terminal depressions, or cavi. The channel-cavi association suggests a genetic link between inflowing floodwater and cavi formation and evolution. The geologic settings are consistent with a Hesperian-aged pre-flood, evaporite-containing sedimentary basin. Estimated water volumes associated with the Osuga Valles floods suggest cavi formation within this sediment-filled basin by surface collapse into voids generated by dissolution of subsurface salts, most likely magnesium sulfate minerals, which were previously detected in the region. Geologic mapping reveals that initial cavi collapse was associated with relatively low-discharge floods of Middle Amazonian age, which likely infiltrated the subsurface through fractures. Subsequent higher-discharge floods drained directly into the evolving cavi, causing further dissolution and collapse. Terminal depressions at the end of channel systems on Mars may be related to inflowing floodwater and the remobilization of magnesium sulfates within a pre-existing sedimentary basin, according to remote sensing observations and digital terrain mapping.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 火星奥苏加峡谷的洪水相关地表塌陷

summary_bullets.research_question: 火星Osuga Valles的终端洼地是否由洪水引发地表塌陷形成？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过遥感观测和数字地形测绘进行地质制图与水量估算。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 洼地是洪水渗入蒸发盐盆地溶解硫酸镁盐导致地下空洞塌陷形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将水道末端塌陷与盐溶作用、不同年代洪水事件建立成因联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 阐明火星洪水-盐溶-塌陷过程，为理解古气候和水文演化提供新模型。

works.title: Anthropogenic and climatic controls on sediment transfer across China since the Last Glacial Maximum
works.abstract: Sediment transfer underpins nutrient cycling, ecosystem integrity, landscape formation, climate reconstruction, and resource management. Since the Last Glacial Maximum (LGM, ~23,000–19,000 BP), Earth’s climate has gradually warmed, causing ice sheet recession, rising sea levels, and significant global ecosystem changes. However, the impacts of long-term climate change and human activities on sediment transfer since the LGM remain poorly understood. Here, we present a high-resolution reconstruction of sediment accumulation rates (SARs) across China since the LGM based on the new Chinese Lake and Peatland Sediment Record (CLASER) database. We find that 54% records exhibit increasing SARs over time. Three distinct phases driven by human activities and climate are identified: stable (20,000–8822 BC), fluctuant (8822 BC–1609 AD), and increasing (1609–1998 AD), characterized by 100–300-year cycles. The growing SARs correlate positively with land-use intensity and precipitation, and negatively with temperature. Regional patterns indicate that human activities and plant productivity mainly controlled sediment accumulation in the Eastern Plain and Yunnan-Guizhou Plateau, while precipitation exerted a more substantial influence in lowland plains, and temperature played a greater role in plateau regions. Our quantified study highlights the long-term combined and regional-specific roles of climate and anthropogenic forcing in shaping sediment transfer across China since the LGM. Sediment accumulation across China has increased since the Last Glacial Maximum, driven by shifting climate and intensifying human land use, as revealed by a high-resolution reconstruction of sediment accumulation rates based on lake and peatland records.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 末次盛冰期以来中国沉积物输移的人为与气候控制因素

summary_bullets.research_question: 末次盛冰期以来气候变化与人类活动如何共同影响中国沉积物输移？
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于中国湖泊与泥炭沉积记录数据库（CLASER）高分辨率重建沉积物累积速率。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 54%的记录显示沉积速率上升；识别出稳定、波动和增长三阶段，受土地利用、降水和温度共同驱动。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次量化并区分长尺度气候与人为因素对中国沉积物输送的区域特异性影响。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解养分循环、碳埋藏及陆地-海洋物质通量对人类与气候响应的机制提供基础数据。

works.title: Crustal thickness controls the formation of porphyry copper deposits: Global correlations and evidence from the Yidun Arc
works.abstract: Crustal thickness exerts a key control on the formation of porphyry Cu deposits by modulating magmatic differentiation and Cu enrichment processes. While geochemical proxies like Sr/Y ratios are established tracers of crustal thickness, their relationship with magmatic Cu content remains ambiguous. This study integrates a global geochemical compilation with a detailed case study of the Yidun Arc, eastern Tibet, to resolve this relationship. We establish a robust inverse correlation between crustal thickness and magmatic Cu content on a global scale. In the Yidun Arc, we document a pronounced north-south gradient in Cretaceous crustal thickness. This gradient directly controlled the spatial distribution of fertile, high-Sr/Y magmas, explaining the exclusive localization of Triassic and Cretaceous porphyry deposits in the thickened southern segment. Our results confirm that crustal thickness acts as a critical geodynamic filter for porphyry Cu deposit formation, providing a powerful framework for mineral exploration.
works.label: must_read

summary_bullets.research_question: 地壳厚度如何控制斑岩铜矿形成，以及岩浆铜含量与Sr/Y等地球化学指标的关系为何模糊。
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合全球地球化学数据集并结合义敦岛弧详细案例对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 全球尺度上地壳厚度与岩浆铜含量存在显著负相关，义敦弧南段加厚地壳控制了高Sr/Y岩浆及矿床分布。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次明确全球岩浆铜含量与地壳厚度的负相关关系，并通过单一岛弧的时空梯度验证。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为斑岩铜矿勘查提供了地壳厚度作为关键地球动力学过滤器的定量预测框架。

works.title: Sulphides to weathering products: metal evolution in seafloor massive sulphide deposits at the Semenov hydrothermal cluster, Mid-Atlantic Ridge
works.abstract: Abstract Seafloor massive sulphide (SMS) deposits are potential sources of Cu, Zn, Au and Ag, however, how seafloor weathering affects the content of these metals in the deposits remains poorly understood. Key sulphide weathering products, i.e. Fe-oxyhydroxide and atacamite, can provide insight into metal mobilisation during and after oxidation of sulphides. Ten Fe-oxyhydroxide and three massive sulphide samples from the Semenov hydrothermal cluster (13°30′N, Mid-Atlantic Ridge) were studied; five Fe-oxyhydroxides and all sulphides were analysed by LA-ICP-MS with one sulphide sample analysed by LA-TOF-ICP-MS mapping. Additionally, a sequential leaching study comprising nine Fe-oxyhydroxide samples was performed. Copper is mainly sequestered into the sulphide weathering products atacamite (~ 60%) and Fe-oxyhydroxide (~ 30%). Initially, Fe‑oxyhydroxide precipitates as ferrihydrite, inheriting the metal content of its sulphide precursor (e.g., pyrite or chalcopyrite). Concurrently, Au and Ag are displaced from the sulphide and become concentrated along the oxidation front at the sulphide rims rather than being incorporated into the nascent Fe‑oxyhydroxide. As oxidation proceeds, further breakdown of sulphides such as chalcopyrite, releases Cu that initially adsorb onto existing Fe‑oxyhydroxide. When sufficient mobilised Cu reacts with oxygenated seawater, atacamite precipitates, sequestering the Cu in a stable mineral form, serving as an exploration indicator for Cu‑rich Fe‑oxyhydroxide deposits and underlying massive sulphide deposits. Complete sulphide oxidation leads to the loss of Au and Ag from the solid system into seawater or their migration downwards toward a redox boundary within the SMS mound. Crystallisation of ferrihydrite into more stable goethite liberates substantial amounts of Cu (92%) and Zn (57%). However, the metal loss caused by this process may be limited if released metals re-adsorbed onto adjacent Fe‑oxyhydroxide. These results reveal that Fe‑oxyhydroxides can act as effective long‑term traps for Cu and Zn, suggesting that older, fully or partially oxidised off-axis SMS deposits may retain considerable base metals, expanding exploration areas.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 从硫化物到风化产物：大西洋中脊Semenov热液区海底块状硫化物矿床中的金属演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 海底风化如何影响块状硫化物矿床中Cu、Zn、Au、Ag的含量与迁移。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用LA-ICP-MS、LA-TOF-ICP-MS成像和连续淋滤实验分析铁氧化物与硫化物样品。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铜主要被封存于氯铜矿和铁氧化物；金和银在氧化锋富集但最终流失；针铁矿结晶释放大量铜锌但可再吸附。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示铁氧化物作为铜锌长期捕集剂，氯铜矿可作富铜矿床勘探指标。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证明老氧化矿床仍可保留大量贱金属，拓展海底硫化物勘探范围。

works.title: Geochronological and geochemical constraints on the Wuyi tungsten metallogenic belt, South China
works.abstract: The Wuyi metallogenic belt is a key part of the world-class South China tungsten province, but its metallogenic regularities are poorly constrained. Here, we present chronological and geochemical data from U–Pb geochronology, O isotopes, and trace elements in zircon, monazite, and wolframite for the Xingluokeng large-scale, Guomuyang medium-scale, and Beikeng small-scale W deposits in this belt. This study reports the first granite emplacement ages and W mineralization ages for the Guomuyang and Beikeng deposits. The results show that the Guomuyang biotite granite (∼435 Ma) and the Beikeng early-stage biotite granite (410–413 Ma) were emplaced during the Early Paleozoic, but these host granites have no direct genetic relationship with the Late Jurassic W mineralization (Guomuyang, ∼144 Ma; Beikeng, ∼150 Ma). This interpretation is further supported by the weakly fractionated nature of the Early Paleozoic granites, such as high K/Rb and low Rb/Sr ratios. The fertile granites are interpreted respectively as a concealed intrusion at Guomuyang and a younger muscovite granite cupola at Beikeng. Wolframite from these three deposits exhibits consistent REE patterns and δ18O values (Guomuyang, 2.92–4.76‰; Beikeng, 2.44–3.71‰; Xingluokeng, 3.50–4.70‰), indicating a magmatic-hydrothermal origin typical of quartz-vein-type W deposits. However, significant differences exist in trace element compositions: wolframite from Xingluokeng exhibits higher Nb, Ta, and Sc and lower Nb/Ta ratios than Guomuyang and Beikeng. This fluid signature is consistent with a highly differentiated, reduced, and acidic magmatic-hydrothermal system, which would have favored efficient tungsten transport, thereby likely contributing to the substantially higher WO3 endowment at Xingluokeng. Overall, these chronological and geochemical data, together with those from other W deposits in the same belt, indicate that granitic magmatism and W mineralization in the Wuyi metallogenic belt peaked in the Late Jurassic, showing a strong temporal correlation with the adjacent Nanling metallogenic belt.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华南武夷钨成矿带的地质年代学和地球化学约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 约束武夷山钨成矿带的成矿规律，特别是矿床的年代学及成岩成矿关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用U-Pb定年、氧同位素和锆石、独居石、黑钨矿的微量元素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 早期古生代花岗岩与晚侏罗世钨矿无成因联系；黑钨矿成分差异揭示兴罗坑为高分异还原流体系统，利于形成大型矿床。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次报道郭母阳和北坑矿床的成岩成矿年龄，并通过黑钨矿微量元素对比揭示流体控制因素。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 完善华南钨成矿年代学框架，证实晚侏罗世成矿高峰与南岭带同步，对区域找矿有指导意义。

works.title: Isotopic evidence for slab-derived magmatic water beneath the Kussharo Caldera, Japan
works.abstract: It is well known that water transported by a subducting oceanic plate (slab) plays a key role in the formation of island-arc magmas. However, direct evidence demonstrating that magmatic water is derived from the slab remains limited. To address this, we conducted isotope and dissolved ion analyses of hot and cold spring waters, river waters, fumarolic vapor, and hydrothermal waters at and around Kussharo Caldera in northern Japan. In this region, the Pacific Plate subducts beneath the North American Plate at the Kuril Trench, and more than a dozen Quaternary volcanoes form a volcanic front parallel to the trench. The results show that the Kawayu hot springs, located near the active lava dome within the caldera, are not derived solely from meteoric water. Strong linear correlations were observed among δ2H, δ18O, Cl− concentrations, and SO₄2− concentrations, suggesting mixing between meteoric water and magmatic water. The isotopic composition of the magmatic end-member coincides with the simulated value for Pacific slab-derived water at this location. This provides direct evidence that the magmatic water originates from the slab. In contrast, the isotopic compositions of fumarolic vapor and hydrothermal waters were partially modified by isotopic fractionation associated with vapor –liquid separation. This study highlights that the large flux of slab-derived water can preserve its original isotopic signature, even though that of the surrounding rocks may be substantially modified by isotopic exchange.
works.venue: Journal of Volcanology and Geothermal Research
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 日本屈斜路破火山口下方板片来源岩浆水的同位素证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 能否提供直接证据证明岛弧岩浆中的水来自俯冲板片？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对日本屈斜路火山口周边温泉、河水、喷气孔蒸汽和热液水进行同位素及溶解离子分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 川汤温泉的同位素组成与模拟的板片来源水一致，直接证明岩浆水源于太平洋板块。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过天然热水样品识别出俯冲板片来源的岩浆水原始同位素信号。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲带水循环和岛弧岩浆成因研究提供了关键的直接观测约束。

works.title: Erosion-driven delayed warming and marine stress prior to the end-Permian mass extinction
works.abstract: The end-Permian mass extinction (EPME) presents an anomaly: intense global warming lags the onset of the carbon isotope excursion (CIE) by ~50,000 years, challenging the presumed link between carbon cycle perturbations and climate warming. Using biogeochemical modeling, Bayesian inversion, and multiple proxies, here we show that incorporating continental erosion as a forcing term into the hyperthermal models can resolve this decoupling. Enhanced erosion, likely resulting from the terrestrial die-off of vegetation, accelerates continental weathering, which buffers early carbon release and delays global warming. This process also increases riverine phosphorus export to the oceans, fostering gradual marine anoxia and preconditioning the oceans for the extinction event. With these findings, we present a coherent unifying scenario for the EPME environmental dynamics. Furthermore, our study refines the hyperthermal paradigm, offering implications for future climate scenarios. Increased continental erosion during the end-Permian mass extinction buffered carbon emissions, delaying global warming by ~50 kyr and promoting marine anoxia, revealing a key link between ecosystem collapse and climate response.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 侵蚀驱动的延迟变暖与海洋环境压力在二叠纪末大灭绝之前

summary_bullets.research_question: 为何二叠纪末大灭绝中全球变暖滞后碳同位素偏移约5万年？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用生物地球化学建模、贝叶斯反演和多种代理指标。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 增强的大陆侵蚀缓冲碳排放，延迟全球变暖，并促进海洋逐步缺氧。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将大陆侵蚀作为强迫项纳入超热模型，揭示侵蚀驱动的延迟变暖机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 连接了生态系统崩溃与气候响应，为未来气候情景提供重要启示。

works.title: Raising the Gangdese Mountains via Subduction of Indian Continental Crust, Not Slab Breakoff, During Subduction to Collision Transition
works.abstract: Abstract The tectonic evolution of the Tibetan Plateau, including the timing and magnitude of crustal thickening and surface uplift, is debated during the transition from oceanic subduction to India‐Asia collision. Previous studies of the Gangdese magmatic orogen show a ∼3–3.5 km apparent discrepancy between the elevations obtained from stable‐isotope‐based paleoaltimetry and those inferred from paleo‐crustal thickness estimates during the subduction‐collision transition. Here, we use thermo‐mechanical numerical modeling to investigate how subduction of the leading Indian continental margin influences Gangdese topography. We impose slab breakoff at prescribed depths using a viscosity‐reduction “control box” to assess its topographic effects. Our results show that a ∼25 km‐thick subducted Indian continental crust can provide sufficient buoyancy to rapidly uplift the elevation of southern Tibet to ∼4 km after initial India–Asia contact. In the imposed shallow‐breakoff scenarios (80–120 km depth), slab breakoff has only transient effects on surface elevation. This study highlights how discordant results from geochemical Mohometry and paleoaltimetry proxies may be reconciled. Mohometry‐derived elevations capture only the buoyancy of the upper‐plate crust, whereas paleoaltimetry proxies reflects the total elevation supported by deeper buoyancy, including the subducted Indian crust. Our results are consistent with a synchronous India–Asia collision, the continental nature of Greater India, and a stepwise increase in Gangdese elevation during the early Paleogene.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 印度陆壳俯冲而非板片断离在俯冲至碰撞转换过程中隆升冈底斯山脉

summary_bullets.research_question: 为何冈底斯山脉古高度计与古地壳厚度估计存在约3-3.5公里高程差异？
summary_bullets.methodology: 热-力学数值模拟，通过粘度降低控制箱模拟板片断离和印度大陆地壳俯冲。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 俯冲的25公里厚印度大陆地壳提供浮力使藏南快速隆升至约4公里，浅断离仅产生短暂影响。
summary_bullets.innovation: 区分上板块地壳浮力与俯冲地壳深部浮力贡献，调和了莫霍测量与古高度计的结果矛盾。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为青藏高原早期隆升机制提供新解释，并协调了地球化学与稳定同位素古高程重建的分歧。

works.title: Hotspots of Arctic and sub-Arctic marine sediment organic carbon are dominated by the Baltic, Barents and Chukchi Seas
works.abstract: Abstract The Arctic and sub-Arctic are warming at least three times faster than the global average, altering terrestrial carbon delivery to the oceans and marine carbon cycling. The sequestration of such carbon into marine sediments is a key contributor to climate regulation. Despite this, the location of organic carbon hotspots at high latitudes are poorly understood, hindering our ability to identify their sensitivity to environmental change. Using quantile regression forests with >13,000 sediment samples, we identify the Baltic, Barents and Chukchi Seas as the dominant high-latitude marine organic carbon hotspots, playing a disproportionately large role in the area-normalised global sedimentary carbon stock. Organic carbon accumulation rates are elevated across shallow shelf environments and coastlines, particularly in proximity to Arctic rivers. Development of organic carbon hotspots reflects both local and external processes, including salinity, mixed layer depth, primary production and sedimentation, demonstrating the importance of coupled land-ocean processes. Uncertainty in future changes to organic carbon cycling and transit pathways, including river transport, is therefore an emerging risk factor for the stability of marine sediment carbon stores. Compounding this, only 10.19% of the surface sediment organic carbon stock is currently within marine protected areas, placing >17 Pg at higher risk of anthropogenic disturbance.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 北极及亚北极海洋沉积物有机碳热点区域主要由波罗的海、巴伦支海和楚科奇海主导

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示北极和亚北极海洋沉积有机碳热点位置及其对环境变化的敏感性。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用分位数回归森林分析超过13,000个海洋沉积物样本数据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 波罗的海、巴伦支海和楚科奇海是主导热点，仅10.19%有机碳储量处于保护区内。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统量化高纬度海洋沉积碳热点，揭示陆海耦合过程的关键作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估气候变化下沉积碳库稳定性与保护优先区提供关键科学依据。

works.title: A continental-scale Eurasian ice sheet 2.4 million years ago
works.abstract: Understanding when ice sheets first developed over the continents is essential for attributing ice volume to marine records of global sea-level change. We resolve a long-standing terrestrial–marine mismatch in the timing of the first Eurasian Ice Sheet (EIS) expansion by dating the earliest glaciogenic unit in northwest Europe, the Hattem Bed Complex (HBC). Paired cosmogenic 26Al-10Be burial dating and detrital zircon fingerprinting indicate that glacially-derived Fennoscandian gravels reached the Netherlands $${2.41\,}_{-0.29}^{+0.51}$$ Ma, while ages from the overlying Appelscha Formation record a second EIS advance and attendant shutdown of the Baltic River System $${1.72\,}_{-0.25}^{+0.25}$$ Ma. Cyclic stratification of the HBC could reflect freshwater discharge to the North Atlantic associated with episodic disruption of meridional overturning circulation. The timing of the first trans-Baltic EIS overlaps the Laurentide Ice Sheet maximum ($${2.42\,}_{-0.14}^{+0.14}\,$$Ma), underscoring substantial Northern Hemisphere ice growth more than a million years prior to the Mid-Pleistocene Transition. The earliest known glacial sediments in northwest Europe are dated using cosmogenic nuclides, revealing the first expansions of the Eurasian Ice Sheet at ~2.4 and ~1.7 million years ago.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 240万年前大陆尺度的欧亚冰盖

summary_bullets.research_question: 何时欧亚冰盖首次在西北欧大陆扩张，以解决海陆记录在时间上的长期不匹配。
summary_bullets.methodology: 联合宇宙成因26Al-10Be埋藏测年与碎屑锆石指纹技术，对荷兰最早冰碛单元Hattem层进行定年。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 首次跨波罗的欧亚冰盖扩张发生于约2.41百万年前，第二次推进在约1.72百万年前。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次精准确定欧亚冰盖最早陆地证据年代，将其与北美冰盖极盛同步，重大冰期提前逾百万年。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为全球海平面变化记录提供关键陆地冰量校准点，重塑对中更新世转型前冰盖演化的认识。

works.title: Isolation and reactivity of an alkyl-substituted germanium(I) radical anion
works.abstract: Abstract The isolation of low-valent main group radical species remains a fundamental challenge in synthetic chemistry due to their intrinsic instability. Herein, we report the successful isolation and full characterization of an alkyl-substituted germanium(I) radical anion predominantly stabilized by steric protection with minimal electronic perturbation. This radical anion exhibits thermal stability in both the solid state and in solution at ambient temperature, enabling thorough structural, spectroscopic and reactivity investigations. EPR spectroscopy and DFT calculations consistently verify predominant localization of the unpaired electron at the germanium center. Furthermore, the Ge(I) radical anion presents unique radical reactivity patterns demonstrating by its reactivity investigation. This work represents a rare example of an isolable low-valent group 14 radical species.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 烷基取代的一价锗自由基阴离子的分离与反应性

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何分离并稳定低价态主族锗(I)自由基阴离子这一不稳定物种？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用大位阻烷基取代基进行动力学保护，结合EPR波谱和DFT计算表征。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成功分离出在固态和溶液中均热稳定的锗(I)自由基阴离子，自旋密度主要定域在锗中心，并表现出独特的自由基反应活性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 报道了极罕见的可分离低价态14族自由基物种，实现近乎纯空间位阻稳定化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为探索不稳定主族自由基的稳定策略和反应模式提供了重要实验先例与结构佐证。

works.title: Conformational landscape and ligand-dependent clustering of the human type 2 IP3 receptor
works.abstract: Inositol 1,4,5-trisphosphate (IP3) receptors (IP3Rs) are tetrameric ER Ca2+ channels that shape intracellular Ca2+ signaling in response to IP3, regulating diverse physiological processes. The structural basis for subtype-specific regulation among the three subtypes (IP3R-1–3) remains incompletely understood due to the lack of IP3R-2 structures. Here, we report cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) structures of human IP3R-2 in distinct conformations in the presence and absence of IP3, Ca2+, and ATP. These structures define the conformational landscape of IP3R-2, delineate ligand-binding interactions, and reveal shared architectural features alongside isoform-specific differences. We also resolve ligand-dependent IP3R-2 assemblies, identifying a conformation-dependent inter-channel interface. Live-cell imaging demonstrates that IP3R-2 undergoes clustering following ligand-induced Ca2+ release, and disruption of this interface selectively abolishes clustering without impairing channel activity. Together, these findings provide a structural framework for human IP3R-2 and establish a mechanism linking ligand-dependent conformational changes to inter-channel interactions and post-activation cellular clustering. Here the authors define the conformational landscape of human IP3R-2 and identify a ligand-dependent inter-channel interface that mediates receptor clustering during calcium signalling.

works.title: Ore-forming processes of orogenic gold deposits in the northwest Fengtai Basin, South Qinling Orogen, central China: Constraints from pyrite texture and geochemistry
works.abstract: The genesis of orogenic gold deposits (OGDs), and in particular the source of their metals and fluids (crustal vs. sub-crustal), remains a matter of debate. The South Qinling Orogen, central China, hosts significant Triassic OGDs spatially associated with Devonian sedimentary basins containing SEDEX Pb-Zn mineralization, providing a natural laboratory for testing competing genetic models. This study investigates the Matigou and Pangjiahe OGDs (a total of > 60 t Au) in the Fengtai Basin based on detailed petrography combined with in-situ LA-ICP-MS trace element and LA-MC-ICP-MS sulfur isotope analyses of pyrite. Five pyrite generations were identified: syn-sedimentary Py0 in phyllites (fine-grained, framboidal and tubular in morphology; highly variable δ34S from − 35.7‰ to + 14.9‰; elevated background Au and trace-element contents); diagenetic Py1 in phyllites (coarser and euhedral; narrower δ34S from − 5.1‰ to + 9.4‰); metamorphic-hydrothermal Py2 in phyllites (euhedral; base metal inclusion-bearing; δ34S similar to Py1); magmatic-hydrothermal Py3 in granite porphyry (δ34S = +2‰ to + 5‰); and main-ore-stage Py4 hosted by both phyllites and granite porphyry (zoned, with elevated Au and As contents; δ34S = +8‰ to + 13‰). The Py4 δ34S signature is distinctly heavier and more tightly clustered than that of any pre-ore pyrite generation at the deposit site, requiring derivation of ore-stage sulfur from an isotopically homogeneous reservoir external to the immediate host horizon, rather than in-situ remobilization of local sedimentary, metamorphic, or magmatic pyrite. Taken together with regional structural, S-isotopic, and geochemical constraints, this signature is inconsistent with a sub-crustal (mantle) source and instead indicates a crustal, basin-internal reservoir. We propose that the ore-forming fluids were generated during Triassic metamorphism through devolatilization of, and metal leaching from, the underlying Devonian strata previously enriched by SEDEX activity. Precipitation of native gold and auriferous Py4 most likely occurred during the syn-orogenic tectonic transition through fault-valve cycling. This study highlights the importance of pre-existing, basin-hosted mineralization as a key metal source for subsequent orogenic gold systems.

works.translated_title: 南秦岭造山带凤台盆地西北部造山型金矿床的成矿过程：黄铁矿结构和地球化学的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 造山型金矿的成矿流体和金属究竟源自地壳还是地壳之下？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过黄铁矿显微组构、LA-ICP-MS微量元素和LA-MC-ICP-MS硫同位素原位分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成矿阶段硫同位素组成重且均一，表明硫源自外部均一储库，而非本地沉积或岩浆硫化物。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出盆地内先存的SEDEX矿化层为区域造山型金矿提供了关键金属来源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示预富集矿化对造山型金矿成矿的贡献，为区域成矿预测和勘查提供新思路。

works.title: Geodynamic Controls on Magmatic Ni-Cu-Platinum Group Element Sulfide Mineral Systems Through Time
works.abstract: Abstract Most models for the formation of magmatic Ni-Cu-platinum group element (PGE) sulfide deposits invoke high-temperature events (e.g., plumes) to sufficiently melt enough peridotite mantle to produce MgO- and Ni-Cu-PGE–rich magmas, and the deposits are thus intrinsically linked to the emplacement of large igneous provinces (LIPs) in mostly extensional tectonic regimes. However, many Ni-Cu deposits are hosted by intrusions unrelated to LIP events, having formed during compressional orogenic events. We present a new conceptual framework for global magmatic sulfide deposits based on chalcophile element geochemistry, which reflects distinct combinations of mantle source composition (anhydrous peridotite vs. hydrous peridotite/pyroxenite) and the temperature and/or volume of melting. Low volumes of melting of hydrous mantle at low temperatures (<1,200°C) produce alkalic ultramafic-hosted, Ni-poor, Cu-Au–dominant, low-temperature Cu (LT-Cu) deposits, displaying relative enrichment in Cu, Au, and Te over the other chalcophile elements. Greater volumes of melting of a hydrous source produce mafic-ultramafic-hosted low-temperature Ni (LT-Ni) deposits defined by distinctly PGE-poor chemistries. High-temperature (>1,200°C) melting of more anhydrous mantle peridotite forms both mafic-ultramafic-hosted high-temperature Ni (HT-Ni) deposits enriched in all chalcophile elements and layered mafic intrusion-hosted high-temperature PGE (HT-PGE) deposits, which display relative PGE enrichment. Very-high-temperature melting of peridotite mantle forms komatiite-hosted very-high-temperature Ni (VHT-Ni) deposits with chalcophile element profiles close to primitive mantle ratios. Temporally and spatially, all VHT and HT deposits are inextricably linked to LIPs throughout Earth’s history. The major HT-PGE deposits are all >2.0 Ga and hosted within cratons, the VHT-Ni deposits are all >1.8 Ga and hosted in komatiites, and the HT-Ni deposits are distributed throughout geologic time and are mostly located at cratonic margins. Conversely, LT deposits are all younger than 2.0 Ga, are almost never associated with LIPs, and have a more varied spatial distribution, but are more commonly located within orogenic belts. These secular changes in the nature of magmatic sulfide systems through time are a function of (1) a cooling mantle from the Archean to the present, (2) varying compositions of mantle as a product of increased mantle metasomatic processes through time, (3) the mineralogical deportment of chalcophile metals in mantle rocks, and (4) the variety of thermal triggers to melt such assemblages. We present a revised mineral system framework for the source and geodynamic controls on magmatic sulfides that takes into account all these criteria and allows enhanced targeting capability and prediction of the metal fertility of potential deposits.

works.title: Slab flattening in the mantle transition zone drives extrusion and upwelling of ancient subducted material
works.abstract: Global seismic tomography reveals that many subducted slabs flatten and stagnate within the mantle transition zone (MTZ), particularly beneath the western Pacific, yet how this process influences mantle material redistribution and overlying intraplate volcanism remains a fundamental question. We address this issue using integrated 40Ar/39Ar geochronology, whole-rock and mineral chemistry, and Sr–Nd–Pb–Hf isotopic analyses of basalts from the Changbaishan volcanic field (NE China), a long-lived volcanic system situated above the stagnant Pacific slab. Our results document a systematic temporal evolution over ∼22 million years. The earliest low-Ti basalts (∼22.4 Ma; 1.1–1.3 wt.% TiO2) display arc-like signatures, high olivine Ca/Al (5–45) and Mn/Fe (>1.7) ratios, and elevated oxygen fugacity (∼∆FMQ+2), indicating derivation from an oxidized, carbonated peridotitic source. Subsequent high-Ti (∼21.3 Ma; 2.4–2.8 wt.% TiO2) and later shield-stage basalts (∼3–1 Ma) exhibit ocean island basalt-like affinities, low olivine Ca/Al (∼5) and Mn/Fe (<1.5), and were derived from a reduced (∼∆FMQ), pyroxenite-bearing mantle source. Isotopically, the earliest basalts record a stronger contribution from recently subducted components, whereas subsequent basalts show progressively greater involvement of an ancient, enriched mantle (EM-1) component. Together with regional isotopic comparisons of Mesozoic–Cenozoic basalts, these data indicate that EM-1-like signatures became prominent mainly after ∼22 Ma in NE China. By integrating these geochemical signatures with geophysical observations, numerical modeling, and plate reconstruction evidence, we propose that Pacific slab rollback and flattening since ∼22 Ma drove upwelling of MTZ material containing resident EM-1 components. Fluids from the stagnant slab and destabilized hydrous MTZ minerals reduced mantle density, enabling buoyant ascent and decompression melting that generated the voluminous shield-stage magmas. Our findings support a close genetic linkage among slab flattening, dynamic source contributions from the MTZ, and intraplate volcanism, highlighting the MTZ as a crucial geochemical reservoir that mediates material cycling between Earth’s shallow and deep mantle domains.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地幔过渡带板片扁平化驱动古俯冲物质的挤出与上涌

summary_bullets.research_question: Stagnant slab flattening in the mantle transition zone influences mantle material redistribution and intraplate volcanism, but the mechanism remains unclear.
summary_bullets.methodology: Integrated 40Ar/39Ar geochronology, whole-rock and mineral chemistry, and Sr–Nd–Pb–Hf isotopic analyses of Changbaishan basalts.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Basalts reveal a 22-million-year evolution from arc-like, oxidized sources to OIB-like, reduced sources with increasing ancient enriched mantle (EM-1) contribution.
summary_bullets.innovation: Demonstrates slab flattening drives upwelling of ancient EM-1 material from the mantle transition zone, linking deep and shallow mantle geochemical cycles.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: Highlights the mantle transition zone as a critical geochemical reservoir mediating material cycling between Earth’s shallow and deep mantle.

works.title: The genesis of the large Dabaiyang Au-Te deposit in the North China Craton: Insights from deposit geology, pyrite geochemistry and S-O isotope
works.abstract: The genesis of the Dabaiyang Au-Te deposit on the northern margin of North China Craton remain poorly constrained due to limitations of previous studies that were mainly based on bulk quartz δ18O isotope analyses and fluid inclusion microthermometry potentially affected by post-entrapment modification. Here, we presented an integrating study of paragenetic sequence, in-situ trace element and isotopic (δ34S and δ18O) analyses of pyrite and K-feldspar to decipher fluid source and evolution history. The δ18O values of pre-ore K-feldspar (8.2 to 9.6 ‰) and δ34S values of pre-ore pyrite (–5.5 to –0.1 ‰) indicate a magmatic source for the ore fluids, with negligible meteoric water input in the pre-ore stage. Trace element compositions of three pyrite generations (Py-1, Py-2a, Py-2b) reveal a two-stage gold enrichment process. The pre-ore stage was characterized by high-temperature, oxidized, and alkaline fluids, where Au was mainly incorporated as invisible gold into the As-rich Py-1. The syn-ore stage involved vigorous fluid boiling and mixing with meteoric water, leading to fluid cooling and the precipitation of visible native gold. The enrichment of gold during this stage was further facilitated by polymetallic Te-rich melts, accounting for the close association between native gold and tellurides. Integrating our results and previously published data, we propose that the Dabaiyang is more appropriatelyclassified as an oxidized intrusion-related gold deposit, likely associated with a concealed Late Triassic granitic intrusion, rather than an epithermal system as previously suggested.

works.title: Quadruple sulfur and triple oxygen isotope constraints on biological processes in Mars-analog gypsum
works.abstract: A primary objective of Mars sample return missions is the detection and characterization of potential biosignatures. Sulfates, among the most abundant hydrated minerals on Mars, represent promising targets for such investigation. Terrestrial studies have shown that gypsum can preserve life-associated organic matter and that its δ34S signatures provide key evidence for microbial sulfate reduction as early as ∼ 3.5 billion years ago. This study analyzes quadruple sulfur (δ34S, Δ33S, Δ36S) and triple oxygen (δ18O, Δ́17O) isotopes in gypsum from three strong evaporation basins on the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau, where sulfate deposition is extensive but surface environments are only marginally habitable due to severe limitations in water, soil development, and nutrient availability. We focus on the Qaidam Basin as a Mars analog environment and place it in context through comparison with a higher-elevation region (Shuanghu) and a magmatic rock-dominated region (Yushu). Together with isotopic mixing models, an open-system steady-state sulfur cycle model, and triple-oxygen isotope oxidation pathway calculations, our quadruple sulfur and triple oxygen isotope measurements reveal that the studied gypsum deposits preserve distinct isotopic biosignatures. In particular, the isotopic compositions of the samples reflect microbial sulfur disproportionation and cryptic sulfur cycling, both of which extend beyond widespread microbial sulfate reduction, demonstrating how sulfur can be internally recycled and energetically utilized to sustain life in Mars-analog environments. This integrated isotopic approach significantly advances our capability to decipher sulfur cycling in extreme terrestrial environments, including Mars analog systems, and provides critical methodology for interpreting potential biosignatures in returned Martian samples.

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何利用多硫氧同位素在火星类比石膏中识别微生物硫循环的生物特征？
summary_bullets.methodology: 测量青藏高原蒸发盆地石膏的四硫三氧同位素，结合混合、稳态和氧化路径模型分析。

works.title: Punctuated energetics of dehydration contributes to slow earthquake phenomena
works.abstract: The prograde breakdown of hydrous minerals like lawsonite is energy-intensive and releases fluids at depths coincident with extensive slow earthquake phenomena for many subduction geotherms. However, there remains inconsistency between the spatial occurrence and inferred temporal rates of these dehydration reactions relative to the episodic character of slow earthquakes. The example of lawsonite breakdown shows that dehydration reactions will dictate heat consumption, thus buffering the rate of temperature increase for a rock undergoing intervals of metamorphism (<30 °C) and delaying each small increment (∼1 °C) of fluid release. A nonlinear behavior is predicted involving periods of fast fluid release paused by periods of slower heat absorption. Such stepped reaction progress is consistent with natural rock textures of lawsonite breakdown indicating intermittent fluid-present crack propagation and associated step changes in mineral growth. Pulsed fluid flow into rocks of heterogeneous permeability may result in stress build-up enabling crack propagation and slip at different scales. Energetics of punctuated dehydration and resultant fluid flow match temporal and spatial characteristics of slow slip behavior. Consequently, episodic dehydration is suggested as a viable trigger for slow slip.

works.title: Pressure-temperature-time evolution of the Lüliang Group, North China craton: Insights from phase equilibria modeling and geochronology
works.abstract: Unraveling the tectono-thermal history of medium- to low-grade belts would place important constraints on the regional tectonic evolution. There exists a Barrovian metamorphic belt in the Lüliang Group, Trans-North China orogen of the North China craton. Representative rock samples from chlorite zone, biotite zone, garnet zone, and staurolite-kyanite zone have been collected to delineate the pressure-temperature-time (P-T-t) evolution. A two-stage prograde P-T path characterized by heating first and then pressurizing is recovered from the garnet zone by phase equilibria modeling. The peak P-T conditions are constrained to be ∼7.0 kbar and 560 °C. Decompression-dominated P-T paths involving peak pressure (6.8−9.2 kbar, 515−565 °C) and peak temperature (4.6−6.5 kbar, 560−615 °C) stages are obtained from the staurolite-kyanite zone. Metamorphic zircon from the staurolite-kyanite zone and garnet from the garnet zone yield U-Pb ages of 1850 ± 31 Ma and 1882 ± 67 Ma, respectively. Biotite from the biotite zone gives an 40Ar/39Ar age of 1762 ± 3 Ma. The geochronological results indicate that metamorphism of the Lüliang Group is younger than the formation age of the Trans-North China orogen (ca. 1.95 Ga) but is coeval with the subduction-collision orogeny (1.90−1.82 Ga) along the northern margin of the North China craton. The distribution of the Barrovian metamorphic belt is also parallel to the latter orogen (E-W trending). Consequently, combining these results with field observations and regional geological evolution, it is inferred that the genesis of Barrovian metamorphism in the Lüliang Group may be related to the stress propagated from the 1.90−1.82 Ga orogeny. The heat sources and formation mechanisms of Barrovian metamorphism globally may vary case by case.

summary_bullets.innovation: 提出吕梁群巴罗型变质作用受北缘远场应力传播控制的新解释。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为全球巴罗型变质带的热源与形成机制差异性比较提供了实例。

works.title: Fluid sources and evolution of early Oligocene Be-W deposits in the Mahuaping ore district, Western Yunnan
works.abstract: The Cenozoic Sanjiang Tethyan metallogenic belt is renowned for large-scale porphyry-skarn Cu-Mo-Au mineralization systems. Recent studies have shown that this belt also host coeval Be and W mineralization, however, the genesis and evolution mechanisms of such coeval critical metal (e.g., W, Be) mineralization remain poorly constrained. This study focuses on the Yinchangping quartz-vein type Be-W deposit, which occurs within ophiolitic mélange in the Mahuaping ore district, western Yunnan. Through in situ muscovite Rb-Sr dating and scheelite geochemical analysis, the ore-forming age is precisely constrained at 29.5 ± 1.3 Ma (Early Oligocene). Scheelite display relatively uniform 87Sr/86Sr ratios (0.7056 – 0.7085), significant Y/Ho fractionation (19.1 – 59.8), and non-charge-and-radius-controlled (non-CHARAC) behavior, suggesting that the ubiquitous positive Eu anomalies and absence of Ce anomalies in scheelite collectively record a persistently reducing hydrothermal environment. The decoupling of in-situ Sr isotopes and Sr contents, accompanied by high-frequency ’sawtooth’ fluctuations and core-to-rim isotopic profile characteristics, robustly demonstrates that driven by a ’fault-valve’ mechanism, pristine magmatic fluids underwent multi-component mixing with highly radiogenic fluids that had intensively interacted with the basement, mid-ocean ridge basalt (MORB) components, or carbonate wall rocks. This intense water–rock interaction thoroughly disrupted the fluid chemical equilibrium, thereby triggering the large-scale co-precipitation of scheelite and beryl. More importantly, this study reveals that the Yinchangping and adjacent Mahuaping deposits are not isolated occurrences. Instead, they likely belong to the same magmatic‑hydrothermal metallogenic system. As a proximal end-member, the Yinchangping deposit directly records the early stage process of deep magmatic fluid ascent to shallow levels, undergoing water–rock interaction and initial mixing with metamorphic fluids. With the continuous upward evolution of fluids, the distal Mahuaping deposit experienced more intensive metamorphism, leading to attenuation of magmatic signals and completion of a geochemical transition to metamorphic fluid dominance. These two deposits constitute a temporally and spatially continuous Early Oligocene “magmatic-metamorphic transitional” Be-W metallogenic system within the Mahuaping ore district.

works.translated_title: 滇西马花坪矿集区早渐新世铍钨矿床的流体来源与演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨早渐新世钨铍矿床的流体来源与演化机制及其成因联系。

summary_bullets.key_findings: 成矿年龄为29.5±1.3 Ma，还原性流体经历多源混合与断层阀控制，银厂坪与马花坪属同一岩浆-变质过渡成矿系统。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示马花坪矿区存在早渐新世岩浆-变质过渡型钨铍成矿系统及其时空连续演化规律。

works.title: ScS-triggered slip on megathrust interfaces after the 2011 M W 9.0 Tohoku-Oki earthquake
works.abstract: We report an extraordinary observation of ground motion in Japan after the moment magnitude ( M W ) 9.0 2011 Tohoku-Oki earthquake attributed to a multiplate-interface slip event triggered by shear wave that traveled to the Earth’s core and back. The megathrust earthquake generated a strong ScS phase with a peak-to-peak amplitude exceeding 1 centimeter in Japan. Superposed on this waveform, an eastward steplike displacement of up to 5 to 6 millimeters was recorded in Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) data throughout Japan. This likely originated from slip on the megathrust interfaces triggered by the nearly simultaneous arrival of the ScS wave across Japan. Such an ScS triggering is a previously unrecognized source of seismic hazard, which can potentially (re)activate the mainshock area and the broader surrounding megathrust interfaces.

summary_bullets.key_findings: ScS波抵达日本时触发了板间滑动，产生5至6毫米东向阶跃位移。

summary_bullets.relevance_note: 表明远场体波能远程激活主震断层，对地震灾害评估有重要启示。

summary_bullets.research_question: 石油是否可以通过无机过程在深层地幔中非生物生成，从而实现“无尽石油”？
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于苏联时期理论，俄罗斯计划通过超深钻探验证非生物成油假说。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 普京前竞选经理推崇的理论认为石油可无有机物生成，俄罗斯拟开展深层探索。
summary_bullets.innovation: 挑战传统有机成因范式，提出幔源无机合成石油的可验证路径。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 若证实，将颠覆油气勘探方向与资源枯竭认知，对能源地缘产生深远影响。

works.title: Molybdenum isotopic constraints on temporal variations in slab inputs to arc magmas within the Mongol-Okhotsk tectonic regime
works.abstract: This study documents temporal variations in slab inputs to arc magmas within the Mongol-Okhotsk tectonic regime by investigating molybdenum isotopic compositions of the Mesozoic mafic−intermediate igneous rocks in the Erguna Massif in NE China. The early Mesozoic rocks, formed in an active continental margin setting, exhibit higher δ98/95Mo values and Ce/Mo ratios, more enriched Sr-Nd isotopes than those of depleted mantle, along with positive Mo-Pb isotope correlations. These features suggest that their primary magmas were derived from partial melting of a mantle wedge modified by altered oceanic crust-derived aqueous fluids and sediment-derived melts. Conversely, the late Mesozoic igneous rocks, formed in an extensional setting, show lower δ98/95Mo values, higher Th/La ratios, and more radiogenic 87Sr/86Sr and 207Pb/204Pb ratios than mantle values. When integrated with higher Hf/Nd ratios compared to early Mesozoic counterparts, their magma sources are interpreted as the early Mesozoic mantle domains subsequently modified by residual sediment-derived melts. Additionally, early Mesozoic magmatism with heavy Mo isotopes is primarily associated with porphyry Cu-Mo deposits, whereas late Mesozoic magmatism with light Mo isotopes is linked to porphyry-type Mo and epithermal deposits. These findings reveal that temporal variations in slab inputs directly control the diversity of arc magmas and regional mineralization.

works.translated_title: 蒙古-鄂霍茨克构造体制内板片输入对弧岩浆随时间变化的钼同位素制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 蒙古-鄂霍茨克构造体制下，板片俯冲输入如何随时间变化影响弧岩浆成分与成矿？
summary_bullets.methodology: 系统分析额尔古纳地块中生代镁铁质-中性火成岩的钼同位素、Sr-Nd-Pb同位素和微量元素。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 早中生代高δ98/95Mo岩浆源自俯冲流体与沉积物熔体改造的地幔；晚中生代低δ98/95Mo岩浆源于早期地幔域被残余沉积物熔体再改造。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用钼同位素揭示板片输入的时间变化对弧岩浆多样性和区域成矿的直接控制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为区域构造-岩浆演化与多金属成矿规律提供新示踪工具，对矿产勘查有重要指示意义。

works.title: Efficient preservation of old methane-derived organic carbon in deep-sea surface sediments
works.abstract: Methane released from the subseafloor is significantly attenuated during upward migration, yet the preservation of methane-derived organic carbon (OC) in global deep-sea sediments remains poorly understood. Here, we measured carbon isotopes coupled with temperature-ramped analyses on various methane seepage sediments. Our results reveal a correlation between the radiocarbon (14C) content in deep-sea surface sediments and sulfate-methane transition depth. Notably, our findings suggest that a substantial amount of 14C-depleted OC may originate from deep-seated methane and is efficiently preserved in surface seepage sediments. We propose that the efficient OC preservation is related to microbial-mediated aggregate formation at the seawater-sediment interface, where physical occlusion within coarse-grained matrices reduces oxygen availability and enhances OC stability. We estimate that at least 6 Tg C of methane-derived OC are preserved annually in surface sediments of the global continental slopes. This process may play a non-negligible role in OC preservation in sediments, reducing methane emission into the atmosphere. This study finds that ancient methane from deep-sea sediments can be trapped as organic carbon in the seafloor’s top layer, highlighting an overlooked ocean carbon sink, which helps to reduce greenhouse gas release from the seafloor.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 深海表层沉积物中古老甲烷衍生有机碳的有效保存

summary_bullets.research_question: 深海表层沉积物中甲烷衍生的古老有机碳如何被高效保存？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对多种甲烷渗漏沉积物进行碳同位素测量与程序升温分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 大量放射性碳耗尽的有机碳来自深部甲烷，通过微生物聚集和物理封闭被有效封存，年均约6 Tg C。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了被忽视的甲烷衍生有机碳高效保存机制及其作为海洋碳汇的作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估深海碳封存和减少甲烷排放的气候效应提供了新机制与定量依据。

works.title: Metallogenic age, material sources, and ore-forming process of the Donggou VMS-type zinc deposit in the Qimantag Area, East Kunlun Orogenic Belt
works.abstract: The Donggou zinc deposit is the first discovered volcanogenic massive sulfide (VMS)-type lead–zinc deposit in the East Kunlun orogen, holding significant scientific value and economic potential. As a newly identified deposit type in the region, key scientific issues such as its metallogenic age, sources of ore-forming materials, ore-forming conditions, and genetic mechanism remain unclear. This study systematically analyzes the major and trace element compositions of sphalerite from different ore-forming stages within the main mineralization period, the in situ S-Pb isotopic characteristics of major metallic sulfides, and zircon U-Pb dating of the host rocks. The aim is to delineate the ore-forming process and elucidate the genetic mechanism of the deposit. Results indicate that the main mineralization period of the Donggou deposit can be divided into three stages: stockwork stage (I), massive sulfide stage (II), and laminated stage (III). The trace element compositions of sphalerite from these stages (Sp1, Sp2, Sp3) show significant differences: Sp1 is relatively enriched in Cu, In, Se, and Co; Sp2 is enriched in Mn, Ag, As, and Pb; and Sp3 is characterized by enrichment in Sb and Ga. Temperature estimates based on the GGIMFIS geothermometer for sphalerite are 314-361°C (avg. 334°C) for Sp1, 296-336°C (avg. 317°C) for Sp2, and 286-334°C (avg. 308°C) for Sp3. Corresponding sulfur fugacity (lg f s 2 ) ranges are −6.79 to −4.93 for Sp1, −7.60 to −5.89 for Sp2, and −8.10 to −6.23 for Sp3. These indicate that the ore-forming fluids were generated under medium‑ to high‑temperature and relatively high sulfur fugacity conditions. From early to late mineralization, temperature remained generally stable, while sulfur fugacity gradually decreased. In situ δ34S values of sulfides (−3.59‰ to 6.24‰) suggest that sulfur was primarily derived from the degassing of a shallow magma chamber or the leaching of wall rocks, with minor incorporation of seawater sulfate sulfur formed via thermochemical sulfate reduction (TSR). Lead isotope compositions of galena (208Pb/204Pb = 37.980–38.021, 207Pb/204Pb = 15.575–15.613, 206Pb/204Pb = 18.210–18.261) display characteristics of a mixture derived from basement and wall rocks. Zircon U-Pb dating of the host rock yields an age of 446 ± 1.5 Ma, indicating that the deposit formed during the Late Ordovician subduction of the Qimantag Ocean. In summary, this study delineates for the first time the metallogenic age, material sources, and evolution of physicochemical conditions of the ore-forming fluids for the Donggou VMS-type zinc deposit, providing a detailed reconstruction of the ore-forming process. These findings are significant for understanding VMS-type mineralization in the East Kunlun orogen and for guiding regional mineral resources exploration.
