works.translated_title: 造山型金系统中浸染状金矿化形成过程中的颗粒尺度渗透率增强与反应流体流动

summary_bullets.research_question: 造山型金矿床中浸染状矿化形成时渗透率增强与反应性流体流动的机制为何？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合构造分析、微观结构观察、全岩地球化学及热力学模拟研究矿化英安岩。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 晶粒尺度微裂隙与矿物反应耦合提升渗透率，硫化反应促成浸染状金沉淀，随后矿物生长封闭渗透性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示无清晰脉网体系中渗透率与反应前锋演化如何控制浸染状矿化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解缺乏明显脉网的造山型金成矿系统提供了新的物理化学过程见解。

works.title: Low Abundances of Ultramafic Components in the Chang'e‐6 Landing Site Basalt and Ejecta Material
works.abstract: Abstract The South Pole‐Aitken (SPA) Basin, the Moon's largest impact structure, holds key insights into lunar evolution, prompting the Chang'e‐6 mission to return first samples for ground‐truth verification. Analysis of over 6,000 grains from the Chang'e‐6 soil returned from the SPA Basin reveals a composition dominated by clinopyroxene (26.5–32.9 vol.%), plagioclase (29.9–33.2 vol.%) and glass (32.4–36.2 vol.%), with low orthopyroxene and olivine contents. This indicates the Chang'e‐6 landing site contains minimal deep mantle components, and the primary ejecta material is plagioclase‐rich. However, laboratory reflectance spectroscopy on the same sample suggests much higher abundances of ultramafic minerals, aligning with previous orbital data. This discrepancy implies that reflectance spectroscopy likely overestimates ultramafic phases, a result attributed to unique farside space weathering including higher solar wind flux in the absence of geomagnetic shielding, and methodological limitations. The findings highlight the necessity of recalibrating spectral models for accurate mineral quantification on the lunar farside.
works.label: followed
works.translated_title: 嫦娥六号着陆点玄武岩及溅射物质中超镁铁质组分的低丰度

summary_bullets.research_question: 月球背面嫦娥六号着陆区是否存在深部月幔超镁铁质组分？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对嫦娥六号返回月壤6128颗颗粒进行矿物定量并结合实验室反射光谱分析
summary_bullets.key_findings: 着陆点月壤以斜长石和单斜辉石为主，橄榄石与斜方辉石极低，缺乏地幔超镁铁质信号
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示月背真实矿物含量与遥感光谱解释存在系统性偏差
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 提醒需修正月背遥感光谱模型以避免高估超镁铁质矿物，影响地月演化认知

works.title: Mesozoic continental crustal growth: A comprehensive review of the accretion-arc system in the Jilin-Heilongjiang high-pressure belt
works.abstract: The development of accretion-arc systems represents a fundamental mechanism of continental crustal growth and records key tectonic transitions during oceanic plate subduction. The Jilin-Heilongjiang High-Pressure Belt, eastern segment of the Central Asian Orogenic Belt, constitutes a classic accretion-arc system and provides an exceptional site for investigating geodynamic evolution. This review synthesizes geochronological, geochemical, deep seismic reflection, and magnetotelluric data, combined with other typical cases, to reveal the structural characteristics, formation mechanism, and continental growth geodynamic of the accretion-arc systems. Available geochronological constraints indicate that the protoliths of both the Zhangguangcai Complex and Heilongjiang Complex formed predominantly during the Permian and underwent successive metamorphism in the Early Jurassic, implying a unified tectonic regime linked to the evolution of the Heilongjiang Ocean. Arc-related magmatism displays typical subduction-related geochemical affinities, but is distinguished by relatively low 87Sr/86Sr ratios and high positive zircon εHf(t) values, reflecting substantial input from juvenile subduction-accretionary materials and marking the transition from accretionary growth to arc magmatism. Integrated seismic reflection and magnetotelluric imaging reveal imbricated, small-scale, short-arc reflectors with high resistivity beneath the accretionary complexes, underlain by mid-lower crustal high-conductivity, anti-U-shaped reflectors interpreted as deep-seated arc magmatic systems. These observations indicate that the Jilin-Heilongjiang High-Pressure Belt preserves a complete evolutionary sequence from accretionary wedge formation to arc magmatism. The fundamental geodynamic mechanism was dominated by prolonged low-angle westward subduction and subsequent plate rollback of the young Heilongjiang Ocean. Voluminous inputs of juvenile material underscore the critical role of accretion-arc systems in continental crustal growth.

works.translated_title: 中生代大陆地壳生长：吉林-黑龙江高压带增生弧体系的综合评述

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示吉林-黑龙江高压带增生-弧系统如何驱动中生代大陆地壳生长
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合地质年代学、地球化学、深地震反射与大地电磁成像及典型案例对比
summary_bullets.key_findings: 该带完整记录了增生楔到弧岩浆的演化，受黑龙江洋低角度俯冲与回滚控制
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用多地球物理与地球化学方法联合揭示增生-弧系统的三维结构与演变
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为中亚造山带地壳生长和俯冲带动力学研究提供了关键实例与新模式

works.title: Origin of negative Δ33S anomalies and Δ36S–Δ33S trends in 3700 Ma Isua sulfides: Searching for evidence of Eoarchean life in dolomitic meta-sedimentary rocks
works.abstract: Proof of life in the oldest rock record is complex and at the limit of current scientific capabilities. However, investigations using the covariation between minor isotopes of sulfur (Δ33S and Δ36S) reveals the potential of using the sulfur isotope system to discriminate between biologically-influenced and entirely non-biological signatures. This paper reports new in-situ four sulfur isotope data measured on rare pyrite grains in Isua supracrustal belt (Greenland) 3700 Ma metamorphosed dolomitic rocks with primary sedimentary structures. The sulfide grains have negative Δ33S and positive Δ36S values indicative of photolytic sulfate as their primary sulfur source. The limited spread in δ34S values relative to an inferred Archean seawater sulfate reservoir, along with covariation between the minor sulfur isotopes (Δ33S and Δ36S) can be modelled by microbial sulfate reduction under conditions of low sulfate concentration (<100 μM). Potential abiogenic origins for these signatures are also considered, but they either fail to reproduce the observed sulfur isotope relationships or require reaction conditions or sulfur sources that are difficult to reconcile with the geological context of the Isua meta-dolomitic rocks. Our findings reinforce earlier interpretations that these pyrite-bearing dolomitic meta-sedimentary rocks have rare primary sedimentary structures preserved along with trace-element signatures indicative of biomediation in a marine-like environment. Collectively, these observations support microbial sulfate reduction as a coherent and geologically reasonable interpretation for the observed sulfur isotopic patterns when considered alongside the petrographic, sedimentological, and geochemical context. In this framework, the Isua sulfur isotope data would extend the documented record of microbial sulfate reduction by more than 200 million years, to ca. 3700 Ma, and provide one of the earliest geochemical constraints on the evolution of microbial sulfur metabolisms.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 3700百万年伊苏瓦硫化物中负Δ33S异常与Δ36S–Δ33S趋势的成因：在白云质变沉积岩中探寻始太古代生命的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 伊苏阿变质白云岩中硫化物异常Δ33S负值和Δ36S–Δ33S趋势是生物还是非生物成因？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用原位四硫同位素分析技术测定黄铁矿的δ34S、Δ33S、Δ36S值并结合微量元素和岩相学背景。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 负Δ33S和正Δ36S值指示光解硫酸盐参与，同位素关系可藉低硫酸盐浓度微生物硫酸盐还原模型解释。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在约37亿年变沉积岩中运用Δ33S–Δ36S协变关系区分生物与非生物硫代谢过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 将微生物硫酸盐还原的地质记录延长逾2亿年，为早期生命演化和硫循环提供关键地球化学约束。

works.title: Neoarchean sanukitoids, metavolcanic rocks and TTGs of the northern Yangtze Craton, China: Insights into petrogenesis and crust-mantle interactions
works.abstract: The northern part of the Yangtze Craton is one of the few regions in present-day South China with geological records dating back to the Archean. However, the geodynamic processes of Neoarchean continental crust formation and evolution in the northern Yangtze Craton remain poorly understood. In this study, we investigated four primary lithological assemblages from the Yudongzi Complex and Douling Complex in the northern Yangtze Craton and analyzed their petrogenesis. (1) The ~2.7 Ga Yudongzi meta-andesites exhibit typical characteristics of high-Mg andesites (HMAs) and originated from partial melting of a depleted mantle wedge metasomatized by fluids and sediment-derived melts. (2) The ~2.53 Ga Douling amphibolites display arc-type geochemical signatures and were derived from partial melting of a fluid-metasomatized depleted mantle wedge. (3) The ~2.5 Ga Douling tonalite–trondhjemite–granodiorite (TTG) gneisses are characterized by high Mg# values (45–57), elevated Cr (26–42 ppm) and Ni (19–31 ppm) concentrations, and positive zircon ɛHf(t) (+5.3 to +8.5) and whole-rock ɛNd(t) (−0.1 to +2.9) values. These features suggest that they formed via partial melting of a subducted oceanic slab. (4) The ~2.5 Ga Douling dioritic gneisses and quartz dioritic gneisses exhibit characteristics typical of Archean sanukitoids and formed by partial melting of a mantle wedge metasomatized by fluids and melts derived from sediments and oceanic slabs. These findings, together with the presence of contemporaneous subduction-related rocks in the northern Yangtze Craton, suggest that slab subduction was the dominant geodynamic process responsible for Neoarchean magmatism and continental crust formation in the region. Moreover, on the basis of thermodynamic and trace element simulations, the estimated partial melting P–T conditions for the slab-derived TTGs were approximately 1.2 GPa and 830 °C. This corresponds to geothermal gradients of ~19–22 °C/km, suggesting a warm and intermittent subduction environment during the Neoarchean in the northern Yangtze Craton.
works.label: consider

summary_bullets.research_question: 扬子克拉通北部新太古代大陆地壳形成与演化的地球动力学过程为何？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对鱼洞子和陡岭杂岩中四类岩石进行全岩地球化学、锆石Hf-O同位素及热力学模拟分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 新太古代岩浆作用以板块俯冲为主，形成了高镁安山岩、弧型角闪岩、TTG片麻岩及赞岐岩类。
summary_bullets.innovation: 通过温压模拟首次定量约束扬子克拉通北部新太古代俯冲板片熔融条件为1.2 GPa/830°C。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为太古宙壳幔相互作用和早期大陆生长机制提供了关键岩石成因与构造背景约束。

works.title: Widespread ancient bedrock landslide deposits facilitate deep weathering for storage and access of organic carbon
works.abstract: Soils have been proposed as a tool to reduce atmospheric carbon dioxide (CO 2 ). However, sparse field data and soil databases that do not account for geomorphic controls on soil properties hinder accurate quantification of soil organic carbon (SOC) dynamics at the watershed scale. In mountainous terrain, relict landslide deposits are common and feature thick (>5 m), weathered profiles with substantial SOC below the typically measured top 30 cm of soil. We generated a SOC-age relationship using a landslide chronosequence in Western Oregon where these landforms are abundant. We applied our relationships to an inventory of nearly 10,000 previously dated landslides and show that deep SOC stocks constitute ~70% of the total stock for landslides >41.8 thousand years. Our findings also show that SOC stocks associated with deep-seated landslides are >2× larger than estimates from a global model that does not account for geomorphic controls. These results suggest that geomorphology can improve our ability to quantify SOC stocks and could inform watershed management.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 广泛分布的古老基岩滑坡沉积物促进深层风化，有利于有机碳的储存与获取

summary_bullets.research_question: 地形对深层土壤有机碳储量的控制作用如何影响流域尺度碳动态的准确量化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过俄勒冈州西部滑坡年代序列建立土壤有机碳-年龄关系，应用于近万个已知年代滑坡的清查数据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 古老深层滑坡的深层有机碳储量占总储量约70%，且比忽略地形控制的全球模型估计值大两倍以上。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用滑坡地貌年代序列揭示深层风化剖面中大量有机碳的长久储存与地形过程的关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为改进全球土壤碳模型和流域管理提供了地形地貌控制因素的关键定量证据。

works.title: Large CO2 seeps and hydrate field on the seafloor offshore Mayotte Island
works.abstract: Gas hydrates modulate methane and carbon dioxide benthic fluxes into the ocean and usually occur embedded in the sediment. Here we use acoustic surveys alongside optical and geochemical observations from remotely operated vehicles to show that CO2 hydrate mounds are forming directly on the seafloor atop a large liquid CO2 vent field offshore Mayotte Island. The venting, which initiated following volcanic activity in 2018, deleteriously impacts surrounding coral communities due to local acidification. Carbon dioxide hydrates on the seafloor are sustained by the venting of liquid CO2 associated with volcanic activity near Mayotte Island, according to observations from remotely operated vehicles and geochemical analyses.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 马约特岛近海海底大型二氧化碳渗漏与水合物区

summary_bullets.research_question: 海底液态CO₂渗漏区上方如何直接形成并维持水合物丘？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合多波束声学调查与ROV光学及地球化学观测。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现大规模海底液态CO₂喷口上方直接形成CO₂水合物丘，由2018年火山活动驱动，造成局部酸化并损害珊瑚群落。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次报道海底表面直接形成CO₂水合物丘，而非沉积物内赋存。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为深海碳封存、海底水合物动力学与火山CO₂排放的生态效应提供关键现场证据。

works.title: Biomechanical evidence for occupational specialization in Mesolithic-Neolithic hunter-gatherers from Zvejnieki, Latvia
works.abstract: Mesolithic cemeteries have greater dimensionality and scale that reflect emerging social complexity following the Upper Paleolithic. The Zvejnieki cemetery dates between the Middle Mesolithic and Late Neolithic, is associated with a persistent hunter-fisher-gatherer economy, and includes burials with pendants fashioned from mammal teeth. Stable isotopic analyses indicate dietary differences between individuals with pendants and without pendants beginning early in life. This context provides an opportunity to explore questions relating to occupational specialization using long bone cross-sectional geometry. Femoral cross-sectional properties from Zvejnieki were compared to a European database from the Upper Paleolithic to Neolithic to explore mobility. Femoral and humeral cross-sectional properties were compared between individuals with and without pendants to understand differences in mobility and manual activity in relation to mortuary practices. Diminished femoral rigidity and circular femoral shape were found at Zvejnieki, but no differences were observed between burial groups. Expanded cortical area and diminished medullary area were observed in the right humeri of males with pendants. Right humeral shape was comparatively circular among males with pendants, while right and left humeral shape was anteroposteriorally reinforced among males without pendants. Females with pendants had elevated right and left humeral shape ratios compared to females without pendants. Femoral morphology reflects reduced mobility, interaction with flat terrain, and exploitation of abundant, local resources at Zvejnieki. Differences in humeral cross-sectional properties between burial groups are consistent with specialized manual activity. These patterns reflect the economic and ideological components of independent specialization and point toward expanding social dimensions in Mesolithic-Neolithic hunter-gatherers.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 拉脱维亚兹维涅基中石器至新石器时代狩猎采集者职业分工的生物力学证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨拉脱维亚Zvejnieki中石器至新石器时代狩猎采集者是否存在职业专门化及其与墓葬饰品差异的关联。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用股骨和肱骨横截面几何形态分析，与欧洲旧石器至新石器时代数据库对比，结合稳定同位素数据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 带齿饰男性右肱骨皮质区扩大、髓腔缩小、形状较圆；无饰男性肱骨前后强化；股骨反映低移动性，但葬群间无差异。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过肢骨生物力学与墓葬饰品关联，揭示狩猎采集社会独立专门化的经济与意识形态维度。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解前农业社会复杂性提供直接生物力学证据，对考古学与社会演变研究具有重要参考价值。

works.title: Deep mantle reservoirs of recycled surface carbonates revealed by Mg-Sr-Nd-Pb isotopes in continental basalts
works.abstract: Deep carbon recycling plays a pivotal role in redistributing carbon among the Earth’s internal reservoirs and modulating global climate over geological timescales. However, the depth at which subducted carbon is stored in the deep mantle, and the dynamics of its recycling remain poorly constrained. Subducted carbonates, typically characterized by lower δ26Mg values relative to the ambient mantle, make magnesium isotopes a powerful tracer for identifying recycled carbonates in mantle-derived rocks. In Eastern China, widespread Cenozoic basaltic volcanism is thought to be driven by hot and/or hydrous upwellings originating from the mantle transition zone (MTZ). Here, we present new Mg isotope data for Cenozoic basalts from Southeast China. Through a comprehensive comparison of Mg-Sr-Nd-Pb isotopic and elemental compositions of basalts from both Northeast and Southeast China, we identify distinct mechanisms of deep carbon recycling beneath the two regions. The low δ26Mg values observed in the Northeast China basalts are attributed to contributions from eclogites metamorphosed predominantly from ancient carbonated sediments stored within the MTZ. In contrast, the recycled carbon signatures in Southeast China basalts were derived mainly from eclogites metamorphosed from dehydrated oceanic crust, with only minor contributions from recycled sediments stored in the MTZ and possibly the deeper mantle. Considering the contrasting tectonic evolutions of Northeast and Southeast China since the Mesozoic, we propose a dynamic link between western Pacific Plate subduction and regionally distinct deep carbon cycling processes. Continuous subduction of the western Pacific Plate has formed a hydrous, carbonate-rich mantle domain beneath Northeast China, where fluid-induced partial melting acts as the key mechanism for carbon recycling. Conversely, dense, dehydrated carbonated eclogite fragments preserved in the deep mantle beneath Southeast China are difficult to ascend on their own, with local thermal upwellings providing the necessary dynamics for magma ascent. Our findings highlight that mantle hydration critically influences the efficiency of deep carbon recycling back to the surface through volcanism, with broader implications for the long-term stability of Earth’s carbon cycle
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 大陆玄武岩中的镁-锶-钕-铅同位素揭示深部地幔中再循环表层碳酸盐储库

summary_bullets.research_question: 俯冲碳在地幔中的储存深度及再循环动态如何约束？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过Mg-Sr-Nd-Pb同位素和元素组成系统对比中国东北与东南新生代玄武岩。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 东北低δ26Mg源自MTZ中古老碳酸盐化沉积物，东南主要来自脱水洋壳榴辉岩。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示地幔水化程度控制深部碳再循环效率，制约火山碳释放。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地球长期碳循环稳定性及全球气候调控机制提供关键约束。

works.title: Lithospheric Melting and Gold Mineralization in the Southwestern Cathaysia Block: Constraints From Magnetotelluric Evidence
works.abstract: Abstract Mesozoic Paleo‐Pacific plate subduction was dominant and drove intense continental reworking in South China, coupled with voluminous magmatism and episodic mineralization events. However, the lack of detailed geophysical constraints on the lithospheric architecture of southwestern Cathaysia Block hinders resolution of its alteration mechanisms and metallogenic evolution. We acquired magnetotelluric array data at 82 sites across southwestern Cathaysia Block, constraining the lithospheric resistivity architecture of this region. Integrating laboratory measurements of mantle minerals, broadband seismic data, and geothermal constraints, we quantitatively constrain the origin of lithospheric mantle conductivity anomalies. Research findings indicate that the crust in the study area is predominantly characterized by a high‐resistivity background, interspersed with linear conductive anomalies spatially correlated with fault zones. The conductive features in the lithospheric mantle likely result from the combined effects of partial melting and water in the mantle. Based on the regional tectonic framework, we propose that water released from previously subducted slabs and associated metasomatism weakened the lithosphere, potentially leading to delamination of the lithospheric root. This process, accompanied by slab collapse, triggered asthenospheric upwelling and thermo‐mechanical perturbations. Thermal erosion by the upwelling asthenosphere facilitated decompression melting within the thinned lithospheric mantle and the overlying, extended crust. The Paleo‐Pacific subduction system provided the necessary conduits for sourcing and transporting Au‐rich fluids, ultimately facilitating gold mineralization in the study area.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 华夏地块西南部的岩石圈熔融与金成矿作用：大地电磁证据的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 华南华夏地块西南部岩石圈改造机制与金成矿演化如何受控于深部过程？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用82个大地电磁测深阵列数据，结合矿物电导率实验、地震与地热约束构建岩石圈电性结构。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地壳高阻背景中发育受断层控制的线状低阻带，地幔低阻由部分熔融与含水共同引起；古太平洋俯冲导致岩石圈根拆沉和软流圈上涌，触发减压熔融并输送富金流体。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过多学科电性约束揭示该区岩石圈地幔部分熔融与金成矿的耦合关系及深部动力学机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲带岩石圈改造与巨量金成矿的深部驱动过程提供关键地球物理证据，指导区域成矿预测。

works.title: Late oligocene Cu-Mo mineralization at West Zafarghand, Iran: Evidence for a short-lived magmatic-hydrothermal system
works.abstract: This study investigates the magmatic-hydrothermal evolution of the West Zafarghand porphyry CuMo deposit in the central Urumieh-Dokhtar Magmatic Arc (UDMA), Iran using field and petrographic observations, integrated with fluid inclusion microthermometry, TitaniQ thermometry, UPb zircon and Re Os molybdenite geochronology. The deposit is hosted by late Eocene volcanic rocks, intruded by granodiorite and granite porphyries and andesitic dykes swarm. Mineralization includes magnetite-bornite-chalcopyrite and chalcopyrite ± pyrite assemblages, associated with potassic and chlorite-sericite alteration, followed by molybdenite mineralization during transition to phyllic and propylitic, carbonate-bearing alteration. UPb zircon geochronology constrains the volcanic host rocks and the granodiorite porphyry to ca. 34–33 Ma, whereas the granite porphyry and the dykes are late Oligocene in age (ca.24–23 Ma). Overlapping late Oligocene Re Os molybdenite ages indicate a tight genetic link between CuMo mineralization and the emplacement of the younger granitic magmatism. Whole-rock geochemistry indicates derivation from subduction-modified mantle meltsand lower-crust interaction, with the late Oligocene magmatism displaying a weak adakite-like affinity (Sr/Y up to ~50). Fluid inclusion data define fluid evolution at shallow crustal levels, recording early-stage boiling and phase separation, followed by cooling from ~570 °C in potassic stage at ~2.2 km depth to ~217 °C in propylitic alteration at ~1.5 km depth. The study highlights: (i) robust geochronology for constraining magmatism and ore formation; (ii) late-stage, highly fractionated, fertile intrusions with weak adakite-like affinity as responsible for mineralization; (iii) fluid boiling promoted Cu-o mineralization, and fluid neutralization favored molybdenite–carbonate precipitation.

works.translated_title: 伊朗西扎法尔罕德晚渐新世铜-钼成矿作用：短寿命岩浆-热液体系的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 约束西扎法尔甘德铜钼矿床的岩浆热液演化时序与成因联系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用岩相观察、流体包裹体测温、TitaniQ温度计、U-Pb和Re-Os定年方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 矿化与24–23 Ma弱埃达克质花岗岩相关，流体经历沸腾、降温至217°C。
summary_bullets.innovation: 精确厘定短寿命岩浆热液系统的阶段性流体演化与矿化沉淀机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为弧岩浆带晚期富矿岩浆判识和流体控制找矿模型提供定量证据。

works.title: Controls on natural hydrogen generation during serpentinization of mantle rocks
works.abstract: Abstract Mantle rocks undergoing serpentinization can generate significant amounts of natural hydrogen, yet the rates and controlling processes remain poorly understood. Here, we constrain the possible hydrogen generation rates in two distinct mantle rock types, the fertile lherzolites of the Western Pyrenees and the depleted harzburgites of Northern California, to relatively low rates of ~0.1 to ~0.5 tonnes H₂ yr⁻¹ km⁻³ of reactive rock. When integrated over the full reactive volumes, this corresponds to total production rates of ~300 to ~600 tonnes H₂ yr⁻¹. By combining three-dimensional geophysical inversion with numerical modelling of fluid-rock processes, we show that hydrogen generation rates are mainly limited by H₂ saturation in the fluid and reaction kinetics. Under these constraints, hydrogen generation in mantle-derived serpentinization systems proceeds slowly, making rapid large-scale replenishment unlikely and suggesting that large, economically relevant accumulations, would require timescales of thousands to tens of thousands of years to develop.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 地幔岩蛇纹石化过程中天然氢生成的控制因素

summary_bullets.research_question: 地幔岩蛇纹石化过程中自然氢生成速率及控制因素尚不明确。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合三维地球物理反演与流体-岩石过程数值模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 氢生成速率受限于流体中H₂饱和度和反应动力学，大规模聚集需数万至数十万年。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次量化不同地幔岩类型蛇纹石化系统的低速率氢生成及动力学制约。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估自然氢资源的经济性和勘探时间尺度提供关键约束。

works.title: Magmatic-hydrothermal mineralization in central Jiangnan orogenic belt, south China
works.abstract: The central Jiangnan orogenic belt in South China harbors a world-class magmatic-hydrothermal mineralization cluster, encompassing supergiant resources of tungsten (W), lithium (Li), copper (Cu), antimony (Sb), and gold (Au). This review synthesizes geological, geochemical, and geochronological data from key deposits to delineate two genetically distinct mineralization series: (1) A Cu-Au-W series associated with I- to S-type porphyry systems, characterized by potassic alteration and silicification; (2) An Nb-Ta-Li-W-Sn-Cu series linked to the evolution of S- to A-type granites, marked by sodic alteration, fluorine-rich muscovitization, and silicification. We propose a unified metallogenic model in which prolonged and episodic magmatism served dual roles: (i) as the source of granite-related rare metal and tungsten mineralization, and (ii) as the thermal engine driving regional hydrothermal circulation. This circulation leached Sb, U, and Au from Precambrian sedimentary sequences, re-precipitating them in structurally controlled sites as intermediate- to low-temperature vein-type deposits. The formation of these diverse yet genetically related deposits is interpreted as the result of extensive crustal magmatism within a unique extensional tectonic regime. This model provides a robust framework for future mineral exploration targeting in this metallogenic belt.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华南江南造山带中部的岩浆热液成矿作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 华南江南造山带中段巨量钨锂铜锑金成矿的成因机制与成矿系列关系如何？
summary_bullets.methodology: 系统综述关键矿床的地质、地球化学和年代学数据，建立统一成矿模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出两套成因相异的成矿系列，并提出长期幕式岩浆活动既提供物源也驱动热液循环的耦合模型。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出伸展体制下地壳大规模岩浆作用的统一模型，将不同矿种和类型纳入双重成矿机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为华南及其他类似造山带提供了清晰的找矿预测框架，具有重要勘探指导价值。

works.title: Limited role of continental arc in crustal growth: Insights from zircon U-Pb ages and Lu-Hf isotopes of late Paleozoic granitoid plutons from the northern North China Craton
works.abstract: Continental arcs have been proposed as major sites of continental crust generation because their calc-alkaline compositions resemble those of the bulk continental crust. However, the actual contribution of continental arc magmatism to crustal growth remains highly debated. Here, we present integrated zircon U-Pb ages and Lu-Hf isotopes from sixteen samples of late Paleozoic granitoid plutons from the northern margin of the North China Craton (NCC) to evaluate the role of continental arcs in crustal growth. The plutons yield crystallization ages of 315–272 Ma and contain abundant inherited zircons with ages of ~2.5 Ga and ~ 1.9–1.8 Ga, corresponding to major tectonothermal events in the NCC basement. Magmatic zircons show predominantly negative εHf(t) values ranging from −20.6 ± 0.3 to −6.0 ± 0.4 and two-stage Hf model ages of 1.6–2.8 Ga, indicating derivation from ancient crustal sources. Simple binary Hf isotope mixing calculations indicate that the melt requires a dominant crustal component, with juvenile mantle-derived material contributing no more than 37% for the least evolved pluton (the Daguangding pluton) and < 18% for the other plutons. Large inter-pluton but limited intra-pluton Hf isotopic variations (less than 5 ε units, mostly <3 ε units) are best explained by source heterogeneity within the NCC lower crust, involving variable proportions of Neoarchean and Paleoproterozoic crustal domains. Our results demonstrate that late Paleozoic continental arc magmatism represents large-scale reworking of Archean-Paleoproterozoic crust with minimal addition of juvenile mantle-derived material. Comparison of the Gangdese arc, the Andean arc, and the northern NCC shows that continental arcs built on ancient cratons contribute little to crustal growth, and that post-Archean continental crust formed mainly in oceanic arcs prior to arc–continent collision. Continental arc magmatism primarily reworks and homogenizes pre-existing continental crust rather than producing new crust.

works.translated_title: 大陆弧在地壳生长中的有限作用：来自华北克拉通北部晚古生代花岗岩类岩体的锆石U-Pb年龄和Lu-Hf同位素启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 大陆弧岩浆作用对地壳生长的实际贡献有多大？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对华北克拉通北缘晚古生代花岗岩类进行锆石U-Pb定年和Lu-Hf同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆主要源自古老地壳的重熔，新生幔源物质贡献极低（<18–37%）。
summary_bullets.innovation: 定量揭示大陆弧在古老克拉通边缘主要以地壳改造而非新生地壳生长为主。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为大陆地壳生长机制争论提供关键同位素证据，明确陆弧的有限贡献。

works.title: Differential exhumation between coastal and inland Cathaysia Block: Implications for tectonic evolution and porphyry Cu preservation in South Fujian, SE China
works.abstract: The Late Mesozoic–Cenozoic tectonic evolution of the South China Block was intimately related with the subduction of the Paleo-Pacific Plate. To constrain Late Mesozoic–Cenozoic exhumation and its implications for porphyry deposits preservation in southeastern China, we conducted integrated geo-thermochronological analyses, including zircon and apatite U-Pb and (U-Th)/He dating, as well as apatite fission-track analysis, on intrusive and volcanic rocks from the Da-Xiao Fanshan region, a coastal area characterized by intense magmatic-hydrothermal activity. Zircon and apatite U-Pb data reveal two distinct Early Cretaceous magmatic episodes at ca. 145–134 Ma and 111–106 Ma. Thermochronological data and thermal history modeling indicate a phase of relatively accelerated cooling and exhumation from the Late Cretaceous to the Middle Eocene through the shallow crust level (1–7 km). Combined with published data from the Zijinshan ore field, the results define a systematic, coastward-pronounced exhumation pattern, with rates increasing from 0.05–0.09 km/Ma to 0.09–0.13 km/Ma since the Late Cretaceous. In contrast to the Zijinshan ore field, where moderate exhumation and optimal volcanic cover thickness facilitated exposure of the porphyry Cu-Au deposits, the Da-Xiao Fanshan region, despite experiencing more intense exhumation, are either exhumed to shallow levels or remain preserved at depth beneath a thick Cretaceous volcanic cover. This geological setting is therefore favorable for the preservation of concealed porphyry deposits.

works.title: Fluid physicochemical conditions and critical element enrichment mechanisms of the Yinkeng Pb-Zn-Ag deposit in the eastern Jiangnan Orogen, South China
works.abstract: The eastern segment of the Jiangnan Orogen, South China, hosts significant polymetallic Zn-Pb-Ag mineralization related to its complex multi-stage tectonic and magmatic history. The genesis of recently discovered Yinkeng vein-type Pb-Zn-Ag deposit remains poorly constrained, which has hindered a comprehensive understanding of the regional Zn-Pb-Ag metallogenic mechanisms. This study integrates detailed geological investigation, fluid inclusion Raman and microthermometry, and in-situ LA-ICP-MS trace element analysis of sulfides to characterize the ore-forming processes and critical metal endowment of the Yinkeng deposit. Our results reveal that Yinkeng sphalerite is enriched in Fe, Mn, and Cd (up to 17.6 wt%, 2.5 wt%, and 1.1 wt%, respectively) but depleted in Ga and Ge. These elements (Fe, Mn, Cd) are incorporated primarily via isomorphous substitution for Zn2+. Galena is significantly enriched in Ag and Sb, which enter the crystal lattice mainly through coupled substitution for Pb2+, with aggregates of discrete Ag-bearing minerals also present. Fluid inclusion data and sphalerite geochemistry indicate that mineralization occurred from a reduced, high-temperature (ca. 283.8–397.5 °C) hydrothermal fluid with low to moderate sulfur fugacity (log10fS2 in the range of − 8.38 to − 10.72). These conditions promoted the enrichment of Mn and Cd, while a decrease in sulfur fugacity during the middle stage facilitated Ag enrichment in the galena and the precipitation of discrete silver minerals such as freibergite and argentite. The trace element signatures (e.g., low Cd/Fe and Cd/Mn ratios of sphalerite, Co/Ni ratios of pyrrhotite) suggest that the Yinkeng vein-type mineralization likely represents the distal mineralization of a magmatic hydrothermal system. This study contributes to a refined regional exploration model for Zn-Pb-Ag ± critical mineralization systems within the eastern Jiangnan Orogen.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华南江南造山带东段银坑铅锌银矿床的流体物理化学条件与关键元素富集机制

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示江南造山带东段银坑脉状铅锌银矿床的成因与成矿机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合地质调查、流体包裹体显微测温与拉曼分析、硫化物LA-ICP-MS原位微量元素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 闪锌矿富Fe、Mn、Cd贫Ga、Ge；方铅矿富Ag、Sb；成矿流体为高温还原性，硫逸度降低促进银沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统厘定银坑矿床成矿物理化学条件与关键元素富集过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为区域锌铅银及关键金属勘探提供精细化成矿模型与找矿标志。

works.title: Rapid cooling of magma-rich margins exemplified by the Eastern North American Margin
works.abstract: Abstract Thermal subsidence allows sediment accumulation in passive continental margins, modulating basin development, lithospheric dynamics and Earth-system processes. Classic thermal cooling models underestimate the lithospheric subsidence needed to explain thick early post-rift sedimentary sequences in magma-rich margins. Here we isolate the processes driving this anomalous subsidence at the Eastern North American Margin, a type-example for magma-rich margins. We construct an analytical model simultaneously accounting for non-uniform lithospheric extension, magmatic additions, and variable thermal diffusivity, which controls the rate at which heat spreads through rock. We then calibrate the model parameters against observed sediment and crustal thicknesses across the Baltimore Canyon Trough. Anomalous subsidence can be reconciled if early post-rift lithospheric heat transport is up to 60% faster than typically assumed, particularly at the distal margin edge. We propose that this increase represents hydrothermal fluid circulation enhancing lithospheric cooling during early post-rift periods, offering a new perspective on continental margin evolution.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 以东缘北美边缘为例的富岩浆边缘快速冷却过程

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何解释岩浆型被动陆缘早期裂后异常快速的构造沉降？
summary_bullets.methodology: 构建解析模型，同时考虑非均匀岩石圈伸展、岩浆添加和可变热扩散率，并利用巴尔的摩峡谷海槽观测数据校准参数。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 早期裂后岩石圈热传输比经典假设快60%可调和异常沉降，尤其在远端边缘。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提出热液流体循环增强早期裂后冷却，从而解释岩浆型边缘的快速热沉降。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为大陆边缘演化和盆地模拟提供新机制，修正了经典热冷却模型的不足。

works.title: Subcellular metallomic networks orchestrate physiological outcomes: Single-cell mapping via an integrated SEM-FIB-TOF-SIMS platform
works.abstract: The spatial organization of essential, nonessential, and toxic metal(loid) elements (MEs) within plant cells underpins physiological function. Yet, comprehensive subcellular imaging of the full ME spectrum remains challenging due to trade-offs among spatial resolution, elemental coverage, and structural correlation. Here, we present an integrated scanning electron microscopy–focused ion beam–time-of-flight-secondary ion mass spectrometry platform that overcomes these limitations by achieving nanoscale coregistration of ultrastructure with ME distribution. Applying this high-fidelity workflow to Arabidopsis , soybean, and wheat, we constructed single-cell metallome maps revealing an evolutionarily conserved subcellular architecture: chloroplasts enrich essential MEs (e.g., magnesium, iron, copper), whereas vacuoles compartmentalize nonessential [e.g., lanthanum (La)] and toxic MEs [e.g., cadmium (Cd), lead, arsenic]. We demonstrate that while this architecture remains stable under homeostasis, it undergoes dynamic, stimulus-specific, and dose-dependent remodeling under stress. Low-dose La(III) enhances pairwise and higher-order colocalizations of essential MEs within chloroplasts, correlating with improved photosynthetic efficiency and growth. High-dose La(III) induces nonphysiological La-ME associations and, critically, drives aberrant Cd(II) accumulation in chloroplasts—revealing a cross-toxicity mechanism wherein La(III) disrupts native sequestration barriers. In contrast, although high-dose Cd(II) is largely excluded from chloroplasts, it triggers a widespread redistribution of essential MEs, progressively eroding spatial organization. Thus, while both ions inhibit growth, they perturb metallomic networks via distinct mechanisms: La(III)-mediated disruption of sequestration vs. Cd(II)-induced systemic compartmental collapse. Our findings establish that subcellular ME networks are dynamically regulated and orchestrate physiological outcomes.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 亚细胞金属组网络调控生理结果：基于集成SEM-FIB-TOF-SIMS平台的单细胞图谱

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何在保持超微结构关联的前提下，对植物细胞内全谱金属元素的亚细胞分布进行纳米级成像？
summary_bullets.methodology: 开发集成扫描电镜、聚焦离子束与飞行时间二次离子质谱（SEM-FIB-TOF-SIMS）的高保真单细胞成像平台。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 必需金属元素富集于叶绿体，非必需/有毒金属元素隔离于液泡，胁迫下该网络发生离子特异性且剂量依赖的动态重塑。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次实现纳米级分辨率下超微结构与全谱元素分布的同位配准，构建单细胞金属组网络图谱。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为植物金属稳态、交叉毒性机制及胁迫响应的空间调控研究提供了变革性工具和全新认知框架。

works.title: Prediction of sulfur-iron redox systematics during mantle wedge metasomatism by slab fluids
works.abstract: Chemical mass transfer in subduction zones is a fundamental aspect of plate tectonics on Earth, driving arc magmatism and the recycling of subducted materials to the surface. The reactive mechanisms between aqueous fluids released by slab dehydration and mantle minerals are not well understood, but are likely associated with the transfer of redox potential, which may explain the generally oxidized character of arc magmas. Here we use the Deep Earth Water (DEW) model to perform mass transfer calculations of sulfur-saturated slab fluids at variably oxidized conditions (FMQ + 1 to FMQ + 2) reacting with garnet lherzolite assemblages. Fe3+-bearing multi-component phases are considered in DEW calculations for the first time, including Fe-Ti-Cr-Mg-Al oxides (ilmenite and spinel solid solutions), as well as clinopyroxene (acmite, NaFe3+Si2O6; esseneite, CaFe3+AlSiO6) and garnet (andradite, Ca3Fe3+ 2Si3O12) components. Fluid-rock reaction heating paths are calculated at fixed pressure (2 and 3 GPa) and temperature increasing from 650 to 950°C. At those subarc conditions, sulfate is very efficient at oxidizing iron and producing overall oxidized mineral products after reaction with the depleted mantle, whereas CO2-rich fluids cause only marginal oxidation. Modeled Fe2O3 contents in spinel, clinopyroxene and garnet match those of natural data from variably metasomatized xenoliths. Modeled bulk rock Fe2O3 contents are also similar to those of oxidized arc xenoliths. Furthermore, despite oxidizing significant quantities of mantle iron, predicted fluids remain sulfate-rich owing to very high initial sulfur solubilities. This implies that mantle metasomatism with sulfur-rich, oxidized slab fluids could lead to arc magmas with sulfur budgets and isotopic compositions dominated by recycled subducted sulfur. We further show that our predicted concentrations of sulfur in slab fluids are generally consistent with the global fluxes of water and sulfur in and out of subduction zones.

summary_bullets.research_question: 俯冲带板片流体交代地幔楔过程中硫-铁氧化还原系统如何演化和控制弧岩浆氧化性？
summary_bullets.methodology: 使用DEW模型计算不同氧逸度下含硫流体与石榴石二辉橄榄岩的反应路径。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 硫酸盐流体高效氧化地幔铁形成氧化矿物，流体仍保持富硫，主导弧岩浆硫预算。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在DEW计算中纳入Fe³⁺的多元矿物相，包括尖晶石、辉石和石榴石固溶体。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 阐明俯冲带氧化还原转移机制，为弧岩浆氧化性和硫再循环提供定量模型依据。

works.title: How subduction evolution drives sediment-hosted mineralisation along craton edges
works.abstract: Abstract Sediment-hosted mineral deposits cluster near craton edges, yet the geodynamic factors influencing this concentration remain poorly understood. To investigate the tectonic and geodynamic controls on craton-edge mineralisation, we integrate a 1.8 Ga global plate motion model with craton-edge mapping from full-waveform seismic tomography, geodynamic modelling, and a global mineral deposit database. Here we show that mineralised craton edges consistently cluster 800–1800 km from subduction zones at the time of formation, with some as far away as ~3000 km—a spatial pattern distinct from random craton-edge locations. Geodynamic models show that subduction generates broad mantle return-flow cells that focus lithospheric stress, strain, and weakening at comparable distances from the trench. We propose that this mechanically driven weakening promotes rifting, enhances permeability, and facilitates the infiltration of slab-derived volatiles, thereby preconditioning the lithosphere for metallogenesis. These results identify subduction–craton coupling as a first-order control on sediment-hosted mineral systems across multiple supercontinent cycles and provide a predictive geodynamic framework for understanding the distribution of continental resources through deep time.Subduction near cratons fosters conditions that enrich the mantle and promote mineral formation along craton edges.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 俯冲演化如何驱动克拉通边缘的沉积物容矿成矿作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 沉积物赋存矿床为何聚集在克拉通边缘，其地球动力学控制因素是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合18亿年全球板块运动模型、全波形地震层析成像、地球动力学模拟和全球矿床数据库。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 矿化克拉通边缘距俯冲带800–1800公里，地幔回流聚焦应力弱化岩石圈并促进挥发分渗透。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示俯冲-克拉通耦合是控制沉积矿床分布的一级机制，提供跨超大陆旋回的预测框架。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为深时尺度大陆资源分布提供预测性地球动力学模型，对矿产勘探和环境评估具有应用价值。

works.title: Magmatism and gold mineralization in the Tianmashan skarn deposit, Tongling district, China
works.abstract: Skarn gold deposits constitute an important gold resource in China, and numerous porphyry-skarn Cu-Au and skarn Au systems distributed along the Middle-Lower Yangtze River Metallogenic Belt. However, the genesis of gold-dominant skarn systems in this region remains poorly constrained. The Tianmashan gold deposit, the largest skarn Au deposit in the Tongling district, provides an excellent opportunity to investigate the processes responsible for gold mineralization. This study integrates zircon and garnet U-Pb geochronology, whole-rock geochemistry, zircon Hf isotopes, and sulfide sulfur isotope and trace-element data to constrain the timing, magma source, and ore-forming processes. LA-ICP-MS U-Pb dating of magmatic zircon and hydrothermal garnet yields ages of 137.1 ± 1.0 Ma and 137.1 ± 2.8 Ma, respectively, indicating that magmatism and gold mineralization were coeval during the Early Cretaceous. The quartz diorite porphyry exhibits adakitic geochemical characteristics, indicating derivation from partial melting of a thickened lower crust. Low zircon εHf(t) values (−18.9 to −12.0) further suggest involvement of both juvenile and ancient crustal components, with the juvenile lower crust likely serving as an important metal reservoir for the ore-forming magmas. Zircon oxybarometry indicates elevated magmatic oxygen fugacity (ΔFMQ + 0.9 to + 4.3), which was likely enhanced by the input of oxidized mantle-derived magma during crust–mantle magma mixing. Sulfide trace element and sulfur isotope data indicate that the ore-forming fluids were dominantly magmatic-hydrothermal, with a limited contribution from sedimentary-derived fluids during the late-stage mineralization. Gold was primarily sourced from magmatic-hydrothermal fluids, whereas the formation of the interlayer replacement-type orebodies was likely facilitated by mixing between magmatic-hydrothermal fluids and sedimentary-derived fluids. Such fluid mixing may have lowered the oxidation state of the hydrothermal system and promoted gold precipitation.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国铜陵地区天马山矽卡岩矿床的岩浆作用与金成矿

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究长江中下游天马山矽卡岩金矿床中金成矿的成因机制与关键控制因素。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锆石与石榴石U-Pb定年、全岩地球化学、锆石Hf同位素及硫化物硫同位素与微量元素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆与金矿化同期发生于约137 Ma，成矿流体以岩浆热液为主，流体混合降氧促金沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用热液石榴石精确厘定成矿年龄，揭示岩浆-热液与沉积流体混合对金沉淀的作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为区域金主导矽卡岩矿床的成矿过程与找矿提供了重要年代学和成因约束。

works.title: Deep mantle plume origin of oceanic intraplate volcanism
works.abstract: Volcanism far from tectonic plate margins provides important insights into the dynamic evolution of Earth’s interior. On oceanic plates, an age-progressive volcanic seamount chain is generally attributed to the plate moving over a mantle plume. However, many seamounts are spatially scattered without clear age progression, so their relationship to deep mantle processes has been contentious. Here we show from numerical modelling that all seamounts—with or without age progression—are produced by deep plume-related activity. Specifically, we present a high-resolution mantle convection model with data assimilation simulating the thermal evolution of the mantle from 270 Ma, which we use to reconstruct age trends of major hotspot tracks since the Cretaceous. We find that most Cretaceous seamounts in the Pacific Ocean formed above major plume heads ponding beneath the young oceanic plate, where the resulting hot zones fuelled widespread intraplate volcanism without age progression. Subsequently, the ageing and expanding Pacific Plate covered more plume conduits from its shrinking neighbouring plates, forming the observed Cenozoic age-progressive hotspot tracks above the narrow plume tails. In addition, the resulting widespread and long-lived residual thermal anomalies, which we term seamount brewing zones, eventually formed small-volume scattered seamounts. This mechanism offers a unified framework for the formation of intraplate seamounts, substantially expanding the classical mantle plume hypothesis. Most oceanic intraplate volcanism, including seamounts far from mantle hotspots, originates from deep-rooted mantle plumes, according to a data-constrained numerical simulation of the thermal evolution of the mantle over the past 270 million years.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 洋内板内火山活动的深部地幔柱成因

summary_bullets.research_question: 海洋板内火山远离板块边界，那些空间上分散且无年龄递进的海山与深部地幔过程有何关系？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用高分辨率地幔对流数值模拟并同化数据，重建自2.7亿年前以来的地幔热演化历史。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 所有海山均由深部地幔柱活动产生，年轻大洋板块下宽阔的地幔柱头形成无年龄递进的海山，而窄的地幔柱尾产生年龄递进的热点链。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出统一机制将分散无年龄递进海山与年龄递进热点海山均归因于深源地幔柱，拓展了经典地幔柱假说。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为板内火山作用起源提供了新的统一理论框架，有助于理解全球地幔动力学和热点演化。

works.title: Late Neoarchean garnet-biotite gneiss widely distributed in the Wulashan area, northwestern North China Craton: Implications for the late Neoarchean tectonic environment and the origin of ca. 2.45 Ga metamorphic zircons
works.abstract: The late Neoarchean-early Paleoproterozoic garnet-biotite gneiss with high maturity has been identified in some areas of the North China Craton. Determining its exact formation age, distribution range and compositional features is crucial for understanding the process and timing of the preliminary cratonization during the Neoarchean. In this contribution, we report the field geology, SHRIMP UPb zircon dating, NdHf isotopic analysis, and whole-rock geochemical study of meta-sedimentary rocks (mainly garnet-biotite gneiss, named the Daqingshan Supracrustal Rocks) widely distributed in the Wulashan area, west of Daqingshan, northwestern North China Craton. Eleven samples dated reveal that detrital zircons and metamorphic zircons (including recrystallized zircons and overgrowth rims) show large age variations, mostly from 2.57 to 2.4 Ga and 2.5 to 1.9 Ga, respectively, with three samples having metamorphic zircon ages of 2.50–2.48 Ga. The presence of detrital zircons 2.4 Ga) mainly have εHf(t) values of 0 to +9, tDM1(Hf) of 2.8 to 2.5 Ga and tDM2(Hf) of 3.0 to 2.7 Ga. Therefore, the meta-sedimentary rocks of the Daqingshan Supracrustal Rocks are similar in geochemical and NdHf isotopic compositions and detrital zircon age distribution to the early-formed Sanggan Group and TTG rocks, supporting the inference that the detrital materials were mainly derived from a juvenile crustal source predominantly composed of the Sanggan Group and TTG rocks, which would be much larger in distribution range than identified. Combined with previous studies in the Wulashan-Daqingshan area, which indicated that the Sanggan Group and TTG rocks were formed in an oceanic or oceanic island arc environment, the tectonic environment in the area has undergone significant changes from immature ocean or oceanic island arc to mature continental crust during the short period of the late Neoarchean (2.55–2.50 Ga).
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华北克拉通西北部乌拉山地区广泛分布的新太古代晚期石榴石-黑云母片麻岩：对新太古代晚期构造环境及约2.45 Ga变质锆石成因的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 确定乌拉山地区晚新太古代石榴石-黑云母片麻岩的形成时代、分布和物源，以揭示新太古代构造环境及克拉通化过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用野外地质调查、SHRIMP锆石U-Pb定年、Nd-Hf同位素及全岩地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 碎屑锆石年龄集中于2.57–2.4 Ga，变质锆石年龄2.5–1.9 Ga，物源主要来自桑干群和TTG岩石，指示2.55–2.50 Ga期间从不成熟弧向成熟陆壳转变。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统限定该区变质沉积岩的物源并揭示晚新太古代短期内由洋弧向陆壳的构造转换。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为华北克拉通新太古代晚期初步克拉通化的时限和机制提供关键约束，对理解早期地壳演化具有重要价值。

works.title: Rare earth element enrichment through multi-stage magmatic differentiation and tectono-metamorphic processes: an example from the Hongcheon carbonatite complex, central Korean Peninsula
works.abstract: This study investigates igneous and metamorphic pathways of Rare Earth Elements (REE) enrichment in the Hongcheon carbonatite complex in the central part of the Korean Peninsula and its tectonic implications. This Fe- and P-rich carbonatite complex hosts an estimated 382,600 tons monazite ore reserve and is compositionally analogous to the world’s largest Mesoproterozoic Bayan Obo carbonatite complex in China. The Hongcheon carbonatite complex comprises four main units: a dolomite carbonatite (DC), a magnetite segment (MS), a phosphate segment (PS), and an aureole of Na-rich fenite. The DC unit shows an orthocumulate texture, composed of medium-grained dolomite with minor calcite, suggesting early stages of carbonatite melt differentiation. Whereas subsequent stages formed magnetite and phosphate-rich melt segments, the Na-rich fenite aureole indicates the expulsion of alkali-rich, especially Na-rich, melt/fluid from the carbonatite melt during crystallization. Our geochemical analyses indicate that interaction between the alkali-rich melt/fluid and the country rock does not result in significant REE concentration. Within the Hongcheon carbonatite complex, the PS hosts REE-rich minerals, such as apatite and monazite, whereas apatite and monazite are largely absent from the DC and MS units except where PS occurs. Textural relationships among minerals in the PS suggest that apatite might have preferentially crystallized in Ca- and P-rich melt. Extensive monazite mineralization occurred through apatite dissolution by fluid-assisted recrystallization under amphibolite facies metasomatic conditions, with subsequent calcite and quartz precipitation in the matrix and fracture-filling veins. These results and published (Permo-)Triassic monazite age data suggest that extensive monazite formation was likely influenced by tectono-metamorphic processes, reflecting later metamorphic overprinting shortly after peak (Permo-)Triassic collisional orogeny in the central Korean Peninsula. Overall, this study highlights that Ca-phosphate melts may have an important role in extracting REEs from carbonatite melt, whereas reactive fluids associated with later tectono-metamorphic events likely influence the redistribution and final mineralogical composition of REE ores (e.g., phosphate, fluoride, etc.) in large carbonatite complexes.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 多阶段岩浆分异与构造-变质过程导致的稀土元素富集：以朝鲜半岛中部洪川碳酸岩杂岩体为例

summary_bullets.research_question: 碳酸岩杂岩中稀土元素富集的岩浆分异与构造变质途径及其构造意义是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过岩相学、全岩地球化学和矿物结构分析，结合已发表的独居石年龄数据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 独居石大规模矿化主要发生在磷灰石溶解和角闪岩相流体交代过程中，受碰撞造山后变质叠加控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示钙磷酸盐熔体提取稀土及后期构造变质流体再分配稀土的关键作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为大型碳酸岩杂岩中磷灰石-独居石型稀土矿床的成因和勘探提供了新的成矿模型。

works.title: Zircon–apatite geochemistry and isotope constraints on VMS fertility in a late cretaceous back-arc basin, Eastern Sakarya Zone, Türkiye
works.abstract: Volcanogenic massive sulphide (VMS) deposits are common in submarine back-arc environments, yet mineralization is unevenly distributed even among volcanic successions formed within the same tectonomagmatic system. Here we investigate felsic volcanic sequences associated with the Murgul VMS district and stratigraphically equivalent barren successions from the Hatila Valley in the Eastern Sakarya Zone, northeastern Türkiye, to evaluate how magma evolution and crustal magma transfer varied between fertile and barren domains within a single Late Cretaceous back-arc basin. Mafic rocks from both domains display comparable juvenile Nd-Hf isotope compositions, with εNd(t) = +1.3 to +3.7 and εHf(t) = +6.8 to +9.8 for Hatila rocks, and εNd(t) = +3.1 to +4.0 and εHf(t) = +8.6 to +10.0 for the Murgul VMS district, together with subduction-modified trace-element signatures, including elevated Th/Yb and Th/Nb ratios. These data indicate broadly similar mantle sources and slab contributions. In contrast, felsic rocks associated with VMS mineralization show restricted whole-rock εNd(t)–εHf(t) variability, with εNd(t) = +3.0 to +3.5 and εHf(t) = +8.3 to +9.2, limited intra-sample zircon εHf(t) dispersion, and coherent zircon trace-element arrays involving U, Th/U, and Nb/Ta versus Hf. Barren felsic suites show broader isotopic and geochemical dispersion, including whole-rock εNd(t) = −9.4 to +0.4, εHf(t) = −11.1 to +5.9, and zircon εHf(t) = −9.2 to +10.2. Zircon oxybarometry indicates broadly overlapping low- to moderately oxidized conditions in barren and fertile suites, with mean ΔFMQ values of +0.79 ± 0.87 and + 0.31 ± 0.34, respectively, suggesting that oxygen fugacity alone did not distinguish fertile from barren systems. Apatite compositions and Nd isotopes broadly parallel the zircon record, with Murgul apatite yielding εNd(t) = +1.6 to +3.6 compared with −1.0 to +2.2 in Hatila apatite. We interpret the fertile domain to reflect coherent juvenile felsic magma evolution, limited open-system crustal modification, and vertically connected magma transfer within a back-arc basin supplied by compositionally similar mafic magmas. These results highlight isotopic focusing, defined here as restricted isotopic dispersion expressed by limited whole-rock Nd-Hf variability and limited intra-sample zircon εHf(t) variation, together with accessory-mineral-scale geochemical coherence, as indicators of magmatic conditions favorable for VMS development in submarine felsic volcanic successions.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 锆石-磷灰石地球化学和同位素对土耳其萨卡里亚带东部晚白垩世弧后盆地VMS成矿潜力的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 为何同一弧后盆地中，相邻的火山序列有的含VMS矿床，有的却不成矿？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对比含矿与无矿火山岩的全岩Nd-Hf同位素、锆石与磷灰石微量元素及同位素组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 含矿长英质岩具有集中且均一的同位素组成和锆石化学阵列，指示垂直连贯的岩浆演化；无矿域显示宽泛的同位素分散和更大开放体系地壳混染。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出“同位素聚焦”概念，即全岩和锆石同位素离散度小、副矿物化学协调，作为VMS成矿有利的岩浆指标。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为海底VMS勘探提供了新的岩浆判别标志，有助于在弧后盆地内高效筛选成矿有利火山序列。

works.title: Seamount volcanism associated with Earth’s basal mantle structures
works.abstract: While seafloor spreading and subduction explain much of the volcanic activity in Earth’s oceans, magmatism occurring within tectonic plate interiors requires a deeper mantle explanation. Various types of oceanic intraplate volcanism, including oceanic plateaus and hotspot-associated seamount chains, have been attributed to plumes rising from the margins of two continent-sized structures termed large low-shear-velocity provinces (LLSVPs) in the lowermost mantle beneath Africa and the Pacific Ocean. Here we analyse seamount catalogues and show that seamount volcanism is more voluminous on seafloor that has passed above a LLSVP. We find that this volcanic enhancement is evident above both LLSVPs, but is greater above the Pacific one and has declined since the mid-Cretaceous. We suggest that weak plumes rising from both LLSVPs interact with oceanic lithosphere to promote seamount volcanism. This process may be enhanced for the Pacific because of elevated mantle temperature, transition zone hydration and/or convective vigour in the Pacific hemisphere. Our findings provide additional support for the hypothesis that plumes carrying heat from the LLSVPs are responsible for most oceanic intraplate volcanism, including dispersed seamounts. This deep mantle connection means that seamount volcanism is sensitive to, and thus may constrain, the time-dependent dynamics of Earth’s deepest mantle. Seamount volcanism is more voluminous where seafloor has passed above a large low-shear-velocity province, consistent with mantle plumes being responsible for most oceanic intraplate volcanism, according to an analysis of seamount catalogues.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 与地球基底地幔结构相关的海山火山活动

summary_bullets.research_question: 大洋板内火山活动是否与深部地幔的大低剪切波速省（LLSVPs）有关联？
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析海山目录，比较海山在跨越LLSVPs的洋底上的体积分布。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 穿过太平洋和非洲LLSVPs的洋底上海山火山更活跃，太平洋一侧更显著且中白垩世后减弱。
summary_bullets.innovation: 定量揭示海山火山活动增强与LLSVPs的空间对应关系及其半球差异。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地幔柱源于LLSVPs驱动板内火山提供支持，并可约束最深部地幔的时变动力学。

works.title: Effects of ionic strength and pH on 18O incorporation kinetics in aqueous carbonate and bicarbonate solutions
works.abstract: Oxygen isotopic composition plays a crucial role in the study of Earth's past climate conditions as well as understanding fluid-mineral reactions. Geochemical models commonly assume oxygen isotopic equilibrium between oxyanions and water. However, this may not be valid if the fluid-mineral reactions proceed more rapidly than isotopic enrichment in solution, where the enrichment rate can be influenced by pH and ionic strength. In this study, we used in-situ Raman spectroscopy to investigate the 18O enrichment kinetics into carbonate and bicarbonate oxyanions using solutions with 18O-enriched water containing different concentrations of NaCl. We report species-specific rates of 18O enrichment as a function of pH and ionic strength. The observed trends reflect expected dissolved CO2 behavior under different chemical conditions indicating that the experiments are following an incorporation reaction during the formation of different dissolved inorganic carbon species. In the carbonate system, increasing ionic strength significantly slows isotope incorporation. In contrast, the bicarbonate system shows a stronger dependence on pH, with minimal ionic strength effect. These findings highlight the distinct roles of pH and ionic strength in governing isotope incorporation kinetics across different dissolved inorganic carbon species. Our results refine our understanding of oxygen isotope behavior in aqueous, inorganic carbon systems, particularly with regards to environmental conditions with fluctuating pH and salinity.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 离子强度和pH对碳酸盐和碳酸氢盐溶液中18O掺入动力学的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: pH和离子强度如何影响碳酸根与碳酸氢根离子在水溶液中的氧同位素富集动力学？
summary_bullets.methodology: 使用原位拉曼光谱测量含不同NaCl浓度的18O富集水溶液中氧同位素掺入速率。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 碳酸盐体系中离子强度显著减缓同位素掺入，而碳酸氢盐体系更依赖pH且离子强度效应很小。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次区分了碳酸盐与碳酸氢盐各自的同位素富集速率对pH和离子强度的响应差异。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解释高盐度或酸性波动环境下碳酸盐矿物氧同位素数据提供了更精确的动力学参考。

works.title: Magmatic evolution and rotation dynamics of Gorontalo Eastern Mountain complex, North Sulawesi Arc, Indonesia, and their tectonic implications
works.abstract: Previous studies have attributed magmatism in the Gorontalo Eastern Mountain Complex (GEMC) to subduction-related processes, slab delamination, or extensional tectonics. However, the timing of magmatic activity and its relationship to changes in subduction geometry and vertical-axis rotation remain poorly constrained. This study presents a new integrated dataset that combines 40K-40Ar geochronology, major- and trace-element geochemistry, and paleomagnetic data to constrain the magmatic and tectonic significance of the GEMC. New and published data indicate that tholeiitic to calc-alkaline volcanic rocks, ranging from basalt to rhyolite, were emplaced between ~44.6 Ma and ~ 0.16 Ma. The Tinombo basement formed during Eocene back-arc spreading in the Celebes Sea, likely driven by rollback of southward-subducting plates. The Lower Member of the Bilungala Volcanics was emplaced during the Oligocene to Miocene in association with northward subduction, followed by a transition to subduction related to the Sangihe. Subsequent magmatism, represented by the Middle Member of the Bilungala Volcanics and the Motomboto–Pinogu Volcanics, occurred from the Pliocene to the Pleistocene and is linked to the North Sulawesi subduction. Paleomagnetic results reveal significant clockwise vertical-axis rotation in the Gorontalo (39.6° ± 7.7°), established by the Middle Miocene and likely facilitated by the geometry of surrounding slabs and accommodated by right-lateral strike-slip faulting along the arc. The results indicate that progressive reorganization of subduction geometry exerted control on arc magmatism and block rotation. This study provides new constraints on the tectono-magmatic evolution of the North Sulawesi Arc and offers a conceptual framework for understanding the dynamics of a structurally and magmatically segmented island-arc system at a convergent plate boundary.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 印度尼西亚北苏拉威西弧哥伦打洛东部山脉杂岩的岩浆演化与旋转动力学及其构造意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 哥伦打洛东部山脉杂岩体的岩浆活动时代及其与俯冲几何形态变化和垂直轴旋转的关系如何？
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合40K-40Ar年代学、主微量元素地球化学和古地磁数据进行约束。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆活动从~44.6 Ma持续至~0.16 Ma，中中新世发生显著顺时针旋转（39.6°±7.7°），俯冲重组控制弧岩浆与块体旋转。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次整合年代学、地球化学和古地磁数据揭示北苏拉威西弧的旋转动力学与岩浆演化关系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为汇聚板块边缘结构-岩浆分段岛弧系统的动力学演化提供概念框架和新约束。

works.title: A review of natural hydrogen generation from iron-rich rocks: Mechanisms, influencing factors, techniques, and knowledge gaps
works.abstract: Natural hydrogen has emerged as a promising clean energy resource with significant potential for large-scale subsurface production. Among the various geological sources, water–rock interactions involving iron-bearing rocks are among the most extensively studied pathways for natural hydrogen generation. This study provides a comprehensive review of hydrogen production from iron-rich lithologies, including mafic and ultramafic rocks, iron oxides, iron carbonates, and peralkaline granites. The fundamental mechanism involves the reduction of water coupled with the oxidation of ferrous iron to ferric iron under anoxic conditions. Key processes, including serpentinization, magnetite alteration, and siderite decomposition, are critically evaluated using experimental and modelling data. Integration of experimental findings from representative mineral phases indicates that Fe-rich olivine exhibits the highest hydrogen yield, reaching 0.417 mmol g-1 at 230 °C and 350 bar after 3500 h. Ferroan brucite produces up to 0.22 mmol g-1, whereas magnetite, arfvedsonite-bearing granite, and siderite yield 0.052, 0.036, and 0.0242 mmol g-1, respectively, under varying experimental conditions. The influence of temperature, pressure, pH, grain size, salinity, water-to-rock ratio, and iron partitioning is systematically assessed, with temperature, alkalinity, and reactive surface area identified as the dominant controls on hydrogen generation.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 富铁岩石中天然氢气生成研究综述：机制、影响因素、技术与知识空白

summary_bullets.research_question: 综述富铁岩石中天然氢生成的机理、影响因素、技术手段及知识空白。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合评述实验与模拟数据，评估不同矿物相产氢量及控制因素。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 富铁橄榄石产氢最高，温度、碱性和反应表面积是主要控制因素。
summary_bullets.innovation: 系统对比多种富铁岩石的产氢潜力，识别关键控制参数与知识空白。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地下天然氢资源勘探开发提供机理理解与研究方向参考。

works.title: Water-fluxed melting: A precursor to lithium‑beryllium enrichment in orogenic crust
works.abstract: Lithium (Li) and beryllium (Be) are critical metals essential for energy and advanced technologies. However, their geochemical behaviors during water-fluxed melting, a fundamental process during orogenesis, remain inadequately understood. This knowledge gap limits our ability to explain how Li and Be become enriched during orogenic evolution. In this study, we analyzed mineral and whole-rock geochemical compositions of structurally different domains in migmatites derived from water-fluxed melting. In-situ elemental analyses indicate that Be preferentially incorporates into plagioclase (andesine-oligoclase > amphibole > biotite ≈ muscovite > K-feldspar), while Li is dominantly hosted by biotite (biotite > muscovite > amphibole > plagioclase ≈ K-feldspar). Compiled whole-rock datasets suggest that the differential partitioning behaviors of Be and Li lead to the formation of distinct fertile reservoirs during water-fluxed melting, especially at low temperatures (within the muscovite stability field), with Be concentrating in proximal plagioclase-rich leucosomes (up to 6.37 ppm), while Li is retained in mafic residues (up to 254 ppm) alongside fluxing elements P and F. Phase equilibrium modeling confirms that subsequent (ultra)high-temperature, fluid-absent melting effectively remobilizes these elements to form Li- and/or Be-rich melts. Our findings suggest that water-fluxed melting plays a key role in pre-concentrating Li and Be. This points to multi-stage anatectic terranes, those that experienced early water-fluxed melting followed by later (ultra)high-temperature anatexis, as potential targets for LiBe pegmatite exploration.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 水助熔融：造山带地壳中锂-铍富集的前兆

summary_bullets.research_question: 水致熔融过程中锂和铍的地球化学行为如何影响其在造山带地壳中的富集？
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析混合岩不同结构域的原位矿物和全岩地球化学数据，并结合相平衡模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 水致熔融使铍优先进入浅色体而锂滞留于镁铁质残留体，形成差异化的预富集储库。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示水致熔融对锂和铍的分异预富集机制，并关联后期高温熔融构成多期成矿模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为在经历早期水致熔融和晚期高温深熔的多期混合岩地体中勘探锂铍伟晶岩提供了理论依据。

works.title: He–Ne–Ar isotopic constraints on the mantle source of the Fani Maoré paroxysm: implications for plume involvement beneath the Comoros
works.abstract: The origin of intraplate magmatism remains a subject of active debate. Recent volcanic activity offshore Mayotte, the easternmost volcanic island of the Comoros archipelago, has reignited extensive scientific investigations aimed at better understanding the geodynamic context of the region. Two main hypotheses are generally invoked to explain the observed volcanic activity: one involves a mantle plume, while the other attributes the magmatism primarily to tectonic processes, possibly linked to the offshore prolongation of the East African Rift System. However, both models present limitations. Noble gases are powerful tracers for distinguishing between these scenarios, as mantle plumes typically exhibit distinct isotopic signatures. We conducted step-crushing analyses on pristine glassy samples from the most recent (2018–2021) submarine volcanic edifice of Mayotte named Fani Maoré. The noble gas isotopic systematics of the Fani Maoré lavas are strikingly similar to a MORB-like mantle, casting doubt on a significant chemical contribution from a mantle plume. Instead, we favor a tectonically triggered, shallow origin, for the magmatism in the Comoros. Initiation of rifting in the region, coupled with edge-driven convection at the base of the lithosphere, can induce low-degree partial melting in the upper mantle without the thermal contribution of a mantle plume. The Comorian lithosphere is old and metasomatized, potentially hosting fertile heterogeneities. Preferential melting of these heterogeneities can explain the non-MORB-like lithophile isotopes while preserving MORB-like noble gas signatures. This mechanism provides a coherent explanation for intraplate magmatism in the region and could be applicable to other oceanic intraplate magmatic provinces.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: Fani Maoré 喷发事件地幔源区的 He–Ne–Ar 同位素制约：对科摩罗下方地幔柱参与的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 科摩罗群岛岩浆作用是地幔柱还是构造过程驱动？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对 Fani Maoré 火山新鲜玻璃质样品进行分步压碎稀有气体同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 氦氖氩同位素显示类似 MORB 的地幔特征，未发现地幔柱化学贡献。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过稀有气体同位素排除该区深部地幔柱贡献，提出浅部构造熔融新机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为洋内板内岩浆作用提供了无需地幔柱的解释模型，适用于类似构造背景研究。

works.title: Low-spin ferrous iron suppresses mantle oxidation beyond Earth-like pressures
works.abstract: The Earth’s mantle has elevated Fe 3 + relative to those of other rocky bodies, a property thought to reflect the disproportionation of ferrous iron into its metallic and ferric counterparts during core formation at elevated pressures. However, whether more massive planets (‘super-Earths’) become increasingly oxidised is poorly known for lack of constraints on the oxidation- and electronic state of iron at extreme pressures. We present in-situ energy-domain synchrotron Mössbauer spectra of 57Fe-enriched peridotitic- and basaltic glasses at 298 K compressed from 1 bar to 174 GPa in a diamond anvil cell. Three glasses were synthesised with different Fe 3 + /[Fe 3 + + Fe 2 + ] ratios; 0.02 ± 0.02 (Fe 2 + -basaltic, peridotitic) and 1.00 ± 0.02 (Fe 3 + -basaltic), respectively, as determined by colourimetry. While the spectrum of pure Fe 3 + -basaltic glass shows minimal changes in its hyperfine parameters up to 174 GPa, the spectra of Fe 2 + -peridotitic and basaltic glasses are fit by two doublets, D1 and D2. At 1 bar, their relative intensities are ∼ 92 % and ∼ 8 %, respectively, but the integral area ratio, D2/(D1 + D2), reaches 0.65 by 172 GPa. Because this transition is reversible with pressure and no metallic iron is detected, the D2 feature is ascribed to Fe 2 + in its low spin (LS) state, whereas D1 is consistent with Fe 2 + high spin (HS). The Fe 3 + /[Fe 3 + +Fe 2 + ] of planetary mantles at constant relative fO2 increases to a maximum near ∼ 40 GPa, before decreasing at higher pressures due to the stabilisation of Fe LS 2 + . This peak coincides with estimated core-mantle equilibrium on Earth, implying that its uniquely oxidised mantle and habitable state may result from core formation within a Goldilocks pressure range. Secondary atmospheres are predicted to transition from H2-rich for Moon-sized bodies, to CO-rich for Earth-like planets and H2- and CH4-bearing around super-Earths and sub-Neptunes.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 低自旋亚铁在超过类地压力下抑制地幔氧化作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 超地球等大质量行星的氧化态是否随压力升高而持续增加？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用金刚石压腔在298 K和1 bar至174 GPa下对57Fe富集合成玻璃进行原位同步辐射Mössbauer谱测量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Fe²⁺在约40 GPa以上从高自旋转变为低自旋，导致地幔Fe³⁺比例先升后降，极大值对应地球核幔平衡压力。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在极端压力下直接观测到硅酸盐玻璃中Fe²⁺的自旋转变并量化其对氧化态的非单调影响。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示地球的氧化地幔源自适中的核形成压力，约束了超地球的氧化还原演化与次生大气组成。

works.title: A Noachian hydrosphere component in the 4.1-Ga Martian meteorite Teghaza 001
works.abstract: The recent discovery of a 4.1-billion-year-old (Ga) Martian gabbroic diorite enables an assessment of water reservoirs on early Mars. Measurements of H 2 O and D/H in igneous Ca-phosphates record mixing between D-poor magmatic water and a D-rich component that retains an imprint of the ancient Martian hydrosphere. The D/H ratio of magmatic water is similar in Martian magmas with different ages and mantle sources, indicating that early differentiation processes did not fractionate H isotopes in the primordial Martian mantle. The D-rich component was assimilated by migrating magmas that interacted with aqueously altered basaltic crust. Our minimum bound on the D/H ratio of the Martian hydrosphere at 4.1 Ga (~2× the D/H ratio of Earth seawater) supports models of rapid H loss to space from Mars’ juvenile atmosphere.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 41亿年火星陨石 Teghaza 001 中的诺亚纪水圈组分

summary_bullets.research_question: 4.1 Ga火星陨石Teghaza 001中是否保存了诺亚纪水圈的同位素印记，从而揭示早期火星水储库和氢同位素演化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对陨石火成磷酸钙进行原位H₂O和D/H同位素测量，区分岩浆水与外来富D组分。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现贫D岩浆水与富D古水圈组分混合，限定4.1 Ga火星水圈D/H至少为地球海水2倍。
summary_bullets.innovation: 在已知最古老的火星长英质深成岩中首次识别4.1 Ga水圈的D/H定量约束。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为火星早期水圈存续和大气快速氢逃逸模型提供关键直接同位素证据。

works.title: Triassic aeolian megadune field reveals paleo-monsoon wind directions for low-latitude Gondwana
works.abstract: Abstract Linear dunes are rarely recognized in the geological record. By integrating sedimentological observations with aeromagnetic, magnetic susceptibility and magnetization datasets, we reconstruct the morphology of an Upper Triassic aeolian dune field from the sedimentary architecture of deposits preserved in the Sambaíba Formation, Parnaíba Basin, from northeast Brazil. This dune field was buried by lavas from the central Atlantic magmatic province. Aeolian architecture records the migration of superimposed crescentic dunes along the flanks of parent linear megadunes. These bedforms were part of a large aeolian dune field (>55,000 km 2 ), comprising megadunes with east-northeast to west-southwest oriented crestlines, up to 167 m in height, and ~2.7 km in crest-to-crest spacing. Mantled by lava, it is the largest and best-preserved instance of a linear megadune field yet documented in the rock record. The dune field developed in response to the coalescence of north-easterly and south-easterly paleowinds driven by a monsoon system operating at low latitudes (~10°S) of Gondwana during the Late Triassic: this validates atmospheric circulation models which had lacked direct geological support.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 三叠纪风成巨型沙丘场揭示了低纬度冈瓦纳古陆的古季风风向

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何从地质记录中识别线性古沙丘并验证低纬度季风风向模型？
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合沉积学观察与航空磁测、磁化率和磁化强度数据集重建沙丘形态。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现迄今最大、保存最完好的线性巨型沙丘场，由东北与东南古季风汇聚形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次为低纬度冈瓦纳古季风循环模型提供直接地质证据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为验证大气环流模型、理解古气候动力提供罕见的实存约束。

works.title: Low-temperature eclogite-facies meta-felsic rocks in the Beishan Orogenic Collage, NW China: Implications for Middle Permian subduction-to-accretion orogenesis
works.abstract: We report the first-known low-temperature eclogite-facies meta-felsic gneisses from the Beishan Orogenic Collage in the Central Asian Orogenic Belt in NW China. Petrological examination, mineral compositions and phase equilibrium modeling reveal that these gneisses experienced three metamorphic stages, with peak-pressure assemblage of garnet, phengite, paragonite, epidote, hornblende, plagioclase, and rutile at eclogite-facies conditions of ∼14 kbar and ∼580−590 °C, representing an apparent geothermal gradient of ∼11−13 °C/km. A clockwise pressure−temperature path involving decompression heating to amphibolite-facies at ∼9 kbar and ∼630−650 °C during exhumation is indicative of a transition from subduction to accretion orogenesis. Zircon and garnet U-Pb geochronology indicate that the low-temperature eclogite-facies metamorphism occurred at ca. 279 Ma, followed by amphibolite-facies metamorphism at ca. 273 Ma. This study provides key evidence supporting subduction in the Beishan Orogenic Collage during the Permian, addressing the long-standing controversy over its tectonic environment during the late Paleozoic. We demonstrate that closure of the Paleo-Asian Ocean at the Beishan Orogenic Collage occurred after the Middle Permian.
