works.title: Crustal melting and geodynamics in the Tibetan Plateau
works.abstract: Partial melting and ductile flow within thickened lower crust have long been considered key characteristics of the Tibetan Plateau; however, the spatiotemporal variations and geodynamic causes of crustal melting remain debated. Using a comprehensive dataset (>5300 samples) of Cenozoic metamorphic and magmatic rocks across the entire Tibetan Plateau orogen, we show that the early stage of India–Asia collision (~60–45 Ma) records crustal melting within normal-thickness and slightly thickened lower crust in the frontal region of the orogen, driven by asthenospheric upwelling associated with rollback and breakoff of Neo-Tethyan subducted oceanic lithosphere. By contrast, the late collisional stage (~45–8 Ma) records extensive and long-lived crustal melting within thickened lower crust in the orogenic front, and intermittent and localized crustal melting in the orogenic hinterland, driven by intracrustal radioactive heating and mantle heat flux driven by delamination of overthickened continental lithosphere. Since 8 Ma, the vast orogen has entered a waning phase of crustal melting due to continued underthrusting of old, thick, and cold Indian continental lithosphere, which cuts off mantle heat. Large collisional orogens are therefore major sites of continental crustal reworking rather than growth, but not all exhibit long-distance flow of partially molten deep crust through different tectonic units.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 青藏高原地壳熔融与地球动力学

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨青藏高原地壳熔融的时空变化及其地球动力学成因机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用覆盖整个青藏高原造山带的新生代变质和岩浆岩综合数据集（>5300个样本）进行分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 早期碰撞（60–45 Ma）由俯冲板片断离驱动，晚期（45–8 Ma）由放射性加热及岩石圈拆沉驱动，8 Ma后熔融减弱。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用大规模数据揭示地壳熔融分段驱动机制，强调造山带以地壳再循环为主而非净增长。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碰撞造山带地壳熔融动力学提供新框架，挑战部分熔融地壳长距离流动的普遍性假设。

works.title: Crustal architecture, accretionary evolution, and mineralization in the southern Central Asian orogenic belt (Solonker-Alxa region, Inner Mongolia) from the Paleozoic to early Mesozoic
works.abstract: Understanding continental crustal architecture and its control on mineral systems is fundamental to the earth sciences. Here we integrate zircon U-Pb geochronology, whole-rock Nd-Hf isotopes, lithogeochemical data, and regional metallogenic records from Cambrian to Triassic magmatic rocks across the Solonker-Alxa region of Inner Mongolia to define crustal domains and their metallogenic significance. Two contrasting isotopic provinces are identified: (1) an enriched domain [εNd(t) < −4, εHf(t) < 0] encompassing the North China Craton−Alxa Block and (2) a depleted domain [εNd(t) > −4, εHf(t) > 0] typifies the Central Asian orogenic belt (CAOB). These domains are separated by the Chifeng-Bayan Obo fault, the area north of Chaganhua, and the Quagan Qulu-Tebai fault. Crustal thickness patterns show a belt of thinned crust (<40 km) along the Mandula, Solonker, Ganqimandu, Yingba, and northern Enger Us fault zones, marking the boundary between the Mongolia collage and the Tarim-North China collage. Variations in crustal thickness suggest that the Alxa Block is a distinct Precambrian terrane, separate from the North China Craton. The protracted subduction-accretion and slab rollback of the Paleo-Asian Ocean have driven significant crustal growth in the Solonker-Alxa region, with juvenile crust contributions estimated at 37% in the southern CAOB. Crustal maturation and felsic differentiation resulted from polyphase melting events involving mafic lower crust, oceanic crust, and the middle to upper crust. A systematic correlation exists between isotopic domains, crustal architecture, and metallogenic distribution. Depleted domains with thin crust (<50 km) preferentially host porphyry Cu (± Au), epithermal Pb-Zn-Cu, and volcanic massive sulphide-type Cu deposits, whereas enriched isotopic domains and their peripheries contain porphyry Mo, skarn Cu-Fe, vein-type Au deposits, and magmatic Cu-Ni sulfide deposits, indicating genetic links to ancient crustal recycling and metasomatized lithospheric mantle. This synthesis provides a coherent tectono-metallogenic framework for the Solonker-Alxa segment of the southern CAOB and offers guidance for mineral exploration.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中亚造山带南段（内蒙古索伦克尔-阿拉善地区）古生代至早中生代的地壳结构、增生演化与成矿作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示内蒙古索伦-阿拉善地区古生代至早中生代地壳架构、增生演化及其对成矿系统的控制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合锆石U-Pb年代学、全岩Nd-Hf同位素、岩石地球化学及区域矿床记录。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出富集和亏损两同位素省，明确阿拉善为独立微陆块，地壳缩短与新生地壳贡献37%控制成矿分带。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将同位素域、地壳厚度变化与金属矿床类型空间分布进行系统成因关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为南中亚造山带提供统一的构造-成矿框架，直接指导关键矿产资源勘探部署。

works.title: Ocean iron fertilization from enhanced mid-ocean-ridge volcanism due to ice-age sea-level falls
works.abstract: Iron fertilization in high-nutrient, low-chlorophyll regions has been proposed to boost phytoplankton growth and enhance oceanic CO2 sequestration. While dust has long been recognized as a primary external iron source to these waters, recent discoveries highlight hydrothermal activity along mid-ocean ridges as a substantial contributor of iron to the deep ocean. However, it remains unclear whether hydrothermal iron directly impacts upper-ocean productivity. Pleistocene glacial cycles provide a natural test because previous studies suggest that sea-level falls during ice ages led to several-fold increases in hydrothermal activity and iron emissions during glacial deglaciations. Here we compare 200,000-year records of phytoplankton nutrient consumption in the iron-limited eastern equatorial Pacific (reconstructed from foraminifera-bound 15N/14N) with records of hydrothermal iron emissions from the underlying East Pacific Rise mid-ocean ridges. Beginning just before the last two terminations, increases in East Pacific Rise hydrothermal activity coincide with higher eastern equatorial Pacific nutrient consumption, consistent with direct iron fertilization by enhanced ridge volcanism. If corroborated in other iron-limited regions such as the Southern Ocean, this would suggest a broader Earth system feedback linking sea level, ridge volcanism, ocean carbon sequestration, atmospheric CO2 and climate across glacial cycles. Increased hydrothermal iron inputs from mid-ocean ridges, triggered by ice-age sea-level falls, supported higher surface primary productivity during the last two glacial terminations, according to proxy records of nutrient consumption in the eastern equatorial Pacific Ocean.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 冰期海平面下降增强洋中脊火山活动引发的海洋铁施肥

summary_bullets.research_question: 冰期海平面下降增强的洋中脊热液铁排放能否直接提升上层海洋生产力？
summary_bullets.methodology: 比较东赤道太平洋20万年浮游有孔虫氮同位素营养消耗记录与东太平洋海隆热液铁排放记录。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 最近两次冰消期前，热液活动增强与表层营养消耗升高同步，指示热液铁直接施肥效应。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将洋中脊热液铁输入与上层海洋营养盐消耗直接关联，提出海平面-火山-碳循环反馈。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 若在其它铁限制海域证实，将揭示冰期旋回中地球系统反馈，重塑碳循环与气候认知。

works.title: Sea-level fall might increase ridge volcanism, iron fertilization and ocean carbon storage
works.abstract: Sediment records from the eastern equatorial Pacific suggest that deglacial increases in hydrothermal iron release from East Pacific Rise volcanism, enhanced by earlier ice-age sea-level fall, boosted phytoplankton nutrient consumption. The findings point to a possible Earth system feedback linking sea level, mid-ocean ridge volcanism, ocean carbon storage and climate.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 海平面下降可能增强洋脊火山活动、铁施肥与海洋碳储存

summary_bullets.research_question: 海平面下降是否通过增强洋中脊火山铁释放促进海洋固碳并影响气候？
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析东赤道太平洋沉积记录中热液铁和生物生产力指标。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 冰期海平面下降增强了东太平洋海隆火山铁输入，促进浮游植物消耗营养盐。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出海平面-洋中脊火山-铁施肥-碳储存的地球系统反馈新联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示气候变化通过固体地球过程调控海洋碳循环的新机制。

works.title: Review on the genesis of the world-class Imiter Ag-Hg deposit: Evidence of post-collisional delamination-related metal sources in the Northwestern edge of the West African Craton
works.abstract: The Imiter Ag District, situated in Morocco’s Anti-Atlas belt in the northwestern edge of the West African Craton, hosts silver-rich base metal mineralization across several sectors, including Imiter I, Imiter II, Imiter South, and Igoudrane. The mineralization is characterized by sub-horizontal ore bodies, steeply dipping north-trending veins aligned with major faults, and low-angle south-dipping veins associated with large-scale fault zones. A key factor in the formation of this world-class and extensive mineralization is the persistent and robust magmatic source, coupled with significant tectonic structures linked to asthenospheric mantle reservoirs. This study combines field observations, electron probe microanalysis, and isotopic data with a review of previously published geochemical and U-Pb zircon ages from magmatic rocks to trace the origin of lead in silver-associated galena. Pb isotopic data reveal three distinct lead signatures corresponding to three geological episodes: Pb1, associated with Late Ediacaran magmatism; Pb2, linked to Hercynian orogenic hydrothermal processes; and Pb3, attributed to Alpine magmatism. The primary mineralization (Pb1) is related to Late Ediacaran high Sr/Y intrusions at Bou Fliou (582 Ma) and Igoudrane (538 Ma), as well as dykes controlled by the crustal-scale Imiter Fault. Precious metal remobilization (Au, Ag) is associated with magma derived from the delaminated lower crust and a former subducted slab during post-collisional processes, with significant mantle-derived magmatic input. Dykes play a role in mineralization by acting as conduits for mineralizing fluids. The formation of magma-related mineral deposits in the Imiter region is attributed to a regional metallogenic event during the Late Ediacaran Large Igneous Province (590–540 Ma), a period of extensive magmatism that was critical for the development of intrusions-related mineral deposits in the Anti-Atlas belt.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 世界级伊米特尔银汞矿床成因综述：西非克拉通西北缘碰撞后拆沉相关金属来源的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨西非克拉通西北缘世界级伊米特尔银汞矿床的成因及金属来源。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合野外观察、电子探针、同位素数据，综述前人地球化学和锆石U-Pb年龄。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铅同位素揭示三期铅源，主成矿与晚埃迪卡拉纪高Sr/Y侵入岩及后碰撞拆沉岩浆作用有关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出矿床形成与后碰撞拆沉导致的软流圈地幔物质参与有关，并区分三期铅演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解后碰撞伸展背景下大规模银成矿作用与地幔源区联系提供了关键证据。

works.title: Oxidised pyrogenic carbon sustains electron transfer capacity and organo mineral coupling in subsoils
works.abstract: Abstract Pyrogenic carbon is widely regarded as a component of soil organic carbon, yet how small amounts of vertically redistributed pyrogenic carbon influence organo mineral interfaces in subsoils remains unresolved. Here we combine a ten year field ageing experiment along a 200 cm calcareous soil profile in China with electrochemical assays, spectroscopy and nanoscale microscopy to link pyrogenic carbon electron transfer capacity to mineral association. Redistributed pyrogenic carbon retains electron accepting and donating capacities in subsoils despite low concentrations and exhibits faster electron transfer kinetics. This retention reflects oxidative surface transformation, enriching quinone and phenolic redox moieties and mineral complexing oxygen groups. Nanoscale observations show oxidised subsoil pyrogenic carbon surfaces with organo mineral coatings associated with iron and calcium bearing phases, consistent with a coupled redox and sorptive interface rather than passive presence alone. These findings suggest that field-aged pyrogenic carbon contributes to redox coupled mineral stabilisation in calcareous subsoils.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 氧化热解碳维持底土中的电子传递能力与有机-矿物耦合

summary_bullets.research_question: 少量垂直再分布的热解碳如何影响底土中有机矿物界面的电子转移和耦合机制？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过十年田间老化实验结合电化学分析、光谱学和纳米级显微技术，沿200 cm钙质土壤剖面研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 再分布热解碳在底土中保留电子转移能力，表面氧化富集醌/酚基团，并与铁钙矿物相形成有机矿物涂层。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示热解碳在底土中通过氧化还原耦合驱动矿物稳定，而非仅被动存在。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解热解碳在底土长期稳定、碳固存和矿物保护机制提供新见解，对土壤碳循环研究具有重要价值。

works.title: Crustal evolution of the Archean Rae Province (northern Canada) from oxygen and hafnium isotopes in zircon
works.abstract: The isotope characteristics of the continental crust are fundamental to understanding its formation and evolution. We present zircon O and Hf isotope data for 115 Archean magmatic rocks (>2.58 Ga) from the Rae Province (northern Canada), providing constraints that have been missing from the global Archean archive thus far. Zircon from >2.65 Ga, dominantly tonalite−trondhjemite−granodiorite samples, show mantle-like δ18O, while εHfinitial and two-stage depleted mantle model ages (TDM) are variable and define four broad isotope domains. Two domains comprise relatively juvenile crust (TDM < 3.0 Ga) that define a central spine of the Rae Province. These are flanked to the west and east by two separate domains of more evolved crust with Meso- to Eoarchean histories (TDM > 3.0 Ga). A decrease in εHfinitial with age within each isotope domain is most consistent with infracrustal reworking of local crust. Relative to pre−2.65 Ga crust, zircon from 2.65−2.58 Ga potassic granitoids show a greater range in δ18O, whereas their εHfinitial are more homogenized. Zircon yielding δ18O >6.5‰ are dominant in the northern Rae Province, where sedimentary sequences are most abundant and likely reflect widespread erosion and sediment/crustal recycling following the emergence of >2.65 Ga crust. The relatively homogeneous εHfinitial is most consistent with an infracrustal origin and mixing with local sediment. The zircon isotope data are used to evaluate and refine boundaries of crustal blocks, and to interrogate models for the construction of the Rae Province. The isotope signatures of the Rae Province are consistent with the global Archean archive for the emergence of the depleted mantle and cratonization.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 锆石氧-铪同位素揭示的太古宙雷伊省（加拿大北部）地壳演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 太古宙Rae省大陆地壳形成与演化的同位素特征是什么，如何填补全球太古宙记录空白？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对115个>2.58 Ga岩浆岩样品的锆石进行氧和铪同位素分析，结合TDM模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出四个同位素域，>2.65 Ga地壳显示地幔δ18O，2.65–2.58 Ga钾质花岗岩δ18O范围更广而εHf更均一。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提供Rae省系统的锆石O-Hf同位素数据，揭示地壳再循环和块体边界。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为全球太古宙地壳演化和克拉通化模型提供关键约束，验证亏损地幔出现假说。

works.title: Experimental indications of superionic behaviour in iron hydride under Earth’s core conditions
works.abstract: Earth’s inner core is believed to consist of an iron–light-element alloy such as iron hydride (FeHX). The possibility that a superionic state may emerge in the inner core has recently gained attention as a physico-chemical phenomenon for explaining its seismological properties, such as slow shear-wave velocities and seismic anisotropy. Despite theoretical predictions, direct experimental evidence for superionic behaviour in iron–light-element alloys remains scarce. Here we present in situ, time-resolved X-ray diffraction measurements in a laser-heated diamond-anvil cell. Our experimental observations are consistent with superionic behaviour in face-centred cubic iron hydride (X ~ 1) up to 140 gigapascals—corresponding to Earth’s core pressure. We interpret the anomalous thermal expansion of iron hydride that we observe as consistent with behaviour reported for other superionic materials. In addition, our laser-heating experiments on iron hydride under a constant voltage bias reveal an abrupt migration of hydrogen at the superionic transition temperature. These results suggest that hydrogen in the superionic state may carry a negative charge and diffuse more slowly than predicted by ab initio calculations. These findings suggest that if hydrogen indeed has been incorporated into the inner core during its formation, it can be retained over geodynamic timescales. Iron hydride in the Earth’s inner core may exist in a superionic state, according to high-pressure and high-temperature experiments at relevant conditions. Accompanying slow diffusion suggests that the inner core could retain hydrogen on geologic timescales.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 地球核心条件下氢化铁超离子行为的实验指示

summary_bullets.research_question: 铁氢化物在地核压力下是否存在超离子态？
summary_bullets.methodology: 激光加热金刚石压砧中的时间分辨X射线衍射及恒定电压偏压实验。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 面心立方FeH在140 GPa下呈现超离子态，氢扩散较慢且可能带负电荷。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提供铁-轻元素合金超离子态的直接实验证据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示了内核氢滞留机制，为解释地震波低速和各向异性提供新的物理解释。

works.title: Slow slip modulates low-frequency seismicity on the Parkfield segment of the San Andreas Fault
works.abstract: Abstract Understanding how slow slip events (SSEs) influence fault behavior is essential for characterizing the fault slip spectrum and its role in earthquake generation. Here, we show that deep learning applied to strainmeter data can detect short-duration SSEs on the San Andreas Fault near Parkfield, enabling an SSE catalog. SSEs are coherently observed across instruments, with evidence from nearby creepmeters. Location analysis indicates shallow depths and slip consistent with right-lateral motion. They follow a cubic moment–duration scaling law, similar to earthquakes and consistent with both subduction zone observations, and linear scaling as an upper bound. Low-frequency earthquakes increase following SSEs, suggesting that slow aseismic slip modulates seismicity. Detecting these SSEs fills an observational gap in slow earthquake studies and highlights their broader relevance. These findings support a continuum between aseismic and seismic slip, where transient deformation in creeping segments perturbs stress in adjacent locked areas, potentially promoting seismic activity.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 慢滑移调控圣安德烈亚斯断层帕克菲尔德段的低频地震活动

summary_bullets.research_question: 慢滑移事件如何影响圣安德烈亚斯断层帕克菲尔德段的地震活动？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用深度学习分析应变仪数据，检测短期慢滑移事件并建立目录。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 慢滑移遵循立方矩-持续时间标度律，慢滑移后低频地震增多，表明无震滑移调制地震活动。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用深度学习从应变数据系统检测浅层短期慢滑移，填补观测空白。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证明蠕滑段瞬态变形可扰动邻接锁闭段应力并促进地震，支持滑移谱连续性理论。

works.title: A long-lived impact-generated hydrothermal system at the Chicxulub impact structure
works.abstract: Abstract Hydrothermal systems likely played an essential role in the origin of life, both on Earth and potentially on other planets. They form anywhere that heat and aqueous fluids interact, including within cooling hypervelocity impact craters. Longer periods of hydrothermal activity will generate extended windows of opportunity for prebiotic chemical reactions to occur, life to develop, and micro-organisms to thrive and propagate beyond their point of origin. Here, we present radioisotopic age constraints and numerical simulations for the duration of post-impact hydrothermal activity in and around the peak ring of the ~200 km diameter 66 Ma Chicxulub impact structure. We find that hydrothermal activity persisted for at least 8 million years (Myr), which is approximately four times longer than previously estimated by numerical simulations, palaeomagnetic records, and petrographic interpretations at Chicxulub, making it the longest-lived impact generated hydrothermal system documented on Earth.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 希克苏鲁伯撞击构造中长寿的撞击生成热液系统

summary_bullets.research_question: 希克苏鲁伯撞击坑后热液活动究竟持续了多长时间？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合放射性同位素年龄测定与数值模拟进行分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 热液活动持续至少800万年，是先前估计的四倍，属已知最长撞击生热液系统。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用同位素直接证明撞击热液系统可延续近千万年，远超模拟预测。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地球与地外生命起源的化学窗口提供关键时间尺度约束。

works.title: In Situ U-Pb Dating of Hydrothermal Monazite From Metasediment-Hosted Orogenic Au Deposits: Constraints on the Age and Geotectonic Setting of Au Mineralization in the West Qinling Orogen, Central China
works.abstract: Abstract The general lack of absolute ages for most Au deposits in the well-endowed West Qinling orogen (central China) has hampered establishment of the exact temporal framework of regional Au mineralization during the geotectonic evolution of this orogen. This study presents new in situ U-Pb ages on hydrothermal monazite in native gold-bearing ores from three world-class Au deposits (Liba, Baguamiao, and Shuangwang) in the West Qinling orogen. The dating results indicate that these deposits formed synchronously at ca. 220 Ma. In all cases, these ages overlap with new U-Pb dates for felsic and mafic magmatism in the deposit settings. Our new age data, when combined with independent geologic evidence and previous geochronological studies, suggest orogen-wide Au mineralization was controlled by the Triassic orogenic processes involving westward diachronous subduction and closure of the Mianlue ocean and subsequent oblique continental convergence of the Yangtze craton and the South Qinling terrane. During ca. 250 to 225 Ma, Au mineralization in the western part of the West Qinling orogen is attributed to oceanic subduction, whereas in the eastern part it is related to incipient continental collision. At ca. 225 to 210 Ma, continental collision culminated in the final formation of the West Qinling orogen, during which slab tearing induced upwelling of the asthenosphere and melting of lithospheric mantle and continental crust, as is reflected by the widespread granitic magmatism and synchronous mafic dikes. These latter events facilitated extensive crustal fluid flow that generated the significant Au endowment in the West Qinling orogen as represented by the dated three deposits.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 变沉积岩容矿造山型金矿床中热液独居石的原位U-Pb定年：对西秦岭造山带金成矿时代和大地构造背景的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 西秦岭造山带多数金矿缺乏绝对年龄，制约了区域金成矿时间格架及其构造背景的建立。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对三个超大型金矿中含自然金的矿石进行热液独居石原位U-Pb定年。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 三个矿床约在220 Ma同时形成，与区内长英质和镁铁质岩浆活动同期。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过热液独居石原位U-Pb定年精确约束西秦岭变质沉积岩容矿造山型金矿的年龄。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 厘清了西秦岭金矿化与三叠纪造山过程的关系，为区域成矿规律和勘探提供了关键时间坐标。

works.title: Fluid exsolution in porphyry-skarn magmas constrained from volatile-bearing minerals in the Late Triassic Saishitang complex, East Kunlun Orogen, China
works.abstract: Fluid saturation and exsolution play critical roles in forming porphyry-skarn deposits, but the timing and depth of this process during transcrustal magmatic evolution are often difficult to determine. This study uses volatile compositions of amphibole, biotite, and apatite to reconstruct fluid exsolution during magmatic evolution in the Saishitang complex formed from a transcrustal magmatic system. The Saishitang complex is primarily associated with skarn Cu mineralization in the East Kunlun Orogen, western China and comprises a pluton consisting of quartz diorite, granodiorite, and monzogranite intruded by a series of porphyritic dykes of diorite, quartz diorite, granodiorite, and granite. Calculated F and Cl contents for corresponding melts from amphibole, biotite, and apatite of each rock type in the complex, as well as temperatures obtained from the amphibole geothermometer, reveal that an abrupt drop in Cl-H2O concentrations, marking the onset of fluid saturation at 780–900 ℃ in both porphyritic and equigranular rocks. The Al-in-amphibole geobarometer yields pressures of 81–180 MPa for fluid exsolution, corresponding to a paleodepth of 3.0–6.8 km. These results as well as fractional crystallization modeling show that the Saishitang magmatic system was Cl undersaturated at the middle to lower crustal levels before fluid exsolution in the upper crust. These conclusions are different from the recent model for fluid exsolution at the middle or lower crust suggested by melt inclusions. The study demonstrates that Cl and H2O trends can reliably trace fluid exsolution in the Saishitang complex and thus establishes a robust approach for reconstructing magmatic fluid saturation histories through the analysis of volatile-bearing minerals, particularly in settings where direct melt records are absent or compromised.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 东昆仑造山带晚三叠世赛什塘杂岩体中含挥发分矿物对斑岩-矽卡岩岩浆流体出溶的约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何确定斑岩-矽卡岩岩浆系统中流体出溶的时机与深度？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用角闪石、黑云母和磷灰石的挥发分组成反演熔体流体饱和过程。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 流体出溶始于780–900℃、81–180 MPa（深度3.0–6.8 km），此前下地壳熔体氯不饱和。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立基于含挥发分矿物分析重建岩浆流体出溶历史的可靠方法。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为缺乏或受损的熔体包裹体记录提供了替代手段，对成矿机制研究具有重要价值。

works.title: Mineralization characteristics and controlling factors of key metals of Re, Se, and Te in the Bainaimiao Cu-Au-Mo deposit, northern margin of North China Craton
works.abstract: Porphyry copper deposits are the most important source of critical minerals such as Re, Se, and Te. The Bainaimiao Cu-Au-Mo deposit is located in the eastern segment of the Central Asian Orogenic Belt (CAOB). The northern ore section exhibits porphyry-type alteration and mineralization characteristics, while the ore bodies in the southern ore section mainly occur as stratiform-like layers within the country-rock greenschist. There has long been debate regarding the genetic type of the Bainaimiao deposit. Through in-situ component analysis of different types of sulfides such as pyrite and chalcopyrite, combining with previous data and literatures, we propose that the Bainaimiao belongs to a porphyry deposit modified by later orogenic processes. The high Re content in molybdenite from the Bainaimiao deposit (109–1051 ppm, average of 627 ppm) may be controlled by factors likely its relatively low oxygen fugacity and the incorporation of terrigenous sedimentary components in the magma source. Chalcopyrite from different ore sections have high Se contents, averaging ca. 100 ppm, indicating that chalcopyrite is the primary host mineral for Se. The enrichment of Se is mainly achieved through coupled substitution between S2⁻ and Se2⁻. Tellurium concentrations are relatively low, primarily entering the chalcopyrite lattice as bismuth-tellurium mineral inclusions, which may be related to crustal contamination or the lack of competitive sulfides during Cu mineralization. Porphyry copper deposits in the CAOB have significant potential for mineralization of dispersed elements such as Re, Se, and Te. Future efforts should focus on study of mineralization processes and the comprehensive utilization and recovery of these key metal elements.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华北克拉通北缘白乃庙铜金钼矿床中关键金属Re、Se、Te的矿化特征与控矿因素

summary_bullets.research_question: 解决白乃庙矿床成因类型争议以及Re、Se、Te的矿化特征与控矿因素。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对不同硫化物进行原位成分分析，并结合前人数据与文献综合研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 白乃庙属造山改造型斑岩矿床；辉钼矿高Re受低氧逸度与陆源沉积混染控制；黄铜矿是Se主要载体，通过Se2-替代S2-富集；Te以铋-碲矿物包裹体形式赋存，可能与地壳混染有关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出白乃庙为后期造山改造的斑岩矿床新成因认识，揭示分散元素富集机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为中亚造山带斑岩铜矿中关键分散金属的成矿研究与综合回收提供重要指导。

works.title: Superheating in mafic magmas controls clinopyroxene nucleation delay and magma ascent dynamics
works.abstract: Abstract Crystallisation kinetics play a fundamental role in controlling conduit dynamics and eruptive style. The degree of superheating is critical in controlling crystallisation kinetics; however, its effect is still debated and has an unclear impact on eruption dynamics. Here, we investigate how superheating influences clinopyroxene nucleation in tephritic magmas from the 2021 Tajogaite eruption (La Palma, Spain) through both in situ and ex situ view experiments. Our findings show that superheating delays nucleation by dissolving pre-existing nuclei, thereby inhibiting crystallisation upon return to subliquidus conditions. Using a numerical model, we investigate how different nucleation delays resulting from different degrees of superheating affect magma ascent dynamics. Depending on the initial thermodynamic conditions and on the pre-eruptive history of magma, an increased nucleation delay can significantly reduce crystal content during ascent, lowering magma viscosity and affecting eruptive style. These findings highlight the critical role of pre-eruptive thermal histories in controlling eruptive style, and provide constraints for refining experimental protocols and numerical models, with direct implications for improving volcanic hazard assessment and eruption forecasting.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 镁铁质岩浆过热控制单斜辉石成核延迟与岩浆上升动力学

summary_bullets.research_question: 玄武质岩浆中的过热如何影响单斜辉石成核延迟及岩浆上升动力学？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合原位与离位观察实验，研究2021年Tajogaite喷发的碱玄质岩浆，并采用数值模型分析上升动力学。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 过热通过溶解已有晶核延迟成核，显著降低上升中晶体含量，降低岩浆粘度并影响喷发样式。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次阐明喷发前热历史对成核延迟的控制作用，并量化其对岩浆上升动力学的实际影响。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为改进实验规程和数值模型提供约束，直接有助于火山灾害评估与喷发预测。

works.title:
An aquaglyceroporin governs cellular water and CO
                    <sub>2</sub>
                    conductance relevant for vesicular mineral formation in a marine calcifier
works.abstract: Many marine organisms generate biominerals by endocytotic uptake of seawater which is modified within calcifying cells to produce an amorphous mineral precursor required to form the mineralized shell or skeleton. In this process, water must be removed from the endocytotic vesicles and the cell to promote concentration of calcification substrates and production of a water-free mineral. Here, we demonstrate that in the sea urchin larva, an aquaglyceroporin (spAQP9) is involved in the cellular calcification process. spAQP9 is found exclusively in the calcifying primary mesenchyme cells (PMCs), and spAQP9 expression is increased during mineralization underlining its role in skeleton formation. Heterologous expression of sp AQP9 in Xenopus laevis oocytes demonstrated that this channel conducts water and carbon dioxide. The water conductance by spAQP9 is sensitive to phloretin with an IC 50 of ∼38 µM and treatment of larvae with phloretin or knock-down of spAQP9 impaired skeleton formation. Immunohistological analyses revealed localization of spAQP9 in vesicles with different subcellular distribution depending on the calcification activity of PMCs. Finally, we developed an in vivo assay to measure cellular and vesicular water permeability in PMCs and found a significant water permeability of the plasma membrane and membranes of calcium-rich vesicles. The results of this work highlight the importance of water transport mechanisms in the mineralization process. Here, aquaporins like spAQP9 represent key players that serve a dual function as a water and CO 2 conductance pathway and thereby can support ion concentration and carbon transport, two processes that are of fundamental importance to promote intracellular mineral precursor formation.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 水甘油通道蛋白调控与海洋钙化生物囊泡矿物形成相关的细胞水分与CO₂传导

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨水通道蛋白如何调控海水钙化生物囊泡内水与CO₂运输以促进矿物前体形成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用海胆幼虫、爪蟾卵母细胞异源表达、免疫组化、体内水通透性测定及基因敲降技术。
summary_bullets.key_findings: spAQP9是一种可同时传导水和CO₂的甘油水通道蛋白，定位于钙化囊泡并影响骨骼形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在活体钙化细胞中揭示水通道蛋白的双重传导功能及其在囊泡矿物形成中的关键作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 表明水与CO₂协同运输是生物矿化的核心环节，为理解海洋钙化机制提供新靶点。

works.title: Spatial-temporal distribution of late Cenozoic intraplate basalts in the Leiqiong area, South China: Insights into the distinct roles of mantle plume and continental lithosphere during plume head emplacement
works.abstract: The emplacement of plume head is a critical aspect of mantle plume theory; however, the respective roles of the plume and lithosphere during the emplacement remain insufficiently understood. The late Cenozoic Hainan mantle plume, inferred to remain in the plume head stage, preserves records of its emplacement processes. This study presents comprehensive geochemical data, including major and trace elements, as well as Sr–Nd–Pb–Hf isotopes, for late Cenozoic basalts from the northern Leiqiong area (including Leizhou Peninsula, northern Hainan Island, and Weizhou Island), which are associated with the Hainan plume. Based on their spatial-temporal distribution, these basalts are categorized into early and late stages. Early-stage basalts, restricted to eastern Leiqiong area, show positive ΔεHf values (0.51–2.34) and consistently low Ce/Pb (7.22–18.24) and Nb/Th (6.78–10.52) ratios, suggesting a significant contribution from recycled sedimentary components. Late-stage basalts, distributed across the northern Leiqiong area, are subdivided into two groups based on their ΔεHf values. The eastern late-stage basalts display positive ΔεHf values with overall low Ce/Pb and Nb/Th ratios, whereas the western late-stage basalts show negative ΔεHf values (−1.71 to −0.01) with overall higher Ce/Pb (14.59–31.78) and Nb/Th (10.64–12.77) ratios, indicating a substantial contribution of recycled oceanic crust in their mantle source. The spatial-temporal distribution and geochemical variations of the Leiqiong basalts highlight distinct roles of the plume and continental lithosphere during plume head emplacement. The lithosphere architecture strongly controls the ascent and emplacement of the plume head because the plume lacks sufficient vigor, owing to the impediment of significant stagnant slabs in the mantle transition zone beneath the Leiqiong area. Thus, the Hainan mantle plume initially ascended through a lithospheric weak zone in eastern Leiqiong area and subsequently propagated laterally across the northern Leiqiong area due to lateral variations in lithospheric architecture. The mantle sources of both stages were influenced by the Hainan plume during its ascent and lateral propagation. As the plume expanded, fusible recycled sedimentary components accumulated beneath the lithospheric weak zone, while the surrounding mantle was depleted due to tectonic suction toward the central region. Consequently, late-stage basalts in northwestern Leiqiong primarily record a signature of recycled oceanic crust introduced by the plume. Therefore, the plume governs the compositional evolution of the mantle sources during its propagation.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 雷琼地区晚新生代板内玄武岩的时空分布：对地幔柱头部就位过程中地幔柱与大陆岩石圈差异作用的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 雷琼地区晚新生代板内玄武岩如何揭示地幔柱头就位过程中地幔柱与岩石圈的各自作用？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用主微量元素及Sr–Nd–Pb–Hf同位素地球化学数据进行时空对比分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩石圈结构控制柱头上升路径：早期沿东部薄弱带，晚期向西扩展；源区由沉积物贡献转向洋壳贡献。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出岩石圈架构主导柱头就位模式，阐明柱头传播中地幔源区物质组成的演化机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解地幔柱-岩石圈相互作用、板内玄武岩成因及深部物质循环提供新视角。

works.title: Ti-poor high-Al and high-Cr podiform chromitites in the Ngape ophiolite, Myanmar: constraints from mineral chemistry and Re-Os isotopes
works.abstract: The Ngape ophiolite in western Myanmar preserves critical records of Neo-Tethyan Ocean tectonic evolution. Here, we present the integrated mineral chemistry, whole-rock platinum group element (PGE), and Re-Os isotopic study of podiform chromitites from this ophiolite to constrain their petrogenesis and tectonic setting. The chromitites are classified into high-Al (Cr# = 56.06–60.06) and high-Cr (Cr# = 63.01–72.63) types. Both types are notably poor in TiO2 (<0.29 wt%). Calculated parental melts indicate that the high-Al chromitites crystallized from the tholeiitic melts, whereas the high-Cr chromitites originated from boninitic melts. The chromitites exhibit enrichment of IPGE (Os, Ir, Ru) over PPGE (Pt, Pd, Rh), and possess unradiogenic, homogeneous 187Os/188Os ratios (0.12638–0.12863; average 0.12695). These PGE and Os isotopic signatures point to a depleted mantle source. Trace elements (e.g., V, Sc, Ga) further reveal that the high-Cr chromitites formed under higher oxygen fugacity and from a more depleted source than the high-Al variety. The coexistence of these Ti-poor chromitites records a progressive magmatic evolution within a forearc mantle wedge, transitioning from nascent subduction initiation (high-Al type) to a geochemically mature stage of the subduction initiation sequence (high-Cr type). This study provides the comprehensive Re-Os isotopic dataset for Myanmar ophiolites and documents a complete, in-situ magmatic progression during forearc evolution in the Neo-Tethyan realm.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 缅甸纳佩蛇绿岩中贫钛高铝和高铬豆荚状铬铁矿：矿物化学和Re-Os同位素的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 缅甸Ngape蛇绿岩中贫钛高铝与高铬豆荚状铬铁矿的成因及构造背景是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用矿物化学、全岩铂族元素及Re-Os同位素分析两类型铬铁矿。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高铝型源自拉斑玄武熔体，高铬型源自玻安质熔体，两者均源自亏损地幔，高铬型形成于更高氧逸度和更亏损源区。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提供缅甸蛇绿岩首个系统Re-Os同位素数据，并揭示弧前演化从初始俯冲到成熟阶段的完整岩浆序列。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲起始过程、弧前地幔演化及铬铁矿成矿机制提供了关键实证和判别标志。

works.title: Crust–Mantle Architecture Remodelled by Mantle Plumes: Evidence From Late Permian (ca. 260 Ma) Gabbro–Monzonite Association in the Inner Zone of the Emeishan Large Igneous Province
works.abstract: ABSTRACT Crust–mantle architecture in large igneous provinces (LIPs) controls magma generation and crustal growth. The coeval gabbro and monzonite in the inner zone of the Emeishan Large Igneous Province (ELIP) provide a key opportunity. They display different whole‐rock and mineral compositions, indicating different sources and melting conditions. The gabbro displays moderate TiO 2 and MgO contents, with Ti/Y ratios of 408–413. Its elevated Nb/Ta and Zr/Hf ratios, evolved zircon Hf isotope, and apatite chemistry suggest a volatile‐poor primitive melt, which was derived from the melting of sub‐continental lithospheric mantle. The monzonite displays high Zr and Nb contents, TFeO/MgO and 10,000 × Ga/Al ratios, indicating high‐temperature melting of mafic lower crust, the high Sr contents suggest plagioclase incorporation into the melts. Its relatively depleted isotopic compositions ( ε Nd ( t ) = +3.2 to +3.7; ε Hf ( t ) = +0.87 to +0.88) reveal a juvenile crust source region. Apatite in the monzonite indicates a volatile‐rich melt, supporting a high‐temperature crustal melting origin. This geochemical dichotomy illuminates a two‐stage crustal evolution model: (1) melting of plume‐modified lithospheric mantle to generate the gabbro, followed by (2) thermal remelting of the juvenile mafic crust to form the monzonite. Such plume‐induced crust–mantle interaction offers a window into understanding crust–mantle architecture in global LIPs.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地幔柱改造的壳-幔结构：来自峨眉山大火成岩省内带晚二叠世（约260 Ma）辉长岩-二长岩组合的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: How does mantle plume activity remodel crust–mantle architecture in large igneous provinces?
summary_bullets.methodology: Whole-rock geochemistry, mineral chemistry, zircon Hf isotopes, and apatite composition analysis.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Gabbro originated from volatile-poor lithospheric mantle melting, while monzonite originated from high-temperature melting of volatile-rich juvenile mafic lower crust.
summary_bullets.innovation: Reveals a two-stage crustal evolution model driven by plume-induced crust–mantle interaction.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: Provides a framework for understanding crust–mantle architecture and crustal growth in LIPs worldwide.

works.title: Solidification of the Terrestrial Magma Ocean – Insights from Studies of Crustal Magma Chambers
works.abstract: Abstract In most models of terrestrial magma ocean solidification, crystals are said to accumulate above the core–mantle boundary to form a crystal mush that solidifies under equilibrium conditions. Large mafic-ultramafic crustal intrusions crystallize differently. They are dominated by adcumulates that are composed almost entirely of cumulus minerals, and the residual melt undergoes fractional crystallization. In this study, we draw on insights from studies of crustal magma chamber processes to propose a new model for the solidification of the magma ocean. Our model takes into account the phase relations of ultramafic melt under lower mantle conditions, the presence of a zone of neutral crystal buoyancy located in the lower magma ocean, and the Coriolis force, which organizes convection into separate zones aligned parallel to the planet’s axis of rotation. In this scenario, crystals initially accumulate in two annular septa in the deeper part of the magma ocean, one in each hemisphere. A combination of composition-driven convection within the crystal mush and compaction then expels melt from the septa into the magma ocean. Early on, melt circulates between different parts of the magma ocean through gaps between the septa. Once these gaps close, the two hemispheric regions evolve independently.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地球岩浆洋的固结——来自地壳岩浆房研究的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何修正传统地幔岩浆洋平衡固结模型以解释晶体堆积与熔体演化的动力学过程？
summary_bullets.methodology: 借鉴地壳岩浆房的不平衡结晶理论，结合下地幔相平衡、中性浮力区和科里奥利力进行分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 晶体首先汇聚于下岩浆洋两个半球形环状隔板，熔体被挤出并在隔板闭合后独立演化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出基于对流分带与动力学分离的岩浆洋固化新模型，取代传统整体平衡固结观点。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为早期地球的化学分异和地幔结构形成提供新机制，影响岩浆洋演化和层状侵入体研究。

works.title: Detrital zircon U-Pb-Hf-O isotopes and trace elements of the Mesoproterozoic sediments on the northern margin of the North China Craton and its implications
works.abstract: The supracrustal rock successions along the northern margin of the North China Craton (NCC) records key information of Mesoproterozoic rifting linked to the NCC’s separation from the Columbia (Nuna) supercontinent. The Mesoproterozoic tectonic affinity and evolution of the northern margin of the NCC are controversial, hindering our understanding on its rifting, especially its time. Thus, we carry out a comprehensive study of zircon U-Pb-Hf-O isotopes and trace element on Meso- and Neo-proterozoic successions of the Mesoproterozoic Langshan-Zha’ertai-Bayan Obo-Huade (LZBH) rift from Siziwangqi area, Inner Mongolia. Our study shows that Meso- and Neo-proterozoic successions there can be roughly separated into two parts by a regional uncomformity. Sediments deposited at approximately ∼1.81–1.35 Ga are predominantly composed of late Archean to early Paleoproterozoic (mainly at ca. 3.00–1.85 Ga) zircons, having complex εHf(t) and δ18O values characterized by variable εHf(t) at ca. 2.5 Ga (−14.6 to +6.6) and 1.95–1.85 Ga (−10.4 to +3.0) intervals, and occurrences of high δ18O (>7‰) values. Whereas those overlying sediments deposited at ca. 1.19–0.90 Ga are dominated by late Paleo- to Mesoproterozoic (ca. 1.80–1.20 Ga) zircons, with variable εHf(t) (−16.6 to +10.8) and δ18O (10.5 to 3.6‰) values showing a temporal trend toward greater mantle input with a notable shift toward mantle-dominated signatures after approximately 1.6 Ga. Similar provenance shift occurred along the entire northern margin of the NCC, as reported by many previous works. Integrating ca. 1.35–1.30 Ga magmatic records (e.g., mafic dyke swarms, A-type granites) there, we interpret this shift to date the NCC-Columbia final breakup at ca. 1.35–1.30 Ga. According to similar Archean-Paleoproterozoic detrital zircons from Mesoproterozoic (>1.35 Ga) sediments, we further proposed that the northern NCC has a tectonic affinity with Southern Siberia, and North India. Furthermore, the northern NCC has a close paleo-position to the Baltic Craton and microcontinents in the Central Asia Orogenic Belt within the Columbia supercontinent, due to similar Mesoproterozoic (ca. 1.60-1.20 Ga) detrital zircons and roughly coeval magmatism.
works.label: ignore

summary_bullets.research_question: 华北克拉通北缘中元古代裂谷的构造亲缘性与裂解时间尚存争议，本文旨在厘清其裂谷演化与时限。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对内蒙古四子王旗中—新元古代沉积岩进行碎屑锆石U-Pb-Hf-O同位素及微量元素综合分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 沉积物源在约1.35–1.30 Ga发生转变，标志着华北克拉通与Columbia超大陆最终裂解，并揭示其与西伯利亚南部、北印度等构造亲缘性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用锆石多同位素体系精确制约华北克拉通从Columbia裂解的时限及古地理位置。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为Columbia超大陆裂解过程与华北克拉通中元古代构造演化提供了关键制约。

works.title: Global geodynamics during the Archean: A geochemical perspective on TTGs and mantle-derived rocks from different Cratons worldwide
works.abstract: Geodynamics in the early Archean has been the subject of intense debate and two predominant schools of thought have emerged. Uniformitarians argue that plate tectonics have dominated the Earth's history, albeit with some temporal differences. Conversely, non-uniformitarians support a distinct geodynamic mode operated in the early Archean, characterized by vertical motions and plume activity, with subordinate intermittent subduction. In this contribution, we use a worldwide database of tonalites-trondhjemites-granodiorites (TTGs) and mafic-ultramafic rocks, coupled with batch melting calculations, to constrain geodynamics in the Archean. TTGs are the dominant felsic igneous/metaigneous components of Archean cratons. Basaltic rocks (averages) were selected from well-constrained modern tectonic settings as sources for batch melting calculations to establish which might produce melts that are similar to Archean TTGs. Th/Nb was used to discriminate which TTGs, from a worldwide database, had source rocks similar to plateau (non-uniformitarian scenario) or island arc (uniformitarian scenario) basalts. Overall Th/Nb increases steadily with time and prior to ~3.2 Ga TTGs yielded lower Th/Nb values, consistent with mostly plateau non-subduction related basalts as sources. Similarly, Th/Nb of Archean mafic-ultramafic rocks increase with time and a predominance of low Th/Nb prior to ~3.0–3.3 Ga indicates a paucity of subduction-related setting, whereas higher Th/Nb after ~3.0–3.3 Ga point to widespread subduction. The data suggest that the Earth transitioned from a geodynamic mode dominated by vertical tectonics and plume activity with subordinate intermittent subduction at ~3.3–3.0 Ga to a regime akin to modern-style plate tectonics, dominated by magmatism in subduction zones.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 太古宙全球地球动力学：来自全球多个克拉通TTG岩系和地幔衍生岩的地球化学视角

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文解决早太古代地球动力学是板块构造还是垂向构造与地幔柱活动主导的争议。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用全球TTG和镁铁质-超镁铁质岩数据库及批次熔融计算约束源区构造背景。
summary_bullets.key_findings: ~3.2 Ga前TTG源自高原玄武岩，~3.0-3.3 Ga后Th/Nb升高指示俯冲作用普及。
summary_bullets.innovation: 用Th/Nb比值系统对比TTG与现代构造环境基性岩以鉴别俯冲与非俯冲源区。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为早地球从垂向构造向板块构造体制转变的时间提供定量地球化学约束。

works.title: Pre-main-ore fluid pulses and fluid pathway preparation for Mo enrichment in the Rongga porphyry Mo deposit, Tibet, China
works.abstract: Porphyry Mo deposits commonly form through multistage magmatic–hydrothermal processes, but the role of pre-main-ore fluid pulses in Mo pre-enrichment and fluid pathway preparation remains poorly constrained. The Rongga deposit is the first recognized porphyry Mo system in the otherwise Cu–Au-dominated Bangong–Nujiang metallogenic belt, Tibet. Its ore-related magmas were derived from a relatively Mo-poor juvenile lower-crust. Here, we combine refined quartz-vein classification with pyrite LA-ICP-MS spot analyses, elemental mapping and unsupervised clustering to evaluate mineral-scale records of fluid influx and Mo enrichment. The vein system includes early A quartz–pyrite veins, transitional AB quartz–pyrite–molybdenite veins, main-stage B quartz–molybdenite veins and late D quartz–pyrite ± polymetallic sulfide veins. Pyrite trace-element data show a stage-related shift from Co–Ni–As-rich A-vein pyrite to mixed Co–Ni–As and Cu–Ag–Zn–Mn–Mo signatures in AB-vein pyrite, Cu–Ag–Zn–Mn–Mo-enriched B-vein pyrite and Pb–Bi–Te-rich D-vein pyrite. AB-vein pyrite occupies an intermediate but distinguishable position between A- and B-vein pyrite. Mo statistics show that B-vein pyrite has the highest median Mo content, whereas AB-vein pyrite records the highest maximum and mean Mo contents. Elemental maps and time-resolved signals further show that Mo-rich domains in AB-vein pyrite occur in both internal and rim/fracture-related domains and reflect mixed Mo-bearing components, including submicroscopic phases and fracture-related fillings, rather than purely lattice-bound Mo in pyrite. These results indicate that Mo enrichment at Rongga was not restricted to the main B-vein stage. We suggest that episodic AB-stage fluid influx promoted localized Mo pre-enrichment and reactivation of earlier vein structures, thereby preparing favorable sites for focused molybdenite precipitation during B-vein formation.
works.label: consider

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在约束前主成矿流体脉冲在钼预富集与流体通道准备中的作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用石英脉分类、黄铁矿LA-ICP-MS原位分析、元素填图及无监督聚类方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: AB阶段流体脉冲使早期脉体结构活化和钼局部预富集，为B阶段辉钼矿沉淀创造了有利条件。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在矿物尺度揭示过渡性流体脉冲对斑岩钼矿富集过程的准备作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解源区贫钼背景下斑岩钼矿形成机制和流体演化提供了新的精细约束。

works.title: When tholeiitic magma mimic alkaline magma: Formation of Na-Ca amphiboles and aenigmatite driven by fluid contamination
works.abstract: The emplacement of tholeiitic sills into unconsolidated, volatile-rich sediments provides a unique context to investigate magma–fluid–sediment interactions and their effects on crystallisation. We present petrographic, geochemical, isotopic, and thermodynamic evidence from the ~75 m thick sill at Site U1546 of IODP Expedition 385 in the Guaymas Basin. The sill displays a heterogeneous internal architecture composed of basaltic margins enriched in K₂O and biotite, a doleritic core representative of the primary tholeiitic magma, and coarse-grained gabbroic domains enriched in Na₂O and containing amphibole and aenigmatite. The rocks that compose the pseudogabbroic domains display a texture similar to that gabbro, but their origin is unclear. For this reason, the term “pseudogabbro” will be used throughout the text to refer to them. Geochemical and isotopic data indicate that all lithologies originate from the same parental magma, but their mineralogical differences reflect local contamination and hydration processes. The basaltic margins are contaminated by the infiltration of K-rich metamorphic fluids generated in the contact aureoles, whereas the pseudogabbros formed through fractional crystallisation of a hydrated residual melt of highly alkaline composition, with amphibole and aenigmatite stabilised under variable redox conditions. Thermodynamic models support a two-step crystallisation history involving (1) equilibrium crystallisation of the primary magma, followed by (2) hydration of an incipient mush by infiltration of sediment pore waters, accompanied by fluctuations in fO₂ and late fluid exsolution. These processes illustrate how tholeiitic magmas emplaced in sedimentary basins can mimic alkaline systems through fluid-driven contamination, resulting in the formation of mineralogical assemblages atypical of tholeiitic intrusions. Such mechanisms are critical for understanding volatile transfer, mineral diversity, and redox evolution in shallow magmatic systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 拉斑玄武质岩浆模拟碱性岩浆：流体混染驱动钠钙角闪石与三斜闪石的生成

summary_bullets.research_question: 拉斑玄武质岩浆侵入富挥发分沉积物后，如何通过流体-沉积物相互作用产生类似碱性岩的矿物组合？
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合岩相学、地球化学、同位素分析和热力学模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 所有岩性源自同一母岩浆，边缘富钾黑云母、假辉长岩含角闪石和钠铁闪石，系流体污染与分级结晶所致。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示了流体污染驱动拉斑岩浆氧化还原波动，产生非典型碱性矿物集合体的机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解浅部岩浆系统挥发分转移、矿物多样性及氧化还原演化提供关键机制。

works.title: West Antarctic Ice Sheet advance since the early Pliocene
works.abstract: Abstract Current understanding of past ice dynamics in the Amundsen Sea—the most vulnerable part of the West Antarctic ice sheet (WAIS)—remains incomplete, hampering future predictions. Here, sediments from International Ocean Discovery Program Site U1532 on the continental rise reveal that ice-sheet dynamics strongly influenced detrital magnetic minerals supply. Minimal magnetite concentration during ~4.1-3.8 Ma reflects the smallest WAIS extent in the Amundsen Sea sector since ~4.33 Ma. Since ~4.1 Ma, WAIS expansion was closely linked to long-term global cooling. After ~3.2 Ma, elevated fine-grained magnetite indicates a sustained increase in sediment contribution from the Thwaites Glacier catchment. The abrupt ice-sheet expansion at ~3.2 Ma may reflect the crossing of a climatic threshold that triggered qualitative transformations in ice-sheet development. Cessation of major WAIS growth after ~0.9 Ma aligns with stabilized long-term CO 2 levels and ocean temperatures. Collectively, these results underscore the high sensitivity of the Amundsen Sea sector to global climate forcing.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 西南极冰盖自早上新世以来的推进

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究上新世早期以来阿蒙森海区西南极冰盖的动态演变及其对全球气候强迫的响应。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用IODP U1532站位沉积物，分析碎屑磁性矿物的供应变化反演冰盖历史。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 约3.2 Ma冰盖急剧扩张标志气候阈值跨越，0.9 Ma后生长停滞与CO₂和海洋温度稳定同步。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过磁性矿物浓度揭示阿蒙森海区冰盖最小范围及阶段性扩张与气候阈值的联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示西南极冰盖对全球气候的高敏感性，为预测未来冰盖消融和气候响应提供依据。

works.title: Geochemical and Isotopic Constraints on Long‐Lived Source Enrichment and Mantle Evolution in Paleoproterozoic Cratonic Lamprophyres
works.abstract: Abstract The cratonic lithospheric mantle records complex metasomatic processes and is frequently tapped by alkaline magmatism, offering a unique opportunity to trace the progressive evolution of the mantle. In the present contribution, we investigate a newly identified calc‐alkaline lamprophyre field from the Neoarchean Jonnagiri Schist Belt, Eastern Dharwar Craton, southern India. Petrographic and mineralogical observations reveal reversely zoned amphibole phenocrysts, indicating magma mixing and recharge within a multi‐level magma plumbing system. Amphibole cores, interpreted as antecrysts, crystallized in a deep‐seated magma reservoir (∼20 km) and were later overgrown by rims equilibrated with a more mafic melt at shallower crustal levels (∼7 km), recording a dynamic history of magmatic evolution. 40 Ar/ 39 Ar age (2,200–2,400 Ma) of the lamprophyres cast a significantly distinct Paleoproterozoic calc‐alkaline event that predates the widespread Mesoproterozoic (∼1,100 Ma) alkaline magmatism elsewhere in the craton. Whole‐rock geochemistry characterized by negative Nb‐Ta, Zr‐Hf, and Ti anomalies in the spidergram, suggests derivation from a sub‐continental lithospheric mantle source modified by slab‐derived fluids during the Neoarchean subduction. The Th/Yb (5.3–2.5) and Nb/U (9.4–2.1) trace‐element ratios, and the fractionated LREE/HREE pattern (La N /Yb N : 29–18) of the investigated lamprophyres are indistinguishable from those of lamprophyres from the Superior‐ and Yilgarn‐ Cratons. Near Chondritic εNd i signatures and enriched Archean mantle‐like Sr isotopic signatures imply a short residence time of the generated magma after metasomatic modification. The geodynamic setup of the Jonnagiri schist belt reflects post‐collisional reworking of the subduction‐modified lithosphere, possibly triggered by the slab break‐off and asthenospheric upwelling during the waning period of Neoarchean accretion. Partial melting of this enriched mantle during the Paleoproterozoic (∼2.3 Ga), likely related to Superia supercontinent break‐up, contributed to the polychronous magmatic activity in this domain. The Jonnagiri lamprophyres record the prolonged influence of a subduction‐enriched lithospheric domain tapped episodically during the Neoarchean to Mesoproterozoic.

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示古元古代克拉通煌斑岩的富集地幔源区性质及岩石圈地幔长期演化过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学、矿物化学、氩-氩定年、全岩地球化学及Sr-Nd同位素分析。

summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解克拉通地幔长期富集与多期熔融事件提供了关键岩石探针，对超大陆裂解机制有启示。

works.title: Termination of the Trans-North China Orogenesis: Evidence for ∼1.81 Ga Rapid Cooling and Exhumation in the Zanhuang Complex
works.abstract: The Trans-North China Orogen (TNCO), marking the final amalgamation of the Western and Eastern Blocks of the North China Craton (NCC), provides key insights into Paleoproterozoic crustal evolution and the assembly of the Columbia supercontinent. Here, we investigate garnet-bearing amphibolites derived from mafic volcanic protoliths of the Liyanghe Formation (Zanhuang Group) in the Zanhuang Complex of the central TNCO. Petrography and phase equilibria modeling delineate a clockwise P–T trajectory suggesting a peak high-pressure (HP) amphibolite-facies stage (M2: 1.32–1.63 GPa, 715–750 °C) followed by near-isothermal decompression to lower-pressure amphibolite-facies conditions (M3: 0.61–0.88 GPa, 680–718 °C). Furthermore, high-Ti amphibole compositions and oriented rutile exsolution within garnet provide evidence for a cryptic granulite-facies thermal peak, the diagnostic mineral records of which were likely obliterated by pervasive suprasolidus re-equilibration. Multi-mineral LA-ICP-MS U–Pb geochronology reveals a probable temporal decoupling between peak and cooling stages: metamorphic zircon dating constrains the timing of peak metamorphism to 1870 ± 8 Ma and 1868 ± 8 Ma, whereas cooling phases are consistently younger, with titanite at 1810 ± 16 Ma, rutile at 1799 ± 12 Ma and 1805 ± 6 Ma, and apatite at 1812 ± 31 Ma. Our results demonstrate a prolonged deep crustal residence (∼60 Myr) with negligible cooling (<1 °C/Myr), followed by rapid exhumation at ∼1.81 Ga with a cooling rate of 11.8 - 5.8 + 23.9 °C/Myr. These findings support a Paleoproterozoic final collision model for the TNCO and attribute this rapid ∼1.81 Ga exhumation to lithospheric delamination or slab break-off, marking the definitive collapse of the orogen.

works.title: Late Triassic–Early Jurassic I-type leucogranites and quartz diorites from the Kaçkar Batholith (Eastern Pontides, NE Türkiye): Implications for the generation of highly evolved felsic magmas at convergent plate boundaries
works.abstract: This study examines Late Triassic–Early Jurassic I-type leucogranites and quartz diorites from the Kaçkar Batholith (NE Türkiye) to constrain the origin of highly evolved felsic magmas at convergent plate boundaries. Zircon UPb ages indicate crystallization of the Yedigöl quartz diorites and Sırakonaklar leucogranites at ~210–207 Ma, whereas the Altıparmak leucogranites record a younger felsic event at ~192 Ma, documenting episodic magmatism across the Triassic–Jurassic transition. The quartz diorites are calc-alkaline and metaluminous, displaying positive zircon Ce anomalies without Eu depletion, consistent with oxidized, hydrous, mantle-influenced magmas and limited plagioclase fractionation. In contrast, the leucogranites are evolved, weakly peraluminous, and characterized by very low Sr contents and pronounced negative Eu anomalies in both whole-rock and zircon chemistry, reflecting strong feldspar-controlled internal differentiation. The leucogranites include perthite- and antiperthite-bearing varieties, recording contrasting KNa feldspar systematics during magma evolution. All lithologies display mantle-influenced Sr–Nd–Pb and zircon LuHf isotopic signatures consistent with an I-type, juvenile-dominated origin, excluding derivation from metasedimentary sources. Geochemical constraints indicate that the leucogranites did not form through simple fractional crystallization of quartz diorite magmas, but instead originated from feldspar-retentive partial melting of meta-igneous lower crust, driven by sustained thermal input from mantle-influenced magmatism within a vertically coupled arc system and followed by feldspar-dominated differentiation. Enrichment in Nb, Ta, Th, and U reflects magmatic fertility and late-stage accessory mineral concentration rather than economically significant rare-metal mineralization. Overall, the results highlight episodic felsic magma generation above a south-dipping subduction zone during Late Triassic–Early Jurassic.

works.title: Heavy silicon isotope and mass-independent mercury isotope fractionation signals of Archean TTGs: Insights into the recycling of the silicified oceanic crust in the source region
works.abstract: Tonalite-trondhjemite-granodiorite (TTG), the main constituent of the Archean Earth's continental crust, is widely believed to originate from the partial melting of hydrated metamorphic basalts. However, the tectonic setting of the TTG's origin and thus the Archean Earth evolution remains poorly understood. In this study, we performed silicon (Si) isotope, mercury (Hg) isotope, and geochemical data analysis on 3.06 Ga to 2.5 Ga TTG samples from the Dunhuang Block, at the eastern margin of the Tarim Craton, to investigate their protolith composition and the formation environment. The δ30Si values of quartz in these Dunhuang TTG samples range from +0.05 ± 0.07‰ (2SD) to +0.25 ± 0.08‰ (2SD). These consistently heavy quartz Si isotope compositions may indicate that the silicified oceanic crust was incorporated into their protoliths. The Δ199Hg values of the 3.06–2.7 Ga Dunhuang TTG samples range from −0.05‰ to +0.09‰. In contrast, the 2.6–2.5 Ga samples exhibit a wider range (−0.11‰ to +0.14‰), indicating that the younger Dunhuang TTG protolith composition were no longer homogeneous and incorporated supracrustal materials. Coupled SiHg isotopes suggest that supracrustal recycling was a key process in the generation of the Dunhuang TTGs, and that the protolith composition of the 2.6–2.5 Ga Dunhuang TTGs experienced a change compared to the earlier Dunhuang TTG samples. Combined with phase equilibrium modeling and geochemical data, we speculate that the subduction model may represent a reasonable explanation for the formation environment of 2.6–2.5 Ga Dunhuang TTGs, although non-subduction models cannot be ruled out.

works.title: Transformation of Refractory Oceanic Lithospheric Mantle by Reactive Melt Infiltration: An Experimental Study on the Roles of Temperature, Melt Volume and Ascent Velocity
works.abstract: Abstract Reactive melt infiltration critically modifies the physical and chemical properties of the oceanic lithospheric mantle (OLM). This process, involving melt‐rock reactions and in situ crystallization, exhibits substantial spatial and temporal variability driven by melt volume and ascent velocity. To explore how eclogite/pyroxenite‐derived plume melts transform refractory OLM, we conducted coupled reaction and in situ crystallization experiments at 2 GPa, systematically varying temperature, melt/rock ratio, and duration. We demonstrate that higher temperatures, lower melt/rock ratios, and shorter durations promote only orthopyroxene precipitation coupled with olivine dissolution, thereby preserving the starting harzburgitic lithology. In contrast, lower temperatures, higher melt/rock ratios, and longer durations facilitate clinopyroxene and orthopyroxene crystallization, converting refractory OLM harzburgite into fertile lherzolite or localized websterite. Beyond the well‐established influences of pressure and temperature, our study underscores the pivotal roles of melt volume and ascent velocity in governing metasomatism. This study reveals that clinopyroxene formed by high‐pressure (2 GPa) reactive melt infiltration explains clinopyroxene compositions in ocean island basalt–hosted mantle xenoliths, including high Na 2 O and TiO 2 and low Mg# and Cr#. Furthermore, these mineralogical transformations significantly alter OLM geophysical properties, reducing shear‐wave velocity by ∼2.2%–5.4% and increasing density by ∼1.4%–2.2%. We therefore propose that reactive melt infiltration explains shallow (50–60 km depth) low‐velocity anomalies observed in mature oceanic lithosphere (90–110 km thick) above a mantle plume. Concurrently, the associated density increase may induce delamination of metasomatized OLM, accompanied by buoyant ascent of underlying high‐temperature melting residues, ultimately driving vertical mantle convection within the plume.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth

works.title: Near-inertial internal waves funneled into Taylor caps shape seamount tops, with implications for biodiversity in the deep ocean
works.abstract: Internal waves are energetic and ubiquitous in the ocean and their interactions with submarine topography could drive sediment resuspension and reshape seafloor substrate. However, the mechanisms governing these interactions are largely unknown. Here, using observational and reanalysis data at Pacific deep-sea seamounts, we show how near-inertial internal waves (NIWs) may affect substrate variability via interactions with seamounts. Taylor caps with anticyclonic vorticity generated above the seamounts can act as a “chimney” that focuses NIW energy. The NIWs can further undergo reflection at the summits and generate strong bottom currents to erode sediments. As wind energy input to NIWs increases with latitude, this process could contribute to the removal of sediments at seamount summits further north than 20°N, exposing the rock outcrops needed for biogenic structuring species and thus boosting species richness. Given that Taylor caps occur at ~93% of the global seamounts, our findings suggest a wave-topography interaction that could shape the substrate and enrich the biodiversity in the deep ocean.

works.title: Green chelating agent‒hydrofluoric acid synergy enables sustained mineral dissolution for near-wellbore stimulation in geological CO2 storage formations
works.abstract: Chemical stimulation to enhance near-wellbore permeability can be important where injectivity improvement is needed in low-permeability deep saline aquifer rocks relevant to geological carbon dioxide storage. Hydrofluoric acid-based stimulation accelerates silicate dissolution, but silica-rich secondary phases may impair permeability if dissolved silicon accumulates excessively. Here we present a stimulation strategy that combines a biodegradable glutamic-acid-derived chelating agent with ammonium bifluoride and brine flushing to sustain mineral dissolution while controlling the fate of dissolved silicon. Laboratory batch and flow-through experiments on sandstone and sandy siltstone from deep saline aquifers show that dissolved silicon can be temporarily removed from the aqueous phase as sodium hexafluorosilicate and then flushed out under diluted conditions. This process sustained mineral dissolution and increased both brine and nitrogen permeabilities by more than one order of magnitude within several hours, demonstrating promise for near-wellbore treatment of low-permeability storage formations. A strategy for sustained mineral dissolution may help improve near-wellbore injectivity in reservoir rocks relevant to geological carbon dioxide storage, according to a green chelating agent and hydrofluoric acid in batch and core-flooding experiments on deep saline aquifer sandstone and sandy siltstone.

works.title: Craton-margin lithosphere drives rare earth element ore-forming carbonatite magmatism
works.abstract: The majority of light rare earth element (LREE) resources are derived from carbonatite-associated deposits at cratonic margins. However, the origin of ore-forming carbonatite magmas remains unclear. Here, we conducted high pressure-temperature experiments to investigate LREE behavior during carbonate-rich sediment recycling. Results show that, during subduction, the calcic carbonates progressively concentrate LREE, becoming the principal LREE carriers and, upon melting at higher pressures, generate LREE-rich melts. As the melts ascend through cratonic lithospheric mantle, precipitation of extremely LREE-poor magnesite induces further enrichment, producing melts with LREE concentrations up to 156 times those of sedimentary carbonates. These melts are comparable to natural ore-forming carbonatites, highlighting that craton-margin lithosphere drives LREE ore-forming carbonatite magmatism. Our global compilation shows that LREE concentrations in carbonatites positively correlate with the associated deposit tonnage, suggesting that ore-forming carbonatites fundamentally control the deposit reserve magnitude. These findings provide a unified framework for the formation and global distribution of carbonatite-hosted deposits at cratonic margins. Experiments show that recycling carbonate-rich sediments at craton margins concentrates rare earth elements, generating highly enriched carbonatite melts that form major ore deposits.

works.title: ẟ88/86Sr and 87Sr/86Sr variability in global carbonatites: Implications for the role of mineralogy, hydrothermal alteration, and crustal recycling
works.abstract: We report ẟ88/86Sr values (relative to NIST SRM 987), measured using a double-spike thermal ionization mass spectrometry (DS-TIMS) technique, and 87Sr/86Sr of twenty-one whole rock (WR) globally distributed carbonatites, whose eruption ages range from Proterozoic to recent. Most carbonatites show ẟ88/86Sr values (0.22–0.33 ‰) which broadly overlap with the estimated ẟ88/86Sr value of the bulk silicate Earth (BSE, 0.27 ± 0.05 ‰) (Moynier et al., 2010). Three carbonatite samples from Ambadongar, India (0.36–0.40 ‰) along with a fluorspar from Ambadongar (1.13 ‰), show higher ẟ88/86Sr values caused by secondary hydrothermal processes, supported by presence of hydrothermal minerals. Silicate igneous rocks (alkali basalts) from Phenai Mata, genetically linked to the Ambadongar carbonatites, show slightly lower ẟ88/86Sr values (0.21–0.26 ‰) that most-likely result from higher abundances of plagioclase. In contrast to the ẟ88/86Sr values, 87Sr/86Sr ratios in these carbonatites show significant variation (0.702007–0.710425), with younger carbonatites showing more radiogenic ratios. The ẟ88/86Sr values in global carbonatites cannot be explained by partial melting, fractional crystallization or liquid immiscibility. The BSE-like ẟ88/86Sr values are best explained by combined contributions of different components of the recycled lithosphere (marine carbonates, unaltered oceanic crust and altered oceanic crust) and their interaction with the upper mantle. A Monte Carlo simulation was performed using published values of concentrations and isotopic compositions of these lithospheric endmembers as well as the upper mantle by varying the contributions of these lithospheric components. The modelled (median Rmix) ẟ88/86Sr value of the subducting lithosphere overlaps with that of the BSE but the modelled 87Sr/86Sr is more radiogenic than the depleted mantle or bulk silicate Earth (CHUR), both consistent with our measurements.
