works.title: Late Paleozoic (ca. 300 Ma) eclogite belt on Hainan Island, South China, probably related to the Paleo-Pacific subduction system
works.abstract: Hainan Island in South China lies at the intersection of the Paleo-Tethyan and Paleo-Pacific tectonic regimes. The discovery of Carboniferous oceanic-type eclogites at Chaotanbi on northeastern Hainan Island offers a novel perspective for elucidating the early tectonic evolution of the Southeast Asian continent. Recently, new eclogite exposures have been recognized at Gongmiao and Yadunling, ∼70−100 km southwest of the Chaotanbi eclogites. These eclogites occur as kilometer-scale tectonic lenses in the Huangzhuling Complex, which predominantly comprises Late Devonian gneissic granites with subordinate Silurian clastic metasedimentary rocks. The Gongmiao eclogites generally preserve a primary mineral assemblage of garnet + omphacite + quartz + (rutile + ilmenite) ± amphibole ± zoisite or allanite, with rare kyanite or phengite. Peak pressure-temperature conditions during eclogite-facies metamorphism are estimated at 750−830 °C and 18.5−21.2 kbar, followed by decompressional cooling through amphibolite-facies (690−740 °C and 8.6−12.6 kbar) to greenschist- and prehnite-pumpellyite−facies conditions. The Yadunling eclogites consist mainly of garnet + omphacite (completely symplectized in the matrix) + amphibole + quartz + (rutile + ilmenite) ± epidote ± calcite. They record a metamorphic history from prograde stage at 490−540 °C and 10.7−14.0 kbar to peak stage at 620−700 °C and 16.2−17.9 kbar, followed by near-isothermal decompression (620−670 °C and 8.7−12.7 kbar) and subsequent cooling to greenschist-facies conditions. Ion microprobe zircon U-Pb ages constrain eclogite protoliths to 359 ± 2 Ma (Gongmiao) and metamorphism to 310−295 Ma, with rutile cooling ages of 295−285 Ma. Trace element geochemical analyses indicate that the Gongmiao eclogites have an island arc geochemical signature, with bulk-rock initial εNd values of −1.0 to +2.7 and an average zircon initial εHf value of +11.1, whereas the Yadunling eclogites display affinities consistent with normal mid-ocean-ridge basalt, with initial εNd values of +5.5 to +6.2. These data suggest that their protoliths correspond to arc-type gabbros and oceanic basalts, respectively, formed in a backarc basin environment. Minor siliceous rocks (with terrigenous detritus) within or adjacent to the Yadunling eclogites likely experienced synchronous metamorphism and deformation along with the eclogites. However, the widespread gneissic granites and clastic metasedimentary rocks underwent only low-grade metamorphism at ca. 285 Ma. This implies that the eclogites were tectonically juxtaposed with these country rocks during their exhumation. The coeval Gongmiao, Yadunling, and Chaotanbi eclogites define a >100 km NE-SW−trending medium- to high-temperature eclogite belt on eastern Hainan Island. The formation of this eclogite belt is inferred to be related to the opening and closure of a backarc basin and subsequent arc-continent collision, which are induced by the retreating to advancing subduction of the western Paleo-Pacific oceanic lithosphere during the late Paleozoic.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华南海南岛晚古生代（约300 Ma）榴辉岩带：可能与古太平洋俯冲系统有关

summary_bullets.research_question: 海南岛晚古生代榴辉岩的形成构造背景及其与古太平洋俯冲系统的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过离子探针锆石U-Pb定年、微量元素和同位素地球化学及变质相平衡分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现一条>100 km的310–295 Ma中高温榴辉岩带，原岩为弧后盆地岛弧辉长岩和洋中脊玄武岩。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在海南岛东部揭示由古太平洋俯冲回撤-前进引起的弧后盆地闭合榴辉岩带。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解古太平洋与古特提斯构造域交汇及东南亚晚古生代演化提供关键约束。

works.title: Slab tearing and its surface signals controlled by passive margin strength
works.abstract: Abstract Slab tearing, the lateral detachment of subducting oceanic slab from continental lithosphere, is widely inferred from seismic tomography, yet its surface expressions in mountain belts and adjacent foreland basins remain ambiguous and often contradictory. Existing geodynamic models predict that slab tearing propagates at unrealistically high velocities, implying its transient signatures unlikely to be preserved in surface or stratigraphic records. In contrast, geological observations, such as lateral migration of foreland basin depocenters and systematic basin thickening in the direction of tear propagation, indicate more persistent surface responses, highlighting a long-standing disconnect between models and field evidence. Here we resolve this paradox by showing that lateral variations in passive-margin strength fundamentally control the initiation, propagation, and surface imprint of slab tearing. Using fully coupled three-dimensional thermo-mechanical and surface-process simulations, we demonstrate that accounting for passive-margin heterogeneity significantly slows tear propagation and produces long-lived tectonostratigraphic signatures consistent with natural examples from the Alps, Carpathians, Zagros, and other orogenic belts. These results bridge deep-mantle dynamics and surface geological records, providing a unified framework to identify and interpret slab tearing in orogenic systems worldwide.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 板片撕裂及其地表信号受被动陆缘强度控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 为何板片撕裂的地球动力学模型预测与地表地质记录之间存在矛盾？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用全耦合三维热-力学与地表过程模拟，结合被动陆缘强度横向变化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 被动陆缘强度的横向不均一性显著减缓撕裂传播速度，产生持久的地表响应。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在板片撕裂模型中融入被动陆缘的非均质性，统一了深部动力学与地表记录。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解释全球造山带中的板片撕裂现象提供了统一框架，连接深部与地表过程。

works.title: Fluid pathways, geochemical zonation, and exploration of Carlin-type gold deposits, Youjiang Basin, China: insights from the Lannigou 3D geochemical system
works.abstract: The Youjiang Basin in southwestern China is the world’s second-largest province of Carlin-type gold deposits, yet its exploration potential remains underexplored compared to its counterpart in Nevada, USA. A primary challenge has been the lack of robust, data-driven metallogenic models to guide the search for deeper, concealed orebodies. This study addresses this critical knowledge gap by conducting a comprehensive geochemical investigation of the Lannigou deposit, the largest fault-controlled Carlin-type gold deposit in the basin. In this work, we integrated large, spatially matched geochemical datasets from deep drill-core rock (n = 449) and surface soil (n = 2,280) samples. Through comprehensive statistical analyses, mass transfer calculations, and innovative three-dimensional spatial visualization, we successfully (1) identified distinct ore-related (Au-As-Hg-Sb-Ag-Tl-W-Mo) and diagenetic (Bi, Co, Cu, Ni, Zn, Pb) elemental suites, delineating their controlling geological mechanisms; (2) established a robust vertical geochemical zonation pattern (Mo → Tl → Sb → W → As → Au → Ag → Hg), which serves as a powerful vector for assessing the erosional level of mineralizing systems; and (3) revealed the critical role of a deep-seated, bedding-parallel detachment fault (F1) as a master conduit, channeling ore-forming fluids from basement structures into shallower, ore-hosting reverse faults. Based on these findings, we propose a new metallogenic model wherein ore-forming fluids ascended from depth, migrated laterally along this major detachment fault, and subsequently precipitated gold within structurally favorable traps, such as secondary reverse faults on anticlinal limbs. Our metallogenic model and the identified geochemical vectors offer robust and actionable criteria for targeting concealed Carlin-type orebodies in the Youjiang Basin and analogous terranes worldwide.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 右江盆地卡林型金矿床的流体通道、地球化学分带与找矿勘探：来自烂泥沟三维地球化学系统的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 右江盆地卡林型金矿缺乏数据驱动的成矿模型以指导深部隐伏矿体勘探。
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合深部岩心与地表土壤的大规模地球化学数据，通过统计分析和三维空间可视化研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出矿化与成岩元素组合，建立了Mo→Tl→Sb→W→As→Au→Ag→Hg的垂直分带序列，并揭示滑脱断层作为主要导矿通道。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次构建烂泥沟矿床三维地球化学系统，提出以分带序列为向量定位隐伏矿体的新成矿模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为右江盆地及全球类似地质背景的卡林型金矿勘探提供可操作的找矿准则。

works.title: Tungsten‐Tin Mineralization and Its Dynamic Background in the Bozhushan Ore District, Southeastern Yunnan: Constraints From Petrology, Geochronology and Geochemistry
works.abstract: ABSTRACT The W–Sn–Ag–Pb–Zn polymetallic deposit in the Bozhushan ore concentration area is closely related to Late Cretaceous magmatic activity, and the diagenetic age of the granite body is 88.8–87.1 Ma. The granites in the Bozhushan ore district are characterized by high silica and aluminium contents, high abundances of Rb, Sr, Sn and Th, and low contents of Ba, P and Ti. The granites are peraluminous S‐type granites that underwent fractional crystallization during magmatic evolution. The ε Hf ( t ) values of the zircons from −17.92 to −1.77, with T DM2 age ranging from 1.1 to 2.0 Ga, indicate that they may be mainly derived from partial melting of the lower crust without the addition of mantle‐derived materials. The Late Cretaceous magmatic activity in the Bozhushan area formed in a syn‐collisional tectonic environment and transitioned to a post‐collisional orogenic environment. In the later stage, it transforms into a post‐collisional extensional environment. The upwelling of deep‐seated asthenospheric melts has provided substantial fluxes of W, Sn, Pb, Zn and other ore‐forming elements. The ore‐forming fluid and materials carried by magma rise and migrate along favourable parts of the structure to precipitate and mineralize. Therefore, understanding the tungsten‐tin metallogenic history in the Bozhushan ore district is important.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 滇东南薄竹山矿集区的钨锡成矿作用及其动力学背景：来自岩石学、地质年代学和地球化学的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示滇东南薄竹山矿区钨锡多金属成矿作用与晚白垩世岩浆活动的成因联系及动力学背景。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用岩石学、锆石U-Pb年代学、全岩地球化学及锆石Hf同位素分析方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 花岗岩为过铝质S型，源于下地壳部分熔融，形成于同碰撞向后碰撞伸展转换的动力学环境。
summary_bullets.innovation: 精确厘定了岩浆-成矿时限，并限定了从同碰撞到碰撞后伸展的构造体制转换对钨锡成矿的制约。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解华南西部晚白垩世钨锡成矿规律和深部动力学机制提供了重要岩石地球化学约束。

works.title: Initiation of the Gangdese Retroarc Fold‐and‐Thrust Belt in Southern Tibet: Evidence From New Geochronologic Data of the Late Cretaceous Shexing Formation
works.abstract: Abstract The initial exhumation of the fold‐and‐thrust belt in the Gangdese retroarc provides key insights into the development of an Andean‐type continental margin in southern Tibet. Here, we present new zircon U‐Pb geochronology, low‐temperature thermochronology and balanced cross section from the Late Cretaceous retroarc and forearc basins to reconstruct the pre‐collisional exhumation history of the Gangdese fold‐and‐thrust belt. Interbedded andesite and tuffite layers from the upper Shexing Formation in the retroarc basin yield weighted mean U‐Pb ages of 85.5 ± 4.4 and 84.6 ± 0.9 Ma, providing refined constraints on the depositional age. Thermochronologic data from the retroarc and forearc basins record Late Cretaceous‐Cenozoic cooling, with inverse thermal modeling indicating the onset of rapid retroarc exhumation at ∼78–70 Ma, shortly after deposition. This timing likely corresponds to the onset of crustal shortening in the Gangdese retroarc, with a minimum estimate of ∼67% as constrained by balanced cross section restoration. This earliest exhumation signal is also recognized in the forearc and north‐central Lhasa terrane, coinciding with a magmatic lull in the Gangdese arc and northward migration of magmatism. Collectively, we interpret that shallow or flat subduction of the Neo‐Tethyan oceanic lithosphere may have provided the primary geodynamic forcing, whereas surface erosion modulated the mechanical state of the orogenic wedge, jointly promoting Late Cretaceous crustal shortening.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 藏南冈底斯弧背褶皱冲断带的启动：来自晚白垩世设兴组新地质年代学数据的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文解决冈底斯弧后褶皱冲断带初始剥露时间和缩短变形起始问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用碎屑锆石U-Pb定年、低温热年代学及平衡剖面复原方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 弧后快速剥露始于约78–70 Ma，对应地壳缩短启动，最小缩短率达67%。
summary_bullets.innovation: 通过弧后与弧前盆地热年代学对比，揭示晚白垩世地壳缩短的区域同步性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为安第斯型大陆边缘构造演化和新特提斯洋俯冲动力学提供关键约束。

works.title: New Insights Into Hikurangi Subduction Inputs and Megathrust Host Rocks Spanning Along‐Margin Changes in Fault Slip Behavior
works.abstract: Abstract The seismic behavior of subduction megathrusts varies spatially and is influenced by the properties of subducting plates, including their sedimentary cover. Characterizing these subduction inputs is essential for understanding the mechanisms behind fault slip variability. The Hikurangi subduction margin exhibits well‐documented variations in fault slip ranging from large earthquakes to slow slip events and aseismic creeping. The variations coincide with along‐margin changes in convergence rate, trench sediment thickness, and accretionary wedge development. Here, we integrate regional seismic reflection profiles with drill cores from the International Ocean Discovery Program Expeditions 372 and 375, and with other seafloor samples. We find that the Hikurangi Trough hosts some of Earth's thickest trench sediments, at up to 10 km, including pelagic sediments and a >6 km thick siliciclastic trench wedge that is younger than previously thought. Seismic imaging reveals that the shallow megathrust depth increases by 3.5–4.5 km southward along the margin in parallel with increasing trench sediment thickness despite a “step up” of the fault's stratigraphic position to a different assemblage of host rocks. In contrast to the irregular northern megathrust associated with subducting seamounts and heterogeneous volcaniclastic and pelagic host rocks, the southern megathrust is smooth, hosted in calcareous pelagic rocks, and straddles inherited polygonal faults. These along‐strike variations in physical properties and megathrust geometry correspond to observed changes in fault slip behavior. Our findings provide new insights into the factors controlling fault slip variability, with implications for seismic hazard assessment at subduction zones worldwide and for understanding subduction margin evolution.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 对希库朗伊俯冲输入及沿边缘断层滑动行为变化的巨逆冲断层容矿岩石的新认识

summary_bullets.research_question: Hikurangi俯冲带输入物质和巨型逆断层宿主岩石如何影响沿边缘变化的地震滑动行为？
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合区域地震反射剖面、IODP钻探岩心及其他海底样品进行分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 海沟沉积物最厚达10 km，南部巨型逆断层更平滑且层位不同，与滑动行为变化对应。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示巨型逆断层几何与沉积输入的沿走向变化控制断层滑动多样性的新见解。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为俯冲带地震危险性评估和全球俯冲边缘演化研究提供关键约束。

works.title: The birth of the Beringia Arc: A mid-Cretaceous continental volcano-plutonic belt stretching from Russia to Alaska
works.abstract: Cretaceous igneous rocks exposed in the Bering Strait region from the Russian Far East across Seward Peninsula to the Yukon-Koyukuk basin and the Ruby-Farewell terrane of Alaska lack a unifying model for their formation. We present 47 new U-Pb zircon, titanite, and baddeleyite ages from magmatic rocks. The older group consists of 115−102 Ma plutons and volcanic rocks, including ultrapotassic rocks, found in northeastern Russia, islands in the Bering Sea, and on the Seward Peninsula of Alaska. The younger group includes 102−70 Ma plutonic rocks and dikes from the Yukon-Koyukuk basin and on the Seward Peninsula as well as the volcanic rocks of the vast Okhotsk-Chukotka belt in eastern Russia. Many have elevated alkalis and the subalkaline rocks plot in the calc-alkaline field. Most of the rocks with <65 wt% SiO2 are alkaline, whereas more siliceous rocks are generally subalkaline with Nb and Ta troughs, consistent with arc chemistry. Sr and Nd isotopes plot near bulk earth for the most primitive samples, and there is a trend toward more negative εNd and more positive initial 87Sr/86Sr with higher SiO2, which we interpret to indicate varying degrees of crustal contamination of subduction-related parental magmas. Nd model ages average to ca. 800 Ma. We created a tectonic model in GPlates in which collision of island arcs with the continent in the Late Jurassic−Early Cretaceous was followed by a new north-dipping subduction zone, establishing an Andean-type arc system at least 2200 km long. We call this magmatic belt the Beringia Arc. It lasted from 115 Ma to at least 70 Ma before subduction either rolled back or jumped to the south. The Beringia Arc system was coeval with the continental arc represented by the Okhotsk-Chukotka volcanic belt in northeastern Russia that mainly formed from 98 Ma to 80 Ma. This study links the abundant mid-Cretaceous plutonic rocks of the Bering Strait region into a single model of generation in a continental arc.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 白令陆弧的诞生：一条中白垩世从俄罗斯延伸至阿拉斯加的大陆火山-深成岩带

summary_bullets.research_question: 白令海峡地区广泛分布的白垩纪岩浆岩缺乏统一的形成模型，本文旨在建立其成因框架。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用47件新的U-Pb锆石、榍石和斜锆石年龄及全岩Sr-Nd同位素地球化学分析，并结合GPlates构造重建。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出115–102 Ma和102–70 Ma两期岩浆活动，其地球化学特征符合大陆弧属性，母岩浆受到不同程度地壳混染。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出“白令陆弧”概念，将俄罗斯远东至阿拉斯加逾2200公里的中白垩世岩浆岩统一解释为安第斯型大陆弧。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为环北极构造重建、东北亚-北美西北部白垩纪岩浆演化及古太平洋俯冲体制提供了关键约束。

works.title: Syn‐ to Post‐Collisional Tectonic History of the Paleo‐Tethyan Orogenic Belt: Insights From Triassic Igneous Rocks in the North–Central Tibetan Plateau, China
works.abstract: Abstract The closure of the Paleo‐Tethys Ocean was one of the most important global geological events which formed the framework of the East Asian continent during the early Mesozoic. The Longmu Co‐Shuanghu suture zone is considered to record closure of the main basin of the Paleo‐Tethys Ocean. However, the closure processes remain unclear, which crucially impedes our understanding of the tectonic evolution of the Tethyan oceanic system. In this study, we investigated newly discovered Triassic–Jurassic igneous rocks, including diorite, rhyolite, andesite, and dacite, along the Longmu Co–Shuanghu suture zone. The Middle Triassic diorite (ca. 242 Ma) has a geochemical affinity with andesite and is characterized by high Mg# (53.9–60.9) and variable zircon ε Hf ( t ) (−17.8 to +9.0) and whole‐rocks ε Nd ( t ) (+1.25 to +0.87) values. These features indicate that the diorite was generated by interactions between melts of terrigenous sediment and the mantle in an oceanic subduction setting. Late Triassic rhyolite (ca. 213 Ma) has geochemical characteristics typical of A 2 ‐type granite, with zircon ε Hf ( t ) (−9.7 to +11.6) and whole‐rock ε Nd ( t ) (−0.11 to −0.03) values. The Late Triassic rhyolites, and Early Jurassic andesites ( ε Nd ( t ) = −0.59 to −0.43, ε Nd ( t ) = −10.45 to −9.66) are attributed to partial melting of crustal material, combined with ca. 40%–60% mantle‐derived components introduced into the magma source. In contrast, the Jurassic dacites show limited mantle contribution (ca. 10%–20%). Based on data for igneous rocks from the North Qiangtang area, a Late Triassic continental‐crust thinning event occurred at ca. 218 Ma. This event is roughly coeval with regional tectono‐sedimentary evolution in the north–central Tibetan Plateau. Closure of the Longmu Co–Shuanghu Ocean involved subduction (242–230 Ma), syn‐collision (230–218 Ma), and post‐collision (218–188 Ma) stages. The comparable closure histories of the Longmu Co–Shuanghu and Changning–Menglian Oceans indicate a unified closure history of the Paleo‐Tethys Ocean and further suggest that it may have closed nearly synchronously across East Asia.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 古特提斯造山带同碰撞至后碰撞构造历史：来自青藏高原中北部三叠纪火成岩的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 古特提斯洋主洋盆闭合过程尚不清晰，制约了对特提斯洋构造演化的认识。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对龙木错-双湖缝合带新发现的三叠纪-侏罗纪火成岩进行年代学、全岩地球化学及锆石Hf同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出242–230 Ma俯冲、230–218 Ma同碰撞和218–188 Ma后碰撞三个阶段，218 Ma发生陆壳减薄。
summary_bullets.innovation: 通过多阶段火成岩组合揭示了古特提斯洋统一的闭合历史，并提出东亚近乎同步闭合的新认识。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解东亚大陆早中生代格架形成及特提斯洋演化提供关键岩浆记录约束，具有重要区域构造意义。

works.title: Threatened ‘rolling stone reefs’ are surprisingly diverse
works.abstract: DNA study reveals hidden biodiversity off Brazil—and raises alarm over oil exploration
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 受威胁的“滚动石礁”具有惊人的多样性

summary_bullets.research_question: 巴西海域受威胁的“滚动石礁”隐藏着怎样的生物多样性？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用DNA分析技术揭示该生境的隐藏物种组成。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 滚动石礁的生物多样性远超预期，同时面临石油勘探的严重威胁。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用DNA方法全面揭示滚动石礁惊人的隐藏生物多样性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为平衡海洋资源开发与脆弱独特生态系统的保护提供紧迫科学依据。

works.title: Metal isotope composition of sulfide ore deposits
works.abstract: Sulfide-dominated ore deposits host much of the global supply of copper, lead, zinc, silver, gold, and many critical metals. Stable metal isotopes provide a direct means of tracing ore-forming processes, including metal sourcing, fluid-rock interaction, hydrothermal fluid evolution along flow paths, and the conditions of mineral precipitation. This review presents a compilation of isotope data from sulfide minerals and ore samples (N = 8403) from orthomagmatic, magmatic-hydrothermal, and hydrothermal deposits, and systematically evaluates the key processes responsible for isotope fractionation in iron, nickel, copper, zinc, germanium, selenium, molybdenum, silver, tin, antimony, tellurium, mercury, thallium, and lead. Metal isotope systematics in sulfide ore deposits reveal substantial isotopic variability, although most deposit types cluster close to bulk silicate Earth values. Phase separation during mineral growth from fluids, redox transformations, and Rayleigh fractionation are the main processes responsible for this variability. Isotope ranges commonly overlap among deposit types, even where geological settings and ore-forming processes differ, indicating that metal isotopes are generally more useful as tracers of process than as simple fingerprints of deposit type. Moreover, substantial variability may occur among deposits that are otherwise genetically similar, highlighting the complexity of ore formation. Overall, metal isotopes are valuable tools for tracing metal sources and investigating ore-forming processes, but their robust interpretation requires a well-constrained geological framework.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 硫化物矿床的金属同位素组成

summary_bullets.research_question: 硫化物矿床中金属同位素组成如何示踪成矿过程并界定其分馏机制？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过汇编8403个硫化物矿物和矿石样品的多金属同位素数据，系统评估分馏过程。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 大部分矿床同位素值接近地球硅酸盐整体值，同位素变异主要受矿物生长、氧化还原和瑞利分馏控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次大规模跨矿种整合多种金属同位素数据，揭示同位素套用于过程而非矿床类型指纹。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为矿床学家提供了金属同位素应用的综合性参考，强调解释需结合地质背景框架。

works.title: Calcium isotope composition of oceanic mantle peridotite and its fractionation during seafloor alteration
works.abstract: Calcium isotopes serve as a powerful tracer for studying mantle evolution and the global Ca cycle. However, the Ca isotope composition of the oceanic mantle,and the Ca isotope behavior during seawater-peridotite interaction, remain poorly constrained. This study presents Ca isotope data of abyssal peridotites from the Gakkel Ridge and the Southwest Indian Ridge. Minimally altered samples, characterized by loss-on-ignition <2 wt%, Sr content <10 μg/g, normalized CaO/SiO2 and MgO/SiO2 ratio < 0.1, show δ44/40Ca relative to SRM 915a ranging from 0.94 to 1.04‰. This range overlaps the estimation of bulk silicate Earth, indicating no resolvable systematic isotopic offset between the continental and oceanic mantle reservoirs. Heavily altered peridotites with high LOI, Sr content and normalized CaO/SiO2 display significantly lower δ44/40Ca (−0.15 to 0.82‰), along with seawater-like 87Sr/86Sr ratios (0.70907–0.70915). These signatures cannot be attributed to serpentinization, primary silicates dissolution, or adsorption. Instead, the precipitation of aragonite during seafloor weathering is likely responsible for the enrichment of light Ca isotopes in peridotites. A two-endmember mixing model further indicate that the negative correlation between δ44/40Ca and Sr content can be reproduced if the precipitated aragonite has δ44/40Ca ranging from −1.20 to 0.1‰. Overall, these results show that carbonation of peridotite can significantly decrease the δ44/40Ca values. This process may play a critical role in regulating Ca isotope cycling in subduction zone.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 大洋地幔橄榄岩的钙同位素组成及其在海底蚀变过程中的分馏

summary_bullets.research_question: 海洋地幔的钙同位素组成及海水-橄榄岩相互作用中钙同位素分馏行为尚不明确。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对来自Gakkel洋脊和西南印度洋脊的深海橄榄岩进行钙同位素和锶同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 轻微蚀变橄榄岩的δ44/40Ca为0.94–1.04‰，与硅酸盐地球一致；强烈蚀变样品因文石沉淀导致δ44/40Ca显著偏低至−0.15‰。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示海底风化中文石沉淀是导致橄榄岩富集轻钙同位素的主控过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该机制对理解俯冲带钙同位素循环及全球碳-钙耦合具有重要启示。

works.title: Granitic intrusions enhance strain localization and rapid mantle exhumation along an oceanic detachment fault
works.abstract: Serpentinization and magmatism weaken the lithosphere and facilitate mantle exhumation during magma-poor rifting and ultraslow seafloor spreading. However, the complex interplay and timing among these competing mechanisms along detachment faults remain poorly constrained. The International Ocean Discovery Program (IODP) Expedition 402 drilled an incipient oceanic basin in the Tyrrhenian Sea offshore Italy. Recovered cores consist of one sequence of variably deformed granitic intrusions intercalated with slivers of peridotites and another of primarily serpentinized peridotites with heterogeneous deformation and local granitic intrusions. Geochronological and geochemical data reveal that the granites crystallized at 4 million years ago at a depth of ~7 to 9 kilometers and rapidly exhumed within ~0.5 million years, requiring exhumation rates of ~2 centimeters per year. Structural observations show that these granites accommodated significant postcrystallization strain and enhanced localization of detachment faulting. Stable isotopes record serpentinization temperatures of ~200°C, suggesting that serpentinization occurred after the emplacement and deformation of granites. We conclude that weak felsic rocks may enhance strain localization along detachment faults at intermediate depths and aid continental breakup and mantle exhumation.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 花岗岩侵入体增强沿洋底拆离断层的应变局部化和地幔快速剥露

summary_bullets.research_question: 在贫岩浆裂谷和超慢速扩张中，花岗岩侵入如何影响拆离断层应变局部化和地幔剥露？
summary_bullets.methodology: IODP 402钻探获取岩心，结合地质年代学、地球化学、构造观察和稳定同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 4百万年前在~7-9公里深度结晶的花岗岩在~50万年内以~2厘米/年速率剥露，并显著增强拆离断层应变局部化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示长英质花岗岩弱流变层在拆离断层中促进应变集中并加速大陆裂解和地幔剥露。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解贫岩浆裂谷边缘和超慢速扩张脊的构造演化提供了新的机制和速率约束。

works.title: Double volcanic tracks at Hawaii caused by bridgmanite-enriched primordial mantle blobs
works.abstract: Mantle plumes, rising from Earth’s deep interior, are expected to produce a single age-progressive hotspot track. However, Hawaiian volcanoes younger than ~7 million years form two subparallel volcanic chains, the Loa and Kea trends. The mechanism behind this double-track volcanism and its connection to deep mantle reservoirs remain unresolved. Here we show that bridgmanite-enriched primordial mantle blobs (BPMBs) with intrinsic viscosities 10–30 times higher than the ambient mantle can generate bilaterally zoned plumes using three-dimensional thermochemical mantle plume models. Enhanced viscous heating within BPMBs raises plume temperatures asymmetrically, reproducing observed contrasts in isotopic composition, plume temperature, melt flux, and seismic velocity between the Loa and Kea trends. The global occurrence of similar double-track volcanism suggests that BPMBs are scattered within large low velocity provinces (LLVPs), likely remnants of an ancient basal magma ocean. Our results provide a mechanism for double-track volcanism and constraints on the structure and composition of LLVPs. Bridgmanite-enriched primordial mantle blobs (BPMBs) with high viscosity drive Hawaiian double volcanic tracks by inducing compositional and thermal asymmetries in mantle plume, suggesting that BPMBs are dispersed within large low velocity provinces.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 夏威夷双列火山轨迹成因：富布氏镁石的地幔原始团块

summary_bullets.research_question: 夏威夷火山双链（Loa和Kea）的形成机制及其与深部地幔源区的联系是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用三维热化学地幔柱模型，模拟富布氏石原生地幔团块对上升地幔柱的影响。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高粘度富布氏石原生地幔团块造成地幔柱双侧分区，不对称加热解释了双链的成分、温度和熔融差异。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提出富布氏石原生地幔团块通过增强粘性加热导致地幔柱热化学不对称性，从而产生双重火山轨迹。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为全球双链火山现象提供统一机制，并约束了大型低波速省的结构和成分。

works.title: Geochemical Constraints on Spatial‐Temporal Distribution and Origin of Anomalous Mantle in the Western Pacific Basins
works.abstract: Abstract Seafloor basalt samples recovered from the Caroline Basin (CB), the Parece Vela Basin (PVB), and the Western Philippine Sea Plate (WPSP) are analyzed for whole‐rock major and trace elements (including H 2 O), Sr‐Nd‐Pb‐Hf isotopes and 40 Ar‐ 39 Ar age‐dating. Two geochemically distinct mantle domains (I and II) are identified for the first time in these marginal basins and their spatio‐temporal distribution and origin are discussed. The Mantle Domain I (PVB and Ayu Trough basalts) has normal mantle‐like H 2 O/Ce ratios and TiO 2 /V ratios, whereas the Mantle Domain II (WPSP and CB basalts, and Mariana fore‐arc basalts) has distinctly lower TiO 2 /V, distinctly more radiogenic Sr and Pb isotopes and higher H 2 O/Ce ratios. The normal mantle‐like H 2 O/Ce of Mantle Domain I indicates negligible influence from subducted components. We provide evidences that the Mantle Domain II extends to the Pacific large low shear velocity province (LLSVP) based plate tectonic reconstruction, and such an Indian‐type mantle ubiquitously exists beneath the Mesozoic Pacific Plate. Our geochemistry results indicate that the giant mantle plumes in LLSVP have played a key role in transporting lower mantle depleted and H 2 O‐rich components to the upper mantle.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 西太平洋盆地异常地幔时空分布与成因的地球化学制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 西太平洋边缘盆地异常地幔的时空分布与成因是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对海山玄武岩进行全岩主微量、水含量、Sr-Nd-Pb-Hf同位素及40Ar-39Ar定年分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 首次识别出两类地幔域，域II源自下地幔大剪切波低速省的印度型地幔，具有高水含量和富集同位素特征。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在同一边缘盆地体系区分两个地幔域，并建立域II与太平洋LLSVP印度型地幔的联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示深部地幔柱在输送挥发分和造成地幔同位素不均一中的关键作用，对全球地幔迁移模型具有启示。

works.title: Geochemistry of magnetite and pyrite and implications for cobalt enrichment in the Jinshandian skarn Fe deposit, Edong, China
works.abstract: Understanding Co mobility and fluid evolution in skarn Fe systems requires integrated mineral-scale observations, yet such constraints remain limited for the Jinshandian deposit. This study combines field observations, petrography, and in-situ trace-element analyses of magnetite and pyrite to characterize hydrothermal processes and Co enrichment at Jinshandian. Magnetite occurs as endoskarn Mt1 within the intrusion and as exoskarn Mt2 in retrograde skarn, breccias, and massive magnetite ores. Mt1 and Mt2 show distinct trace-element signatures, including decreasing Ti, V, and Al and increasing Zn/V, Sn/Ga, and Co/Ni ratios from the intrusion outward, recording progressively intensified fluid–rock interaction. Pyrite occurs in multiple generations and displays strong Co zoning, with Co contents increasing from early Py1 to vein-type Py3b and is also high values in breccia-hosted Py2. These patterns are consistent with evolving fluid chemistry, enhanced rock buffering, evaporite involvement, and episodic depressurization during ore formation. Collectively, the magnetite–pyrite geochemistry records the hydrothermal evolution of the Jinshandian skarn Fe system and provides insights into the main controls on Co enrichment.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国鄂东金山店矽卡岩铁矿床磁铁矿和黄铁矿的地球化学及其对钴富集的指示

summary_bullets.research_question: Jinshandian矽卡岩铁矿中钴的迁移机制和流体演化过程缺乏矿物尺度的综合约束。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合野外观察、岩相学及磁铁矿与黄铁矿的原位微量元素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 磁铁矿和黄铁矿的微量元素分带记录了流体与围岩反应增强、蒸发岩参与和减压沸腾共同控制钴富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在Jinshandian矿床通过磁铁矿-黄铁矿原位地球化学揭示钴富集的多因素协同控制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为矽卡岩型铁矿中钴的富集机制和找矿预测提供了矿物化学判别依据。

works.title: Coupled Cs–Cl partitioning in granitic melt–fluid systems: implications for Cs fertility and magma differentiation
works.abstract: Cesium is a critical metal commonly enriched in highly fractionated granite–pegmatite systems. Cesium concentrations in fluid inclusions are widely used to assess magma differentiation and Cs fertility in magmatic–hydrothermal systems, yet the enrichment behavior of Cs during progressive crystallization and fluid exsolution remains incompletely understood. Here, we combined fluid–melt partitioning experiments with Rayleigh-type modeling to investigate the coupled behavior of Cs and Cl during progressive magma crystallization and fluid exsolution. The experiments were conducted at 850 °C and 200 MPa using near-metaluminous to strongly peraluminous granitic melts and Cl-bearing aqueous fluids with chlorinities of ∼ 1–4 mol/kg H2O. Experimental results show that Cs partitioning is controlled primarily by fluid chlorinity rather than by the alumina saturation index (ASI) of the melt. Chlorine partitioning also increases strongly with fluid chlorinity, although melt ASI exerts a secondary effect. Cesium remains preferentially in the melt at low chlorinity but becomes increasingly fluid-compatible above ∼ 2 mol/kg H2O, consistent with transport of Cs predominantly as chloride complexes, most likely CsCl0 in the fluid. Rayleigh-type modeling shows that exsolved-fluid chlorinity rapidly decreases toward a lower, nearly stable range near ∼ 1 mol/kg H2O, limiting the duration of efficient Cs extraction. Under the modeled upper-crustal conditions, fluids extract less than ∼ 10% of the total magmatic Cs budget, indicating that fluid exsolution has limited capacity to generate bulk Cs enrichment. Among fluid parameters, fluid Cs/Rb may provide a useful complementary proxy of magma differentiation, but it is not fully independent of salinity and should therefore be applied with caution during the earliest high-salinity stage of fluid exsolution.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 花岗质熔体-流体体系中铯-氯的耦合分配：对铯成矿潜力与岩浆分异作用的指示意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示花岗质岩浆逐渐结晶与流体出溶过程中Cs-Cl的耦合分配行为及其对Cs富集的影响。
summary_bullets.methodology: 在850°C、200 MPa下进行流体-熔体分配实验，结合瑞利分馏模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Cs的分配主要受流体氯度控制，低氯度时倾向熔体，高氯度时进入流体；出溶流体仅能萃取<10%的岩浆Cs。
summary_bullets.innovation: 通过实验和模拟揭示了Cs-Cl耦合行为，定量评估了流体出溶对Cs成矿的有限贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为利用流体包裹体Cs评估岩浆分异和铯成矿潜力提供了机理解释与校正依据。

works.title: Eastward Growth of the Tibetan Plateau Linked to Cenozoic Orogenic Wedge Deformation and Fluctuating Melt Sources
works.abstract: Abstract The India–Asia collision continuously loads the Tibetan Plateau (TP), driving its Cenozoic eastward growth. This process has caused extensive crustal deformation and a diverse magmatic response. Here, we report on newly identified 35−6.5 Ma granitoids from Kangding area in southeastern (SE) TP. Based on elemental and isotopic data obtained from this study, including the first silicon isotope study of the Kangding Cenozoic granites, and data from the literature, the samples can be divided into two subgroups. Subgroup 1 (Sg1) has diagnostic geochemical characteristics (lower MgO, εNd(t), εHf(t)‐zircon, and higher K 2 O/Na 2 O, sum of light rare earth elements, Th, Th/U, Rb/Sr, ( 87 Sr/ 86 Sr) i totally) compared with Sg2. Sg1 also shows a strong correlation ( R 2 = 0.82) between δ 30 Si and Al/Si, while Sg2 does not. The features of Sg1 are best explained by a significant contribution from metasediments. Based on the restricted ages of the Sg1 magmas, we identify a temporary shift in the melt source during the early Miocene (ca. 20–10 Ma). At that time, the source involved the addition of metasedimentary materials, in contrast to the sediment‐poor source during the rest of the Cenozoic. Based on previous geophysical and regional deformation observations, the growth of the TP involved a gradual accentuation of imbrication structures. This was followed by the formation of a stress overload zone and the involvement of a crustal sedimentary source. Lastly, stress unloading formed an asymmetric topography across the SE plateau margin.

works.translated_title: 青藏高原东向生长与新生代造山楔形变形和熔体源区波动的关系

works.title: Genesis of the Kuogeshaye gold deposit, Western Junggar, NW China: Evidence from fluid inclusions, stable isotopes, and mineralogy
works.abstract: The Kuogeshaye gold deposit, located in the southern part of the Western Junggar region, is hosted in Carboniferous volcanic-sedimentary rocks and diorite-granodiorite dikes. Its genesis remains controversial because the sources of ore-forming fluids and mineralization processes are poorly constrained. This study provides new insights into the genesis of the gold deposit and offers guidance for further exploration through investigations of mineralization and alteration characteristics, fluid inclusions, trace-element compositions of quartz, and H-O-C-S isotopes. Ore bodies occur mainly as quartz-sulfide veins controlled by NE- and NNE-trending faults, and the principal ore minerals include arsenopyrite, pyrite, stibnite, native gold, and minor Sb-bearing minerals. Alteration shows zonation from silicification and beresitization to chloritization. Two stages are defined: (Ⅰ) quartz-sulfide and (Ⅱ) quartz-calcite. Fluid inclusions indicate stage Ⅰ formed at 162–286 °C with salinities of 2.2–6.6 wt% NaCl equivalent, whereas stage II formed at lower temperatures and salinities. Isotopic data (δ 18O = 5.3–7.4 ‰, δD = –110.9 to –115.7 ‰, δ 34S = –1.5 to 2.9 ‰) and δ 13C values (–7.8 to –6.7 ‰) indicate the ore-forming fluids were dominantly magmatic in origin, with meteoric water involvement during the late stage. Quartz chemistry shows enrichment in Al and Li but depletion in Ti, Ge, and Sb. These results suggest that the deposit belongs to a medium- to low-temperature magmatic-hydrothermal vein-type gold system, in which fluid boiling triggered gold precipitation. Favorable exploration targets include fault intersections and zones with dense intermediate to acidic dikes, while deeper levels may host porphyry-type mineralization.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西北西准噶尔阔个沙依金矿床成因：来自流体包裹体、稳定同位素及矿物学的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 查清阔个舍耶金矿成矿流体来源与矿化过程，厘定矿床成因类型。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过矿化蚀变特征、流体包裹体、石英微量元素和H-O-C-S同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 矿床为中低温岩浆热液脉型金矿，流体沸腾触发金沉淀，晚阶段有大气水混入。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用石英微量元素结合同位素揭示岩浆源区，建立沸腾成矿机制，提出深部斑岩型找矿方向。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为西准噶尔金矿勘探提供成因模型，指明断裂交汇区和中酸性岩脉密集带有利靶区。

works.title: Phosphorus-nitrogen systematics of first-generation planetesimals constrain life-essential element delivery to Earth
works.abstract: Habitability of rocky planets relies on the budgets of life-essential elements (LEEs) in their building blocks. The provenance and geochemistry of the planetesimals that supplied the LEEs to Earth remain debated. Traditional models argue LEE delivery via outer Solar System chondrites, but their 2 to 4 million-year (Myr) accretion ages preclude them as the first feedstock. To investigate the initial LEE distribution, we reconstructed the phosphorus-nitrogen (P-N) budget of the iron meteorite parent bodies (IMPBs), which accreted
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 第一代星子的磷-氮体系制约地球生命必需元素的输送

summary_bullets.research_question: 第一批形成的星子如何向地球输送生命必需元素，传统外太阳系来源假说是否成立？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过重建早期吸积的铁陨石母体中磷和氮的丰度与分配规律。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 第一代星子的磷-氮预算显著不同于后期球粒陨石，表明早期地球已获生命必需元素。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用铁陨石母体记录约束最早行星胚胎的生命必需元素地球化学特征。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为岩质行星宜居性初始条件与元素来源提供关键制约，修正传统晚期输送模型。

works.title: A fan-shaped subglacial basin province in East Antarctica formed by rotational extension
works.abstract: Abstract Recent sub-ice topography investigations have imaged—with greatly improved detail—a set of low-elevation V-shaped basins hidden beneath a very large sector of the East Antarctic Ice Sheet. Here we jointly interpret sub-ice topography and geophysical data and show that these basins form a semi-continental-sized, fan-shaped physiographic unit that radiates from a focal point near the South Pole. We name this the East Antarctic Fan-Shaped Basin Province. We propose that the fan-like landscape is the product of distributed intraplate rotational extension before the breakup of Gondwana, with three continental-scale consequences. Laterally, to the west, it caused compression and the consequent uplift of the Gamburtsev Mountains. To the east, the northernmost Transantarctic Mountains segment was rotated clockwise by ~20°, overriding the West Antarctic Rift System’s hot lithosphere and causing segmentation of the mountain chain into three blocks and their differential uplift due to thermal buoyancy. To the north, the transcurrent edge of the fan formed the lithospheric weakness that controlled the breakup of Gondwana by driving the propagation of Antarctica–Australia separation and shaping the resulting semi-circular passive continental margins. These processes have influenced the present-day East Antarctica sub-ice landscape and the evolution of the overlying ice sheet, including the development of glacial troughs and outlet glaciers.
