works.title: Zircon Hf-O Isotopes and geochemistry of TTG in the basement of the Bohai Bay Basin: Petrogenesis and implications for ∼3.1 Ga crustal growth in the North China Craton
works.abstract: The Mesozoic-Cenozoic succession of the Bohai Bay Basin (BBB), located within the Eastern Block of the North China Craton (NCC), overlies a heterogeneous Archean basement. This sedimentary cover obscured insights into the region's early crustal evolution. To constrain the cryptic Archean history of the BBB, we present new in-situ zircon U-Pb ages, whole-rock geochemistry, and zircon Hf-O isotope data for TTG gneisses recovered from deep drill cores. This new data provides constraints on crustal growth and evolution of the Precambrian basement under the BBB in the NCC. Magmatic zircon U-Pb dating reveals two distinct episodes of crustal generation at ∼3.1 Ga and ∼2.5 Ga. The Mesoarchean (∼3.1 Ga) TTG rocks differ from previously published TTGs of the NCC. They exhibit high-K calc-alkaline affinities, with pronounced enrichment in large-ion lithophile elements (LILE) and depletion in high-field-strength elements (HFSE), consistent with generation from evolved granitoid magmas. Isotopic data further highlight their distinct character: highly positive εHf(t) values point to a juvenile mantle source, while their unusually low δ 18 O signatures indicate incorporation of isotopically light material during magma genesis. These isotopic signatures, specifically the δ 18 O-depletion, suggest that the petrogenesis of the ∼3.1 Ga TTGs involved the fluxing of fluids derived from hydrothermally altered oceanic slabs. Our results, integrated with previous studies, lead to three main conclusions. First, the Bohai Bay Basin experienced two major Archean magmatic events at ∼3.1 Ga and ∼ 2.5 Ga. Second, the ∼3.1 Ga TTG magmatism was influenced by oceanic fluids introduced during slab subduction. Third, the tectonic setting of the BBB region in the eastern NCC at ∼3.1 Ga reflects the combined effects of mantle plume activity and plate subduction. These findings provide important constraints on the tectonic evolution of the Eastern Block of the North China Craton.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 渤海湾盆地基底TTG的锆石Hf-O同位素及地球化学：岩石成因及其对华北克拉通~3.1 Ga地壳生长的指示

summary_bullets.research_question: 渤海湾盆地基底太古宙TTG片麻岩的岩石成因及其对华北克拉通约31亿年地壳生长的启示。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过深钻岩心锆石U-Pb定年、全岩地球化学及锆石Hf-O同位素分析进行研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出~3.1 Ga和~2.5 Ga两期地壳生长，其中~3.1 Ga TTG具有高钾钙碱性、正εHf(t)和异常低δ18O特征。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示渤海湾盆地基底存在~3.1 Ga TTG并发现其低氧同位素特征指示俯冲流体参与。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为华北克拉通东部陆块早前寒武纪地壳生长和构造演化提供关键深部约束。

works.title: Crustal anatectic origin of the Tashan carbonatites in the southern margin of the North China Craton
works.abstract: Most carbonatites worldwide were documented to originate from mantle-derived magmas. Carbonatites formed by the melting of sedimentary carbonate rocks were rarely reported, but the principal processes of formation, as well as economic significance, remain poorly constrained. In this paper, we investigated the newly discovered Tashan carbonatites in the southern margin of the North China Craton, Qinling orogenic belt. The Tashan carbonatites are present as dikes intruding the Neoproterozoic biotite syenite, associated with fenitization along the contacts. Monazite U Pb dating shows that the Tashan carbonatites were emplaced at ca. 401 Ma. These carbonatites have low REE concentrations ( total REE as 8.23 to 20.33 ppm) and exhibit unusual positive Ce anomalies in the chondrite-normalized REE patterns. They are enriched in large-ion lithophile elements (U, Sr, and Pb) and depleted in high-field strength elements (Nb, Ta, and Ti), and exhibit high δ 13 C V-PDB (−1.17 to 1.24‰) and δ 18 O V-SMOW (13.37 to 16.87‰) values. They have remarkably high ( 87 Sr/ 86 Sr) i (0.71325–0.71935) and low ε Nd (t) (−8.26 to −6.08) values. These results show that these carbonatites are geochemically different from mantle-derived carbonatites but comparable to sedimentary carbonates. It is suggested that the Tashan carbonatites were formed by anatectic melting of buried dolomitic marble from the Taihua Group, i.e., basement of the southern margin of the North China Craton, during delamination and extension of Qinling orogenic belt in the Paleozoic. Our results highlight that the crustal carbonatites reflect metamorphic, magmatic, and tectonic events and may shed light on the tectonic evolution of orogenic process in specific regions.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华北克拉通南缘塔山碳酸岩的地壳深熔成因

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨华北克拉通南缘塔山碳酸岩是否由沉积碳酸盐岩熔融形成及其形成机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用独居石U-Pb定年、全岩主微量元素、C-O-Sr-Nd同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 塔山碳酸岩源于太华群白云质大理岩的深熔作用，而非地幔来源。
summary_bullets.innovation: 报道罕见的壳源碳酸岩并揭示其反映造山带伸展垮塌的构造事件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别造山过程、地壳深熔及区域构造演化提供新的岩石学证据。

works.title: Temporal and spatial trends in mantle metasomatism and redox state beneath the Kimberley Craton (Northwest Australia)
works.abstract: The Kimberley Craton of northwest Australia hosts a suite of kimberlites, lamproites and ultramafic lamprophyres that range in age from ~1257 (Argyle) to ~20 Ma (Ellendale). Mantle xenocrysts and xenoliths entrained in these rocks provide the opportunity to examine how the composition and structure of the cratonic lithospheric mantle has evolved through time. In this study we present the first oxygen fugacity ( f O 2 ) profile through the cratonic lithospheric mantle beneath the Ellendale and Argyle lamproite pipes. The f O 2 estimates are based on the atomic Fe 3+ / Σ " role="presentation"> Σ Σ Fe in garnet xenocrysts determined by the flank method accompanied by geothermobarometric and trace element data. The f O 2 values indicate a reduced lithosphere beneath the Argyle and Ellendale pipes, within the range of values found for other diamondiferous cratonic lithosphere, but with a systematic trend to more oxidized conditions (by up to 5 log units in f O 2 ) toward the base of the lithosphere. This trend is accompanied by increases in TiO 2 , FeOT, LREE (light rare-earth elements) and in V/Sc, Sm/Er and Zr/Y values with increasing temperature (T). Garnet xenocrysts with higher Fe 3+ / Σ " role="presentation"> Σ Σ Fe from the base of the lithosphere have sinusoidal REE patterns in contrast to the mostly LREE-depleted patterns of garnets at shallower levels in the lithosphere. The oxidation and enrichment of the deeper lithosphere is the result of metasomatism by infiltrating hydrous, possibly carbonate-bearing, silicate melts. At Argyle, the base of the lithosphere was also infiltrated by hydrous fluids that formed abundant Proterozoic eclogitic diamonds with subduction signatures. The composition, thickness and redox state of the lithosphere beneath the Argyle and Ellendale lamproites is similar apart from the base of the Argyle lithosphere being more oxidized and minor differences in the exact values for some trace element ratios (i.e., Ti/Eu, Zr/Y, and Sm/Yb). Existing clinopyroxene paleogeotherms indicate cool conductive paleogeothermal gradients with lithospheric thicknesses similar to those of seismic tomographic models. These results suggest that the Kimberley Craton has remained relatively stable since at least the Mesoproterozoic, despite the emplacement of lamproites, kimberlites and ultramafic lamprophyres at ~840–800 Ma and eruption of continental flood basalts of the Kalkarindji large igneous province (LIP) at 511 Ma. The long-term stability of the lithosphere of the Kimberley Craton has allowed the survival of diamonds of differing ages and the preservation of ancient, enriched mantle domains that gave rise to the Miocene lamproites with extremely enriched Sr-Nd-Hf isotopes that formed by prolonged unperturbed radiogenic ingrowth since the Paleoproterozoic.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 金伯利克拉通（澳大利亚西北部）之下地幔交代作用与氧化还原状态的时空变化趋势

summary_bullets.research_question: 金伯利克拉通下岩石圈地幔的组成、结构与氧化还原状态如何随时间演化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过石榴石捕捞晶的侧翼法Fe³⁺/ΣFe比值结合地温压计和微量元素估算氧逸度剖面。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩石圈深部随温度升高显著氧化并富集元素，由含水硅酸盐熔体交代作用导致。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次建立该区岩石圈地幔的氧逸度剖面，揭示深部氧化与交代作用的关系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证实克拉通长期稳定性对钻石保存和古老富集地幔域存留至关重要。

works.title: Origin and lithium enrichment mechanism of the largest individual Murong pegmatite dyke in Asia: Revealed by phosphate mineral chemistry and SrNd isotopes
works.abstract: The Murong pegmatite dyke hosting over 0.96 Mt. Li 2 O (average grade: 1.63%) in the eastern Songpan-Garze Fold Belt (SW China) is by far the largest individual pegmatite dyke in Asia. However, the origin of pegmatite and associated Li mineralization remain unclear. We report in this study the Mn-columbite U Pb dating, in-situ phosphate (triphylite, fairfieldite and apatite) mineral chemistry, apatite Sr and monazite Nd isotopic data to address these issues. The dating results indicate that the Murong pegmatite has two pegmatite-forming pulses of 201–197 Ma, and 192.7 Ma, respectively. The Murong pegmatite shows I Sr ratios (0.7362–0.7551) significantly higher and initial ε Nd values (ε Nd (t) = −10.4 to −7.6) lower, than the local contemporaneous granitic plutons and the Xikang Group metasediments as well. These data do not favor the traditional hypothesis that attributes the formation of pegmatite to the extreme fractional crystallization of parent granitic systems. Rather, the hypothesis of direct melting of metasediments is inferred. We suggest the Murong pegmatite was derived from melting of the late Proterozoic basement rocks in view of their consistent Sr Nd isotopes, and the source may be dominated by claystone-rich rocks formed by hydrothermal alteration of felsic volcanic tuffs based on the typically radiogenic Sr Nd isotopic features. Importantly, we recognized two stages of fluid-mineral interactions in the Murong pegmatite: an earlier replacement of Li-rich anhydrous triphylite by hydrous fairfieldite due to concentration of aqueous fluid, releasing abundant Li into fluid, and a later replacement of apatite 1 by a relatively Li-rich apatite 2. These findings demonstrate that (1) the Murong pegmatite-forming magma is highly enriched in Li even in the very beginning of magma evolution, thus suggesting that the pegmatite may originate from partial melting of a Li-rich claystone-dominated source, and (2) the dissolution of early crystallized Li-rich triphylite is crucial to the continued Li concentration in fluid phase, and thus to the Li mineralization.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 亚洲最大单体慕蓉伟晶岩脉的成因与锂富集机制：来自磷酸盐矿物化学和Sr-Nd同位素的揭示

summary_bullets.research_question: 亚洲最大慕蓉伟晶岩脉的成因及其锂富集机制是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锰铌铁矿U-Pb定年、原位磷酸盐化学及磷灰石Sr和独居石Nd同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 伟晶岩形成于201-197 Ma和192.7 Ma两期，Sr-Nd同位素表明源自元古代富粘土变质沉积岩直接熔融。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出变沉积岩直接熔融而非花岗岩分异成因，并揭示两阶段流体-矿物反应促锂富集。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为稀有金属伟晶岩的源区属性和锂超常富集机制提供了新的成因模型与找矿指示。

works.title: Trace element systematics constrain the origin of fluids that form gem-quality diamonds
works.abstract: Abstract Diamonds crystallise from fluids/melts circulating in the Earth’s mantle. Analysis of these fluids is possible if they remain entrapped in the diamond during growth, but such fluid inclusions are rarely observed in gem-quality stones. We investigated thin films surrounding mineral inclusions, previously described as silicic fluid rims containing Si 2 O(OH) 6 and Si(OH) 4 , in gem-quality lithospheric diamonds from Siberia. Using micro-Raman spectroscopy and L aser- A blation I nductively- C oupled- P lasma- M ass- S pectrometry (LA-ICPMS) depth-profiling, we obtained compositional data from silicic fluid rims surrounding both silicate and non-silicate inclusions. Slow LA-ICPMS depth-profiling at the diamond-inclusion interface enabled differentiating the respective diamond/fluid-rim/mineral-inclusion contributions, allowing detection of Sr, Nb, Ba, La, Ce, Nd, and Th from the fluid rim. Here, we compare silicic fluid rims and other mantle-derived fluids/melts based on trace element ratios relative to the primitive mantle. Their (La/Nb) N _(Ba/Nb) N and (Nd/Nb) N _(Th/Nb) N systematics align with primitive mantle-like high-density fluids and group 2 kimberlites, suggesting an origin from kimberlite-like melts.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 微量元素系统学约束形成宝石级金刚石流体的来源

summary_bullets.research_question: 宝石级钻石中围绕矿物包裹体的硅质流体边缘的化学成分和来源是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 使用微拉曼光谱和LA-ICPMS深度剖析分析西伯利亚钻石中流体边缘的痕量元素。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 检测到Sr、Nb、Ba、La、Ce、Nd、Th，其比值指示流体源自金伯利岩类熔体。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过缓慢剥蚀深度剖析区分了钻石-流体边缘-矿物包裹体的贡献，获取了流体边缘的痕量数据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为难以观测的宝石级钻石生长流体提供了直接地球化学约束，有助于理解岩石圈钻石成因。

works.title: Discrimination of gold deposit types based on big data analysis and machine-learning techniques
works.abstract: Classifying the genetic types of gold deposits is essential for effective exploration. This study focuses on developing a classifier that can categorize the diverse types of gold deposits using the trace element contents of pyrite, the most common sulfide mineral in most of these deposits. Based on 13,624 pyrite trace element records from 9 types of gold deposits worldwide, random forest (RF), support vector machine (SVM) and k-nearest neighbor (KNN) classifiers were constructed and evaluated. Comparative analysis identified the RF classifier as the best performing model, exhibiting superior predictive accuracy and robustness. Model interpretation and geochemical validation employed SHAP (feature importance analysis), Spearman correlation (element associations), and UMAP (dimensionality reduction and visualization). Results show distinct classification of deposit types, confirming pyrite trace elements as reliable genetic indicators. Feature importance analysis highlighted As, Te, and Ag as key discriminators. Pyrite from Carlin and orogenic deposits is rich in As and Au, whereas epithermal and VMS types have moderate-to-low Te, As, and Se. Porphyry-related pyrite is low in Sb, As, and Au. In contrast, SEDEX pyrite is enriched in Te, Se, and Bi, and skarn pyrite shows high Zn but low As and Se. These systematic variations suggest that the trace elements signature of pyrite is primarily controlled by fluid-rock interaction processes during mineralization, which are strongly influenced by the composition of the host rocks.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 基于大数据分析与机器学习技术的金矿床类型判别

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何基于黄铁矿微量元素含量，利用机器学习区分不同类型金矿床的成因？
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于全球13,624条黄铁矿微量元素数据，构建并比较随机森林、支持向量机和K近邻分类器。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 随机森林表现最佳；As、Te、Ag是关键判别元素；不同类型黄铁矿微量元素特征差异显著。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用大数据机器学习对9种金矿类型的黄铁矿微量元素进行系统分类和地球化学解释。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为金矿勘探提供基于黄铁矿微量元素的快速、低成本矿床类型判别工具。

works.title: Garnet pyroxenite at mid-mantle depths as a source of young lunar magmatism
works.abstract: As the youngest returned mare basalt to date, deciphering the petrogenesis of Chang'e-5 (CE-5) basalts could assist us in understanding the late-stage lunar mantle evolution. However, the lithology of the CE-5 mantle is still controversial. Here, we present a joint study of high pressure-temperature major element phase equilibria using laboratory experiments and trace element modeling, and show that garnet is present in the source of young mare basalts on the Moon. Our high-pressure-temperature experiments approaching the multiple saturation point of the putative parental melt compositions of young CE-5 basalt show garnet and clinopyroxene coexisting with the quenched silicate melt. Trace element modeling also confirms that small amounts of garnet in the mantle source are required to reconcile the rare-earth element pattern of the CE-5 basalts, regardless of whether the CE-5 basalts were the direct mantle-melting products or produced through extensive fractional crystallization of a primitive basalt. The existence of garnet in the source either implies that lunar mantle overturn played a crucial role in contributing to the lunar mantle heterogeneity, creating a garnet-clinopyroxenitic mantle source of these young mare basalts that survived the subsequent mantle evolution, or a late-stage process introduced fertile material into the deep mantle, and such geodynamic processes within the lunar interior may have continued until 2 Ga.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中幔深度的石榴子石辉石岩作为年轻月球岩浆活动的来源

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究最年轻的嫦娥五号月海玄武岩的源区岩性是否含有石榴石。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用高压高温相平衡实验和微量元素模拟联合研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 实验和模拟均证实嫦娥五号玄武岩源区需要少量石榴石存在。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过实验与模拟结合，明确石榴石为月球年轻玄武岩源区必要组分。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示月幔翻转等深部动力学过程可能持续至20亿年前，对理解月球晚期演化至关重要。

works.title: When wet meets dry: An Ivuna-like impactor triggered volatile loss on the angrite parent body
works.abstract: Angrite meteorites remain the “driest” known planetary materials in the Solar System. Recent mineralogical and oxygen (O) isotope data suggest that the angrite parent body (APB) experienced a major impact, raising questions about the identity of the impactor. We report high-precision mass-independent chromium (ε 54 Cr) isotope data for eight angrites and their components. Samples from deeper APB regions exhibit uniform ε 54 Cr values (−0.40 ± 0.03), representing the mantle composition, whereas matrix materials from quenched angrites show anomalous ε 54 Cr values (0.27 ± 0.06 and −0.15 ± 0.08), likely reflecting impactor contamination. Combined Cr-O isotope data point to a CI (Ivuna-type) chondritic impactor—the “wettest” known Solar System material. Although such an impact could introduce volatiles, high-energy conditions likely caused extensive volatile loss, preserving the angrites’ dry nature. CI contamination may also make quenched angrites unsuitable time anchors for siderophile short-lived chronometers, whereas the other “contamination-free” angrites yield a precise age of 4561.0 ± 0.9 million years, dating the formation of their mantle source.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 当湿遇干：一颗类Ivuna撞击体引发安格里特母体的挥发分丢失

summary_bullets.research_question: 火星陨石 angrite 极干的原因及撞击体身份是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对八块 angrite 及其组分进行高精度铬同位素分析和氧同位素结合约束。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 深部样品铬同位素均一，淬火基质显示异常值，表明受 CI 球粒陨石撞击体污染。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过铬-氧联合同位素示踪识别出 angrite 母体曾受最湿润的 CI 型天体撞击。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示高能撞击导致挥发分丢失的机制，并修正了短寿命核素计时体系的应用基础。

works.title: Terrestrial carbon stock vulnerability during the Paleocene-Eocene Thermal Maximum
works.abstract: Abstract The Paleocene-Eocene Thermal Maximum is a key analog for future climate change. However, how terrestrial ecosystems responded to this extreme warming remains uncertain. We integrate a dynamic global vegetation model with a carbon-isotope mass-balance framework to quantify terrestrial carbon-cycle feedbacks. Our simulations reveal that ancient high-latitude carbon stocks were vast but highly sensitive to extreme warming. We identify a fundamental non-linearity in the terrestrial response: while moderate warming triggers ecosystem shifts, extreme warming drives an abrupt collapse of land carbon, releasing up to ~900 petagrams. This decline stems from a bipolar ecological shift where massive tropical forest loss and accelerated soil heterotrophic respiration overwhelm high-latitude greening and carbon dioxide fertilization. Furthermore, hybrid scenarios combining terrestrial release of sedimentary methane and volcanic carbon dioxide provide the best fit to the geological record. We identify critical thermal thresholds, warning that future terrestrial carbon-climate feedbacks could be more severe than currently projected.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 古新世-始新世极热事件期间陆地碳储量的脆弱性

summary_bullets.research_question: 探明古新世-始新世极热事件中陆地生态系统如何响应极端变暖及其碳循环反馈。
summary_bullets.methodology: 耦合动态全球植被模型与碳同位素质量平衡框架进行定量模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 极端变暖引发陆地碳库崩溃，释放约900 Pg碳，热带森林丧失与土壤呼吸加速主导。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示陆地碳响应非线性及临界热阈值，发现两极生态转变抵消高纬度绿化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 警示未来陆地碳-气候反馈可能远超当前预测，为古气候类比提供关键阈值。

works.title: Combining zircon age, Hf-O isotopes and amphibole composition to assess the Cu-Ni-Co mineralization potential in East Tianshan mafic-ultramafic intrusions
works.abstract: Zircon age and Hf-O isotopes reflect a depleted mantle source and low degree of contamination relate to barren intrusions; concentrated amphibole compositions reveal fractional crystallization of silicate melt and large-scale sulfide segregation. Together, they provide a powerful tool for identifying the mineralization potential of mafic-ultramafic rocks and may enhance exploration strategies at the southern margin of the CAOB.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 结合锆石年龄、Hf-O同位素和角闪石成分评估东天山镁铁-超镁铁质侵入体的Cu-Ni-Co成矿潜力

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何有效评估东天山镁铁-超镁铁岩体的铜镍钴成矿潜力？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合锆石年龄、Hf-O同位素和角闪石成分进行综合分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 贫矿岩体显示亏损地幔源区与低混染，富矿岩体角闪石反映分离结晶和硫化物大规模熔离。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将锆石同位素与角闪石成分结合作为成矿潜力判别工具。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为CAOB南缘镁铁-超镁铁岩体矿产勘探提供了高效的地球化学评价方法。

works.title: Formation of Continental Intraplate Basalts with Coexistence of Alkaline and Tholeiitic Suites and their Geochemical Transition from Upwelling of Fractured Oceanic Slabs
works.abstract: Abstract Intraplate basalts, exhibiting a continuous geochemical spectrum from alkaline to tholeiitic compositions, are extensively distributed along the continental margins of eastern and southeastern Eurasia, where subducted oceanic slabs are stagnant in the mantle transition zone (MTZ). The genetic relationship between the coexistence of alkaline and tholeiitic magmatism, the alkaline-tholeiitic transition, and upper mantle dynamics remains enigmatic. We present Sr, Nd, Mg, and Fe isotopic data, combined with major and trace elemental compositions, for the Late Cenozoic Buon Ma Thuot (BMT) and Pleiku (PLK) basalts from southern Vietnam to investigate these mantle processes. Changes in Mg and Fe isotopic values of these basalts are associated with their alkaline-tholeiitic transition. Besides of higher MgO, TiO2, CaO/Al2O3, and lower SiO2, alkaline basalts exhibit lower δ 26Mg (−0.32‰ – -0.43‰) and higher δ 57Fe values (+0.16‰ – +0.37‰) than tholeiitic basalts (i.e. δ 57Fe varies from + 0.09‰ to + 0.21‰) which resemble normal mid-ocean ridge basalts. Trace element ratios and Sr and Nd isotopes of the studied basalts vary spatially. BMT basalts display Ce/Pb (18.4–24.2) and Nb/Th (9.80–11.3) akin to those of oceanic crust, coupled with elevated positive Sr anomalies (Sr/Sr* = 1.10–1.56) and constant low 87Sr/86Sr ratios, indicating the presence of recycled lower oceanic crust in their mantle source. In contrast, mantle source of PLK basalts appears to incorporate more recycled sediments, as indicated by their lower Ce/Pb (13.0–23.1) and Nb/Th (7.16–9.43), along with elevated 87Sr/86Sr ratios and decreased εNd values. The alkaline-tholeiitic transition in both BMT and PLK basalts arises from differences in their source lithologies and melting processes. Spatial geochemical variations can be further ascribed to the small-scale lateral heterogeneity of the mantle, which arises from the recycling of various segments of subducted slabs. Given that BMT basalts erupted prior to PLK basalts, and considering the geophysical evidences (such as receiver function investigations and P-wave velocity models) indicating slab edges and mantle upwelling in the MTZ, we suggest that the observed geochemical variations in intraplate basalts are primarily driven by the upward flow of fractured oceanic slabs, facilitated by slab tearing processes occurring within the MTZ.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 碱性系列与拉斑系列共存的大陆板内玄武岩形成及其由破裂大洋板片上涌引发的地球化学转变

summary_bullets.research_question: 碱性-拉斑质陆内玄武岩共生与过渡如何受停滞俯冲板块上涌控制？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合 Sr-Nd-Mg-Fe 同位素、主微量元素分析越南北部新生代玄武岩。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 碱性玄武岩具更低 δ26Mg、更高 δ57Fe；源区差异反映再循环洋壳与沉积物不均一。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用 Mg-Fe 同位素揭示碱性-拉斑质过渡与板块撕裂驱动的上地幔动力学联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为陆内岩浆源区不均一性及深部地幔过程提供新示踪指标和构造解释框架。

works.title: Biotite unravels F-driven Mo mineralization and magmatic-hydrothermal evolution in the Chaijiagou porphyry deposit, North China
works.abstract: Porphyry molybdenum (Mo) deposits are the world's primary source of Mo and form through multi-stage processes involving source melting, magmatic differentiation, and fluid exsolution that drives hydrothermal Mo mineralization. The transition from magmatic to hydrothermal conditions is a critical phase in these magmatic-hydrothermal systems, yet its primary features are often obscured by subsequent overprinting, hindering direct observation. Biotite preserves a continuous record from magmatic crystallization to hydrothermal alteration, providing critical insights into this evolution. To quantitatively reconstruct the magmatic-hydrothermal transition and elucidate Mo enrichment mechanisms, this study utilizes in-situ geochemical analyses of various biotite generations from the Chaijiagou porphyry deposit, northern North China Block (NCB). Based on quantitative geochemical criteria, three biotite types were identified: early-stage magmatic biotite (Bt1), late-stage magmatic biotite (Bt2), and hydrothermal biotite (Bt3). Magmatic biotite shows a pseudo-A-type geochemical signature, indicating an extensional geodynamic setting related to lithospheric thinning of the NCB. Magmatic biotite crystallized at an average depth of 4.7 ± 0.7 km and temperature of ~705 ± 5 °C, under relatively oxidized conditions (ΔFMQ = +0.13 to +0.31, average 0.25 ± 0.03), which limited early sulfide saturation and promoted initial Mo enrichment. Progressive melt evolution through fractional crystallization is evidenced by systematic decreases in K/Rb ratios from Bt1 (76.8–281.1) to Bt2 (63.8–116.9), accompanied by enrichment in incompatible elements. Low halogen intercept values in magmatic biotite indicate an initially F-rich magmatic system that enhanced melt fractionation and metal fertility. During the magmatic-hydrothermal evolution, hydrothermal biotite (Bt3) records a shift toward high F fugacity, with IV(F) increasing to 1.66–1.74, IV(F/Cl) rising to 6.24–6.44, and IV(Cl) decreasing to −4.71 to −4.56. Meanwhile, log(f H2O /f HF ) ratios dropped from 2.02 to 2.04 in the magmatic stage to approximately 1.47 ± 0.03 in the hydrothermal stage. This elevated F activity significantly enhanced the solubility and transport capacity of Mo complexes. Large-scale molybdenite precipitation was triggered by cooling to ~400 ± 3 °C, coupled with previously documented fluid boiling and meteoric water influx, which destabilized these metal-transporting complexes. Collectively, these results highlight the potential of biotite geochemical signatures as a robust proxy for tracing the full magmatic evolution of highly fractionated porphyry systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 黑云母揭示华北柴家沟斑岩矿床中 F 驱动的 Mo 成矿作用及岩浆—热液演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何定量重建斑岩钼矿床岩浆-热液转变过程并揭示钼富集机制？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对柴家沟矿床不同世代黑云母进行原位地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆黑云母记录了高氟初始熔体，热液阶段氟逸度升高增强钼运移，冷却和流体沸腾触发大规模钼沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用黑云母连续记录定量重建岩浆-热液转化，揭示氟对钼运移的关键作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为利用黑云母地球化学示踪高分异斑岩成矿系统演化提供了可靠方法。

works.title: Late Carboniferous–Permian Tectonic Evolution of the Southern Paleo‐Asian Ocean: New Insights from Magmatic and Sedimentary Records in the Alxa Area
works.abstract: ABSTRACT The Late Carboniferous–Permian magmatic and sedimentary records in the Alxa area are crucial to understanding the tectonic evolution of the Paleo‐Asian Ocean. We present petrological, whole‐rock geochemical, zircon U‐Pb geochronological and Hf isotopic data for magmatic and siliciclastic rocks from northern Alxa. Rhyolite and granite porphyry related to the Amushan Formation crystallized at ca. 309–304 Ma, derived from juvenile to moderately evolved lower crust reworked by oceanic subduction. Sandstones from the Quagan Qulu and Engger Us tectonic belts display contrasting detrital‐zircon age spectra. Quagan Qulu samples, characterized by an early Paleozoic peak at ca. 430 Ma, record mixed input from early Paleozoic arc rocks, Precambrian basement and recycled cover strata, whereas Engger Us samples are dominated by a Devonian peak at ca. 381 Ma and were supplied by a nearby Devonian arc source. Together with published data, our results support a segmented Late Carboniferous–Permian forearc–arc–retroarc system along the northern margin of Alxa. Continued southward subduction of the Quagan Qulu oceanic lithosphere beneath the Nuru–Langshan continental arc is the preferred interpretation, whereas Late Carboniferous to early Permian slab rollback is a plausible mechanism for the ensuing magmatic flare‐up, arc uplift and provenance shift.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 晚石炭世—二叠纪南古亚洲洋构造演化：来自阿拉善地区岩浆与沉积记录的新认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 阿拉善地区晚石炭世-二叠纪岩浆与沉积记录如何揭示古亚洲洋南部的构造演化？
summary_bullets.methodology: 对阿拉善北部岩浆岩和碎屑岩进行岩石学、全岩地球化学、锆石U-Pb测年及Hf同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 北阿拉善发育分段的弧前-弧-弧后体系，显示持续南向俯冲和晚石炭世-早二叠世板片回撤。
summary_bullets.innovation: 结合岩浆岩与不同构造带砂岩碎屑锆石光谱，首次系统识别出分段弧系统和板片回撤起源转变。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为古亚洲洋南缘晚古生代俯冲-增生过程与造山机制提供了关键的多学科约束。

works.title: Nature and timing of W-Sn mineralization in the Xin’anzi Deposit, Nanling Region: constraints from LA-ICP-MS cassiterite U-Pb geochronology and trace element composition
works.abstract: The Nanling region is globally renowned as a key district for vein-type W-Sn mineralization. The recently discovered Xin’anzi W-Sn deposit is located within this region, yet its metallogenic timing, genetic relationship with concealed granites, and ore-forming fluid evolution remain poorly constrained. These uncertainties represent major obstacles to regional exploration and metallogenic modeling. To resolve these issues, this study presents integrated data from LA-ICP-MS zircon U-Pb dating, cassiterite U-Pb geochronology, in situ trace element analysis of cassiterite, and zircon Hf isotope geochemistry. Zircon U-Pb dating yields a weighted mean age of 163.0 ± 0.82 Ma for the concealed granite, constraining its emplacement to the Early Yanshanian. Cassiterite U-Pb dating, applied for the first time in this deposit, yields a precise metallogenic age of 160.3 ± 0.92 Ma. This age is consistent with the granite emplacement age within analytical uncertainty, confirming a genetic link between magmatism and mineralization. Zircon Hf isotopic compositions (εHf(t) = -13.8 to −10.4; TDM 2 = 1862–2075 Ma) indicate that the granite was generated by partial melting of Paleoproterozoic continental crust, and is classified as a highly fractionated peraluminous S-type granite belonging to the regional metallogenic granite association. In situ trace element analysis of dark brown and light brown zones in cassiterite reveals a three-stage ore-forming fluid evolution: (1) an initial high-temperature, low-oxygen-fugacity fluid enriched in Nb-Ta-W; (2) episodic fluctuations in temperature and fO 2 , leading to alternating deposition of Fe-V-rich and Nb-Ta-rich domains;(3) late-stage low-temperature cooling. Variations in Zr/Hf ratios (25–77) and Fe-W contents of cassiterite further support a magmatic-hydrothermal origin genetically related to granitic magmatism. This study precisely constrains the metallogenic chronology of the Xin’anzi deposit, confirming that it formed during the Middle Jurassic (160–150 Ma) regional W-Sn mineralization event associated with Yanshanian lithospheric extension. These results refine the spatiotemporal framework of Nanling W-Sn metallogeny and indicate significant deep prospectivity (>300 m) along the granite–country rock contact zone for disseminated or greisen-type mineralization. This work provides robust geological constraints for targeted deep exploration and improves the understanding of magmatic-hydrothermal W-Sn systems in intracontinental orogenic belts.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 南岭地区新安子矿床钨-锡成矿作用的性质与时代：来自 LA-ICP-MS 锡石 U-Pb 年代学及微量元素组成的约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 该矿床成矿时代、与隐伏花岗岩成因关系及流体演化不明，制约区域勘探成矿模式。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用LA-ICP-MS锆石U-Pb定年、锡石U-Pb年代学、原位微量元素及锆石Hf同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成矿年龄160.3 Ma与花岗岩163.0 Ma一致，花岗岩为古元古代地壳重熔的高分异S型，流体经历三阶段演化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在该矿床应用锡石U-Pb定年，精准限定成矿时代并确证岩浆-热液成因联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 完善南岭钨锡成矿时空格架，为深部找矿提供依据，深化陆内造山带岩浆热液系统认知。

works.title: Geochemical Characteristics and Their Geological Significance of Zircon and Apatite From the Wunugetushan Porphyry Cu–Mo Deposit, Inner Mongolia, NE China
works.abstract: ABSTRACT The Wunugetushan (Wushan) porphyry Cu–Mo deposit is located in the southwestern segment of the Derbugan metallogenic belt. In this study, geochemical analyses of zircon and apatite from pre‐mineralization biotite granite (BG) and inter‐mineralization monzogranitic porphyry (MGP) were conducted, aiming to discuss petrogenesis and their constraints on mineralization. BG apatites have distinctly lower ε Nd ( t ) (−4.28 to −1.03) and higher two‐stage Nd model ages (1063–1328 Ma) than MGP apatites, showing values of −0.23 to +1.31 and 860–984 Ma. MGP zircons have higher Ce/Nd, Ce 4+ /Ce 3+ , δ Eu, 10,000 × δ Eu/Y and (Ce/Nd)/Y values, and lower Yb/Gd values than those in BG zircon. These geochemical features suggest that the MGP has a higher oxidation state and higher water content of magma than BG. Trace element concentrations in zircon and apatite reveal that the MGP is less evolved and exhibits amphibole‐dominated fractionation. In contrast, the BG is evolved and shows plagioclase‐ and apatite‐dominated fractionation. We propose that the key factors making the MGP fertile for mineralization, including its high Cl, S and H 2 O contents, high oxidation state, significant fluid exsolution and multiple recharges of deep‐seated mafic magma, were all critical for the Wushan porphyry Cu–Mo deposit.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 内蒙古乌奴格吐山斑岩型铜钼矿床锆石与磷灰石地球化学特征及其地质意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨乌奴格吐山斑岩铜钼矿床成矿前与成矿期侵入体的岩石成因及制约成矿的关键因素。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对成矿前黑云母花岗岩和成矿期二长花岗斑岩中的锆石与磷灰石进行地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 成矿期岩浆更高氧化态、含水量及Cl、S，经历角闪石分异和基性岩浆补给，而成矿前岩浆更演化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用锆石和磷灰石元素对比揭示了岩浆氧化态、水含量及分异路径对成矿潜力的控制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为斑岩矿床成矿岩浆条件判定提供矿物化学标志，对区域找矿勘查具有指示价值。

works.title: Atlantic sediments reveal interacting environmental and physiological controls on coccolithophore calcite production
works.abstract: Abstract Coccolithophores contribute 20-80% of the open ocean’s total calcite production, playing a pivotal role in the marine carbon cycle. Links between environment, coccolithophore physiology and calcite production remain unclear due to challenges in extrapolating culture experiments to sedimentary nannofossil records. Here, we develop a framework to reconstruct physiology and calcite production of dominant coccolithophore species from sedimentary records. Using well-preserved Atlantic surface sediments, this study establishes factors controlling coccolithophore calcite production via measurements of species composition, primary production, growth (μ), and calcification rates. Contrasting μ-calcification relationships of major groups indicate differing carbon requirements. Optimal μ is the primary control on group-specific maximum calcite production, defining a meridional bimodal structure with a boundary at ~40°N, aligned with oceanic physicochemical gradients. Group-specific cellular carbon demand relative to supply show that this boundary separates reaction-limited cells to the north from mass-transport-limited cells to the south, and likely migrates latitudinally with changing ocean carbon.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 大西洋沉积物揭示环境与生理因素对颗石藻方解石生产的交互控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何将球石藻培养实验与沉积记录关联，揭示环境、生理与碳酸钙生产的联系？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用大西洋表层沉积物测量物种组成、初级生产、生长速率和钙化速率并建立重建框架。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 生长速率是钙化生产主控因素，形成~40°N经向双峰边界，北方为反应限制，南方为质量运输限制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次从沉积记录中直接定量重建球石藻生理与碳酸钙生产。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 阐明细胞碳需求与供给差异对钙化的控制，有助于预测海洋碳循环对气候变化的响应。

works.title: Deep tree roots at risk of accelerating groundwater pollution beneath clay-rich aquitards
works.abstract: Glacial aquitards from the last Pleistocene glaciation cover vast areas of the Northern Hemisphere. Due to their clay-rich composition, these aquitards are considered to protect underlying aquifers from surface contaminations, provided they are not penetrated by widespread deep fractures. In this study we combine ancient DNA (aDNA) with detailed hydrological techniques to investigate contaminant transport in the aquitards – an interdisciplinary approach that was not possible when the current understanding of the dominant role of fractures was established. We show that deep fractures (> 2 m below surface) in the glacial aquitards across Denmark are closed or marginal as pathways of dissolved contaminant transport unless they contain flow channels from deep modern and ancient tree roots. Our study reveals that deep tree roots can compromise natural groundwater protection and accelerate groundwater pollution by opening fractures and generating deep macropores. The results highlight that thorough attention needs to be paid to land-use history and widespread legacy and future soil pollution prior to reforestation and afforestation of aquitards above drinking water resources. We furthermore demonstrate that the protection of aquitard areas with less thickness than historical rooting depths and high degrees of lithological heterogeneity (related to aquitard glacial till types) is crucial to preserve drinking water resources and to restore groundwater quality beneath glacial aquitards. Formation of deep flow channels by roots from reforestation and afforestation is at risk of accelerating groundwater pollution in vast global areas where aquifers are located beneath surficial clay-rich geological formations.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 富含粘土弱透水层之下的深层树根面临加速地下水污染的风险

summary_bullets.research_question: 深层树根是否通过打开裂隙和形成大孔隙加速粘土质弱透水层下的地下水污染？
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合古DNA分析与详细水文技术，跨学科研究污染物在弱透水层中的运移。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 深层裂隙若无树根通道则闭合或不重要，但深树根通道会破坏天然保护并加速污染。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次融合古DNA与水文方法，揭示树根对弱透水层保护功能的损害。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 强调植树造林前需重视土地利用历史，以保护饮用水资源并恢复地下水水质。

works.title: Miocene ocean circulation shifted expansive oxygen deficient zones to the Atlantic
works.abstract: Abstract Contemporary observations indicate that dissolved oxygen concentrations are generally declining as global temperatures rise, which has broad implications for carbon cycling and the habitable ranges of marine animals. Here, we use the foraminiferal iodine redox tracer to evaluate the distributions of oxygen deficient zones (ODZs) and adjacent low oxygen water masses in the oceans during the Miocene Climatic Optimum (‘MCO’, 14.7−17 million years ago)—the last time that atmospheric CO 2 was consistently higher than today. The Pacific lowest oxygen water masses were confined to a narrow latitudinal range of ~10°N-20°S, which is substantially contracted relative to today. In contrast, in the Atlantic, where modern ODZs are minor compared to their Pacific counterparts, our data indicate spatially expansive low oxygen distribution during the MCO. Earth System model simulations provide evidence that the Pacific-Atlantic ODZ seesaw was driven by the very different pattern of ocean circulation and nutrient transport that was induced by an open Central American Seaway. Our findings highlight the key role played by tectonics and ocean circulation, independent of warming, in setting the pattern of ODZs and hence related loci of organic burial and marine habitats.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 中新世海洋环流将扩张的缺氧区转移至大西洋

summary_bullets.research_question: 中中新世气候适宜期开放的巴拿马海道如何影响大西洋和太平洋缺氧带的分布？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用有孔虫碘氧化还原指标重建海洋溶解氧分布，并结合地球系统模型模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: MCO期间太平洋缺氧带大幅收缩，而大西洋缺氧分布却广泛扩张，呈现跷跷板式格局。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示构造驱动的海洋环流变化可独立于变暖主导缺氧带空间格局。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解未来海洋脱氧和碳循环的区域响应提供了关键地质历史参照。

works.title: Legacy wells supporting net zero by screening carbon storage and geothermal potential in the United States
works.abstract: Abstract Depleted oil and gas reservoirs provide an opportunity to repurpose underperforming wells and reuse existing subsurface infrastructure to support Net Zero transitions. Here we present a United States wide screening analysis of underperforming wells to estimate upper bound technical potential for carbon storage and geothermal heat. Using public well inventories, county level carbon removal cost datasets, national scale storage resource maps, and geothermal resource data, and accounting for well integrity attrition and field scale constraints, we estimate carbon storage potential of approximately 0.024–1.17 gigatonnes per year and geothermal heat potential of approximately 1–35 gigawatts thermal across high potential regions. Avoided drilling and deferred abandonment may indicate upper bound cost benefits, although repurposing costs remain site-specific. Key constraints include well integrity and cooling during injection; a retrofittable downhole choke is evaluated to mitigate this during startup. These results highlight conditional potential and the need for site-specific assessment.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 遗留井通过筛选美国碳封存与地热潜力支持净零排放

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何筛选利用美国表现不佳的油气井以实现碳储存和地热能的净零转型潜力？
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于公开井数据库、碳移除成本、储层和地热资源图，结合井完整性衰减和油田约束进行全美筛选评估。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高潜力区域年碳储存潜力约0.024–1.17吉吨，地热热功率约1–35吉瓦，但受井完整性和注入冷却制约。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次全美尺度联合评估废弃井碳储存与地热潜力，并提出可改装井下节流器缓解注入冷却风险。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为油气基础设施再利用提供上限技术潜力估算和约束条件，指明现场评估必要性，指导能源转型规划。

works.title: Revealing environmental, social, and governance-driven conflict risk in global energy transition minerals supply
works.abstract: The global transition to renewable energy hinges on critical minerals like lithium, cobalt, platinum, antimony, and tungsten, but their extraction and supply chains are imperiled by environmental, social, and governance risks that undermine stability and sustainability. Here, we introduce a novel framework for environmental, social, and governance risks evaluation, fusing a multi-dimensional indicator system with advanced machine learning models. Drawing on conflict events alongside diverse socio-economic and environmental indicators, we predict environmental, social, and governance risks at a global scale. Results uncover marked spatial heterogeneity, with elevated risks in the Middle East, North Africa, and South Asia associated with governance weaknesses and environmental pressures. Tungsten exhibits the highest overall environmental, social, and governance risks, while platinum the lowest. Our findings underscore the need for targeted, dimension-specific mitigation strategies and enhanced international cooperation to bolster sustainable governance and secure critical mineral supplies for a resilient energy transition. Tungsten shows highest and platinum lowest environmental social and governance risk, with hotspots in Middle East North Africa and South Asia, predicted using multi-dimensional indicators and machine learning from 112766 conflict events.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 揭示全球能源转型矿产供应中由环境、社会和治理驱动的冲突风险

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示全球能源转型关键矿产供应链中环境、社会与治理（ESG）驱动的冲突风险。
summary_bullets.methodology: 融合多维指标体系与机器学习，基于112766起冲突事件预测全球ESG风险。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 钨的ESG风险最高，铂最低，高风险热点集中在中东、北非和南亚，呈显著空间异质性。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出新型ESG风险评估框架，结合多维指标与机器学习预测矿产供应链冲突风险。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为制定针对性缓解策略与国际合作保障关键矿产可持续供应提供科学依据。

works.title: Hematite is a mineralogical marker of ancient climate change on Mars
works.abstract: The ancient climate of Mars changed from warm to cold surface conditions. This climate transition is demonstrated by geomorphological evidence but lacks suitable mineralogical indicators. We investigated the crystallographic properties of hematite (iron oxide) in Gale crater measured by the Curiosity rover and compared them with laboratory experiments. Hematite crystallite sizes are about 5 to 65 nm in the oldest sedimentary rocks investigated by the rover (the Murray formation) and less than 10 nm in the younger overlying strata (the Mirador and Carolyn Shoemaker formations). We attribute the larger crystallites in the Murray formation to postdepositional coarsening by groundwater in warm and wet conditions that persisted for several million years. Hematite with small crystallites co-occurs with goethite (iron oxyhydroxide) in the overlying layers, consistent with colder and water-limited conditions.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 赤铁矿是火星古气候变化的矿物学标志

summary_bullets.research_question: 火星古气候由暖转冷的矿物学标记是什么？
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过好奇号探测数据与实验室实验对比分析赤铁矿的晶体学性质。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 较老地层中赤铁矿晶粒较大（5-65 nm），指示温暖湿润环境；较年轻地层中晶粒小于10 nm，共生针铁矿，指示寒冷缺水条件。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用赤铁矿晶粒尺寸作为火星古气候转变的矿物学指标。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 提供火星气候演变的关键矿物证据，有助于理解行星宜居性变迁。

works.title: Upper-mantle earthquakes beneath East Antarctica
works.abstract: Intraplate intermediate-depth earthquakes (IDEs) occur at depths >70 kilometers, which is well below the brittle‒ductile transition in Earth’s crust, and their origins are difficult to reconcile with traditional plate tectonics. We applied a deep-learning technique to regional seismic data and identified intraplate IDEs beneath Antarctica. Their occurrence can be explained by concentrated bending stresses resulting from variable, thermally driven uplift along the edge of East Antarctica, where there is an abrupt change in lithospheric strength. Our results support geodynamic model predictions that intraplate seismicity strongly depends on lithosphere‒asthenosphere interactions. The Antarctic ice sheet can also affect regional stress conditions, highlighting the complex interplay between Earth systems. Advanced seismic detection capabilities, such as those used here, could reveal that intraplate IDEs are more common globally than currently recognized.
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 东南极洲下方上地幔地震

summary_bullets.research_question: 解释南极洲东部下方上地幔的板内中源地震（>70公里）的成因机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用深度学习技术分析区域地震数据，识别深部地震事件。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 板内中源地震由热驱动隆升引起的集中弯曲应力触发，与岩石圈强度突变相关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在南极洲识别出板内中源地震，并提出热-力学耦合新机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示板内地震活动对岩石圈-软流圈相互作用及冰盖应力影响的依赖性，拓展全球地震识别。

works.title: Closing the loop on lithium refining
works.abstract: An aqueous process for lithium hardrock refining is economically and environmentally attractive
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 实现锂精炼的闭环

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何实现硬岩锂精炼的经济、环保水相闭环工艺？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用全水相体系构建锂硬岩精炼的闭路循环流程。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 该闭环水相工艺在成本与环境影响方面均具吸引力，优于传统方法。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提出并验证了经济性与环保性兼具的全水相锂精炼闭环系统。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为锂资源可持续提取提供了兼具经济与环境效益的新范式，对电池产业链绿色转型至关重要。

works.title: Ship surveys capture the pulsing beat of mantle plumes
works.abstract: Seismic imaging and drilling cruises bolster a controversial explanation for ancient mass extinctions
works.label: flagship
works.translated_title: 船舶测量捕捉地幔柱的脉动节奏

summary_bullets.research_question: 地幔柱的周期性脉冲活动是否引发了古代大规模灭绝事件？
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用地震成像和科学钻探航次获取地幔柱活动的直接证据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 船测数据揭示了地幔柱呈脉冲式活动，支持其与灭绝事件的争议性联系。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过船舶调查直接捕捉地幔柱的动态搏动，而非依赖间接记录。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为深部地幔过程驱动地表生物灭绝的假说提供了关键观测约束。

works.title: Constraining the metal precipitation mechanism of the Pulang porphyry copper deposit in the Sanjiang metallogenic belt, SW China: Mercury and sulfur isotope perspectives
works.abstract: Porphyry deposits are globally critical for copper, molybdenum, and gold resources, yet the mechanisms governing ore-forming metal precipitation remain poorly constrained. Here, we integrate mercury and sulfur isotope analyses with whole-rock geochemistry to unravel the genesis of the ∼216 Ma giant Pulang porphyry copper deposit in the Sanjiang metallogenic belt, southwest China. Host quartz monzonite porphyries exhibit arc-adakitic signatures, formed by partial melting of subcontinental lithospheric mantle metasomatized by slab-derived fluids/melts during Paleo-Tethyan subduction. Their near-zero to slightly positive Δ 199 Hg (0.00 to 0.12‰) values point to a primary mantle Hg source with minor subducted sediment inputs. Tumugou Formation country rocks show near-zero to negative Δ 199 Hg (−0.15 to 0.05‰). Ore sulfides have predominantly negative Δ 199 Hg (−0.18 to 0.03‰), intermediate between the porphyries and the Tumugou Formation, indicating mixing of mantle-derived Hg with Hg acquired from the Tumugou Formation through fluid-rock interaction. Ore sulfides exhibit δ 34 S of −3 to 4‰, consistent with a magmatic sulfur origin and minor country rock inputs. We propose a multi-stage genetic model that involves slab-derived mantle metasomatism, generation of hydrous, oxidized adakitic magmas, exsolution of metal-rich hydrothermal fluids, fluid-rock interaction with the shallow Tumugou Formation, and metal sulfide precipitation triggered by decreased fluid Eh and increased pH. This work provides key insights into the metallogenic processes of porphyry copper deposits in convergent margin settings.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 汞和硫同位素视角下中国西南三江成矿带普朗斑岩铜矿床金属沉淀机制的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 斑岩铜矿中金属沉淀的机制仍不清楚，本文探究普朗铜矿成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合汞、硫同位素分析与全岩地球化学进行示踪。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 硫化物汞同位素指示地幔与围岩混合，硫为岩浆来源，流体-岩石作用引发沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次联合汞-硫同位素约束斑岩铜矿流体-岩石相互作用与金属沉淀过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为汇聚边缘斑岩铜矿的成矿过程提供了关键新见解。

works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 岩浆硬石膏的成因及其对斑岩铜矿成矿的指示意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨岩浆硬石膏的成因机制及其对斑岩铜矿成矿作用的指示意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合岩石学、矿物学、地球化学及热力学模拟方法分析岩浆硫化物与硫酸盐。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆硬石膏记录高氧逸度下硫酸盐饱和，是斑岩系统铜运移富集的关键硫源。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示硬石膏从岩浆结晶到流体出溶的完整演化链，建立硫氧化态与成矿潜力的关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为斑岩铜矿中硫的来源和富集机制提供新判据，有助于勘探靶区甄别。

works.title: Late cretaceous large-scale melting of the Neo-Tethyan oceanic slab in southern Tibet
works.abstract: The role of oceanic crustal melting in arc magmatism remains debated due to thermal constraints (> 800 °C) and limited observations. We present evidence from a newly identified 500 km-long adakite belt in the Neo-Tethyan subduction zone, southern Tibet, showing that adakites originated from melting of Neo-Tethyan oceanic crust, with minor sediment contributions, followed by mantle interaction and fractional crystallization. An E -W trending, high-temperature (> 800 °C), hydrous (H₂O > 3 wt%) magmatic zone, N-S geochemical-petrological zonation, and magma migration toward the suture, coeval with Late Cretaceous magmatic flare-up, are attributed to enhanced thermal gradients and slab dehydration during Neo-Tethyan rollback. Subduction decarbonation modulated magma composition via water activity, while differential melting of upper/lower oceanic crust influenced arc geochemistry and mantle heterogeneity. These findings bridge slab-scale dynamics with melt generation, offering a unified framework for understanding arc magma composition, continental evolution, and mantle heterogeneity.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 西藏南部晚白垩世新特提斯洋壳的大规模熔融

summary_bullets.research_question: 大洋地壳熔融在弧岩浆作用中的作用因热限制和观测不足而存争议，本文解决此问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过藏南新发现的500公里埃达克岩带进行地球化学和岩石学研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 埃达克岩源自新特提斯洋壳熔融，伴有板片回卷、高温含水岩浆带和弧岩浆分带。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示板片回卷增强热梯度致洋壳大规模熔融，统一解释弧岩浆成分与地幔不均一。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为弧岩浆成因、大陆演化和地幔不均一性提供统一框架，对俯冲带研究有价值。

works.title: Global Variation of Mid-Ocean Ridge Basalt Chemistry: Conditions and Composition of the Source Mantle and Physical Properties of the Ridges
works.abstract: Abstract We investigate relationships between the chemistry of global Mid-Ocean Ridge Basalts (MORBs), the conditions and composition of their source mantle, and the physical properties of the ridges. To accomplish this, major and trace element compositions of primary MORB are estimated by a back-calculation code PRIMACALC3 assisted by a thermodynamically constrained forward fractional crystallisation model COMAGMAT 3.72 with an additional PRIMELT3-P model to ensure mantle equilibrium of the primary melts. We then apply Ocean Basalt Simulator version 1 (OBS1), a thermodynamically constrained forward calculation code for adiabatic melting of a pyroxenite-bearing mantle peridotite, to the trace element compositions of our primary MORBs. Melting conditions and compositions of the MORB source mantle, such as pressure (P), degree of partial melting (F), mantle potential temperature (Tp), fractions of pyroxenite (fPY) and ambient depleted mantle (fDM), and the degree of depletion of the final residual mantle (FPD) are estimated by the two models. The results show that (a) MORBs are derived from mantle with Tp = 1250 − 1520 °C at F = 3 − 31 %, and both are high beneath shallow ridges; (b) pyroxenites in the source mantle peridotite are both recycled MORBs and ocean island basalts (OIBs) in origin and their fractions are estimated to be 0 − 6 % with a high fraction in deep and cold ridges; (c) the fraction of OIB-type pyroxenite is highest at shallow and hot ridges; (d) the degree of depletion of the residual peridotite is highest at shallow and hot ridges, and (e) the isotopic compositions of the OIB-type pyroxenites have both EM1 and HIMU signatures, while that of the MORB-type pyroxenites and the ambient mantle peridotites have depleted compositions. The high-Tp mantle containing recycled OIB-type pyroxenite has a deep plume origin. It forms ridges shallower than 2500 m. b. s. l. due to thermal and chemical buoyancy relative to the ambient upper mantle. In contrast, deeper ridges have a narrower and lower Tp range, and a lesser but variable amount of peridotite depletion. The depth of mid-ocean ridges is controlled by both Tp and relative mantle fertility.
